documents.text:
Name: Beat Saber
Description:
Beat Saber is an immersive rhythm experience you have never seen before! Enjoy tons of handcrafted levels and swing your way through the pulsing music beats, surrounded by a futuristic world. Use your sabers to slash the beats as they come flying at you – every beat indicates which saber you need to use and the direction you need to match. With Beat Saber you become a dancing superhero! Features Feel the Rhythm: Immerse yourself in the smoothest combination of music beats and visual effects in Beat Saber’s truly unique gameplay. Handcrafted Levels & Music: Unlike other rhythm games with generated content, music and levels in Beat Saber are drawn precisely by hand to enhance the music experience. Compete in Multiplayer: Challenge your friends or random opponents around the world. Challenging Campaign: Get better every day while completing objectives and challenges in the Campaign. Rise Up the Global Leaderboards: Compete against other Beat Saberists around the world in various difficulties. Easy to Learn, Fun to Master: Everyone can understand the basic game mechanics. It's easy for anyone to pick up and play. Great Exercise: Exercise while dancing and slashing the beats, Beat Saber gets you moving.

Name: Crypt of the NecroDancer
Description:
DELIVER BEATDOWNS TO THE BEAT! Crypt of the NecroDancer is an award winning hardcore roguelike rhythm game. Move on the beat to navigate an ever changing dungeon while battling dancing skeletons, zombies, dragons, and more. Groove to the epic Danny Baranowsky soundtrack, or select songs from your own MP3 collection! FEATURES: Descend into the crypt as 15 playable characters with unique play styles and challenges! Jam out to over 40 original songs in Danny Baranowsky’s award winning soundtrack, or set your own beats with songs from your own MP3 collection! An ensemble of major and minor puns at every half-step! Play with keyboard, controller, or even a USB dance pad! Official Danganronpa character reskins and mod support! BONUS: Includes 6 playable remixes of the entire soundtrack. Remixes by FamilyJules, A_Rival, Chipzel, OCRemix, Girlfriend Records, and Virt! GOLD AND LOOT AWAIT Gather diamonds to unlock permanent upgrades and better equipment to traverse deeper into the NecroDancer’s lair. The deeper you go, the more treacherous enemies you’ll face. RACE TO THE TOP Reach great heights as you disco down through the depths of the crypt. Whether you aim to get the highest scores or complete runs in the fastest times, you can compete against a robust community of players in a range of permanent and daily challenges across all characters. MERCH! Gear up with official Crypt of the NecroDancer items from our merch store !

Name: AudioSurf
Description:
Ride your music. Audiosurf is a music-adapting puzzle racer where you use your own music to create your own experience. The shape, the speed, and the mood of each ride is determined by the song you choose. You earn points for clustering together blocks of the same color on the highway, and compete with others on the internet for the high score on your favorite songs. Audiosurf on Steam includes The Orange Box soundtrack, integrated with the game to enable 'Still Alive' surfing and more. In addition, Audiosurf is one of the first titles to leverage Steamworks, offering full support for the Steam Achievements that appear on Steam Community profile pages. Play with any music from your own collection--the game supports MP3s, iTunes M4As, WMAs, CDs and OGGs Valve's The Orange Box Original Soundtrack is included. Online scoreboards for each song you play. Choose your strategy from 14 available characters. Track your progress as Steam Achievements.

Name: APE OUT
Description:
APE OUT is a wildly intense and colorfully stylized smash ‘em up about primal escape, rhythmic violence, and frenetic jazz. Build up nearly unstoppable momentum and use your captors as both weapons and shields to crush everyone on your procedurally generated path to freedom. Stylish Escape: Embrace bold colors and a dazzling perspective as you rush through tight corridors, open areas, and twisting labyrinths on a mad dash for freedom. Overcome all manner of human opposition, nefarious traps, and breakable obstacles to find each exit and escape captivity. Grab and Smash: Unleash your primal instincts and incredible strength to overpower your captors. Hold them steady to create a human shield, smash their feeble bodies into walls, or throw one into another in a violent explosion of humanity. Dynamic Soundtrack: Find your rhythm in the chaos as a dynamic soundtrack of drums, cymbals, and decapitations drive the action to the edge of mayhem.

Name: Melatonin
Description:
Melatonin is a rhythm game about dreams and reality merging together. It uses animations and sound cues to keep you on beat without any intimidating overlays or interfaces. Harmonize through a variety of dreamy levels containing surprising challenges, hand-drawn art, and vibrant music. Melatonin explores the relationship between the dreams we have when we’re asleep and the experiences we go through when we’re awake, through unique rhythm game levels. Hand-drawn in a colorful and detailed visual style, with music produced to flow hand-in-hand with the gameplay and visuals, you will piece together elements about the main character’s life as you dive deeper and deeper into their dreams at night. Features Discover over 20 dreamy levels spread across 5 chapters, with every level introducing a new song. Unlock a Hard Mode that will truly test your rhythm. Make the rhythm game level of your dreams with an easy to use Level Editor. Use Practice Mode to guide you through each level. Try out plenty of assist features if you’re feeling lost. Also fully compatible with the Steam Deck and incudes a color mode calibrated for the Steam Deck's screen.

**Mutazione: A Supernatural Soap Opera Adventure**

Delve into the captivating world of *Mutazione*, a unique adventure game that masterfully intertwines everyday small-town dramas with supernatural intrigue. This narrative-driven experience emphasizes personal relationships and character development, making them as crucial to the story as any high-stakes adventure. The game invites players to explore a rich tapestry of human and non-human connections within a distinctive setting, according to game developers.

The game centers on Kai, a fifteen-year-old who arrives in the peculiar, secluded community of Mutazione to tend to her ailing grandfather, Nonno. As Kai navigates this unfamiliar environment, players engage in various activities. These include fostering friendships, cultivating musical gardens where plants respond to sound, participating in local gatherings like BBQs and band nights, embarking on boat excursions, and undertaking a spiritual journey to shield Mutazione from a mysterious darkness, as detailed in game descriptions.

The origins of Mutazione stem from a cataclysmic event over a century ago. A meteor, nicknamed the "Moon Dragon," impacted a tropical resort. Survivors underwent strange mutations due to the altered environment. Following rescue mission withdrawal, those who remained established the isolated community, adapting to their transformed home. This history, according to community lore, has shaped their unique resilience. Research into isolated communities suggests that shared historical trauma can foster strong social bonds.

In the present, Kai's stay reveals Mutazione harbors more secrets. Nonno has hidden motives for Kai's presence, and beneath the community's facade, secrets and betrayals unravel. A disquieting, bird-like figure appearing in Kai's dreams hints at deeper, possibly supernatural, forces. While the inhabitants have shown resilience after the meteor strike, the question remains: can they navigate their small-town dramas and the encroaching darkness? Studies on narrative games suggest that blending personal stakes with external threats often leads to compelling player engagement. The game's design, it appears, leverages these principles effectively.

Soundodger+ is a unique game that merges the intense action of bullet hell shooters with the engaging rhythm of music games. Developed by Studio Bean, this updated version of the original Adult Swim Games title introduces new music, controller support, and a robust level editor.

**Key Features:**

*   **Rhythm-Based Dodging:** Players must dodge incoming projectiles in sync with the music.
*   **Extensive Music Library:** The game features 35 tracks, with over half being new additions for the Steam edition.
*   **Featured Artists:** The soundtrack includes contributions from renowned game musicians such as Disasterpeace (FEZ) and Danny Baranowsky (The Binding of Isaac).
*   **Level Editor:** A comprehensive level editor allows players to create and share their own custom stages.
*   **Music Integration:** Stages can be automatically generated from a player's personal music collection.
*   **Game Modes:** Players can utilize slow-motion for challenging sequences or opt for a risk-free experience in Zen mode.

**Recent Updates:**

*   **March 6, 2017:** This update added 19 new community-choreographed tracks via free DLC, introduced a new 'hug' bullet type, and implemented folder support for User Levels. Numerous bug fixes and editor enhancements were also included.
*   **October 13, 2014:** Six new music tracks were added, and Steam Trading Cards support was introduced.
*   **March 7, 2014:** Six new music tracks were added, along with Smooth Listening Mode for score-based play without audio penalties. Expanded window size options were also implemented.

**Full Track List:**

*   Anoctave - Frog of Lore
*   Austin Wintory - Lost Age
*   Bean - Senioritis
*   Bean - Sixteen & Dangerous
*   Bean - Solvalou
*   Bill Kiley - Foxtail Socks
*   Bill Kiley - Glowing Cubes
*   Bill Kiley - Rake Leaves Into Piles
*   Bill Kiley - Ye Olde Future
*   Chelsea Howe - A Walk In The Park
*   D.WIGHT - Outside Wars
*   D.WIGHT - Waves From Nothing
*   Danny Baranowsky - Kirkhope
*   Delasaurus - Fields & Reaches
*   Disasterpeace - Daisy Wheel
*   Ghost Kollective - Dummy (Radio Edit)
*   Lifeformed - Chloroplast Skin
*   Lifeformed - Forgotten Tea
*   Louis Gorenfeld - MIDI Murder Box
*   Mike Forst - I Do, What I Want
*   Mike Forst - Katapult
*   North Base - Overdose
*   Sonic - Distant Stars

**New Tracks Added:**

*   **March 7, 2014:** Bean - Shibuya, Ben Prunty - Crispy Static, Chipzel - Tokyo Skies, Doseone - Samurai Gunn (Title), Eirik Suhrke - Menu (Super Crate Box), Jukio Kallio - Nuclear Throne (Theme)
*   **October 13, 2014:** A_Rival - Venus, Constrobuz - HP Restored, Popskyy - Samurai, Sferro & Tommy - Rapture (Rex Ronan Remix), Tommy - Nocturnal Wanderings, trash80 - missing_you
*   **March 6, 2017:** ambinate - Bloom, Bean - Stroke of Misfortune, CHRISTINE - Gonna Fear Now, Circuit Bent - Tonic, Dan Salvato - Spellslave, Disasterpeace - Forgotten, Ghost Kollective (ft Snowflake) - Waking Me Softly, grogle - After All ft. Megurine Luka, Hinkik - Time Leaper, Kevin MacLeod - Exit the Premises, Lifeformed - 9-bit Expedition, Lifeformed - A Safe Place to Sleep, lo tag blanco - slumlord, MakeAcid - Voltage, Sawtooth - Carcinogens, Tabrill, Domonic - Cold Pill, The Kyoto Connection - Hachiko (The Faithful Dog), Wolfgun - Galaxian (Starfighter), Xtrullor - Zelda II: Palace Theme (Xtrullor remix)

Name: Audiosurf 2
Description:
By blending gameplay with music visualization, Audiosurf puts you inside your music in a way nothing else can. Use your own music to create your own experience. The shape, the speed, and the mood of each ride is determined by the song you choose. What are the biggest improvements from Audiosurf 1? Ever-expanding new ways to play with over 500 and counting player-created mods and skins on Workshop.. Additional layers of strategy tied to the song’s biggest moments. In-game leaderboards let you compare your score moment to moment against your friends and rivals even when they’re not online. Enhanced graphics quality. Ability to search for music. Available on Mac and Linux! What’s new about Mono mode in Audiosurf 2? In Audiosurf 2 your timing in mono mode is more important than ever. You’ve got to strategize to get your grid full at the most intense moments of songs to get the most points. Look ahead in the distance for corkscrew loops with powerups to know when these moments will occur. What do I get in the demo? The demo allows players to play any song they want, for their first 3 songs. After that, they can play the Song of the Day, everyday, as many times as they want. Is there a mode that focuses on dodging blocks? Yes, there's a new Ninja mode. It has a big bonus for hitting no spikes and creates intense spike fields to weave through. It’s faster than regular Mono and the second-to-second challenge of avoiding spikes is harder. For even more challenge there’s ninja turbo. It’s too fast for you. What’s new about the Puzzle modes in Audiosurf 2: Just as with Mono mode, your timing on Puzzle modes is now more important than ever. Push, Shuffle, Erase, or Scoop blocks at the just the right moments to take full advantage of multiplier powerups that come at the most intense moments of songs. Can players make their own mods and skins to share on Steam Workshop? Yes! There’s detailed documentation on making Audiosurf 2 skins available here: Also, every mode and skin in the games comes with the script source code and assets. Players can use any of the official modes/skins as a starting place.

Name: Turba
Description:
Turba provides a gameplay experience unlike any you have encountered before. Load in music from your PC and combo blocks to your favorite tunes in this unique new twist on the “match-3” style game! The blocks on the game board generate and move to the beat of the song you choose. Clear blocks in time with the beat and make expert combos to maximize your score while you compete in online leaderboards for any and every song you play. Key features: Three modes of play Seven Special Powers to change up how you play Online leaderboards for each song you play Supported file types: Mp3, Music CDs, Flac, Ogg, Wma, Ape, Mpc Last.fm Scrobbling support In-depth stat tracking and unlock system 20 Steam achievements, 50+ Steam stats, Steam leaderboards

Name: Symphony
Description:
Your music is under attack, you must liberate it! A mysterious entity is absorbing and corrupting your music before your very eyes. You must battle through your own song collection, discover items, customize your ship and fight boss enemies to liberate the Symphony of Souls and reclaim your music! Symphony is one of the most music-driven games ever made. In this vertical shooter, re-experience each of your songs as it becomes a unique battlefield driven by intensity and tempo. Your music collection is now an item collection! Each of your songs contains an item you can discover, equip and upgrade. Fully customize your ship to reach score targets, upgrade items and unlock new difficulty levels. Showcase your skill. Symphony's innovative per-song leaderboard rewards you more, when you dominate with less powerful weapons. Find the loadout that suits your style and show what you can do! Key features Battle a mysterious entity that absorbs and corrupts your music as it plays Cutting-edge music analysis adapts the game to any song you like! Innovative per-song leaderboard system rewards you based on your weapons and the difficulty level 5 unique sets of boss enemies to conquer 6 difficulty levels Discover, collect and equip weapons hidden inside your own music collection 30 achievements/medals to unlock Supported file types: Windows & Mac: MP3, OGG, WAV, FLAC, WMA (Windows only), AIFF, WV. Linux: MP3, OGG, WAV, FLAC, AIFF M4A & AAC supported via a DLC download for a small fee to cover patented decoder licensing costs (M4A & AAC also require the free QuickTime player) Full amBX™ support (cool lighting!) - Windows only

Name: Sid Meier's Civilization® IV
Description:
With over 6 million units sold and unprecedented critical acclaim from fans and press around the world, Sid Meier's Civilization is recognized as one of the greatest PC game franchises of all-time. Now, Sid Meier and Firaxis Games will take this incredibly fun and addictive game to new heights by adding new ways to play and win, new tools to manage and expand your civilization, all-new easy to use mod capabilities and intense multiplayer modes and options*. Civilization IV will come to life like never before in a beautifully detailed, living 3D world that will elevate the gameplay experience to a whole new level. Civilization IV has already been heralded as one of the top ten games of 2005, and a must-have for gamers around the globe! *Mac version's Online Multiplayer is no longer supported.

Name: Sid Meier's Civilization® IV
Description:
With over 6 million units sold and unprecedented critical acclaim from fans and press around the world, Sid Meier's Civilization is recognized as one of the greatest PC game franchises of all-time. Now, Sid Meier and Firaxis Games will take this incredibly fun and addictive game to new heights by adding new ways to play and win, new tools to manage and expand your civilization, all-new easy to use mod capabilities and intense multiplayer modes and options*. Civilization IV will come to life like never before in a beautifully detailed, living 3D world that will elevate the gameplay experience to a whole new level. Civilization IV has already been heralded as one of the top ten games of 2005, and a must-have for gamers around the globe! *Mac version's Online Multiplayer is no longer supported.

Name: Rome: Total War™ - Collection
Description:
Once the Roman Empire is under your command, don't lay down your sword just yet - the Barbarians are coming. With two award-winning titles from the esteemed Total War series, you'll have twice as many obstacles and opportunities to control and conquer the greatest empire ever known to man. The Collection Edition includes: Rome: Total War Guide one of three noble Roman families on a century spanning quest to seize control of the Roman Empire. Rome: Total War - Barbarian Invasion (official expansion pack to Rome: Total War) Witness the decline of Rome as Barbarian hordes attack, forcing a bitter internal struggle between rival factions. Voted 2004 Best Strategy game by IGN, GameSpy and GameSpot. Fight alongside or against history's greatest leaders such as Julius Caesar, Spartacus, and Hannibal to expand or destroy the Roman Empire. Lay siege against the Romans as Attila the Hun, fearful Saxons, or other savage factions using signature weapons and abilities. Command warrior-tested legions in cinematic epic battles with thousands of soldiers on-screen at once. A century-spanning campaign charges players with strategically managing the economic, civil, religious and military arms of their empire.

## Galactic Civilizations II: Ultimate Edition - A Comprehensive Overview

The *Galactic Civilizations II: Ultimate Edition* provides a complete package for fans of the acclaimed space strategy series. It includes the base game, *Galactic Civilizations II: Dread Lords*, the expansion *Dark Avatar*, and the latest addition, *Twilight of the Arnor*, offering a full 4X experience.

In *Galactic Civilizations II: Dread Lords*, players manage a growing space empire. Success requires balancing economy, technology, diplomacy, culture, and military strength. You can form alliances, fight wars, and aim for control of the galaxy. The game features a single-player mode with randomly generated maps and a campaign detailing the fight against the Dread Lords.

The *Dark Avatar* expansion adds new opponents, units, and a new campaign, as noted by Stardock. Key additions include mining asteroids for resources, colonizing planets that need special tech, and using espionage. New diplomatic options and a better AI also enhance the strategy.

*Twilight of the Arnor*, set in 2227, features a galaxy-wide war caused by the Dread Lords. However, remaining groups, led by humans, have a plan to fight back. This expansion introduces new threats like Terror Stars, unique tech trees for each civilization, and creative tools for making maps, scenarios, and campaigns. New ship types and planetary upgrades are also included.

The *Ultimate Edition* uses a 3D engine to show planets, stars, and ship battles. Players can build custom 3D ships and choose from many civilizations or create their own. Victory can be won through war, culture, diplomacy, technology, or ascension. The game offers varied galaxy sizes, a challenging AI, and online play. Its moddable design allows for customization, and advanced diplomacy options support trade and alliances.

Name: Crusader Kings III
Description:
Your legacy awaits. Choose your noble house and lead your dynasty to greatness in a Middle Ages epic that spans generations. War is but one of many tools to establish your reign, as real strategy requires expert diplomatic skill, mastery of your realm, and true cunning . Crusader Kings III continues the popular series made by Paradox Development Studio, featuring the widely acclaimed marriage of immersive grand strategy and deep, dramatic medieval roleplaying. Take command of your house and expand your dynasty through a meticulously researched Middle Ages. Begin in 867 or 1066 and claim lands, titles, and vassals to secure a realm worthy of your royal blood. Your death is only a footnote as your lineage continues with new playable heirs, either planned… or not. Discover a sprawling simulated world teeming with peasants and knights, courtiers, spies, knaves and jesters, and secret love affairs. An extensive cast of historical characters can be romanced, betrayed, executed, or subtly influenced. Explore a vast medieval map stretching from the snowswept Nordic lands to the Horn of Africa, and the British Isles in the west to the exotic riches of Burma in the east. Claim, conquer, and rule thousands of unique counties, duchies, kingdoms, and empires. Each character is larger than life, with traits and lifestyle choices determining their actions and schemes. Prompt fear and dread as you rule with an iron fist, or inspire your subjects with magnanimous deeds. Genetics can be passed along to your children, be it the gift of genius or crippling stupidity. Groom your heir with the appropriate guardians or educate them yourself. If found wanting, marry them off or despatch them through other means. Customize your ruler and noble house, from appearance to attributes, and create a monarch worthy of all their inherited virtues and vices. Govern an ever-evolving realm and grant titles to whom you see fit - or usurp your liege to claim their crown as your own. Be wary of rivals, from restless serfs to revengeful concubines. The shadows stir frequently, and danger lurks around every darkened corner. Recruit agents and other unsavory elements to undermine, blackmail, or murder those who stand in your path. Or be inspired by the bard and ballad, and seduce your way to power and influence. Blood will flow. Assemble men-at-arms units and powerful knights. Manage your battlefield tactics and armies. Raid and plunder nearby lands or hire mercenaries and Holy Orders for your major conflicts. Be a pious king to invite the religious powers to your side, or design your own faith as you battle between everlasting fame or eternal damnation. Bring novel innovations to your culture and construct mighty castles and bastions to increase the wealth, prestige, and security of your realm. The paths to follow are limitless: experience thousands of dynamic events and life-altering decisions tailored to each and every conceivable situation and character. There are countless ways of securing and keeping your place in the history books.

Sid Meier's Civilization V is a highly acclaimed turn-based strategy game. It offers players an epic journey of empire building across millennia. According to gaming publications, players guide their civilization from nomadic beginnings to the advanced space age. Numerous strategic paths exist for achieving global dominance. These include engaging in warfare, navigating diplomacy, pioneering technology, and confronting historical leaders. The ultimate aim is to forge the world's most formidable empire.

The game is widely praised for its inviting presentation and intuitive interface. This makes it remarkably accessible for new players. Veterans of the Civilization franchise will discover ample depth and intricate control. These are hallmarks of the series. Game reviews indicate that Civilization V's world is rendered with ultra-realistic graphics. These showcase meticulously detailed landscapes ripe for exploration and conquest.

Civilization V also boasts robust community and multiplayer features. This is highlighted by its active player base. It allows for both global and local competition. Extensive modding capabilities offer unprecedented customization. An in-game community hub enables players to easily discover and install mods. According to many players and industry analysts, this accessibility is a key factor in the game's enduring popularity and sustained engagement.

A significant innovation, as noted in game design analyses, is the new hex-based grid. This fundamentally alters combat and city-building strategies. City-States have been introduced as a new diplomatic resource. This adds another crucial layer to strategic interactions and alliances. The improved diplomacy system features fully interactive leaders. This makes negotiations more dynamic and unpredictable, a point frequently made by players. The game offers wide system compatibility, running on various operating systems. Specifically, the Mac and Linux + SteamOS versions are available in English, French, Italian, German, and Spanish. The Modding SDK is a free download for those interested in deeper game modification. This feature has fostered a vibrant modding community.

**Sid Meier's Civilization® V: Forge Your Legacy**

Begin an epic journey as the leader of your own civilization in Sid Meier's Civilization® V. This acclaimed turn-based strategy game lets you guide humanity from its earliest days to the space age. According to IGN, the game provides a full experience where you can wage war, engage in diplomacy, develop new technologies, and meet historical figures. The main aim is to build the most powerful empire ever seen.

PC Gamer highlights the game's "Inviting Presentation." It has an easy-to-use interface that welcomes new players, letting them start playing quickly. Experienced players will find the series' usual depth, detail, and control options. The "Believable World" features very realistic graphics showing detailed landscapes ready for exploration, conquest, and growth.

Civilization V offers a lively "Community & Multiplayer" experience. Players can compete with others worldwide or in local matches. The game also supports extensive modding. An integrated community hub allows direct mod installation without leaving the game, a feature praised by many modding groups. "Wide System Compatibility" means Civilization V runs on many devices, from powerful desktops to laptops.

Introducing "All New Features," Civilization V changes gameplay with a new hex grid, creating new combat and city-building tactics. City-States are a key new element in diplomacy, adding more strategic depth. An improved diplomacy system features interactive leaders for better negotiations and alliances. GameSpot noted in a review that these additions greatly enhance strategic options.

*The Modding SDK is a free download. Note that Mac and Linux + SteamOS versions of Sid Meier's Civilization V are only in English, French, Italian, German, and Spanish.

**Total War: EMPIRE – Definitive Edition** offers an expansive and strategic experience, transporting players to the dynamic Age of Enlightenment. This comprehensive edition integrates all previously released downloadable content and feature updates, promising a complete and immersive journey.

A key addition is the **Warpath Campaign**, which significantly expands the game's scope with a detailed North American map. This campaign introduces five new playable Native American factions: the Iroquois, Huron, Plains, Pueblo, and Cherokee. These factions engage in conflict over their ancestral territories, as detailed by the game's creators. Furthermore, the **Elite Unit Packs** are integrated, bringing over 50 new elite units to the game. These specialized troops are distributed across various packs, including **Elite Units of the East** and **Elite Units of the West**, providing players with enhanced military options.

The game is set in the 18th century, a period marked by profound political shifts and groundbreaking military advancements. EMPIRE features revolutionary 3D naval battles, allowing players to command fleets on turbulent seas. These naval engagements incorporate dynamic weather effects and thrilling troop boarding actions. Land battles are equally sophisticated, showcasing the era's cannon and musket warfare alongside new tactical formations. The Campaign Map itself is vast, encompassing India, Europe, and the United States. New systems for Trade, Diplomacy, and Espionage have been introduced to these regions, according to the game's developers.

The **Warpath Campaign** alone contributes 18 new tribal technologies, forming a distinct technology tree. It also introduces two new agent types: the Shaman and the Scout. The **Elite Units of the East** pack bolsters the Maratha and Ottoman factions with 12 new elite units, such as the Ottoman Haydut Irregulars and Maratha Rajput Zamindars. The **Elite Units of the West** pack adds 14 unique units for major Western factions, including the Austrian Hungarian Grenadiers and the French Swiss Guards. For the American Revolution, **Elite Units of America** provides 15 units for American, British, and French factions, featuring notable units like the United States' 1st Delaware and British Tarleton’s Light Dragoons. Lastly, the **Special Forces Units & Bonus Content** pack includes influential military forces of the 18th century, such as HMS Victory and Rogers' Rangers, as highlighted in game descriptions.

Name: Sid Meier's Civilization® III Complete
Description:
Sid Meier's Civilization III: Complete, the latest offering in the Sid Meier's Civilization III franchise, provides gaming fans with Sid Meier's Civilization III, the highly-addictive journey of discovery, combined with the updated and enhanced multiplayer expansion pack Sid Meier's Civilization III: Play the World*, as well as all of the great new civilizations, scenarios, and features from Sid Meier's Civilization III: Conquests! Sid Meier's Civilization III: Complete provides more ways to explore, more strategies to employ, more modes of play, and more ways to win, all in one box! *Online Multiplayer to be suspended as of May 31st 2014, LAN mode still supported

## Conquer Feudal Japan: Your Guide to Total War: SHOGUN 2

Total War: SHOGUN 2 transports players to 16th-century Japan, a time of intense conflict and political intrigue. As a Daimyo, your goal is to unite the nation and become Shogun. This requires a blend of military strength, economic growth, and smart diplomacy.

The game builds on the Total War series' strengths, offering a deep strategic experience. Players engage in exciting real-time land and sea battles with impressive visuals and large-scale combat. The turn-based campaign map is where you plan your moves, manage resources, and direct your conquest. The game's AI is said to be inspired by Sun Tzu's "The Art of War," providing a challenging yet accessible experience, according to the developers.

Victory in SHOGUN 2 relies on three key areas. First, expanding your territory is vital. This means leading samurai armies and naval fleets across Japan, winning battles to grow your lands and defeat enemies. Second, developing your provinces is essential. This involves building up your regions by gaining wealth, recruiting strong armies, and increasing your influence through economic, political, and military means. Third, skillful command is crucial. This includes using tactics like fire and siege warfare, and deploying spies and assassins to succeed on the battlefield and in politics, as noted in player guides.

SHOGUN 2 also features engaging multiplayer modes and new gameplay elements. The online campaign allows for co-op play or competitive battles against up to eight players. Generals and agents gain experience and unlock new skills, adding RPG elements. Castle sieges are now multi-stage challenges requiring careful planning. Powerful Hero units with unique abilities can boost troops and change battle outcomes. A new, dynamic 3D campaign map offers a fresh strategic view, a feature praised by critics.

Name: The Spike
Description:
The Spike is a 2D volleyball game which is light, but dynamic. Dominate your opponents with speedy and powerful spikes, to take control of the court! Features Speedy 3v3 volleyball matches Story mode that contains stories of the student athletes who aim for the top Local multiplayer mode to compete with your friends Steam Achievements!

Name: Spike Volleyball
Description:
50 national teams, men's and women's, go head to head in a realistic indoor volleyball simulation. Speed, reflexes, teamwork: all the elements needed for success are there for a spectacular sports experience. Manage your own team and take it to the highest level. Enter multiple international tournaments, change your tactics to catch your opponent off guard and become world champions! Spikes, blocks, floaters… Master the skills of volleyball and experience all the thrills of one of the most complex team sports played today, realistically reproduced with the powerful Unreal Engine 4.

Name: Lactea Volleyball
Description:
Lactea Volleyball is a game made to be simple and fun to play, choose or create your team and aim well to beat your opponents. Game Modes Play alone or with a friend locally in mode 'Friendly' or... Face five full championships for years in mode 'Seasons'. 12 Teams Choose between twelve teams with unique players, and find yours weaknesses and strengths to define your strategy. Team's Creator Make twelve customizable teams. Others 12 courts with differents environments. 3 difficulty levels. 32 achievments to unlock.

Name: King of Volleyball
Description:
Eunice Park and Suzy Karlson are probably the best college beach volleyball team in all of the continental USA and have been touted to win the coveted ABVA (American Beach Volleyball Association) Gold Cup at the finals being held in Honolulu next month. Thing is, something has gotten to the duo and their practise sessions have been less than smooth. To alleviate this problem their manager, Natalia, seeks the help of a legendary sports guru that lives in a remote island in the Caribbean. The three set off for this Tropical Paradise to see if they can seek help from this sports guru to help Eunice and Suzy get their groove back so they can confidently fly to Hawaii to win the ABVA Gold Cup. Features Soothing Reggae and Latin Jazz Background music Many CGs Multiple Endings

Name: Actual Volleyball
Description:
Just like everyone else in the world, you probably love volleyball. That's so cool! Actual Volleyball, the game someone maybe once talked about, is the most realistic volleyball simulation ever made. Features: 1v1 local volleyball action (play against a friend). 2v2 local volleyball action (play in teams). Single player practice mode (play against yourself). And that's it! ———————————————————————— What People are Saying: 'Borderline criminal user experience design.' - Kyle 'This could be really fun if everything about it was different.' - Sanantha ———————————————————————— Read Before Buying: PLEASE NOTE - Actual Volleyball can technically be played with a keyboard, but it's definitely not the best way to experience the game. Using a controller is highly recommended.

Name: Volleyball Fever
Description:
Volleyball Fever is a VR sports game set on a tropical island. Stick your feet in the warm sand and join us on the beach! 🏐🌊🌴😃 Great physics Online or solo Bomb mode Tropical island

Name: Highline Volleyball VR
Description:
Highline Volleyball VR is a virtual reality sport game. Virtual reality allows it to be ultra-immersive and bring interactions that will allow you to also improve your volleyball skills. We designed Highline Volleyball so that it can be played by beginners or pros and in any kind of VR configurations (seated, standing, room scale). Play volleyball and discover 4 totally different environments and ambiences like for example the Sunny Beach Resort, or the Olympic Stadium. Choose your favorite time of day for playing (Morning, Afternoon, Sunset, Night) Explore and interact with the environments List of Features available in Early access at launch: Tutorial 2 VS 2 match 3 environments and ambiences : Sunny Beach, Six Coconut Beach, Paris Stadium Different time of day settings (Morning, Afternoon, Sunset, Night) Realistic and precise scales (Net height, ball size etc....)

Name: Volleyball Unbound - Pro Beach Volleyball
Description:
Volleyball Unbound is a realistic beach volleyball video game with an extensive career mode and local multiplayer for up to 16 people in hot seat mode and 4 people at a time. Features Extensive career mode for males and females Party mode(shared screen) for up to 16 people (4 people playing at a time) Very realistic ball physics and player abilities Very large range of locations and tournaments Character editor - recreate the looks and abilities of any real world player! Controls are simple to learn but hard to master Emotion system: audience and player reactions reflect the complete course of the game Smart AI with humanlike behaviour Plug & Play support for most controllers. Gameplay To defeat your opponents you have the full array of shots and spikes a real volleyball player would have in the same situation. You will need fast reflexes as well as a cool head to keep the overview in any situation. The ball physics are very accurate - even the spin of the ball is taken into account to calculate the flying trajectories. To hit the ball precisely you need perfect timing just like in the real world - so playing the game also feels a lot like playing in reality. There are two control modes: either control just one player at all times or - more difficult but also more intense - control both players alternately whenever they play the ball. Additionally you can always play cooperatively with a friend. AI The AI has several difficulty settings but always behaves very similar to a real human. On the one hand it analyzes your style of play and  guesses your next action, on the other hand it sometimes makes unforced errors. Just don't think you can successfully do the same shot in the same situation over and over again. Emotion System The audience and player reactions reflect the complete course of the game - not just the last rally. There will be no inappropriate cheers just because one team, that is already way behind and will lose the match anyways, scores. Again, even not so spectacular points might lead to some heavy cheers if one team is catching up! This awareness of situations also affects the gameplay: e.g. AI controlled players are more prone to make unforced errors in a close match after they were intimidated by a block. Character Editor In the character editor you can create any type of player you can imagine, from a virtual clone of yourself to a world champion(if this is not the same in your case). The players not only look like their real world counterparts, they also have the same abilities(e.g. jumping heights, running speed, stamina, technique, ...). You could for example create a fully trained version of yourself (and your partner) and look what would be possible. While modifying a character you can always see his/her physical facts and some athletic results (height, weight, attack reach, sprint and middle distance). This makes it very easy to accurately recreate real world players. Extensive Career Mode for both sexes In career mode hundreds of teams competing at dozens of tournaments all around the planet are simulated. You start out as local underdog in one of 30 nations. After gaining enough points at national tournaments you are qualified to take part in continental tournaments and eventually you become eligible for international tournaments. After each tournament you can train your team to eradicate your most annoying weaknesses. Before a match starts you can view the abilities of your opposing team. This way you can take advantage of their weaknesses or hinder them to utilize their strengths. Plug & Play Joystick Support This game can be played with keyboard and most joysticks. Just plug your controller to your computer while the game is running and press a button - no complicated setup process necessary! Party Mode Play custom tournaments(single elimination, double elimination, king of the beach, round robin) with up to 16 teams. Each team can either be controlled by two humans, one human, or the AI. Theoretically you could setup a tournament for 32 human players, where always 4 people play at a time!

Name: Volleyballed
Description:
Volleyballed is a fun filled arcade style 6 on 6 volleyball game. Bump, set, and spike your want to victory against AI opponents or friends locally or through Steam Remote Play Together. If you like fast paced, action packed volleyball without an adherence to the laws of physics and the occasional flaming ball, Volleyballed is for you. Key Features 6 on 6 indoor arcade style volleyball so good you can hang your hat on it Simple but nuanced controls that allow you to easily bump, set, and spike but also allow more advanced moves (spikes, cuts, jump serves, etc) 1 player vs AI OR 2 player local / Remote Play Together 6 team colors to choose from 10,000+ random team names assigned in hilarious fashion Random hairstyles that will leaving you breathless Achievements for you to... uh, achieve Gameplay Standard 6 on 6 volleyball rules (or pretty close to that) Player can switch between the 6 players on their team to ensure they're always controlling the most important player on the court First to 25 wins momentous fictional prizes that will impress friends and enemies alike Big time spikes and jump serves that literally set the ball on fire Exit menu option that allows you to exit the game, but you'll probably never want to use that

Name: Spikair Volleyball
Description:
Spikair volleyball is a game where you control the whole team. You choose the players actions within high tension matches where timing is decisive ! And if you want to play with friends or family, you can go for the co-op or versus mode ;) RECRUITING Recruit new players with better statistics. TRAINING Train your players to build the best team. TOURNAMENTS Lead your team to win the game. Rise to the top ! Become the best volleyball club of the world. Press Kit

Name: Beat Saber
Description:
Beat Saber is an immersive rhythm experience you have never seen before! Enjoy tons of handcrafted levels and swing your way through the pulsing music beats, surrounded by a futuristic world. Use your sabers to slash the beats as they come flying at you – every beat indicates which saber you need to use and the direction you need to match. With Beat Saber you become a dancing superhero! Features Feel the Rhythm: Immerse yourself in the smoothest combination of music beats and visual effects in Beat Saber’s truly unique gameplay. Handcrafted Levels & Music: Unlike other rhythm games with generated content, music and levels in Beat Saber are drawn precisely by hand to enhance the music experience. Compete in Multiplayer: Challenge your friends or random opponents around the world. Challenging Campaign: Get better every day while completing objectives and challenges in the Campaign. Rise Up the Global Leaderboards: Compete against other Beat Saberists around the world in various difficulties. Easy to Learn, Fun to Master: Everyone can understand the basic game mechanics. It's easy for anyone to pick up and play. Great Exercise: Exercise while dancing and slashing the beats, Beat Saber gets you moving.

Name: Half-Life: Alyx
Description:
Half-Life: Alyx is Valve’s VR return to the Half-Life series. It’s the story of an impossible fight against a vicious alien race known as the Combine, set between the events of Half-Life and Half-Life 2. Playing as Alyx Vance, you are humanity’s only chance for survival. The Combine’s control of the planet since the Black Mesa incident has only strengthened as they corral the remaining population in cities. Among them are some of Earth’s greatest scientists: you and your father, Dr. Eli Vance. As founders of a fledgling resistance, you’ve continued your clandestine scientific activity—performing critical research, and building invaluable tools for the few humans brave enough to defy the Combine. Every day, you learn more about your enemy, and every day you work toward finding a weakness. ABOUT GAMEPLAY IN VR: Valve’s return to the Half-Life universe that started it all was built from the ground up for virtual reality. VR was built to enable the gameplay that sits at the heart of Half-Life. Immerse yourself in deep environmental interactions, puzzle solving, world exploration, and visceral combat. Lean to aim around a broken wall and under a Barnacle to make an impossible shot. Rummage through shelves to find a healing syringe and some shotgun shells. Manipulate tools to hack alien interfaces. Toss a bottle through a window to distract an enemy. Rip a Headcrab off your face and throw it out the window. COMMUNITY-BUILT ENVIRONMENTS A set of Source 2 tools for building new levels is included with the game, enabling any player to build and contribute new environments for the community to enjoy through Half-Life: Alyx's Steam Workshop . Hammer, Valve’s level authoring tool, has been updated with all of the game's virtual reality gameplay tools and components.

Name: Ragnarock
Description:
Are you ready to rock? Ragnarock is a solo/multiplayer VR rhythm game in which you play a viking captain competing in a ship race. With your two hammers, crush the incoming runes in sync with epic viking music. Keep hitting the runes perfectly to accumulate combo energy in your hammers, and you will be able to activate a speed boost! Viking music: The tracklist is curated with love and care. Unleash the drummer in you and play to the epic rock and metal tracks of Alestorm, Gloryhammer, Saltatio Mortis, Wind Rose and many more. All have a festive viking/celtic/pirate style, which will make you feel the viking power in you! Simple gameplay: Following the tradition of arcade games, Ragnarock is easy to play, hard to master. To move forward, only your sense of rhythm matters. However, to win the race, you will have to train and use your skills wisely. Multiple difficulty settings will help you improve over time. Only the most experienced players will be able to collect all the gold medals, beat the high scores and sign their name on the leaderboard! Cross-platform multiplayer mode: The multiplayer PvP mode brings real-time competition against your friends or other people. Start a public or private game (up to 6 players) and beat them all to finish in first place! In solo, you can also race against ghost ships (representing your best score or other players from the leaderboard) to add some competition. Mythological environments: Ragnarock transports you to the land of the vikings in stylized environments inspired by nordic mythology. Support for custom songs: Want to play a track from your personal music library? You can create a custom playable song from any song you own, and play it in solo mode. More info in our FAQ (-vr.com/faq) .

## Until You Fall: Master Your Fighting Style in a Neon Fantasy VR Roguelite

Champions, prepare for an electrifying VR experience! The highly anticipated version 1.3 of *Until You Fall* is now available, introducing exciting new features like two-handed weapons, smooth turning, and comprehensive localization with subtitles. Developed by the creative minds behind *I Expect You To Die*, this arcade-inspired VR hack-and-slash roguelite challenges you to discover and perfect your unique fighting style for countless hours of exhilarating, kinetic fun.

### The Cycle of Combat: Fight, Fall, Rise Again

Step into the heart-pounding world of Rokar and prepare for the fight of your life. Immerse yourself in a vibrant neon fantasy realm, moving your arms and body in sync with a driving synthwave soundtrack. Attack, block, cast spells, and dodge your way through a world teeming with magic-infused monsters. As you progress, equip yourself with a diverse arsenal of gameplay-altering weapons, growing stronger with each encounter and striking down the monstrosities that plague Rokar.

### The Story of Rokar: A World in Ruins

Rokar's once-thriving civilization, powered by a mystical energy known as Aether, has been tragically destroyed by a Calamity of unknown origin. Now, twisted spirits and fearsome monsters roam the crystallized ruins. You are the last remaining Rune Knight, the sole hope to push back these encroaching horrors. With guidance from a mysterious Runesmith, you will forge the legendary weapons necessary to complete your campaign and restore balance to Rokar. Will you rise to become the Champion the world desperately needs?

### Key Features of Until You Fall:

*   **Intense Physical Gameplay:** Stay active and engaged to survive the relentless onslaught.
*   **Driving Synthwave Soundtrack:** A dynamic soundtrack that keeps the energy high both in and out of the game. (The Original Soundtrack is available for free on Steam!)
*   **Strategic Encounters:** Face off against cadres of corrupted monstrosities, each demanding unique strategies for defeat.
*   **Stunning Environments:** Explore a variety of gorgeous, neon-tinged landscapes.
*   **Diverse Weaponry:** Wield a selection of unique one- and two-handed weapons, allowing you to choose your preferred combat approach.
*   **Replayable Roguelite Experience:** Each run offers randomized rewards, powerups, enemy configurations, and room layouts, ensuring no two playthroughs are ever the same.
*   **Customizable Comfort and Accessibility:** Tailor your experience with options designed to help you move and battle with ease.

### Join the Community

Become part of our growing community on Discord! Connect with the developers, share your hard-won battle strategies, and compete for a chance to win exclusive *Until You Fall* merchandise.

## The Gallery - Episode 2: Heart of the Emberstone: A VR Adventure

Embark on a captivating sci-fi epic that defined the dawn of modern VR. *The Gallery* series, a recipient of over 30 awards including 'VR Game of the Year', set new standards for roomscale movement and interaction, establishing itself as VR's premier adventure series. This puzzle exploration game, built exclusively for virtual reality, draws inspiration from the enigmatic allure of 1980s dark fantasy adventure films.

### Journey to the World of Ember

In *The Gallery - Episode 2: Heart of the Emberstone™*, you follow your sister Elsie into the mysterious world of Ember. Here, you'll uncover the remnants of a civilization tragically torn apart by two warring siblings, each driven by their own insatiable quests for power. Your journey will lead you to encounter a formidable, mountainous ally who, much like yourself, is searching for their missing counterpart.

### Unraveling Ancient Mysteries

To navigate this forgotten realm and expose the true motives of the shadowy figure who orchestrated your arrival, you must master the Gauntlet. This enigmatic new power allows for the manipulation of energy, offering a unique tool to unlock the secrets of Ember's past.

### Key Features of Heart of the Emberstone:

*   **Epic Continuation:** Continue your grand adventure through the Starseed, venturing to the distant planet of Ember. This highly anticipated sequel builds upon the foundation laid by *Call of the Starseed*, the VR adventure that ignited the series.
*   **80s Fantasy Inspiration:** Immerse yourself in a dark past inspired by beloved 80s fantasy classics such as *Labyrinth* and *The Dark Crystal*.
*   **The Gauntlet's Power:** Wield impossible technologies with the Gauntlet, a mysterious relic imbued with potent telekinetic abilities.
*   **VR-Native Puzzles:** Unlock the world's history through a suite of new puzzles meticulously designed to leverage the full potential of virtual reality's physicality and precision hand-tracking.
*   **Immersive Encounters:** Come face-to-face with a towering mountainous ally and a host of bizarre alien creatures, all rendered with stunning roomscale presence.
*   **Captivating Audio Experience:** Experience the pinnacle of VR sound with mesmerizing spatial audio and a brand-new Original Soundtrack composed by the award-winning Jeremy Soule.
*   **Polished World of Wonder:** Dive into a lovingly crafted fantasy world offering multiple hours of engaging gameplay, compelling story, and breathtaking wonder.
*   **Tailored Locomotion:** Explore experimental locomotion modes that allow you to uniquely customize your VR journey.

*The Gallery - Episode 2: Heart of the Emberstone* is available for Arcades on SpringboardVR.

Prepare your culinary tools and embrace the delightful chaos, because the award-winning multiplayer VR cooking game, "Cook-Out: A Sandwich Tale," is here to transform your gaming experience. Developed by Resolution Games, the acclaimed studio behind titles such as "Angry Birds VR: Isle of Pigs," "Bait!," and "Blaston," this whimsical adventure plunges players into the heart of a cook's cabin nestled within an enchanting fairytale forest. The core of "Cook-Out" revolves around cooperative play, challenging up to four participants to collaborate effectively and ensure a steady stream of orders for a diverse and hungry clientele of mythical creatures.

As players navigate through levels that escalate in intensity, their responsibilities extend beyond mere meal preparation. They must also contend with a cast of troublesome customers determined to disrupt the kitchen's harmony. For instance, jesters might mischievously conceal crucial order components, while opportunistic thieves could attempt to pilfer vital ingredients. This dynamic adds a layer of strategic challenge, requiring quick thinking and seamless teamwork to overcome these obstacles. According to Resolution Games, the game's design emphasizes the fun and frantic nature of cooperative cooking.

Recent enhancements have further enriched the "Cook-Out" experience. The introduction of the "Make it Your Way" feature allows chefs to personalize their appearance, adding a unique flair to their in-game persona. Furthermore, the "House Party" update brings a host of new skins and customization options, enabling players to express their individual style. While the game shines in its cooperative mode, solo players are not left out. A simulated partner is available to assist, ensuring that even when playing alone, there's always a team ready to tackle demanding orders and re-establish order in this lively and often wild kitchen environment. This commitment to accessibility ensures that the joy of "Cook-Out" is available to a broader audience.

Name: GORN
Description:
GORN is a ludicrously violent VR gladiator simulator, made by Free Lives, the developers of Broforce and Genital Jousting. Featuring a unique, fully physics driven combat engine, GORN combatants will be able to creatively execute their most violent gladiatorial fantasies in virtual reality. Savagely strike down an infinite supply of poorly-animated opponents with all manner of weapons – from swords, maces, and bows to nunchuks, throwing knives, massive two-handed warhammers or even your blood-soaked bare hands. The only limits to the carnage are your imagination and decency, in the most brutal and savage VR face-smashing game ever produced by man.

Name: Knockout League - Arcade VR Boxing
Description:
Welcome to Knockout League, a single player arcade-style boxing game built from the ground up for virtual reality. Dodge flaming uppercuts, block sweeping tentacle attacks, and pummel your opponents using 1:1 tracking of your head and hands. Work up a serious sweat with various boxing drills like the focus mitts or the one and only Reflex Alley. Take on a crazy cast of characters, including a mad scientist and a wily octopus, each with different fighting styles and unique gameplay. Fight through them all to become the champion of the Knockout League!

Demeo delivers a cooperative RPG dungeon crawler that captures the spirit of tabletop gaming with friends. This cross-platform game allows up to four players to unite against a dark force threatening the underworld. Players select from six unique classes: Hunter, Sorcerer, Assassin, Guardian, Bard, and Warlock, each with special abilities.

The world of Gilmerra, or the 5th Earth, presents a diverse landscape. It includes peaceful meadows and villages alongside dangerous swamps and old ruins. Demeo brings tabletop dungeon crawling to a digital space, connecting players globally for real-time chat, treasure hunts, strategic turn-based combat, and high replayability. The game's future plans include new stories, areas, and enemies. Past expansions featured popular adventures like *The Black Sarcophagus*, *Realm of the Rat King*, and *Roots of Evil*. The latest expansion, *Curse of the Serpent Lord*, introduces the Ronth Desert and a new character, Oana, the Warlock of the Ancients, according to the developers.

Success in Demeo requires smart strategy, clever tactics, and strong teamwork. Each character's unique way of using magic and handling monsters is vital for the group's survival. Players build decks from over 60 cards to attack, cast spells, and heal allies. As players advance, they unlock new cards and skills for hero customization. The Heroes' Hangout serves as a social space for sharing stories and planning future quests. This area also offers mini-games, miniature painting, tutorials, and avatar customization. Demeo supports cross-play on PC and various VR devices, including Oculus. The PC Edition allows players without VR to join the adventure, as noted by the game's creators.

Name: Synth Riders
Description:
A DANCE-ACTION RHYTHM GAME CUSTOM SONGS officially supported GOOD FITNESS that activates the whole body without repetitive movements GREAT MUSIC 57 free songs and 35 DLCs from Lindsey Stirling, Muse, Caravan Palace Dance to 57 licensed songs of various genres - listen on Spotify! Enjoy official custom song support Discover DLCs including Lindsey Stirling, Muse, Caravan Palace, and more Meet 10 friends in cross-platform Multiplayer Experience 360° Spin Mode in every song Burn those calories with in-game fitness tracker Create own maps with official beatmap editor Utilize built-in avatars; LIV and twitch integration

Name: Call of Duty® 4: Modern Warfare®
Description:
The new action-thriller from the award-winning team at Infinity Ward, the creators of the Call of Duty® series, delivers the most intense and cinematic action experience ever. Call of Duty 4: Modern Warfare arms gamers with an arsenal of advanced and powerful modern day firepower and transports them to the most treacherous hotspots around the globe to take on a rogue enemy group threatening the world. As both a U.S Marine and British S.A.S. soldier fighting through an unfolding story full of twists and turns, players use sophisticated technology, superior firepower and coordinated land and air strikes on a battlefield where speed, accuracy and communication are essential to victory. The epic title also delivers an added depth of multiplayer action providing online fans an all-new community of persistence, addictive and customizable gameplay. Authentic Advanced Weaponry - Featuring an available arsenal of more than 70 new and authentic weapons and gear from assault rifles with laser sites, claymore mines, .50 caliber sniper rifles, and M-249 SAW machine guns. With accessories like night-vision goggles and ghillie suits, for maximum concealment, Call of Duty 4: Modern Warfare has players locked and loaded to accomplish the mission. Coordinated Assault and Support - Delivering the most visceral action thriller ever, the title covers modern battle from the soldier to the satellite, where the need for air support is critical to success. The adrenaline rush deployment enlists gamers to fast-rope from tactical helicopters, ride in an armada of attack choppers, utilize jets to remove enemy strongholds and even engage hostiles from thousands of feet above the ground inside a state of the art aerial gunship. Cinematic Quality Graphics and Sound - Featuring stunning next-generation graphics, players will be drawn into the cinematic intensity of Call of Duty 4: Modern Warfare. Amazing special effects, including realistic depth of field, rim-lighting, character self-shadowing, texture streaming as well as physics-enabled effects will enlist players into the most photo-realistic gaming experience. Combine the lifelike graphics and the realistic battle chatter with the Call of Duty award-winning sound design and players will face battle as they have never before. Unparalleled Depth to Multiplayer - Multiplayer builds from the success of Call of Duty 2 delivering a persistent online experience for greater community interaction. Featuring create-a-class options allowing players to customize gear that is best suited for play, to experience points enabling unlockables and perks, all the way to matchmaking and leaderboards for the latest in tracking, Call of Duty 4: Modern Warfare's multiplayer is set to deliver easily accessible and addictive online play for all.

## Cities: Skylines: Your Ultimate City-Building Experience

Cities: Skylines offers a refreshing take on the city simulation genre, focusing on the multifaceted joys and inherent difficulties of constructing and managing a contemporary urban environment. The game introduces innovative features that authentically capture the excitement and challenges faced in real-world urban planning. As you embark on your city-building journey, your imagination truly becomes the sole limitation as you expand your metropolis upwards and outwards.

### Mastering the City's Pulse: A Deep Simulation

The core mechanics of Cities: Skylines are designed to be intuitively accessible yet profoundly challenging to master, delivering a deeply engaging simulation experience. In your role as the city's leader, you are tasked with meticulously balancing essential public services while diligently overseeing your city's financial health. According to player feedback, residents react with remarkable realism to various in-game events, significantly enhancing the authenticity of the gameplay.

Key elements that define the gameplay experience include:

*   **Complex Management:** This involves the intricate task of juggling vital services such as educational institutions, water and power infrastructure, police, and fire departments, all while maintaining a sound municipal budget.
*   **Fluid Traffic Flow:** Leveraging the expertise gained from the acclaimed Cities in Motion series, the game incorporates a sophisticated and detailed local traffic simulation, ensuring that the movement of citizens and goods feels organic and responsive.
*   **Zoning and Directives:** The ability to designate specific areas as districts empowers you to implement tailored policies and special rules, granting you genuine mayoral authority over your burgeoning city.
*   **Dynamic Day/Night Cycle:** Your city undergoes a visible transformation as the day progresses, influencing resident routines, operational efficiency, and the overall ambiance of your urban landscape.

### A World of Customization and Connection: Fostering a Vibrant Community

Cities: Skylines boasts extensive support for player-created modifications, a feature that has been consistently highlighted by the community. Players are empowered to construct entirely new maps and buildings or enhance existing ones. These unique creations can then be seamlessly integrated into the game, shared with a global audience, and discovered through the Steam Workshop. This robust ecosystem cultivates a dynamic and collaborative community of city planners. This strong emphasis on modding support is frequently cited as a primary reason for the game's enduring popularity, as it significantly amplifies its replayability and expands its creative potential.

Name: Tomb Raider: Legend
Description:
Follow Lara Croft down a path of discovery as she travels the globe to remote, exotic locales in search of one of history's greatest artifacts that unleashes unwelcome figures from Lara's mysterious past. With guns blazing, Lara must use her athletic ability and intellectual wits to explore vast, treacherous tombs, riddled with challenging puzzles and deadly traps. Experience an adrenaline-fueled adventure in Tomb Raider: Legend! KEY FEATURES: Travel the globe as Lara Croft, the critically-acclaimed dual-pistol wielding heroine, of the classic Tomb Raider series. Discover tombs and explore living breathing, lost ancient realms which hold clues to the secrets of Lara's past. Physics, water, and fire systems bring perilous environments of Lara's world alive, creating new deadly challenges and obstacles. Intuitive and fluid control system allows for seamless handling of any obstacle and interaction with dynamic surfaces. Utilize an arsenal of new weapons, communication devices, a grappling hook, and other tools, to achieve your goals. Explore ancient tombs, treacherous jungles, snowy mountain ranges, and more!

War Thunder is a leading free-to-play, cross-platform MMO military game that immersizes players in large-scale battles across land, air, and sea. It provides an exceptional experience, concentrating on aviation, armored vehicles, and naval combat, with a vast historical scope from the early 20th century to contemporary military hardware. Millions of players engage in these dynamic, evolving conflicts.

The game's primary appeal is its cooperative combat, where aircraft, attack helicopters, ground forces, and naval ships collaborate in realistic, competitive scenarios. Gaijin Entertainment, the developer, states that War Thunder features over 2,000 highly detailed vehicles. This extensive collection includes aircraft, helicopters, tanks, warships, and other combat units, all meticulously recreated using historical documentation and surviving sources. The game also presents around 100 maps, depicting significant historical battlegrounds and offering a wide array of combat environments.

War Thunder accommodates diverse player preferences through its varied gameplay modes. Intense player-versus-player (PvP) engagements are available via full-scale combat missions, with customizable difficulty to match all play styles and skill levels. For those seeking a more story-focused experience, robust player-versus-environment (PvE) content is provided, including dynamic historical campaigns and compelling solo missions. The game is consistently updated with new vehicles, maps, missions, and nations, ensuring a perpetually fresh and engaging experience.

The immersive nature of War Thunder is amplified by its stunning graphics, authentic sound design, and captivating musical score, all contributing to a deeply engaging combat atmosphere. A distinctive aspect is the player-driven content creation on War Thunder Live. This platform even allows creators to earn real money through its Revenue Share Partner System, cultivating a thriving community of content developers. Seamless cross-platform play is a major advantage, connecting players on Windows PC, Linux, Mac, PlayStation®4, PlayStation®5, Xbox One, and Xbox Series X|S on unified servers.

**Tormented Souls: A Modern Take on Classic Survival Horror**

*Tormented Souls* plunges players into a chilling survival horror experience, centering on Caroline Walker's quest to find missing twin girls at Winterlake. This game is heavily inspired by survival horror pioneers like *Resident Evil* and *Silent Hill*, offering a fresh take on the classic fixed-perspective genre. It skillfully merges nostalgic gameplay with modern touches, such as updated controls and a dynamic camera, according to game critics.

Caroline awakens in a dire situation: naked and connected to medical equipment in a bathtub within a deserted mansion. Her main goal becomes survival as she navigates the mansion's eerie halls, confronting the horrors within.

The core gameplay of *Tormented Souls* focuses on several key aspects. Players face intense combat, requiring strategic use of limited resources against terrifying creatures. Survival also depends on careful exploration and item management, with players needing to find and combine items to solve puzzles and uncover the mansion's secrets, including clues from forgotten journals. A unique feature involves exploring alternate dimensions through mirrors, which act as portals to different times and realities, allowing Caroline to alter the environment and reveal hidden truths.

As Caroline delves deeper, she faces constant supernatural threats. The game emphasizes player awareness and the tactical use of scarce items. The narrative itself carries a cautionary tone, echoing the sentiment that "gaze into the darkness, and it also gazes into you..."

Ultimately, the central question is whether Caroline can uncover the truth about the disappearances and escape Winterlake. Players are invited to join the community to share their experiences and wishlist *Tormented Souls* for future updates.

## Manage Global Emergencies in 112 Operator

112 Operator puts you in charge of emergency services worldwide. Building on the success of 911 Operator, this game lets you manage operations from a small neighborhood to a large city. You'll dispatch units, answer calls, and handle emergencies.

### Diverse Scenarios and Dynamic Environments

The game features over 100,000 real locations. You'll face:

*   **Dynamic Weather:** Realistic weather, like storms and wildfires, is based on historical data. Weather significantly impacts emergency response times.
*   **Day/Night Cycles and Seasons:** Time of day and seasons affect traffic and incidents.
*   **Urban Chaos:** Respond to riots, crime, and attacks.
*   **Natural Disasters:** Deal with widespread destruction.

### The Human Element

You'll also handle individual emergency calls, from witnessing crimes to guiding CPR, and even prank calls.

### Game Modes

*   **Career Mode:** Start in a European city and climb the ranks. Your choices affect your team and those needing help.
*   **Special Scenarios:** Tackle pre-set challenges in any city.
*   **Free Game Mode:** Play without limits.

### Enhanced Gameplay

112 Operator includes new features:

*   **Expanded Maps:** Maps are 25 times larger, with 3D buildings.
*   **New Incidents:** Experience new emergency calls and large events.
*   **Redesigned Campaign:** A revamped campaign offers objectives, emails, and a story.
*   **Advanced Mechanics:** A new fire mechanic can spread rapidly, needing extensive unit deployment. This adds strategic depth.
*   **Regional Specificity:** Gameplay changes based on country laws and local areas.
*   **On-Site Visualization:** See actions unfold clearly.
*   **New Team Members:** Command specialists like doctors, robots, and K-9 units.
*   **Additional Dispatchers:** Assign extra dispatchers for support.
*   **Redesigned Equipment:** Units have new gear.

## Arma 2: Operation Arrowhead: A New Conflict in Takistan

**Arma 2: Operation Arrowhead** thrusts players into a new conflict in the Green Sea Region, three years after the original Arma 2. As part of a US Army-led coalition, your mission is to restore peace in the volatile nation of Takistan and minimize civilian harm amidst an escalating crisis.

### Diverse Military Roles

This PC military simulator by Bohemia Interactive lets you choose your path. Serve as a basic infantryman, a skilled special operative, or command powerful pilots and tank crews.

### Unparalleled Combat Realism

Arma 2: Operation Arrowhead delivers the most realistic combat environment available. It meticulously simulates ballistics, round deflection, thermal imaging, material penetration, real-time day/night cycles, and dynamic environmental effects. A Bohemia Interactive developer noted, "The engine's ability to simulate complex environmental factors and ballistics is a cornerstone of the Arma experience."

**Note:** Arma 2: Operation Arrowhead is a standalone product and does not require the original Arma 2.

### Key Features of Operation Arrowhead

#### New Content and Gameplay

*   **Story Campaign:** A compelling narrative for single and multiplayer.
*   **Tutorials:** Master game mechanics with extensive guidance.
*   **Varied Scenarios & Modes:** Engage in diverse single and multiplayer experiences.

#### Expansive Game World

*   **Three New Maps:** Explore vast Central Asian-style environments, including urban, desert, and mountainous terrain.
*   **Dynamic Environment:** The world reacts realistically to your actions.

#### Enhanced Warfare Simulation

*   **Full Arma 2 Integration:** Combine with the original Arma 2 for an unmatched simulation.

#### Unique Gameplay Elements

*   **Customizable Loadouts:** Detachable backpacks and advanced weapon optics.
*   **Realistic Damage:** Material penetration modeling.
*   **UAV Simulation:** Control Unmanned Aerial Vehicles.
*   **Consequential Decisions:** Your actions impact the battlefield.

#### Extensive Units and Vehicles

*   **Over 300 New Assets:** Engage with units, weapons, and vehicles from factions like the US Army, UN, Takistani Army, and Guerrillas.

#### Mission Creation and Modding

*   **Intuitive Mission Editor:** Design custom missions.
*   **Freeware SDK:** Create your own game content.

#### Robust Multiplayer

*   **Cooperative Campaign:** Play campaign missions with friends.
*   **Large-Scale Battles:** Join epic battles with up to 50 players.

#### Server Support and Security

*   **Optional Anti-Cheat:** BattlEye integration.
*   **Dedicated Server Software:** Available for Windows and Linux.

### Bus Simulator 21: A Deep Dive into Driving and Management

Bus Simulator 21 delivers a comprehensive simulation, featuring the series' largest vehicle roster yet. Players can command 30 officially licensed buses from top manufacturers like Volvo, Alexander Dennis, Scania, BYD, Grande West, and Blue Bird. Popular brands such as Mercedes-Benz, Setra, IVECO BUS, and MAN also return, offering a diverse selection of driving options.

This installment introduces new bus types, including double-decker and electric models, designed for the complex traffic systems within two expansive open-world cities. The game includes a new US map, Angel Shores, and a revamped European map, Seaside Valley. Each map features varied districts, from busy industrial areas and lively Chinatowns to scenic promenades and tranquil countryside.

Bus Simulator 21 offers flexible gameplay. Players can focus on management, creating timetables, buying buses, and planning routes. Alternatively, they can concentrate on driving, with automated management handling operations. Realism is significantly boosted by improved AI for traffic and pedestrians, upgraded graphics, a dynamic day-night cycle, and varied weather. Player immersion is enhanced through authentic bus sounds, voiced tutorials, passenger dialogues, and an extensive character creator with over 15,000 designs. Players can also personalize buses with custom colors, patterns, and advertisements.

To improve convenience, features like fast travel, time acceleration, and direct control over NPC routes are included. Players will encounter urban driving challenges, such as narrow streets, busy terminals, night driving, and roadworks. In-bus events, like passenger issues and fare dodgers, add to the realism. For PC players, the Modding Kit allows for custom content creation and sharing. According to developers, Bus Simulator 21 is the most comprehensive simulation in the series, available on PC and consoles.

## Step into the Boots of Elite Tier 1 Operators in Medal of Honor™

The new **Medal of Honor™** game immerses players in modern warfare, drawing inspiration and development from **actual Tier 1 Operators**. These are the **handpicked warriors** chosen for missions where success is **absolutely critical**. Operating directly under the National Command Authority, these elite soldiers represent the apex of military capability.

### The Tier 1 Operator: A Cut Above

While the U.S. military boasts over 2 million active soldiers, with approximately 50,000 under the Special Operations Command, Tier 1 Operators function on a level **surpassing** even the most highly trained Special Operations Forces. Their precise numbers are classified but are understood to **be in the low hundreds**. These individuals are characterized as **precision instruments of war**, masters of applying force.

### A New Conflict, A New Soldier

In **Medal of Honor™**, players will **embody these warriors**, employing their distinctive skill sets. The game challenges participants to confront a new adversary in the **most unforgiving environments** of contemporary Afghanistan. This is a modern conflict, and the player assumes the role of the **modern warrior: Tier 1**.

### Engaging in Today's Warfare

Experience a realistic combat campaign that merges the **precise tactics of Tier 1 Operators** with the **overwhelming power of Army Rangers**. This offers a chance to participate in **today's conflicts** with exceptional realism.

### Authentic Experience and Online Multiplayer

The game presents an **engaging narrative with dynamic pacing and variety**, set against the challenging Afghan terrain. This delivers a shooter experience **unique to the renowned Medal of Honor franchise**.

Additionally, **online multiplayer has been revolutionized**. Developed by the acclaimed team at DICE, creators of Battlefield Bad Company 2, this rapid combat provides an **ideal blend of strategic engagement and intense action**.

**Online Play Note:** Playing online requires acceptance of the EA End User License Agreement and PunkBuster End User License Agreement. Access to online features necessitates an EA account and registration with a unique serial code. EA reserves the right to discontinue online features with 30 days' notice via ea.com/service-updates. The software includes PunkBuster anti-cheat technology.

Name: Alpha Protocol™
Description:
Loyalty carries a price and no one knows this more than agent Michael Thorton. A talented young agent cast out by his government, Thorton is the only one with the information needed to stop an impending international catastrophe. To do so means he must cut himself off from the very people he is sworn to protect. As players determine how to accomplish different objectives, the decisions made and actions taken in each mission will ultimately transform the type of secret agent Michael Thorton will become. Every choice the player makes as Michael Thorton will carry consequences for his future and the fate of the world.

Name: BioShock™
