*   **‘Team Meat’ Audio Commentary Track:** Edmund McMillen and Tommy Refenes offer their candid, often hilarious, and sometimes outright fabricated insights throughout the film. This track serves as a fantastic complement to the main feature.
*   **Extensive Subtitle and Language Support:** The film is available with support for Arabic, Chinese (traditional), Czech, Danish, Dutch, English, Finnish, French, German, Greek, Hebrew, Hungarian, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese, Russian, Spanish, Swedish, Thai, Turkish, and Ukrainian.
*   **Video Extras:** Discover assorted video pieces created during the film's production.

### Festival Recognition

*   2012 Sundance Official Selection, World Documentary Competition
*   2012 Sundance Winner, Best Editing in World Documentary Cinema
*   2012 South by Southwest Official Selection
*   2012 Hot Docs Festival Official Selection
*   2012 Sheffield Doc/Fest Official Selection

Name: Fiendish Thieves
Description:
An all new Interactive Feature Film / FMV game The best way to describe Fiendish Thieves is Home Alone meets Frankenstein a fun Interactive movie suitable for all audiences. Filled with lots of laughs and slapstick humour. You choose the actions of the bungling burglars who search an abandoned warehouse for a rare vintage pocket watch and the obsessed film fan munching on snacks watching the events unfold. Starring Julian Seager (Death Race 4, Fisherman's Friends, Guardians of the Galaxy) Shawn C Phillips (Youtube Star Coolduder) Boyd Rogers (Doc Martin) Matt Stuart Scarlet Brooke (Alternative Model) Jamie Smith (She’s Dead) Featuring • Stylized FMV video • Multiple paths • Multiple endings • Hidden scenes

Name: Afterlife
Description:
After the tragic death of their 5-year-old son, a family struggles with his loss and attempts to mend their frayed bonds. Experience the struggle through the child’s ghostly eyes and explore Afterlife’s multiverse of different realities as the family acknowledges his absence, or presence, in their own lives. Using a cutting-edge VR filming technique, Afterlife takes you through a 360 VR branching narrative that seamlessly reveals a story that shifts based on the characters that you choose to follow and the objects you activate within the environment. Key Features Witness the void that death leaves behind in an interactive virtual reality drama Shape the story by choosing which character you follow Navigate and interact seamlessly in a rich 360-3D virtual reality live-action narrative No two playthroughs are alike: this branching story has 3 episodes, 29 unique choices, thousands of unique playthroughs and multiple endings Game mode: Single user Player mode: sitting or standing Language: English Subtitles in English and French available (NOTE: Enabling subtitles will disable the 3D stereoscopic capabilities in order to avoid eye soreness while reading the text.) Choices Matter Grief is uncomfortable, but our choices move us forward or leave us stuck. For this reason, in Afterlife -just as in real life- intended and unconscious choices matter and will determine how the story unfolds. Follow characters, discover objects to interact, and reveal different paths. Breakthrough the Void and Be Present!

Name: The Great C
Description:
Based on the sci-fi short story by Philip K. Dick, The Great C is a cinematic narrative set in the aftermath of an apocalyptic event. Featuring a thrilling storyline, stunning environments and a powerful soundtrack, the viewer is transported to a desolate landscape in which the remnants of humanity are ruled by an all-powerful supercomputer known as the Great C. Each year, the nearby village is forced to send a young person on a pilgrimage to appease the mysterious machine, a journey from which no one ever returns. The Great C follows Clare, a young woman who finds her life upended when her fiancé is summoned for this year’s pilgrimage. Leaving the safe confines of her village, Clare must decide whether to accept the rules of her harsh society or fight against the oppressive powers that created it. The Great C is a sweeping 30+ minute experience, developed from the ground up to push the boundaries of storytelling in VR. Official selection of the Venice Film Festival.

Name: Deluded I
Description:
GENRE An experimental fusion of narrative FMV (Full Motion Video), point and click investigation and quick time event (QTE) based interactive games. DELUDED The latest live action crime thriller game by New IDEA Games. THE STORY A 'classic' hit 'n run case or at least it seems like. Play the detective's role and try to solve the case with your assistant, Susan. Pay attention to the details during your investigation, find the clues and evidence, complete the puzzle and be sure you are ready to face your demons and answer all the questions, since your life depends on it... FEATURES Cinematic videos. Redesigned and simplified controls. Improved sound design. Quick time events. Hidden clues to find. Alternative endings. NEW IDEA GAMES A tiny independent game studio from Hungary - creator of Hijacker Jack. We would like to say thank you for all the critics we got on our previous project. We truly listened to all and tried our best to fix the issues. Hopefully, this time you will enjoy to be Deluded... ;) CAST Detective - Zsolt Kormendy Susan - Lilla Panczel Jimmy - Gery Sanches Kate - Anna Meszaros John - Viktor Halla Cop - Norbert Nyutali Camera Balazs Maitz Tom Fekete Matyas Ulz Written and directed by Viktor Halla NEW IDEA GAMES (c) 2021.

Name: Landflix Odyssey
Description:
Landflix Odyssey is an action platform in which players play as Larry, a lazy binge-watcher who finds himself trapped inside the streaming service after using special batteries. This incredible world is called Landflix! In order to return home he has to recover all five batteries ended up inside the TV shows on the Landflix platform. Landflix Odyssey is a clear reference to video-on-demand platforms and TV shows universe. In each TV show our hero can count on some special powers that will help him overcome obstacles and dangers in any game world. Our hero can move through parallel dimensions, use magic swords, do superhero stuff with superhero tools, take drugs to increase productivity and defend himself with a crossbow against hordes of zombies. 5 worlds inspired by some of the most famous TV shows; 5 special abilities make the gameplay exciting and different; 10 boss fights; An incredible set of unforgettable, unique enemies and boss Secret content to unlock

Name: Kamile: The Fall
Description:
The project is being developed by a coalition of independent video game and film industry professionals. # Before you buy: + This this is a pilot episode. Runtime: 15-30 minutes (depends on your curiosity) + This is a VR-only experience in 6DoF + It is in English only. + It's an interactive narrative experience rather than a classical VR game + By paying for `Kamile: The Fall` you support the development of narrative-based VR. We want to contribute to the genre. # After you buy: + Give us your honest feedback about what would you like to be improved + Request new features The project is co-financed by the Lithuanian Film Centre.

Name: Portal 2 - The Final Hours
Description:
Portal 2 draws from the award-winning formula of innovative gameplay, story, and music that earned the original Portal over 70 industry accolades and created a cult following. For more information on Portal 2 click here.

Name: Late Shift
Description:
Late Shift is a high stakes FMV crime thriller. After being forced into the robbery of a lucrative auction house, mathematics student Matt is left proving his innocence in the brutal London heist. Your choices will have consequences from the very start, right through to the very end. One small decision could change the entire outcome with interactive gameplay that can lead to one of seven conclusions. Written by the author of Sherlock Holmes (2009 film), experience a gripping live-action crime thriller with a total of over 180 decision points. Do you steal the car or do you run away? Do you follow orders or sabotage the plan? You’ll have just seconds to decide as the film continues to roll with no pauses and no looping footage. Shot in full HD, Late Shift ’s cinematic experience blends the line between movies, games and interactive storytelling. Your Decisions Are You • Multi-optional Storytelling: One story, countless storylines, seven endings. • A completely live action, cinematic interactive thriller, filmed in full HD in London, England. • Over 180 decision points in total with no pauses and no looping footage. • Directed by Tobias Weber, and written by Michael R. Johnson, author of Sherlock Holmes (2009 film) • Acting performances by Joe Sowerbutts (Matt), Haruka Abe (May-Ling) and Oliver Twist’s Richard Durden (Samuel Parr).

Name: Milanoir
Description:
Inspired by the Italian crime flicks of the '70s revered by Quentin Tarantino, Milanoir is a pixel-packed action game set in the violent city of Milan. Come meet Piero, a convict suddenly released from prison looking for revenge over the man who framed him. Hunt for the truth and escape the ones who are chasing you through an unforgiving city. Someone wants you dead: you have to use all your toughness to survive. Shoot, choke, sneak your way through the enemies and engage them in breathtaking car chases. Features CRIME & VIOLENCE: A sordid story of betrayal and greediness. A homage to the Italian masterpiece crime movies of the '70s such as Caliber 9 and Almost Human. Stay alive, trust no one... FUNKY '70S SOUNDTRACK & AMAZING PIXEL ART GRAPHICS: Enjoy the streets of Milan from a new, high-quality pixelated perspective! Immerse yourself in a groovy '70s atmosphere! ARENA MODE: There's no escape from death, but more killings means more time… 2P LOCAL COOP MODE: The Guy in Blue joins the Guy in Red to face a common enemy.

Name: LEGO® Jurassic World
Description:
Following the epic storylines of Jurassic Park, The Lost World: Jurassic Park and Jurassic Park III, as well as the highly anticipated Jurassic World, LEGO Jurassic World™ is the first videogame where players will be able to relive and experience all four Jurassic films. Reimagined in LEGO form and told in TT Games’ signature classic LEGO humor, the thrilling adventure recreates unforgettable scenes and action sequences from the films, allowing fans to play through key moments and giving them the opportunity to fully explore the expansive grounds of Isla Nublar and Isla Sorna. GAME FEATURES: • Relive key moments from all four Jurassic films: An adventure 65 million years in the making - now in classic LEGO brick fun! • Wreak havoc as LEGO dinosaurs: Choose from 20 dinosaurs, including the friendly Triceratops, deadly Raptor, vicious Compy and even the mighty T. rex. • Customize your own dinosaur collection: Collect LEGO amber and experiment with DNA to create completely original dinosaurs, like the Dilophosaurus Rex. • Populate and explore Isla Nublar and Isla Sorna: Put your unique dinosaur creations in to paddocks as you complete special Free Play missions. • Play with family and friends with easy access drop-in, drop-out gameplay option.

**The Complex: An Interactive Sci-Fi Thriller**

In the wake of a devastating bio-weapon attack on London, two scientists find themselves in a perilous situation within a locked-down laboratory. With time and breathable air dwindling, their actions and relationships will determine their fate, leading to one of eight suspenseful endings.

The narrative centers on Dr. Amy Tenant, a leading nanocell technology expert who previously treated victims of a chemical attack in the totalitarian state of Kindar. When news emerges of a civilian exhibiting symptoms of a mysterious blood-vomiting illness in London, the identity of the victim is far from coincidental. Reunited with an old friend, Amy becomes trapped within an impenetrable research headquarters, a hub of scientific advancement harboring a dangerous secret.

The Complex is penned by Lynn Renee Maxcy, a writer recognized for her work on the Emmy award-winning series *The Handmaid's Tale*. The interactive film features a cast including Michelle Mylett (*Letterkenny*, *Bad Blood*), Kate Dickie (*Game of Thrones*, *The Witch*), and Al Weaver (*Grantchester*). Notably, it also includes a guest performance by Twitch streamer and former Xbox UK presenter, Leah Viathan.

**Key Interactive Features:**

*   **Relationship Tracking:** Your interactions with characters are continuously monitored. Choices made will either strengthen or weaken these relationships, impacting specific scenarios and significantly influencing the concluding scenes.
*   **Personality Tracking:** Every decision and interaction contributes to tracking your character's personality. At the end of each playthrough, you receive a Personality Score, offering insights into your gameplay style. Discover how your character aligns with the five basic personality dimensions:
    *   Openness
    *   Conscientiousness
    *   Extraversion
    *   Agreeableness
    *   Neuroticism
*   **Live-Action Cinematics:** Experience a fully live-action, cinematic interactive sci-fi thriller filmed in the UK and directed by Paul Raschid.
*   **Multi-Optional Storytelling:** Explore a narrative with 8 distinct outcomes, driven by your choices.
*   **Unlockable Content:** Features such as Skip Scene, Personality Assessment, and a Hidden Event can be unlocked.
*   **Pause Choices:** An option to pause for choices is included, enhancing audience participation during live streams.

Name: The Bunker
Description:
The Bunker is a completely live action experience with point-and-click interactivity. Filmed on location in a decommissioned government nuclear bunker, it features a plot crafted by writers and designers behind titles like The Witcher , SOMA and Broken Sword , and incredible cast including Adam Brown ( The Hobbit ) and Sarah Greene ( Penny Dreadful , Assassin’s Creed 3 ). As the last remaining survivor in a nuclear bunker, John’s daily routine is the one thing that keeps him sane. But when an alarm goes off, his mind starts to self destruct. He has to venture into long forgotten areas, recovering long repressed memories and unlocking the dark secrets of The Bunker . Key Features: An incredible cast , including Adam Brown ( The Hobbit ), Sarah Greene ( Penny Dreadful ), Grahame Fox ( Game Of Thrones ) and Jerome St. John Blake ( Star Wars ) Totally live action - No CGI, no motion capture, shot on location in a genuine decommissioned nuclear bunker A complex, twisting plot written by award-winning screenwriters and designers behind Broken Sword , The Witcher and SOMA Hidden secrets , documents and recordings to explore the mystery further Neo-retro soundtrack by composer Dom Shovelton

Name: She Sees Red - Interactive Movie
Description:
Someone has killed several people at a popular nightclub. A lone detective has been assigned to the case, following every clue … wherever it may lead. In this provocative interactive thriller, NOTHING is as it seems! Make choices. Affect change. Experience multiple endings and inhabit the mind of a killer in She Sees Red. Gripping, mature non-linear narrative. Story elements can be experienced by making meaningful choices along the way. Four possible endings! Professional actors, editing, lighting, and sound design. NOTE! The game contains two audio tracks: original Russian and dubbed English. Lip-synching in the dubbed version might not be perfect due to the nature of speech patterns in the original language. If you are not satisfied with the dubbed version, you can always switch to the original Russian version with subtitles (different languages available).

Name: Big Rumble Boxing: Creed Champions
Description:
Are you ready to become a boxing champion? Step into the ring and show off your boxing skills in a knockout arcade experience. Fight as 20 iconic characters from the Creed and Rocky universe. Take on world-class opponents across a variety of thrilling locations, or challenge your friends and family in intense, head-to-head matches. Pound-for-Pound Boxing for All - Intuitive, pick-up-and-play controls - Robust boxing mechanics - Dynamic boxing styles and combos - Fighter-specific super finishers for cinematic knockouts Ultimate Creed & Rocky Boxing Universe - Legendary tales of 20 iconic and unique characters - Unlockable characters and outfits - Classic Creed and Rocky training moments in thematic mini games - 13 Classic and original boxing arenas Iconic Champs from Creed & Rocky - Adonis Creed - Rocky Balboa - Apollo Creed - Clubber Lang - Ivan Drago - Viktor Drago and more... Pulse-rousing Fun with Friends and Family - Choose your champion and venues - Face off in local player-versus-player mode Developed by the team who brought you Creed: Rise to Glory for VR platforms, Big Rumble Boxing: Creed Champions is the second collaboration between Survios and MGM Studios, that brings the gripping intensity of Creed boxing to consoles and PC for the first time.

**Conscious Existence: A VR Exploration of Inner Appreciation**

"Conscious Existence," a 12-minute pre-rendered stereoscopic 360/VR short film by Marc Zimmermann (EpicScapes), offers an immersive journey into the profound gift of consciousness. This experience, as noted by Zimmermann, invites viewers to explore the universe's boundless beauty through the power of a conscious mind.

**Important Warning:** This experience contains flashing, stroboscope-like effects. Individuals sensitive to such stimuli, or those with a history of epilepsy or seizures, should consult a physician before viewing.

The film is presented with a dedicated player for seamless playback of its 4096x4096px @ 60fps, high-bitrate 360/VR video. This player is optimized for VR-enabled Windows 10 workstations with an NVidia 970GTX or higher. An alternative playback option for Windows 7/8 users is available via the 'win-7-8-alternative' beta branch. Intuitive playback controls include Spacebar for Play/Pause, the 'R' key to Reset View, and the 'L' key to Toggle Voice, operable via VR controllers or keyboard shortcuts when the application window is active.

The central theme of "Conscious Existence" highlights the profound value of consciousness. This ability, according to the film's creator, allows us to perceive and internalize the universe's infinite beauty, a source of inspiration for our inner world. Our perception of reality is significantly shaped by our thoughts. Misplaced priorities can hinder our ability to see the ever-present beauty that surrounds us, a beauty that provides potent energy and inspiration. Cultivating a positive and grateful mindset, as suggested by the film's narrative, empowers us to harness this energy, enriching our inner lives and fostering well-being. Zimmermann's VR creation, as he states, shares his personal appreciation for life, encouraging viewers to rediscover wonder and embark on an inward journey toward relaxed appreciation.

**Need for Speed™: Conquer Ventura Bay's Streets with Style and Speed**

Are you ready to dominate the asphalt and become a racing legend? Need for Speed™ invites you to get behind the wheel of iconic vehicles and push them to their limits across the vast, dynamic urban environment of Ventura Bay. This installment offers an engaging experience where players will explore interconnected narratives, cultivate their reputation, and meticulously craft their dream car. According to the developers, the game presents five distinct paths to victory, ensuring immense replayability and a deep sense of progression.

For those seeking an enhanced experience, the Deluxe Edition of Need for Speed™ provides exclusive in-game bonuses. As reported by the publisher, players receive a lifetime 10% discount on all in-game currency purchases, a tricked-out starter car, and a comprehensive Styling and Performance pack. Additionally, the Deluxe Edition includes exclusive wraps, a unique identifying sticker, and a VIP icon, as detailed in promotional materials.

Key game features include PC optimization with an unlocked frame rate and 4K resolution support. The PC version also delivers robust support for a wide range of steering wheels and peripherals from leading manufacturers like Logitech, Thrustmaster, and Fanatec, enhancing immersion, according to technical specifications. The game boasts rich customization options, allowing players to build a car that performs exceptionally and reflects their personality. Explore Ventura Bay's sprawling West Coast playground, from dense city streets to scenic winding roads, offering diverse racing environments.

Need for Speed™ returns with five unique gameplay styles: Speed, Style, Build, Crew, and Outlaw, each allowing players to earn reputation and achieve victory on their own terms. The "Living Game" aspect ensures ongoing engagement with free updates, including Eddie's challenge, which tests your skills against Ventura Bay's formidable street racers. Aspiring photographers can hone their craft with Snapshot Pro, and players can even earn Ken Block’s iconic Hoonicorn and Morohoshi-San’s legendary Diablo, as confirmed by game content reveals. Immerse yourself in a richly crafted world and become an integral part of an engaging story.

Name: CINEVEO - VR Cinema
Description:
----------------------------------------------------------------------------- ----------------------------------------------------------------------------- ----------------------------------------------------------------------------- !!! ATTENTION !!! !!! ATTENTION !!! !!! ATTENTION !!! DO NOT PURCHASE CINEVEO !!! CINEVEO has been discontinued and is no longer available! CINEVEO servers are offline! CINEVEO is being removed from Steam. DO NOT PURCHASE CINEVEO !!! !!! ATTENTION !!! !!! ATTENTION !!! !!! ATTENTION !!! ----------------------------------------------------------------------------- ----------------------------------------------------------------------------- ----------------------------------------------------------------------------- ----------------------------------------------------------------------------- ----------------------------------------------------------------------------- ----------------------------------------------------------------------------- ----------------------------------------------------------------------------- ----------------------------------------------------------------------------- ----------------------------------------------------------------------------- ----------------------------------------------------------------------------- CINEVEO is a super immersive VR Cinema experience, with the most detailed and beautifully designed VR Cinema environments on the market. Experience total presence in VR, as you watch your videos inside a collection of ultra-realistic VR Cinemas with AAA graphics. Nothing comes closer to the real thing. CINEVEO is loaded with unique features. CINEVEO has not just one VR Cinema environment. It has six! The 4D Movie Theater, the 1960 Drive-in Theater, the Ocean Theater, the Haunted Valley, the Internet Cinema and the Void. CINEVEO's 4D Movie Theater generates ambient lighting effects. The ambient lighting creates an intense atmosphere inside the theater room during movies. Both the 4D Movie Theater and the Internet Cinema have a multi-player audience. These theaters are populated with real CINEVEO users and you can see their head movements in real-time. CINEVEO is not limited to playing video files. CINEVEO's Internet Cinema has an integrated web browser that can play YouTube videos. It also has a chat room where CINEVEO users can talk, share links to YouTube videos and watch them together. Additionally, all of CINEVEO's VR Cinemas have movie subtitle support and you can customize the size and shape of the cinema screen. Several ultra-detailed and animated 3D VR Cinema environments with AAA graphics. A true VR Cinema experience with an unprecedented level of immersion. Plays all video file formats perfectly smooth (MKV, MP4, AVI, MOV, WMV, etc.). Plays 3D videos (SBS and Over / Under) with superb 3D depth perception. Crystal clear cinema screen with the best video image quality on the market. You can customize the size and shape of the cinema screen. Ambient lighting effects generate an intense atmosphere in the 4D Movie Theater & Internet Cinema during movies. Movie subtitle support (SRT format). The seats in the 4D Movie Theater & Internet Cinema are populated with a multi-player audience made up of real CINEVEO users. The Internet Cinema has an integrated web browser that can play YouTube videos. It also has a multi-player chat room where users can talk, share links to YouTube videos and watch them together. SPECIAL FEATURES Advanced dynamic lighting | CINEVEO's Stereo PFOV Lighting™ | Multiplayer audience CINEVEO’s 4D Movie Theater v4.0 is the most immersive and advanced VR Cinema simulation available for the Oculus Rift and HTC Vive. Feel total presence in your own personal movie theater and watch your videos on a huge customizable cinema screen. The 4D Movie Theater v4.0 features innovative dynamic lighting effects during movies, such as CINEVEO’s Stereo PFOV Lighting™ , which generates visual effects for any video and creates an incredible atmosphere inside the movie theater using the cinema screen’s light, color, reflections, shapes and shadows. To immerse you even further into VR, CINEVEO comes with a multiplayer mode, which can populate your movie theater with an animated live audience made up of real CINEVEO users, who are watching a movie at the same time as you. SPECIAL FEATURES Ultra-detailed 1960s drive-in movie theater setting | Sit in a 1958 Buick convertible | Air traffic and animated birds | Vertigo effect Inspired by the popular car drive-in movie theaters, that were all the rage throughout the United States in the 60s, CINEVEO’s 1960 Drive-in Theater v2.0 will let you watch your movies from the seat of an ultra-detailed 1958 Buick convertible car, with a fully modeled interior and exterior. Your car is parked in front of a gigantic cinema screen, located on a on a vast hill overseeing the Los Angeles city skyline by night. Look behind and you will spot a road-side diner with restroom building, projector tower and neon billboard. Search the sky long enough and you will spot classic Douglas DC airplanes flying over the city. The cinema screen casts dynamic lighting effects, creating an incredibly immersive atmosphere during movies. SPECIAL FEATURES Ultra-realistic ocean environment | Animated lighthouse, ships and birds | Cinema screen water reflection CINEVEO’s Ocean Theater v2.0 is an ultra-realistic and incredibly immersive VR Cinema environment, teleporting you in front of a gigantic cinema screen, located in the middle of the ocean at dawn time. Watch your movies, sitting inside a little wooden rowboat, dancing gently with the waves. Your rowboat is anchored next to a photo-realistic lighthouse with animated lights. In the distance you will see ships and flocks of birds passing by once in a while. The cinema screen casts dynamic lighting effects and its reflection shimmers on the surface of the ocean, creating a powerful atmosphere during movies. SPECIAL FEATURES Eerie environment ideal for horror movies | The ghost of little Lucy roams through the haunted valley | Get scared during movies The Haunted Valley v2.0 features an eerie environment that will give you the shivers. It's great for watching horror movies. This VR Cinema is haunted by little Lucy, the ghost of a 12 year old girl who disappeared in 1894. Lucy does not like it very much when strangers are around. Be prepared, as she will not hesitate to give you a scare once in a while. You can spot Lucy in four locations at random times if you keep your eyes peeled. Are you ready for little Lucy? SPECIAL FEATURES Integrated web browser and chat room | YouTube video support | Watch videos together | Play browser games | Multiplayer audience | CINEVEO's Stereo PFOV Lighting™ The Internet Cinema is based on the 4D Movie Theater and features an integrated web browser, a multi-player audience and a chat room. You can watch YouTube videos, surf the web and play browser games in the Internet Cinema. You can do this alone or together with other CINEVEO users. You can meet other CINEVEO users in the integrated chat room to talk, share links to YouTube videos and watch them together. SPECIAL FEATURES Just the screen and you in empty space | CINEVEO's ULTRA - 3D™ Mode The Void features a distraction free environment in pitch black darkness. The Void is the only cinema theme that currently supports viewing 3D movies in CINEVEO's ULTRA - 3D™ Mode .

Name: HEX: Shards of Fate
Description:
HEX: Shards of Fate – Magical World for Keen Card Players HEX: Shards of Fate is an exciting challenge for fans of cards, action and strategy. Explore the fabulous world of Entrath, wrestle your way through sinister dungeons and use skill and guile in matches against other players. This digital card game combines the best of two worlds: classic TCGs and online RPGs . Create powerful decks from over 1,000 unique cards and dive into epic battles. Earn equipment items and use socketing gems to further improve your deck, whilst a variety of champions with individual skills complement your card armies. Cool animations and effects enrich the gaming experience on your road to victory! Experience HEX: Shards of Fate Play the first digital TCG with RPG elements Select a champion from eight races and three classes Explore dungeons in the exciting single-player mode Put your skills to the test in 1 vs 1 matches and hone your strategies Trade cards with friends and other players Win amazing prizes in daily tournaments with up to 128 players

Name: Duelyst
Description:
DUELYST is the ultimate collectible tactics game. Head-to-head matches last between five and ten minutes, and focus on thoughtful decision-making and strategic positioning. Players are rewarded with new battle units every monthly season. Assemble your battle deck from over 800 cards across 6 unique Factions and test your mettle against other players online in ranked season ladder and draft mode tournaments. Key Features Infinite Depth : With a tactical battlefield, positioning of your units truly matters. And with over 500 battle units, no battle will ever be the same! Lightning-Fast Matches : Online matches last from five to ten minutes. Get your competitive fix anytime during the day! Competitive : Play against players of equal skill on the monthly Season Ranked Ladder. Or compete in the Gauntlet Draft Mode, where the longer you last, the better the rewards! Classic Pixel Art Aesthetic : Bright and detailed pixel art for all Generals and Cards with full 16-bit spell and effect animations. Immersive Lore : Expansive codex and history spanning 30,000 years to uncover the mysteries of the denizens of Mythron. Jump down the rabbit hole! Competitive head-to-head turn-based battles at its best!

# Faeria: A Strategic Card Battle Experience

Faeria offers a unique living board and a deeply strategic card battle experience. Players craft decks, shape the battlefield, and fight for victory, setting it apart from other strategy games.

## Dynamic Battlefield Creation

Faeria's gameplay centers on its innovative battlefield mechanics. Players build decks and influence the game's terrain. This includes:

*   Raising mountains
*   Cultivating forests
*   Filling lakes with water
*   Harnessing desert sands

This environmental manipulation provides numerous strategic pathways to victory.

## Accessible Card Collection

Faeria uses a straightforward, affordable DLC model, allowing players to earn cards without expensive micro-transactions. All cards are obtainable through gameplay, including:

*   Solo campaigns
*   Draft mode
*   PVP matches

The developers state there are over 100 hours of solo content, featuring co-op missions and puzzles. This rewards player dedication and skill.

## Diverse Game Modes

Explore the Oversky to confront World Bosses or test your skills against AI in draft mode. Pandora, Faeria's draft mode, pushes deck-building to its limits. Compete against AI or other players in PVP. Success yields rewards, aiding card collection and enjoyment.

## A Thriving Community

Faeria has a supportive community. Connect via:

*   Official Discord channel
*   Subreddit
*   Forums
*   "The Hub"

Years of development have created a welcoming environment. The game hosts regular tournaments with prizes. Spectators can win in-game loot by watching live events. Faeria's esports system rewards top players and offers free rewards to others.

## KARDS: A Strategic WWII Card Game

KARDS is a free-to-play collectible card game (CCG) that immerses players in World War II battlefield tactics. It combines familiar trading card mechanics with strategic depth, allowing you to command grand-scale warfare across land, air, and sea. All cards are available from the start and can be earned through gameplay, daily missions, and achievements.

### Core Gameplay and Strategy

The game features an accessible entry point with familiar trading card gameplay, but its innovative mechanics deliver significant strategic depth. A core innovation is the **frontline system**, where you strategically position units to protect support assets and engage the enemy directly. This fosters dynamic gameplay and diverse strategic approaches.

Players can adopt various strategies, such as:

*   **Blitzkrieg:** Overwhelm opponents with rapid assaults.
*   **Air Superiority:** Dominate the skies to control the battlefield.
*   **Defensive War:** Dig in for a protracted conflict, outproducing and outgunning the enemy.

Effective force management is crucial. Players must balance their **Kredits** to deploy units, operate existing ones, and issue orders to support their plans.

Decks are built around one of the **five major World War II powers**, with the option to include an allied nation for added support. Decks combine units and orders, tailored to specific strategies. Common unit types include:

*   **Infantry:** Ideal for overwhelming opponents with numerous, often less costly units.
*   **Tanks:** Perfect for aggressive assaults with heavily armored forces.
*   **Artillery:** Enables bombardment of enemies from a safe support line.
*   **Aircraft:** Essential for achieving air dominance.

### Progression, Atmosphere, and Development

Players advance through ranks from **Private to Field Marshal**, earning monthly rewards based on their achieved rank. Each card features **beautiful illustrations** in a distinct World War II style. According to 1939 Games, weapons and units are meticulously researched, ensuring their in-game behavior aligns with historical data and specifications.

KARDS boasts a **vibrant player community and active developers**, leading to consistent introduction of new gameplay features and improvements. Numerous expansions have added new ally nations, hundreds of cards, and fresh mechanics. The annual **World Championship** in Iceland highlights the game's competitive spirit. 1939 Games, an **independent studio based in Iceland** founded by veterans of CCP Games, aims to revolutionize the CCG market with KARDS.

GWENT: The Witcher Card Game is a free-to-play online PvP experience that blends CCG and TCG elements. Victory hinges on mastering bluffing, real-time decisions, and meticulous deck construction.

The game features iconic heroes like Geralt and Yennefer, alongside a vast collection of spells and abilities. Players can employ deception and cunning strategies across various game modes, including classic, seasonal, and Arena challenges.

GWENT's progression system is designed to be fair and rewarding, allowing players to collect new cards simply by playing. This means building a competitive deck is enjoyable and free of hidden costs or restrictions.

Visually, the game is stunning, with beautiful hand-drawn art and mesmerizing effects that bring cards, battles, and battlefields to life.

Skill and strategy are paramount in GWENT, with the core objective being to outscore your opponent over three rounds. Players achieve this by playing cards across melee and ranged rows. Winning two out of three rounds secures victory.

GWENT offers diverse game modes:

*   **Online Duels:** Quick games against friends.
*   **PvP Challenges:** Highly competitive matches.
*   **Arena Mode:** Adventurous new challenges.

The gameplay is accessible yet deeply strategic. Players start with 10 cards and can play any card immediately, allowing for early strategic choices. Careful consideration of deck composition and overall strategy is encouraged.

Card Hunter provides a unique online collectible card game experience, merging strategic deck building, tactical combat, and fantasy role-playing. This blend creates an engaging game where players explore a rich world, with tabletop choices impacting in-game actions. The game centers on assembling a party of adventurers for quests in a single-player campaign. Each adventure tests your deck-building and tactical skills against various enemies. You'll collect fantasy gear, including swords, shields, and other adventuring equipment.

A key feature is Card Hunter's distinct deck-building system. Instead of manual construction, the game generates your deck based on equipped items. This ensures fluid gameplay, making item selection crucial for success. Combat occurs on a grid-based, turn-based tactical battlefield, requiring precise card play to defeat foes, gain experience, and earn loot.

Beyond single-player, Card Hunter offers robust multiplayer. Players can join casual or ranked matches for practice or competition. The game includes leagues, like monthly seasons, and themed events such as the Graveyard Gambol, where players control undead minions. Cooperative play lets you team up with friends to face Cardhuntria's dangers together. Substantial additional content enhances the game's appeal. After the main campaign, players can explore adventures with characters from Acquisitions Incorporated, a storyline by Jerry Holkins of Penny Arcade. Expansions add challenges like the Expedition to the Sky Citadel, featuring robots and AI, and Attack of the Artifacts, pitting players against ancient monsters and powerful weapons. This content ensures a consistently evolving and challenging experience.

Name: Etherlords II
Description:
The saga continues! Etherlords II takes you back to the world of Ether and into a whole new realm of fantastic possibilities. Lead your hero on an unforgettable journey through lands filled with unsurpassed beauty and danger to unlock the ultimate mystery. Etherlords II is an exciting mix of role-play and tactical turn-based combat in the best traditions of fantasy trading card games. This version of the game supports co-op battles via Internet, including Round Table mode: round robin elimination tournament with random set of cards. Key Features Five campaigns covering a magnificent fantasy world Hundreds of spells and creatures combine to create nearly unlimited tactical possibilities New monsters and magic that can be used by any of the four races Enhance your Hero’s skills throughout each campaign with new spells, creatures and abilities. Non-linear missions with multiple paths to completion Thorough tutorial system to help you learn basic and advanced dueling tactics 4 multiplayer modes. A dedicated master server that calculates and maintains your statistics and raitings

Magic: The Gathering — Duels of the Planeswalkers 2013 represents a notable strategic advancement for the highly regarded franchise. This latest iteration invites participants on an expansive adventure across imaginative realms, introducing fresh challenges and formidable adversaries. The game delivers a robust experience, suitable for solo endeavors or shared enjoyment with friends, prominently showcasing the engaging Planechase multiplayer mode.

According to reviews, the game introduces several key enhancements to the gameplay experience:

*   **Individual Records:** Players can now meticulously track their progress through newly implemented gameplay statistics.
*   **Unlockable Game Items:** A variety of new game items are discoverable and unlockable, adding to the replayability.
*   **Strategic Land Tapping:** Seasoned players are granted enhanced control, with the ability to choose which lands to tap when casting spells, allowing for greater tactical depth.

Magic 2013 comes equipped with ten distinct, customizable decks. These decks are drawn from the most recent Magic: The Gathering expansions, even providing early access to cards from the Magic 2013 Core Set. Each of these sets further offers an additional 30 unlockable cards, enabling players to refine their strategies even further.

Beyond the extensive deck customization options, players gain a significant degree of control over their mana resources. This is achieved by allowing them to select which lands to tap when casting spells, a feature that experienced players will find particularly beneficial. The game also boasts updated graphics and music, alongside other additional features designed to create a more immersive and engaging experience for all players.

The Planechase multiplayer format supports up to four players or AI opponents as they navigate the vast Multiverse. This mode involves encountering peculiar phenomena and a constantly changing environment, playable both locally and online. Furthermore, the Encounters mode presents unique, puzzle-like challenges. In these challenges, opponents utilize pre-built decks specifically designed to test a wide range of tactical approaches and player ingenuity.

With an expanded tutorial designed to welcome new players and deep, intricate gameplay mechanics that appeal to veterans, Duels of the Planeswalkers 2013 truly caters to all Magic fans. It offers content that is both accessible for newcomers and challenging for seasoned players. The game builds towards a dramatic final confrontation with the powerful dragon Planeswalker, Nicol Bolas, serving as a definitive test of a player's mastery over the game's mechanics and strategies.

Name: Magic: The Gathering - Duels of the Planeswalkers 2012
Description:
All-new and redesigned, Magic: The Gathering — Duels of the Planeswalkers 2012 takes last year’s massive hit game to even greater heights with better graphics, more options, and new challenges! Face off against the AI, or gather your allies for the new multiplayer format: Archenemy, where you team up to take down a boss opponent. And if one of your fellow Planeswalkers drops out, no problem–the AI will drop in for uninterrupted action! Featuring ten unique decks, Duels of the Planeswalkers 2012 also lets you customize those decks. As you progress in the game, you can enhance your deck by swapping in new, unlockable cards! Gather your allies. A challenge awaits.

Name: Freespace 2
Description:
The year is 2367, thirty two years after the Great War. Or at least that is what YOU thought was the Great War. The endless line of Shivan capital ships, bombers and fighters with super advanced technology was nearly overwhelming. As the Terran and Vasudan races finish rebuilding their decimated societies, a disturbance lurks in the not-so-far reaches of the Gamma Draconis system. Your nemeses have arrived... and they are wondering what happened to their scouting party.

Name: EVE Online
Description:
THE #1 SPACE MMO EVE Online is the largest single shard space MMO of all time. With over 7,000 solar systems and nearly 20 years of rich player-created history, join this storied universe and play free to experience everything from immense PvP or PvE battles to mining, exploration, and industry. Seize your destiny as an immortal, a Capsuleer capable of piloting over 350 fully customizable starships from small, nimble Frigates to formidable Battleships and massive Freighters. Embark on a solo adventure through the twisting nexus of wormhole space, form a mighty industrial empire to transform athe building blocks of the universe, or take up arms with likeminded players to conquer vast frontiers together. Who will you be in New Eden? PLAY FREE Experience this vast spaceship MMO for free as an Alpha Clone with access to Frigates, Destroyers, Cruisers, Battlecruisers, and Battleships of any faction. Enterprising Capsuleers may also choose to upgrade to Omega Clone for unlimited Ship access and double training speed. SINGLE SHARD, SINGLE SERVER SANDBOX As a single sharded MMO, all players of EVE Online play on the same server across all timezones. Jump in and join thousands of players in the greatest space sandbox there is. Every decision you make, battle you win, and system you claim becomes a part of the long, rich history of New Eden. Where will you leave your mark? GAMING'S BIGGEST BATTLES There's no limit on what you can accomplish as a Capsuleer. EVE currently holds the Guinness World Record for the largest multiplayer video game PvP battle - 8,825 players in a single conflict. Take part in massive spaceship battles from day one or train up and command those fleets yourself. PLAYER DRIVEN ECONOMY EVE's player economy is one of unprecedented scale. The single shard nature of the universe makes for a single economy spread across thousands of space stations. Whether you want to trade on the local markets, produce new ships and equipment, or make cunning investments based on knowledge of player politics, it's all possible. LIMITLESS CHOICES Pursue a life of exploration, warfare, prosperity, or all of the above! Pilot over 350 different vessels and customize it to your liking with thousands of unique modules. Modify your ship as a fast and nimble fighter or design it from the ground up as a heavily shielded brawler to go toe to toe with others. Feeling lucky? Take a chance and modify your equipment further using alien technology found deep in Abyssal Deadspace. CONTINUOUS DEVELOPMENT With over 17 years of active development and free expansions, EVE is one of the longest running space MMOs out there. Join a thrilling universe filled with the unrelenting activity and combined history of millions of other players!

Name: Kerbal Space Program
Description:
In Kerbal Space Program , take charge of the space program for the alien race known as the Kerbals. You have access to an array of parts to assemble fully-functional spacecraft that flies (or doesn’t) based on realistic aerodynamic and orbital physics. Launch your Kerbal crew into orbit and beyond (while keeping them alive) to explore moons and planets in the Kerbol solar system, constructing bases and space stations to expand the reach of your expedition. Kerbal Space Program features three gameplay modes. In Science Mode, perform space experiments to unlock new technology and advance the knowledge of Kerbalkind. In Career Mode, oversee every aspect of the space program, including construction, strategy, funding, upgrades, and more. In Sandbox, you are free to build any spacecraft you can think of, with all parts and technology in the game. Key Features Build spaceships, rockets, and vehicles using any imaginable combination of parts, each with their own function that will affect the way your spacecraft behaves. Take full control over your ship’s setup to execute complex flight maneuvers. Manage your Kerbal crewmembers, including hiring, training, and sending them into space to become heroes. Discover a whole star system with unique moons and planets, exploring detailed terrain at a vast scale. Send your Kerbal crew outside their ships for “extra-vehicular” activities. Dock spacecraft together to construct space stations, massive starships, and surface bases on new planets. Use satellites to scan terrain and find biomes and other anomalies. Set up communications networks to communicate between your spacecraft and Kerbal Space Center. Research and develop new technologies to extract valuable information and resources from all over the solar system, and much more! Try out the many mods created by the Kerbal Space Program community!

Sins of a Solar Empire: Trinity® offers a unique space strategy experience, blending grand empire-building with real-time combat in what is often termed "RT4X." This genre fusion immerses players in a galactic war where survival hinges on astute management and precise fleet control. The game unfolds across a vast, dynamic 3D galaxy filled with planets, environmental hazards, and strategic opportunities.

**Exploring the Galactic Canvas**

Players will navigate a universe teeming with planets, asteroid fields, plasma storms, and stars. Each of these celestial bodies and phenomena presents distinct strategic choices and yields valuable resources, according to game developers.

**The Strategic Zoom: Seamless Empire to Fleet Command**

A standout feature is the Strategic Zoom, enabling effortless shifts in focus. One moment, you are overseeing the entirety of your burgeoning empire; the next, you are commanding your fleets in the heat of intense space battles.

**Foundations for Galactic Dominance**

Achieving victory in Sins of a Solar Empire: Trinity® necessitates mastery across several critical domains:

*   **Diplomacy and Economic Growth:** Cultivate alliances and establish pacts to secure beneficial bonuses. Engage in trade to bolster your economy. Furthermore, players can hire mercenary pirates to disrupt rivals, though this tactic carries the inherent risk of these forces eventually posing a threat to your own dominion.
*   **Grand Space Engagements:** Participate in colossal battles involving hundreds of vessels. The game's engine can render up to 10,000 particles simultaneously during combat, generating a visually spectacular and chaotic warzone, as noted in player reviews.
*   **Fortifying Your Dominion:** Construct formidable starbases and strategically deploy defensive minefields. Invest in researching advanced technologies to safeguard your worlds. A well-defended empire is paramount for sustained survival.
*   **Sophisticated Diplomatic Maneuvers:** The game's diplomacy system is notably robust, facilitating strong alliances and providing significant strategic advantages. Employing pirates as a tactic to neutralize opponents is a viable strategy, but it is accompanied by the potential for these hired assets to turn against the employer.

Sins of a Solar Empire: Trinity® delivers a profound and captivating galactic combat simulation. It masterfully balances the intricacies of empire management with the demands of tactical warfare, appealing to strategy enthusiasts seeking an innovative space combat challenge.

## Independence War® 2: Edge of Chaos: A Space Combat Saga

*Independence War® 2: Edge of Chaos* immerses players in the perilous Badlands cluster, a setting established 100 years after the events of the original *Independence War*. This particular installment of the acclaimed space combat saga focuses on a deeply personal quest for vengeance. After enduring 15 years of unjust imprisonment for seeking justice for your father's murder, a crime perpetrated by the powerful Corporations, your moment for retribution is finally at hand. The unchecked expansion of these Corporations poses a significant threat to the entire universe, and you find yourself uniquely positioned to confront and challenge their dominance.

You will command a fleet of advanced interstellar hardware, including four formidable futuristic battlecruisers, and lead a daring band of revolutionary pirates against seemingly insurmountable odds. The central conflict of the game is rooted in a stark and unforgiving reality: there simply isn't enough space for everyone in the galaxy. According to game developers, the experience features a user-friendly interface with highly customizable functions, allowing players to tailor their controls. Furthermore, it boasts a physically realistic flight model grounded in Newtonian mechanics, a testament to its sophisticated design. Detachable fighters can be deployed to act as independent gun turrets or loyal wingmen, adding a strategic layer to combat. Players have the freedom to explore 16 distinct star systems, each populated with dynamically generated traffic, offering a living, breathing universe. Ship customization is extensive, with over 30 weapons and accessories available to outfit your vessels. The narrative unfolds across four distinct acts, promising a rich and engaging storyline.

The game leverages the advanced Flux™ Graphics Engine, which is compatible with Microsoft Direct3D®, to deliver stunning visual effects. These effects include incredibly realistic ship details and impressive fire and flare animations, as noted by reviewers. The ship models themselves are based on high-detail CGI creations, reminiscent of movie productions. Online multiplayer functionality supports up to 8 players across various modes, such as DeathMatch and Capture the Flag. While Atari no longer actively maintains official servers for online play, local network multiplayer remains a viable option for engaging with friends. For those seeking optimal performance on modern computer systems, running the game in Windows XP SP2 compatibility mode is a recommended setting.

Name: Universe Sandbox Legacy
Description:
/ Create and destroy on a scale you've never imagined with the ultimate space simulator. Harness the power to create black holes, collide galaxies, and manipulate gravity with just a few clicks. Inspired by the software astronomers use to unlock the mysteries of our universe, never before has astronomy been so interactive or so much fun. Spawn a massive moon to tear apart Saturn’s rings or launch a rogue star to rip the planets from their orbits around our sun. After unleashing catastrophic destruction, create your own solar system and share it with friends. Key Features Interactive, real-time, n-body gravity simulator Change any property of any object at any time Real physics, real data, real units, real science Compare the objects in any simulation with chart mode Supports anaglyphic 3D glasses and 3D DLP televisions Built in tutorials and step-by-step activities Includes 70+ simulations both real and fantastical Extensive editing and creation tools make it easy to build your own simulations

Name: Hardspace: Shipbreaker
Description:
Welcome to LYNX, the solar system’s leader in spaceship salvaging! We offer you the privilege of helping turn humanity’s past into its future by salvaging ships in zero-g. Each one is a puzzle, and how you solve it is up to you! Carve your way in, salvage everything, and maximize your profit. Our cutting-edge LYNX tech helps you do the job. Slice metal with the laser cutter and use the grapple tool to move salvage with ease. Earn upgrades, such as demo charges, sensors, and safety gear. Careful where you point those tools! Hazards include explosive decompression, fuel, electricity, and radiation. Your life is protected by our EverWork™ technology, but our profits aren’t. Your LYNX adventure starts now! Account balance owing is: 1,252,594,441.92 Credits Start paying that debt! Good luck, shipbreaker! Experience daily life as a blue-collar spaceship salvager Cut and destroy at will in a next-gen physics sim Salvage through a compelling campaign, relax in freeplay, or compete in timed challenges Explore a variety of ship types with unlimited variations Upgrade tools and gear to take on bigger and harder ships

## Sins of a Solar Empire®: Rebellion - A New Era of Galactic Conflict

*Sins of a Solar Empire: Rebellion* is a standalone RT4X game, merging real-time strategy with deep 4X mechanics. Players explore, expand, exploit, and exterminate their way to galactic supremacy in a galaxy fractured by war. New ideologies and crumbling alliances define this installment, according to Stardock Entertainment.

### The Great Schism: Factions Divided

The ongoing war has split major galactic powers into distinct Loyalist and Rebel factions for each race. These divisions unlock unique technologies, ships, and playstyles, altering the strategic landscape.

*   **Trader Emergency Coalition:** Loyalists focus on fortified defenses, while Rebels adopt a militant stance, aiming to crush all opposition.
*   **Advent Unity:** Loyalists pursue revenge and assimilation, whereas Rebels suspect internal corruption has led the Unity astray.
*   **Vasari Empire:** Loyalist Vasari abandon cooperation, driven by a desperate need for resources. Rebel Vasari recognize the necessity of collaboration for survival.

### New Power and Tactics

*Sins of a Solar Empire: Rebellion* introduces new units and enhancements to deepen strategic gameplay.

#### Titan Class Warships

Colossal Titan class warships are game-changers, capable of tipping the scales of power. Each faction fields its own unique titan with distinct strengths, as noted in game reviews.

#### Capital and Corvette Ships

A new capital ship class joins each fleet, offering fresh tactical options. Existing capital ships are upgraded with four distinct ability levels for specialized development. Small, agile Corvette class ships are designed for harassment and swift strikes.

### Enhanced Presentation and Gameplay

The game boasts significant visual and auditory upgrades, alongside new victory conditions.

#### Visual and Audio Enhancements

Experience enhanced graphics, particle effects, lighting, and race-specific user interfaces. Over 60 minutes of original music, new sound effects, and dozens of new voiceovers immerse players.

#### New Victory Conditions

Multiple paths to victory are now available, including Military, Diplomatic, Research, Last Flagship Standing, Last Capital Standing, and Occupation.

#### Tutorials and Performance

New and updated tutorials cater to all players, ensuring a smooth entry into empire building. Optimizations also provide improved performance.

Name: Elite Dangerous
Description:
Elite Dangerous is the definitive massively multiplayer space epic, bringing gaming’s original open world adventure to the modern generation with a connected galaxy, evolving narrative and the entirety of the Milky Way re-created at its full galactic proportions. Starting with only a small starship and a few credits, players do whatever it takes to earn the skill, knowledge, wealth and power to survive in a futuristic cutthroat galaxy and to stand among the ranks of the iconic Elite. In an age of galactic superpowers and interstellar war, every player’s story influences the unique connected gaming experience and handcrafted evolving narrative. Governments fall, battles are lost and won, and humanity’s frontier is reshaped, all by players’ actions. Horizons Season Now Included! Experience a whole new angle on the galaxy with the Horizons season, now included in Elite Dangerous . Journey from the stars to the surfaces of strange worlds, hit the ground running in the Scarab Surface Recon Vehicle, craft weapons, deploy ship-launched fighters and experience exhilarating multicrew co-op action. A Galaxy Of Wonders The 400 billion star systems of the Milky Way are the stage for Elite Dangerous ' open-ended gameplay. The real stars, planets, moons, asteroid fields and black holes of our own galaxy are built to their true epic proportions in the largest designed playspace in videogame history. A Unique Connected Game Experience Governments fall, battles are lost and won, and humanity’s frontier is reshaped, all by players’ actions. In an age of galactic superpowers and interstellar war, every player’s personal story influences the connected galaxy and handcrafted, evolving narrative. Blaze Your Own Trail Upgrade your ship and customize every component as you hunt, explore, fight, mine, smuggle, trade and survive in the cutthroat galaxy of the year 3301. Do whatever it takes to earn the skill, knowledge, wealth and power to stand among the ranks of the Elite. Massively Multiplayer Experience unpredictable encounters with players from around the world in Elite Dangerous ’ vast, massively multiplayer space. Experience the connected galaxy alone in Solo mode or with players across the world in Open Play, where every pilot you face could become a trusted ally or your deadliest enemy. You will need to register a free Elite Dangerous account with Frontier to play the game. A Living Game Elite Dangerous grows and expands with new features and content. Major updates react to the way players want to play and create new gameplay opportunities for the hundreds of thousands of players cooperating, competing and exploring together in the connected galaxy. The Original Open World Adventure Elite Dangerous is the third sequel to 1984's genre-defining Elite, bringing gaming’s original open world adventure into the modern generation with a connected galaxy, evolving narrative and the entire Milky Way recreated at its full galactic proportions.

## Master the Galaxy in STAR WARS™: Squadrons: Your Guide to Intense Space Combat

For fans of thrilling space combat and immersive dogfights, STAR WARS™: Squadrons offers an unparalleled experience. This game plunges you directly into the cockpit for intense first-person battles, where you'll join your squadron for exhilarating multiplayer action. As a pilot, you'll command iconic starfighters from both the New Republic and Imperial fleets in strategic 5v5 combat scenarios. This core feature has been widely praised by players for its depth and excitement, according to numerous player reviews.

STAR WARS™: Squadrons provides extensive customization options for your starfighter, allowing you to tailor your ship with numerous modifications and cosmetic appearances. Mastering legendary craft like the X-wing and TIE fighter is crucial for success in these engagements. An immersive cockpit view offers a vital tactical advantage, enabling you to divert power between weapons, shields, and engines. This first-person perspective is essential for survival and making split-second strategic decisions, as highlighted in numerous game reviews. Beyond the multiplayer action, the game features a galaxy-spanning story that explores the meaning of being a pilot in the aftermath of *Return of the Jedi*. This narrative allows you to experience the conflict from both New Republic and Imperial perspectives.

The intense multiplayer action includes thrilling 5v5 dogfights and the opportunity to influence larger fleet battles. Success in these engagements relies heavily on effective communication and coordination within your team, a point consistently emphasized by players. You'll master diverse starfighter classes, from the agile A-wing to the devastating TIE bomber, each offering unique tactical advantages. A rewarding progression system allows you to unlock new components, weapons, hulls, engines, shields, and cosmetic items. For the ultimate immersion, the entire game supports Virtual Reality, placing you directly in the cockpit. Triumph as a team by completing challenging objectives on diverse battlefields like Yavin Prime and the shattered moon of Galitan. STAR WARS™: Squadrons masterfully blends a compelling narrative with exhilarating multiplayer action, creating a deeply satisfying experience for fans of space combat simulations.

## Mastering Alchemical Engineering in Opus Magnum

Opus Magnum, a unique creation from Zachtronics, immerses players in the complex world of alchemy. You play as Anataeus Vaya, appointed Head Alchemist for House Van Tassen. This role, however, suggests that exceptional alchemical skill alone may not be enough to overcome future challenges.

Central to Opus Magnum is the **transmutation engine**, the core tool for alchemical engineering. This apparatus is vital for creating essential materials, from potent medicines and valuable gems to powerful weapons. Players must design and build intricate mechanical systems to drive alchemical reactions. These systems employ programmable arms for precise handling, adaptable tracks for controlled movement, and specialized devices like Van Berlo’s wheel and the Glyph of Animismus.

Opus Magnum features an open-ended puzzle design that encourages global competition. The goal is to create solutions that are elegant, efficient, and compact. The game also allows players to export animated GIFs of their machine designs, showcasing their ingenious creations.

To enhance replayability and community engagement, Opus Magnum includes the **Steam Workshop**. This feature lets players design and share custom puzzles using an editor. Players can also explore top user-submitted puzzles, often highlighted by Zachtronics in the Journal of Alchemical Engineering.

The game's narrative unfolds amidst covert plots and political intrigue within the city's ancient Houses. Alchemists, capable of fabricating nearly any substance, are highly sought after, making them both valuable and vulnerable.

For a break from engineering, Opus Magnum offers **Sigmar's Garden**, an alchemically themed solitaire minigame. While each puzzle is solvable, victory is not guaranteed, adding strategic depth. As the developers note, the core gameplay emphasizes creative problem-solving and continuous optimization.

Name: Factorio
Description:
Factorio is a game in which you build and maintain factories. You will be mining resources, researching technologies, building infrastructure, automating production and fighting enemies. In the beginning you will find yourself chopping trees, mining ores and crafting mechanical arms and transport belts by hand, but in short time you can become an industrial powerhouse, with huge solar fields, oil refining and cracking, manufacture and deployment of construction and logistic robots, all for your resource needs. However this heavy exploitation of the planet's resources does not sit nicely with the locals, so you will have to be prepared to defend yourself and your machine empire. Join forces with other players in cooperative Multiplayer , create huge factories, collaborate and delegate tasks between you and your friends. Add mods to increase your enjoyment, from small tweak and helper mods to complete game overhauls, Factorio's ground-up Modding support has allowed content creators from around the world to design interesting and innovative features. While the core gameplay is in the form of the freeplay scenario, there are a range of interesting challenges in the form of Scenarios . If you don't find any maps or scenarios you enjoy, you can create your own with the in-game Map Editor , place down entities, enemies, and terrain in any way you like, and even add your own custom script to make for interesting gameplay. Discount Disclaimer: We don't have any plans to take part in a sale or to reduce the price for the foreseeable future. What people say about Factorio No other game in the history of gaming handles the logistics side of management simulator so perfectly. - Reddit I see conveyor belts when I close my eyes. I may have been binging Factorio lately. - Notch, Mojang Factorio is a super duper awesome game where we use conveyor belts to shoot aliens. - Zisteau, Youtube

Name: SpaceChem
Description:
Zachtronics is back with an ambitious new design-based puzzle game. Take on the role of a Reactor Engineer working for SpaceChem , the leading chemical synthesizer for frontier colonies. Construct elaborate factories to transform raw materials into valuable chemical products! Streamline your designs to meet production quotas and survive encounters with the sinister threats that plague SpaceChem . KEY FEATURES: Over Fifty Mind-bending Puzzles! An original soundtrack by Evan Le Ny, whose music was featured in The Codex of Alchemical Engineering! Twenty challenging achievements!

Name: Autonauts
Description:
Travel the universe colonising uninhabited planets with the sole goal of setting worlds in motion through the power of automation. Fresh from your spaceship you must harvest stick and stone and begin your colonisation efforts. Create rudimentary crafting items from blueprints and slowly build a number of workerbots to aid in your efforts. Teach and shape their artificial intelligence with a visual programming language, then instruct them to begin the formation of your colony. Marvel as a planet you’ve shaped becomes home to a civilisation of workerbots, happy to do your bidding! Expand further with the creation of colonists; beings that require your assistance to survive. Push your workerbots further by introducing fishing, cooking, housing, and tailoring and help the colonists into a state of transcendence. Key Features: Playful Programming Teach your workerbots requisite steps to complete tasks by asking them to repeat actions utilising a visual programming language. Designed to be easy to learn but with added complexity there are numerous possibilities. Automated Automation Build an army of bots to automate just about everything in your colony, teach them what to do and expand both their brains and task possibilities with numerous upgrades and options. Various Ventures From gathering to building, cooking, fishing, tailoring, farming, animal husbandry and more - the world of Autonauts is vast with limitless opportunities to automate and colonise. Charming Creativity The world of Autonauts pops to life with a low-poly art-style married with a consistent and bright colour palette adding depth and scale, creating a relaxing and attractive play space. Autonauts combines the very best of agriculture, simulation, crafting, building, production-line and resource management titles to create a brand new experience unlike any other. Create the automated world of your dreams! The future is now!

Embark on an ambitious journey with Per Aspera, a planetary simulation game where you are tasked with terraforming Mars. This title goes beyond typical base-building, offering a grand-scale simulation that blends hard science fiction with intricate base construction, ultimately expanding your efforts across the entire planet. You will play as AMI, an Artificial Consciousness with the monumental goal of making Mars habitable for human settlement.

Players face the challenge of managing a vast array of resources and constructing interconnected structures that will eventually span the planet. According to scientific theories from major space organizations, players can utilize branching research paths to develop new technologies grounded in real-world science. The game also involves exploring Martian secrets, investigating a mysterious presence, and defending growing settlements from unknown hostile entities.

Per Aspera offers a deeply engaging experience, whether you choose its detailed story mode or prefer to meticulously design your ideal Martian environment in Sandbox Mode. The game features a notable voice cast, including talents such as Troy Baker, Phil LaMarr, and Laila Berzins. Per Aspera also supports multiplayer in Sandbox Mode for up to four players. Drawing inspiration from scientific theories from major space organizations and utilizing geographical data from NASA, the game aims to realistically depict Martian conditions and challenges rooted in theoretical science.

The narrative presents players with critical, planet-wide choices, allowing you to experience the journey of an AI as it undergoes self-discovery and shapes humanity's future. Adapting your evolving programming to ethically complex situations and fostering relationships with human colonists who depend on you for survival are central to the gameplay. Your decisions will directly influence the success of your mission. It is important to note that humanity's prior attempts at colonizing the Red Planet have not always succeeded. Players will discover the remnants of these past failures, learn from their mistakes, and confront a significant threat determined to impede progress at every turn.

Name: Drill Down
Description:
You start out on the surface on a mine shaft, faced with several deposits of valuable ores. You begin building your basic mining rig, harvesting the resources and transporting them via conveyor belts to your storage center. You gather more resources, invest into research & development, discover new techniques and machinery. Your factory grows, your processing chains grow longer, you need to expand. So you dig down deeper into the earth, discovering new materials and opportunities. All the while your factory must stay humming and busy, so you swap back and forth, adjusting conveyor paths and bottlenecks in the system. Refine and improve your materials and products further and further, to eventually be able to use highly advanced tech to create the pinnacle of engineering, a computer chip. Features: - Procedurally generated world - 100 different machines - 100 resources and products - play-time to your first chip: about 30 hours - play-time to you feeling there is nothing left to tweak and you can go outside now: infinity

RAILGRADE invites players to build intricate railway networks and connect industries with essential resources. The game emphasizes managing inputs and outputs to optimize production and create efficient supply chains. This is achieved through multi-level tracks and a variety of engine types, as highlighted by players.

The game offers deep customization for trains, allowing experimentation with different engines and freight. Hundreds of unique engine and cargo combinations provide ample strategic planning opportunities. Efficient supply chains are built by connecting industrial sources and strategically placing numerous trains. The core gameplay blends strategic decision-making and creative construction to rebuild an industrial colony. Success may even earn a return trip to Earth.

RAILGRADE features a single-player campaign with over 50 missions focused on restoring prosperity to an industrial colony. Progress unlocks new industries, upgrades, and gameplay options. The game provides intuitive construction tools for building and managing a bustling railway network. Optimizing train setups and track placement are crucial for navigating terrain and establishing effective delivery routes.

Players control resource production by meticulously managing inputs and outputs, resolving bottlenecks to ensure smooth cargo movement. A cinematic view mode allows players to admire their train fleets. Bonus side missions include searching for oil supplies or developing a rocket launch program. A photo mode lets players showcase their railway setups with various filters. To further colony growth, players can invest in development or use zeppelins for export, according to developer insights.

Name: Human Resource Machine
Description:
Update: now includes the official soundtrack Program little office workers to solve puzzles. Be a good employee! The machines are coming... for your job. Human Resource Machine is a puzzle game for nerds. In each level, your boss gives you a job. Automate it by programming your little office worker. If you succeed, you'll be promoted up to the next level for another year of work in the vast office building. Congratulations! Don't worry if you've never programmed before - programming is just puzzle solving . If you strip away all the 1's and 0's and scary squiggly brackets, programming is actually really simple, logical, beautiful, and something that anyone can understand and have fun with! Are you already an expert? There will be extra challenges for you. From the creators of World of Goo and Little Inferno . Have fun! Management is watching.

## Become a Manufacturing Mogul in Little Big Workshop

**Little Big Workshop** places you in the shoes of a factory manager, where the goal is to build and grow a miniature manufacturing empire. This engaging simulation game combines strategic planning with hands-on management, enabling you to evolve a small area into a busy production hub and establish your own tabletop factory. The central gameplay loop involves meeting various customer needs by manufacturing a broad spectrum of products, ranging from simple rubber ducks to sophisticated drones. Players are involved in every step of the manufacturing process, from obtaining raw materials to putting together intricate items. The game's developers have stated that players can create more than 50 distinct types of items, each made up of several components, and must adapt to a fluctuating market by selling their finished goods to customers.

In your role as the "Big Boss," you are in charge of arranging the factory's layout, assigning tasks to your workers, and obtaining the required equipment. The game stresses the importance of overcoming practical production hurdles and grasping the fundamentals of manufacturing. Essential management duties include refining production lines to boost output, carefully mapping out item assembly sequences on detailed blueprints, and expanding the factory's capacity by purchasing additional desk space for larger projects. A simulated day and night cycle contributes to the immersive atmosphere, necessitating that players manage worker tiredness. The game's creators emphasize the practical elements of manufacturing, offering a simulation that is both easy to grasp and profoundly engaging, fostering player creativity. As players advance, they gain access to advanced machinery and novel production techniques, enabling them to transform their modest workshop into a prosperous business. The game boasts a delightful, model-town aesthetic and incorporates Razer Chroma support for a more interactive experience.

## Big Pharma: Balancing Healing and Profit in a Simulation Game

**Big Pharma** is a simulation game where you lead a pharmaceutical company. Your goal is to create treatments that cure diseases and improve global health. The game explores the tension between helping people and making money. Some medicines are more profitable than others, and sometimes, illness can be good for business. This game offers a look into the complex pharmaceutical industry.

### From Generics to New Cures

You start with limited resources, making basic generic drugs. You can then work towards discovering new active ingredients. This requires better manufacturing equipment to produce advanced medicines. The industry is competitive, with rivals developing their own cures. Market demand can change due to seasons.

### Science Meets Business Strategy

**Big Pharma** combines business simulation with logistics puzzles. First, you develop drug formulas in the lab. Then, you need to turn these scientific ideas into financial success. This needs both an engineering and a business mind. Factory space costs money, and new equipment needs careful planning. The industry requires innovation not just in the lab, but also in the supply chain and market strategy.

### Key Features:

*   **Strategic Challenges:** Face 35 unique challenges across 7 scenarios.
*   **Customizable Play:** Use a custom game mode to tailor your experience.
*   **Free Exploration:** Experiment with strategies in freebuild mode without set goals.
*   **Community Content:** Enhance gameplay with extensive modding support.

The game lets you explore the balance between ethics and profit in the vital pharmaceutical sector.

## Company of Heroes - Legacy Edition: A Timeless WWII Real-Time Strategy Experience

For enthusiasts of World War II real-time strategy games, the **Company of Heroes - Legacy Edition** stands as the definitive, updated iteration of the groundbreaking original, **Company of Heroes (COH1)**.
