This version, now simply listed as 'Company of Heroes' on the Steam platform, is highly recommended for those seeking the most engaging online play and access to its vibrant, active community. It represents the pinnacle of polish for this critically acclaimed title.

Company of Heroes masterfully transports players into the heart of wartime chaos, vividly depicting **acts of profound bravery**, **environments scarred by relentless conflict**, and **dynamic combat scenarios** that necessitate continuous strategic adjustment. The **compelling single-player campaign** chronicles the **unyielding grit of soldiers** facing overwhelming challenges, commencing with the pivotal **D-Day landings in Normandy**. A standout element, frequently lauded by players, is its **intelligent squad AI**. This advanced artificial intelligence imbues troops with a sense of realism, as they adeptly utilize cover and execute tactical maneuvers, significantly enhancing the game's strategic complexity, as noted in numerous player reviews.

Developed using Relic's proprietary engine, Company of Heroes impresses with its **robust visual fidelity** and a **world that dynamically responds to physics**. The strategic imperative to **leverage the environment is paramount**, with **dynamic physics and destructible terrain** ensuring that each engagement unfolds as a unique tactical puzzle. Players are empowered to **demolish structures to reshape the battlefield** and strategically employ buildings for defensive cover. For those drawn to competitive play, the game features robust **multiplayer support for 2 to 8 players**, accessible via LAN or online connections. Players can immerse themselves in the classic **Axis versus Allies conflict**, putting their strategic acumen to the ultimate test. Furthermore, the **COH1 Steam Community and its thriving modding scene remain exceptionally active**, offering a wealth of resources and fostering connections through the [COH1 Community Hub](link-to-community-hub) and the [COH1 Steam Workshop](link-to-steam-workshop). This dedicated modding community has been instrumental in sustaining and expanding the game's enduring appeal.

Name: Company of Heroes: Opposing Fronts
Description:
The next chapter in the #1 rated RTS franchise thrusts players into a hellish war torn landscape to command two battle-hardened armies in relentless campaigns for honor and country. Players lead the tenacious British 2nd Army during the heroic World War II liberation of Caen, France, and command the German Panzer Elite as they struggle to repel the largest airborne invasion in history. Two New Armies: Play as the British 2nd Army or German Panzer Elite, each with devastating command trees options and unit upgrades. Two Full Campaigns: Command the British 2nd Army to liberate the key strategic position of Caen, France. Control the German Panzer Elite to repel the Allied airborne invasion in Operation Market Garden. Real War, Real Battlefields, Real War Enhanced: Mission Persistence, Dynamic Weather Effects, Enhanced Vehicle Tactics and more deliver a new level of realism and all new battlefield tactics. All new Multiplayer Options: Combine Company of Heroes™: Opposing Fronts™ with the original Company of Heroes for a total of four playable armies online. Join British artillery with American armor to dominate the 3rd Reich or utilize Wehrmacht and Panzer Elite blitzkrieg tactics to annihilate the Allied invasion. DirectX® 10 Support provides the most realistic RTS experience available with enhanced lighting and incredible terrain detail.

In the world of Fuga: Melodies of Steel, a harrowing conflict erupts, transforming a once tranquil village into a battlefield. As war descends, a group of courageous children, driven by an unwavering resolve to protect their loved ones, embark on a perilous mission. Their only hope lies in a colossal tank, upon which they launch a daring offensive. This captivating RPG immerses players in the strategic deployment of children, each possessing distinct traits and abilities, to various gun turrets within the tank. Their objective: to combat formidable enemies.

As the children inhabit the tank, they forge bonds, exhibiting a spectrum of emotions and developing deep affinities for one another. The narrative emphasizes the importance of managing these relationships, as they can significantly influence the trajectory of their extraordinary journey. Central to their survival is the Taranis, a colossal and enigmatic ancient weapon. This formidable tank, which serves as the children's sanctuary, harbors profound mysteries and appears to possess a will of its own. In moments of extreme peril, the Taranis is capable of unleashing a forbidden and devastating power: the Soul Cannon.

Fuga: Melodies of Steel presents players with a narrative rich in consequential decisions. The game poses a critical question: will you embrace difficult sacrifices in pursuit of victory, or will you endeavor to discover an alternative, less brutal path? Throughout this engaging RPG, numerous choices must be made to advance the story. However, it is crucial to recognize that the seemingly safest route may not always yield the most favorable outcome. Confronted with dire circumstances, players will be compelled to make difficult decisions, shaping the fate of the children and their quest. The game's design, according to developer CyberConnect2, focuses on these impactful choices and the emotional development of its young protagonists.

Call of Duty: World at War plunges players into the most intense and chaotic World War II combat ever experienced. This installment builds upon the acclaimed Call of Duty 4: Modern Warfare engine to deliver a gritty, uncensored war experience. Players will fight alongside allies through harrowing battles on both the European and Pacific fronts, contributing to the eventual downfall of the Axis powers.

The game introduces a variety of unique enemies and combat tactics, including:

*   **Kamikaze fighters:** Fearless aerial assaults.
*   **Ambush attacks:** Enemies emerging from unexpected locations.
*   **Banzai charges:** All-out, often suicidal, offensive maneuvers.
*   **Cunning cover tactics:** Enemies utilizing the environment for strategic advantage.

**Key Features:**

*   **Co-Op Campaign Mode:** For the first time in the franchise, experience the campaign with up to four players online. This mode enhances camaraderie and tactical execution, offering deeper replayability with challenges, rankings, and online stats. Competitive Co-Op also allows players to test their skills against teammates.
*   **Enhanced Multiplayer:** The addictive class-based multiplayer returns, now featuring vehicle combat with tanks. Persistent stats, player rankings, weapon upgrades, squad-based gameplay, customizable classes, and Perks are all enhanced to set a new standard for online warfare.
*   **Unprecedented Visuals:** Utilizing the Call of Duty 4: Modern Warfare engine, World at War boasts cutting-edge technology. This includes highly-detailed character models, advanced lighting, and stunning special effects. Features like depth of field, rim-lighting, and realistic fire propagation create a truly immersive and dynamic combat environment.

Players will step into the boots of a U.S. Marine and a Russian conscript, battling elite German soldiers and the Imperial Japanese forces across diverse Pacific and European landscapes. Missions involve intense infantry, vehicle, and airborne combat.

Valkyria Chronicles 4 Complete Edition plunges players into a continent torn by war, presenting a fresh narrative that unfolds alongside the original game's events. This installment centers on Squad E of the Federation, under the command of Claude Wallace and his dedicated comrades. Their journey to triumph is fraught with danger, from severe blizzards and persistent imperial forces to the immense power of the Valkyria. The game also showcases the celebrated BLiTZ Battle System and the distinctive CANVAS Graphic Engine, features that have garnered critical acclaim.

The game offers a compelling coming-of-age narrative set against a wartime backdrop. Players will lead a group of resolute young characters, including Commander Claude Wallace, engineer Riley Miller, the spirited Raz, and the accurate sniper Kai Schulen. The story delves into the brutal realities of conflict, questioning whether Squad E's camaraderie can withstand the harsh, frozen battlefields.

A significant advancement is the evolution of the BLiTZ Battle System, which skillfully combines turn-based strategy, RPG elements, and real-time third-person shooting. This iteration introduces key improvements, such as the new Grenadier class, comprehensive battleship support for both offensive and defensive maneuvers, and the "Last Stand" mechanic for units facing imminent defeat. The system also features expanded maps and larger unit counts to better counter the imperial threat, as noted in game reviews.

The series' signature CANVAS aesthetic has been revitalized for contemporary platforms. Inspired by watercolor art, the CANVAS Graphics Engine artfully merges realism with imagination, crafting a vivid and emotionally engaging world. This visual style transforms Squad E's adventure into an interactive painting, a sentiment shared by many players.

Enhancing the experience is the return of Hitoshi Sakimoto, the original composer for the Valkyria Chronicles series, who provides a magnificent orchestral score. Additionally, the PC version boasts significant optimizations, including support for 4K resolutions, adjustable keyboard and mouse controls, and ultra-widescreen displays. It also incorporates Steam achievements and trading cards, enriching the overall player engagement.

The Valkyria Chronicles 4 Complete Edition includes the full game and all additional DLC. This content comprises "Squad E to the Beach," "A Captainless Squad," "Expert Level Skirmishes," "The Two Valkyria," "Advance Ops," and "A United Front with Squad 7," delivering a comprehensive and immersive gameplay experience.

Name: Steel Division: Normandy 44
Description:
Steel Division: Normandy 44 is a Tactical Real-Time Strategy (RTS) game, developed by Eugen Systems, the creators of titles like Wargame and R.U.S.E. This new game puts players in command of detailed, historically accurate tanks, troops, and vehicles at the height of World War II. Players can measure their tactical skills against several opponents in big multiplayer battles or against enemies in a challenging single-player campaign. Steel Division: Normandy 44 allows players to take control over legendary military divisions from six different countries, such as the American 101st Airborne, the German armored 21st Panzer or the 3rd Canadian Division, during the invasion of Normandy in 1944.

**Command & Conquer™ Remastered Collection: A Modern RTS Revival**

The iconic Command & Conquer™ and Red Alert™ real-time strategy (RTS) franchises have been meticulously remastered in stunning 4K. Developed by Petroglyph Games, a studio comprising former Westwood Studios members, this collection revitalizes these beloved classics with numerous modern enhancements.

**Key Features:**

*   **Visual Upgrades:** Experience games in 4K resolution, with the ability to toggle between legacy and remastered graphics in real-time during solo play. This allows players to appreciate the visual evolution of these titles.
*   **Expanded Content:** The collection includes all three original expansion packs. A bonus gallery offers over 4 hours of unreleased footage and photos. Over 7 hours of remastered music are featured, with 20 tracks re-recorded by original composer Frank Klepacki and the Tiberian Sons. Hours of upscaled full-motion video cinematics are also included. Original console missions and cinematic videos are now available on PC.
*   **Modernized Gameplay:** A redesigned Sidebar UI reduces scrolling, and an improved Jukebox allows full soundtrack customization. Customizable hotkeys support the new UI. Control improvements enhance mouse movement, camera, unit queueing, and selection. Camera zoom allows viewing distances from legacy DOS to Gold editions. Skirmish mode, new for Tiberian Dawn, offers AI opponents with adjustable difficulty. The Map Editor provides terrain control. A new Mission Selection Screen tracks campaign progress.
*   **Enhanced Multiplayer:** Rebuilt multiplayer features custom game lobbies for setting rules, teams, and maps. Enjoy 1v1 Quickmatches and Leaderboards. Replays and Observer mode are also included.
*   **Modding and Community:** Steam Workshop support facilitates creating, sharing, and playing mods, fostering a vibrant community.
*   **Accessibility and Localization:** In-game tooltips, quicksave/autosave support, and cinematic subtitles are provided. Text localization is available in multiple languages. Voice-over is in English, French, and German. Original voice-over actress Kia Huntzinger reprised her role as EVA for Tiberian Dawn, re-recording lines in high definition.

The Steam version further enhances the experience with achievements, friends lists, Trading Cards, and Steam Workshop support for user maps. Welcome back, Commander.

## Red Orchestra: Ostfront 41-45 - Eastern Front Realism

Red Orchestra: Ostfront 41-45 offers a deeply realistic first-person shooter experience set on the Eastern Front of World War II. The game emphasizes authentic combat, immersing players in intense historical battles.

### Combat Roles

Players can choose from distinct roles:

*   **Infantry:** Engage in close and ranged combat with historically accurate firearms.
*   **Vehicle Crew:** Command detailed armored vehicles, including tanks and half-tracks.

### Unrivaled Realism

The game is renowned for its simulation-level realism, featuring:

#### Combined Arms Warfare

Experience battles that blend infantry and vehicle combat within meticulously recreated environments.

#### Advanced Ballistics

Realistic physics necessitate tactical positioning and the use of cover. Engagements can extend beyond 800 meters, according to developer insights.

#### Strategic Communication

Integrated Voice Over IP (VoIP) facilitates crucial team coordination.

#### Immersive Audio

Authentic sound effects and 3D positional audio create a profound battlefield atmosphere.

#### Authentic Weapon Handling

Features include 3D 'Iron Sights,' a unique 3D scope system, and a true weapon deployment system for enhanced accuracy.

#### Tactical Movement

An advanced movement system allows for diving and leaning, providing tactical advantages.

### Key Features and Updates

Red Orchestra: Ostfront 41-45 has seen significant content additions.

#### Summer '07 Update

This free update introduced:

*   **Krivoi Rog Map:** The largest tank combat map to date, spanning 16 square kilometers with a 3000-meter viewable range, supporting up to 50 players.
*   **Panzer IV G Vehicle:** Added for German players.
*   **Graphical Enhancements:** Included an adaptive bloom system and configurable Anti-Aliasing and Anisotropic Filtering.

#### Spring '07 Map Pack

This pack features ten new maps from Tripwire's Custom Map Competition:

*   **'Smolensk Stalemate':** Focused on infantry combat in ruined villages.
*   **'Leningrad':** Provided intense urban fighting with armor support.
*   **'Berezina':** Introduced the Russian BT-7 light tank with tank riders and the first functional anti-tank gun.
*   **'Black Day July':** A prime map for tank enthusiasts, set near Prokhorovka.

#### Additional Enhancements

Further additions include:

*   **Increased Player Limits:** Multiplayer battles support over 50 players.
*   **Community Content:** Incorporated the Russian BT-7 light tank with infantry tank riders and a player-controllable anti-tank gun.
*   **New Soundtrack:** Features a complete in-game soundtrack by Matthew Burns.
*   **Gameplay Improvements:** Features were added based on competitive community requests.

Name: War Thunder
Description:
War Thunder is the most comprehensive free-to-play, cross-platform, MMO military game dedicated to aviation, armoured vehicles, from the early 20th century to the most advanced modern combat units. Join now and take part in major battles on land, in the air, and at sea, fighting with millions of players from all over the world in an ever-evolving environment. In War Thunder, aircraft, attack helicopters, ground forces and naval ships collaborate in realistic competitive battles. You can choose from over 2,000 vehicles and an extensive variety of combat situations many of which are exclusive. You can find yourself blasting your pursuers from a bomber turret, defending your teammates on the ground from an air raid with anti-aircraft guns, shooting down enemy planes with a firestorm from multiple rocket launchers, or trying to sink an enemy warship with a torpedo from a fast attack boat. Features include: Seamless cross-platform gameplay between Windows PC, Linux, Mac, PlayStation®4, PlayStation®5, Xbox One with Xbox Series X|S – everyone on the same server. Over 2,000 highly detailed aircraft, helicopters, tanks, warships and other combat vehicles crafted carefully from historical documents and surviving sources. 100 maps representing the main historical battle theaters. Intense PvP experiences in full-scale combat missions at various difficulty settings for all play styles and degrees of experience. Rich PvE content including dynamic historical campaigns and solo missions. Regular content updates including new vehicles, maps, missions and nations. Astonishing graphics, authentic sound effects and beautiful music creating an atmosphere to fully immerse yourself in. Create custom content for War Thunder and share it on War Thunder Live , with the prospect of earning real money through the Revenue Share Partner System!

Name: Wargame: European Escalation
Description:
2 sides, 8 nations, and one battlefield: Europe! Wargame: European Escalation is an intense and spectacular Real Time Strategy game, where realism and strategy are brought to the front lines. With a phenomenal range of vehicles and units (over 350 different models), build your army and enter a huge military campaign across Europe of the 80's, as the Cold War is about to become World War 3. With the powerful IRISZOOM ™, Wargame offers breathtaking graphics and battles as spectacular as they are strategic. Prepare to bring hundreds of units of all kinds--tanks, helicopters, squad Infantry, etc.--under your command in intense battles on gigantic maps stretching up to 60 square miles! Online service EugenNet© provides a full multiplayer experience with creation of clans, organizing games, and world rankings where up to 8 players can compete simultaneously in massive battles involving hundreds of units!

Name: Persona 5 Royal
Description:
Prepare for the award-winning RPG experience in this definitive edition of Persona 5 Royal, featuring a treasure trove of downloadable content included! Forced to transfer to a high school in Tokyo, the protagonist has a strange dream. “You truly are a prisoner of fate. In the near future, ruin awaits you.” With the goal of “rehabilitation” looming overhead, he must save others from distorted desires by donning the mask of a Phantom Thief. Key Features: Explore Tokyo, unlock Personas, customize your own personal Thieves Den, experience alternate endings, and more Become the ultimate Phantom Thief and defy conventions, discover the power within, and fight for justice in the definitive version of Persona 5 Royal Includes over 40 items of previously released downloadable content Choose between Japanese and English VO

Name: Sid Meier's Civilization® IV
Description:
With over 6 million units sold and unprecedented critical acclaim from fans and press around the world, Sid Meier's Civilization is recognized as one of the greatest PC game franchises of all-time. Now, Sid Meier and Firaxis Games will take this incredibly fun and addictive game to new heights by adding new ways to play and win, new tools to manage and expand your civilization, all-new easy to use mod capabilities and intense multiplayer modes and options*. Civilization IV will come to life like never before in a beautifully detailed, living 3D world that will elevate the gameplay experience to a whole new level. Civilization IV has already been heralded as one of the top ten games of 2005, and a must-have for gamers around the globe! *Mac version's Online Multiplayer is no longer supported.

## Divinity: Original Sin - Enhanced Edition: A Revamped RPG Classic

*Divinity: Original Sin - Enhanced Edition* offers a comprehensive revamp of a classic RPG, promising an immersive experience for both new and returning players. This edition significantly enhances the original game with thousands of improvements, according to the developers.

### Key Features and Gameplay

The Enhanced Edition introduces several key features designed to deepen the player experience. These include full voiceovers for the narrative, new game modes such as Explorer, Classic, Tactician, and Honour, and full controller support. A dynamic split-screen co-op mode allows for local multiplayer, while expanded story content, including a brand-new ending, adds hours of new and revised narrative elements. Players can also expect new combat options with fresh weapon styles, skills, puzzles, and enemies, alongside improved loot and balancing.

The core gameplay pillars remain strong, emphasizing party-based decisions where companion interactions shape the narrative. Strategic, turn-based combat is central, requiring careful consideration of every action. The game encourages open-world exploration across a vast, interactive world. Players assume the role of a Source Hunter, tasked with combating forbidden magic within an epic narrative that begins with a murder investigation.

### Unparalleled Freedom and Interaction

*Divinity: Original Sin - Enhanced Edition* provides remarkable freedom, akin to a pen-and-paper RPG. Players can explore diverse environments, battle creatures, and find valuable items with flexible approaches to challenges. A standout feature is environmental manipulation; combining skills and spells with the environment leads to dynamic outcomes. For instance, heating ice creates water, boiling water generates steam, and electrifying steam can stun foes, as noted by game reviewers. The game also boasts classless character creation, allowing for unique builds without traditional restrictions, and extensive item interaction to discover new possibilities.

### Co-op and Story

Team up with a friend online or via split-screen to face the game's challenges together. Dive into the early *Divinity* universe and experience a rich narrative where your party members are vital to navigating the many decisions throughout your adventure.

Name: Sid Meier's Civilization® IV
Description:
With over 6 million units sold and unprecedented critical acclaim from fans and press around the world, Sid Meier's Civilization is recognized as one of the greatest PC game franchises of all-time. Now, Sid Meier and Firaxis Games will take this incredibly fun and addictive game to new heights by adding new ways to play and win, new tools to manage and expand your civilization, all-new easy to use mod capabilities and intense multiplayer modes and options*. Civilization IV will come to life like never before in a beautifully detailed, living 3D world that will elevate the gameplay experience to a whole new level. Civilization IV has already been heralded as one of the top ten games of 2005, and a must-have for gamers around the globe! *Mac version's Online Multiplayer is no longer supported.

Divinity: Original Sin 2 - Definitive Edition delivers a redefined role-playing experience, immersing players in a world on the brink of destruction. With the Divine gone and the malevolent Void threatening, dormant powers awaken. In this land where trust is scarce and darkness resides, players face a central question: who will you become?

The game offers exceptional freedom in character creation. Players can choose to be a flesh-eating Elf, a proud Imperial Lizard, or even an Undead, with their race and origin significantly shaping their story. Six unique Origin Characters are available, each with detailed backstories and personal quests. Alternatively, players can create their own character as a Human, Lizard, Elf, Dwarf, or Undead. Every choice, from dialogue to combat, actively influences the narrative and the world of Rivellon.

Exploration and interaction are virtually boundless. Players are encouraged to explore any area, speak with any character, and engage with every element in the expansive world. This unrestricted gameplay permits the elimination of any non-player character without hindering progress, and the ability to converse with animals can uncover hidden secrets. Even interactions with ghosts can offer unique perspectives, as noted by some players.

Combat in Divinity: Original Sin 2 features a complex, turn-based system where strategic thinking and environmental interaction are crucial. Players can combine elements for powerful effects, use elevation and surroundings for tactical advantages, and master over 200 skills across 12 distinct disciplines. The game includes AI 2.0, designed to present a clever and challenging opponent.

This epic journey can be experienced solo or with up to three companions in cooperative mode, supporting both online and local split-screen play with full controller support. For those who wish to create their own stories, the Game Master Mode allows for the creation of custom adventures and campaigns. Additionally, the Steam Workshop provides access to a vast collection of player-created content and modifications.

Visually, Divinity: Original Sin 2 - Definitive Edition is a triumph, offering a stunning 4K experience that advances RPG visuals and truly marks a new era for the genre.

Name: Rome: Total War™ - Collection
Description:
Once the Roman Empire is under your command, don't lay down your sword just yet - the Barbarians are coming. With two award-winning titles from the esteemed Total War series, you'll have twice as many obstacles and opportunities to control and conquer the greatest empire ever known to man. The Collection Edition includes: Rome: Total War Guide one of three noble Roman families on a century spanning quest to seize control of the Roman Empire. Rome: Total War - Barbarian Invasion (official expansion pack to Rome: Total War) Witness the decline of Rome as Barbarian hordes attack, forcing a bitter internal struggle between rival factions. Voted 2004 Best Strategy game by IGN, GameSpy and GameSpot. Fight alongside or against history's greatest leaders such as Julius Caesar, Spartacus, and Hannibal to expand or destroy the Roman Empire. Lay siege against the Romans as Attila the Hun, fearful Saxons, or other savage factions using signature weapons and abilities. Command warrior-tested legions in cinematic epic battles with thousands of soldiers on-screen at once. A century-spanning campaign charges players with strategically managing the economic, civil, religious and military arms of their empire.

Name: Galactic Civilizations® II: Ultimate Edition
Description:
Get the complete Galactic Civilizations II saga including the acclaimed PC strategy game of the year Galactic Civilizations II: Dread Lords, the award winning expansion pack Dark Avatar, and the newest expansion pack Twilight of the Arnor! Galactic Civilizations II: Dread Lords: Galactic Civilizations II is the sequel to 2003's hit turn-based strategy game of the same name. The player takes on the role of the leader of a space-faring civilization and must guide its expansion in a hostile galaxy. Gamers must balance their economic, technological, diplomatic, cultural, and military power to forge alliances, fight wars, and ultimately dominate the galaxy. The game is single-player and allows the player to play randomly generated galactic maps or play through a multi-mission campaign that tells the story of an ancient enemy called the Dread Lords. Galactic Civilizations II: Dark Avatar: The expansion pack for Stardock's award-winning hit strategy game, Galactic Civilizations II: Dread Lords. This expansion pack not only adds the usual content that expansion packs tend to do such as new opponents, new units and a new campaign. It also greatly expands the game play of Galactic Civilizations II. New features include asteroid belts on the map that can be mined for resources, unique planets that require special technologies to colonize, spies to conduct sabotage and destabilization (or used to protect your worlds from the same), new types of diplomatic treaties, an enhanced artificial intelligence engine, and much more! Galactic Civilizations II: Twilight of the Arnor: The year is 2227 and the fire of war is consuming the galaxy thanks to the manipulations of the evil Dread Lords. But the remaining factions, led by the humans, have a plan to rid the galaxy of the Dread Lords once and for all. Expand the Galactic Civilizations II universe with Terror Stars, unique technology trees per civilization, Map editors, Custom Scenario makers, campaign editors, new types of ships, new planetary improvements, and much more! Key features: Beautiful 3D engine brings planets, stars, asteroids and ship battles to life. Create custom 3D ships piece-by-piece with your Shipyard. Play as any of a dozen unique civilizations or create your own. Multiple paths to victory: Military conquest, cultural domination, political alliance, technological supremacy or ascension. Addictive gameplay: Dynamic galaxies ranging from tiny to gigantic. Superior multi-threaded artificial intelligence enables computer players to provide a challenge without having to cheat. Put your scores online via the Metaverse and compete with players from around the world. Fully moddable design enables players to create unique opponents, graphics and scenarios. Advanced diplomacy enables players to trade, make treaties, alliances and more.

Name: Sid Meier's Civilization® V
Description:
The Flagship Turn-Based Strategy Game Returns Become Ruler of the World by establishing and leading a civilization from the dawn of man into the space age: Wage war, conduct diplomacy, discover new technologies, go head-to-head with some of history’s greatest leaders and build the most powerful empire the world has ever known. INVITING PRESENTATION: Jump right in and play at your own pace with an intuitive interface that eases new players into the game. Veterans will appreciate the depth, detail and control that are highlights of the series. BELIEVABLE WORLD: Ultra realistic graphics showcase lush landscapes for you to explore, battle over and claim as your own. COMMUNITY & MULTIPLAYER: Compete with players all over the world or locally in LAN matches, mod* the game in unprecedented ways, and install mods directly from an in-game community hub without ever leaving the game. WIDE SYSTEM COMPATIBILITY: Civilization V operates on many different systems, from high end desktops to many laptops. ALL NEW FEATURES: A new hex-based gameplay grid opens up exciting new combat and build strategies. City States become a new resource in your diplomatic battleground. An improved diplomacy system allows you to negotiate with fully interactive leaders. *Modding SDK available as a free download. Note: The Mac and Linux + SteamOS versions of Sid Meier's Civilization V are available in English, French, Italian, German and Spanish only.

Name: Sid Meier's Civilization® V
Description:
The Flagship Turn-Based Strategy Game Returns Become Ruler of the World by establishing and leading a civilization from the dawn of man into the space age: Wage war, conduct diplomacy, discover new technologies, go head-to-head with some of history’s greatest leaders and build the most powerful empire the world has ever known. INVITING PRESENTATION: Jump right in and play at your own pace with an intuitive interface that eases new players into the game. Veterans will appreciate the depth, detail and control that are highlights of the series. BELIEVABLE WORLD: Ultra realistic graphics showcase lush landscapes for you to explore, battle over and claim as your own. COMMUNITY & MULTIPLAYER: Compete with players all over the world or locally in LAN matches, mod* the game in unprecedented ways, and install mods directly from an in-game community hub without ever leaving the game. WIDE SYSTEM COMPATIBILITY: Civilization V operates on many different systems, from high end desktops to many laptops. ALL NEW FEATURES: A new hex-based gameplay grid opens up exciting new combat and build strategies. City States become a new resource in your diplomatic battleground. An improved diplomacy system allows you to negotiate with fully interactive leaders. *Modding SDK available as a free download. Note: The Mac and Linux + SteamOS versions of Sid Meier's Civilization V are available in English, French, Italian, German and Spanish only.

Name: Into the Breach
Description:
The free major update, Into the Breach: Advanced Edition is now available! Nearly every aspect of the game is expanded with new content, including: New Mechs and Weapons: Five new mech squads and nearly forty new weapons. New Challenges: More enemies, more bosses, and more mission objectives. New Pilot Abilities: Four new pilots and triple the amount of pilot skills. “Unfair” Mode: A more challenging difficulty to test the most seasoned tacticians. The remnants of human civilization are threatened by gigantic creatures breeding beneath the earth. You must control powerful mechs from the future to hold off this alien threat. Each attempt to save the world presents a new randomly generated challenge in this turn-based strategy game from the makers of FTL. Key Features: Defend the Cities: Civilian buildings power your mechs. Defend them from the Vek and watch your fire! Perfect Your Strategy: All enemy attacks are telegraphed in minimalistic, turn-based combat. Analyze your opponent's attack and come up with the perfect counter every turn. Build the Ultimate Mech: Find powerful new weapons and unique pilots as you battle the Vek infestation across Corporate-Nation islands. Another Chance: Failure is not an option. When you are defeated, send help back through time to save another timeline!

Prepare for an extraordinary odyssey in the year 3000 with Hypergalactic Psychic Table Tennis 3000, a groundbreaking RPG that challenges players to ascend as the ultimate paddle champion. This title masterfully fuses exhilarating table tennis gameplay with profound RPG mechanics, all set against the breathtaking canvas of expansive hypergalaxies.

The game introduces the revolutionary 'PaddleTalk™' dialog system, enabling players to engage in meaningful conversations with formidable boss paddles. Developers emphasize that enhancing charisma is paramount for cultivating "rich, lasting relationships" with these distinctive characters, according to the game's design philosophy. Beyond strategic dialogue, the game boasts an intricate spellcasting system, empowering players with psychic abilities. These include the option to "Cast Fireball" to incinerate opponents or "Utilize Psychic Repulsor" to manipulate reality. Alternatively, players can hone their physical prowess, allocating level-up bonuses into strength to overcome obstacles through brute force.

Exploration across the vast hypergalaxies is rewarding, with new equipment frequently discovered in treasure chests. Examples include the "Slightly Ill-Fitting Tunic" to bolster confidence or the whimsical "Boots With Fish in the Heels" to impress romantic interests. Your quest is further enriched by the ability to befriend and ride majestic mounts, such as a Moshi, a sparkling Unicorb, or a small Woodle, who eagerly await to join your epic journey.

Hypergalactic Psychic Table Tennis 3000 boldly redefines the sport with its unique premise, encouraging players to embrace its unconventional spirit. This approach promises a thoroughly enjoyable and unconventional experience, with even seemingly unorthodox tactics like smashing balls against walls proving viable, as noted by the development team. The game encourages players to "get paddling those balls and smash them in the face of your foes." Adding to the immersive experience, the game features full voice acting by the renowned Mark Meer. He is celebrated for his iconic portrayal of Commander Shepard in the Mass Effect series, bringing a familiar gravitas to the game's characters.

Name: Virtua Tennis 4™
Description:
The world’s top stars return – The top players in the world return, joined by some of the most exciting up-and-coming contenders. An all-star line-up of 19 players includes Nadal, Federer, Murray, Sharapova, Wozniacki and Williams. Tennis stardom awaits – A totally new World Tour sees the VT career mode go 'RPG'. Designed to encourage replay value and with an element of off-court fame, each decision affects a player’s career path meaning no two careers will ever be the same. A true online hub for our community – The new online centre will offer the world’s first engaging online tennis experience. Designed using the popular Virtua Fighter 5 technology, the matchmaking system promises more competitive games, and online tournaments will seek to find the ultimate Virtua Tennis champion. Experience the drama - A brand new on-court feature making for more dramatic matches. Build up your Match Momentum gauge over the course of a match and revel in your form as your player grows in confidence, allowing them to play shots mere mortals can only dream about. Putting the fun back into mini-games – Breaking the mini-game mould to include new weather conditions and put a real focus on multiplayer action, the VT mini-games will give players a real alternative mode to compete in both multiplayer and online.

Name: AO Tennis 2
Description:
A PLAYING FIELD MADE FOR YOU, BY YOU Use the comprehensive Academy editing suite to create a player just like YOU as well as your own courts, or you can download thousands of community creations. THE BEST PLAYERS IN THE WORLD See how you compare to the big names on the ATP & WTA circuits, including Rafael Nadal, Ash Barty, Angelique Kerber and many more. A COMPLETELY REDESIGNED CAREER MODE Set out to conquer the world rankings in a singles career or in doubles with a friend. Manage your Reputation, sponsors and performance to reach the top. NEW GAME MODES Relive legendary matches or create new challenges using the scenario editor.

Name: Radon Blast
Description:
Radon Blast ist a Brick Breaker / Arkanoid style game, with a touch of Pong. Break bricks by using the ball. Get items like bonus, speed and multiple balls to make the game more challenging. If you hit the force wall multiple times it will be destroyed so you can reach the next stage. If you miss a ball you go back to the previous stage. But hurry up, you only have seconds before the ball explodes. Radon Blast is full packed with randomly sorted stages. An increasing ball speed makes it even more challenging. Jump between stages, collect bonus multipliers to get higher scores.

Name: Tennis Elbow 4
Description:
Tennis Elbow 4 is the successor of Tennis Elbow 2013, acclaimed by many Steam reviewers as the most realistic tennis simulation ever. TE4 pushes even deeper the realism of the tennis rallies by providing completely rehauled ball, strike & player physics. Created by and for tennis fans, Tennis Elbow 4 is a tennis simulation with an easy and intuitive learning curve, but with exceptional gameplay depth. In this tennis game, you'll have to show all your tactical skills, use an iron mind and quick reflexes, as well as a sharp eye to guess the ball trajectories, all of this to choose your next strike wisely. To beat your opponent, you have the choice between all the possible strikes on a real court, from the safe strike to the acceleration, including the drop shot and the topspin lob. This tennis simulation is designed for all tennis lovers, whether gamepad mashers or keyboard novices, because of its numerous difficulty levels. In addition, a visual help system will assist you in aiming the ball and positioning your player. You can turn these options on and off whenever it suits you. TE4 features one of the most complete World Tour ever made in a tennis video game. With more than 3500 players evolving over several decades competing in more than 400 tournaments each year, from the low-rank Junior tournament qualifications to the top-level Pro event finals, both in singles and doubles competition, you’ll feel like diving in a real professional tennis player’s career. Tennis Elbow game engine is very open to modifications and TE2013 has an active Modding community, eager to jump on TE4 once its Modding will be available. Features: 9 different court surfaces : clay, green clay, grass, hard, blue-green hard, classic synthetic, NewLine synthetic, indoor hard and indoor synthetic; each with a specific rebound 18 Stadiums around the world 400+ tournaments, with 3500+ players evolving over 70 years, from 1973 for men & 1983 for women, to 2042 The Country Cup Singles & doubles competitions Junior & Pro Tours 6 difficulty levels, each split in 10 sublevels Full ranking system 3D male & female players fully customizable Singles, 3, and doubles games Split screen Network : LAN and online games 1 to 6 games per set, in best of 1, 3 or 5 sets 7 camera modes Game is very Modding friendly Warning: You can play doubles with 4 human players on 1 computer, or on 2 computers with 2 players per computer by LAN or Internet, but not on 4 computers.

Name: Action Ball
Description:
Free the Earth from invaders from Robot Empire by driving a mobile paddle-equipped ship. Be careful and agile - while you are destroying enemy fortresses, the invaders will try to stop you in every way. Dodge the attacks of the Guards and don't let the Repairmen restore the defenses! Destroy everything you see on the screen by making your ball a terminator that does not feel obstacles. Or fill it with explosives and launch it into a crowd of enemies - all means are good in war! You are waiting for heavy battles with generals, who have at their disposal the full power of Robot Empire military technologies. Machine guns, flamethrowers, cannons, rockets - use all available weapons to free the Earth from invaders! Features 260+ fascinating levels 3 difficulty modes 10 types of bricks 6 kinds of robots and 3 kinds of bosses 28 sorts of bonuses bright, colorful 3D-graphics extra dynamic gameplay

Ping Pong Space - Retro Tennis offers a captivating modern take on the iconic arcade classic, Pong, ingeniously transplanted into an interstellar setting. Players embark on an exhilarating journey through the vastness of endless space, engaging in retro tennis matches against a computer opponent. The core gameplay experience is a fresh reimagining of familiar concepts, blending elements of air hockey with the timeless appeal of Atari's original Pong, all while introducing novel mechanics.

This updated version of the classic game introduces new rules and dynamic arena elements. According to the developers, the blocks and mechanisms within the arenas are designed to be dual-natured, capable of either aiding your victory or contributing to your downfall. Similarly, the drop-down bonuses present an element of delightful surprise or potential disappointment, with outcomes heavily reliant on the player's dexterity and honed skills. The game supports both solo play, allowing you to conquer every level independently, and a two-player mode for competitive fun with a friend. Immerse yourself in a truly fascinating journey through a vibrant cosmic world.

Are you prepared to challenge artificial intelligence and emerge victorious? Ping Pong Space boasts an atmospheric space setting that enhances the immersive experience. It presents a unique blend of table tennis and breakout game mechanics, offering both a compelling single-player campaign and an engaging two-player mode. Players can select from two difficulty modes to perfectly match their preferred style of play. The game features 60 challenging levels spread across 9 colorful and distinct arenas. For those seeking an intense experience, the hard mode delivers difficult, fast-paced gameplay. Special bonuses, such as the small ball, speedball, and lasers, add strategic depth. Furthermore, the game includes Steam achievements, encompassing medals and cups, alongside leaderboards to track your progress. Controller support is provided, though a keyboard is still required for text input. Enjoy this old-school sports game, now enhanced with improved graphics. Don't let the alien invaders seize control of the galaxy! Accept the ultimate challenge to defeat the AI robot and claim your title as the retro tennis champion of the cosmos.

## Tennis Manager 2022: Your Academy to Grand Slam Glory

**Tennis Manager 2022** puts you in charge of a tennis academy, aiming to develop junior talent into world champions. This simulation blends on-court coaching with the complex management of a sports organization. The game features over 2,000 tournaments and 5,000 players, offering a vast environment for aspiring managers.

Key to success are **Talent Identification** and **Player Growth**. You'll scout young athletes and guide their development. Beyond player performance, astute operational management is crucial. This includes **Budget Control** for financial stability, **Deal Making** for advantageous contracts, and investing in **Facility Upgrades** to improve training.

Building a winning team requires a strong support staff. Recruit specialized **Trainers** and **Experts** to address specific needs. Craft personalized training programs for each athlete. Effective communication, especially in press conferences, is vital for morale and stakeholder satisfaction. The game's 3D engine allows for live coaching during matches, enabling real-time tactical adjustments.

**Tennis Manager 2022** includes several enhancements for greater realism. A refined **Player Design** system offers more customization. The updated **Facility System** provides a more nuanced approach to academy management. The year-end Finals now use **Round Robin Play**, and **Team Data** is more accessible. **Contract Handling** has been overhauled for a more realistic experience. The ability to **Share Tactics** promotes community engagement, and **Match Play** features improved AI and graphics.

**Racket Fury: Table Tennis VR** plunges players into an interstellar table tennis championship, where their prowess is vital for the survival of the Crown Galaxy. This virtual reality title revolves around the Zen-Racket Fury Tournament, an event established to promote peace after a devastating conflict. Players assume the roles of aspiring Zen contestants, striving to earn a spot in the esteemed Division of Steel and, ultimately, to claim the championship title.

The game offers diverse gameplay options. For an authentic table tennis experience, **Full Simulation** mode meticulously replicates spins, bounces, and strategic maneuvers. Conversely, **Arcade Mode** provides a more direct and dynamic engagement, prioritizing speed and enjoyment.

Within the single-player realm, players will confront formidable adversaries in the Division of Steel. Two distinct campaigns present varied challenges: the **Full Simulation Campaign** tests pure skill, while the **Arcade Mode Campaign** offers a faster-paced adventure. The game's commitment to authenticity is underscored by its advanced physics engine. Developers have stated that this engine was developed with input from professional players and scientific principles, ensuring that real-world movements translate into natural, responsive shots. Furthermore, intelligent AI opponents exhibit unique moods and playing styles, making each match feel fresh and unpredictable.

To hone abilities, **Practice Mode Pro** offers a dedicated space for refining techniques, emphasizing the importance of consistent practice for improvement. Lifelike character animations, achieved through sophisticated motion capture and input from professional players, result in fluid swings and genuine actions that enhance the competitive atmosphere. For those seeking human competition, **Multiplayer Mode** allows players to challenge others from across the galaxy. Player progression is also fostered in **The Workshop**, where earned rewards can be used to customize characters, enhancing attributes such as skill, rank, and fame for a personalized experience.

*Players utilizing headsets other than Vive or Rift are advised to verify that their SteamVR controller settings are correctly configured for Racket Fury.*

**Tennis Elbow Manager 2: Master the World of Professional Tennis**

Embark on a journey to the pinnacle of professional tennis with Tennis Elbow Manager 2. This immersive simulation places you in the role of a dedicated coach, tasked with guiding your player to the coveted Number One ranking. Your ultimate objective is to maintain this elite status for as long as possible, accumulating an impressive collection of Grand Slam titles along the way.

**Experience Realistic Tennis Gameplay**

Beyond the strategic management aspects, Tennis Elbow Manager 2 boasts a robust 3D match engine. This allows you to directly engage in gameplay within the Training Club, experiencing tennis as you envision it. For an even more hands-on approach, you have the option to take direct control of your player during tournament 3D matches. However, be aware that this can slightly alter the game's balance, potentially diminishing the importance of certain management skills when you're solely focused on playing.

The match engine is built upon the acclaimed Tennis Elbow 2013 foundation, recognized by many players for its exceptional realism. This iteration introduces significant enhancements to ball physics, court interactions, strike mechanics, and player movements. Furthermore, the artificial intelligence has been substantially upgraded, featuring new player strategies and more authentic behaviors. Collectively, these advancements deliver an advanced tennis simulation that is not only more realistic but also more challenging than its predecessor. It remains remarkably faithful to the true spirit of tennis, presenting a steep learning curve for true mastery.

**Extensive World Tour Features**

The World Tour mode offers a comprehensive experience, catering to both men's and women's circuits. It features a vast pool of 3,500 players whose careers span 70 years, from 1973 for men and 1983 for women, extending to 2042. Players can compete in over 400 tournaments, including the prestigious World Team Cup and the Masters Cup. The game supports both singles and doubles matches, across Junior and Pro Tours. You can manage up to nine players simultaneously, with five distinct coaching difficulty levels to choose from. A full ranking system, mirroring the ATP's entry system, is implemented. Players can opt for 3D matches with real-time coaching, textual match commentary, or instant results. The game is also designed to be modding-friendly.

**Detailed 3D Match Features**

The 3D match experience is rich with detail. It includes nine distinct court surfaces—clay, green clay, grass, hard, blue-green hard, classic synthetic, NewLine synthetic, indoor hard, and indoor synthetic—each with unique ball rebound characteristics. Six difficulty levels are available, each further divided into ten sublevels. Players can customize both male and female 3D characters. Matches can be played in sets of 1 to 6 games, with options for best-of-1, 3, or 5 sets. Seven camera modes are provided for optimal viewing.

**Local Multiplayer Capabilities**

Tennis Elbow Manager 2 supports local multiplayer, allowing up to four human players to compete in matches within the Training Club. In the World Tour, while there is only one coach, different human players can assume control of various coached players during their respective 3D matches.

**Quake (Enhanced): A Modern Revival of a Dark Fantasy FPS Classic**

The seminal dark fantasy first-person shooter, **Quake**, has been revitalized for today's players. Developed by **id Software**, this enhanced edition offers a contemporary take on a genre-defining title that continues to inspire modern retro-style FPS games. As noted in the original release, "There’s never been a better time to play Quake."

This reimagined **Quake** experience elevates the classic gameplay with significant visual and technical upgrades. Players can now enjoy up to 4K resolution with widescreen support, improved character and enemy models, and dynamic, colored lighting that deepens the game's dark atmosphere. Enhanced visuals are further refined with anti-aliasing and depth of field effects, all while retaining the iconic original soundtrack by Trent Reznor. The core campaign casts players as the warrior **Ranger**, tasked with traversing four distinct dimensions. The mission involves collecting four magic runes to defeat an ancient evil, battling a variety of corrupted foes from knights and ogres to twisted creatures across diverse environments, from military outposts to gothic cathedrals.

Beyond the original campaign, **Quake (Enhanced)** includes the classic expansion packs, "The Scourge of Armagon" and "Dissolution of Eternity," alongside new content from MachineGames: "Dimension of the Past" and the recent addition, **"Dimension of the Machine."** This new expansion plunges players into a **labyrinthine core of lava and steel**, challenging them to traverse time and space. The objective is to gather runes to power a dormant machine, open a portal, and ultimately **destroy the ultimate threat** to all known worlds. For those seeking endless challenges, the **new Horde Mode** provides intense survival scenarios. Players can engage in solo, online co-op, or local split-screen battles against **endless monster waves**, earning new weapons and power-ups along the way.

Multiplayer remains a core component, offering **4-player online or local split-screen co-op** for the campaign and expansions. Competitive players can dive into **retro-style combat** with **8-player online** or **4-player local split-screen** matches, supported by dedicated servers for smooth online performance. The **Quake** experience is further enriched by **free, curated mods and missions**, including the fan-favorite **Quake 64**. **Crossplay is fully supported** across PC, Xbox, PlayStation, and Nintendo Switch, allowing players to team up or compete with friends regardless of their platform. Your purchase of **Quake** grants access to both the **fully-moddable, original version** and the **updated, enhanced version** with its graphical improvements, curated add-ons, and crossplay capabilities.

Unreal Tournament 2004: Editor's Choice Edition elevates the **multiplayer first-person shooter** genre with intense combat and **advanced technology**. This version offers a wide array of challenges, featuring ten distinct game modes for both team-based strategies and solo play. Players can engage in **fast-paced, frag-filled arenas** against up to 32 opponents, immersing themselves in **detailed indoor and expansive outdoor settings**.

The game's diverse modes cater to various playstyles. **Assault Mode** challenges teams to **defend and attack fortified bases**, with scenarios like moving trains emphasizing **coordinated team play and tactical objective control**. In **Onslaught Mode**, teams compete to **capture and hold strategic points** to destroy the enemy's power core. This mode features **large outdoor environments** and **vehicular combat**, allowing players to pilot various machines.

Unreal Tournament 2004 equips players with an impressive arsenal, including three **new weapons**: the **Mine Layer** that deploys spider-like bombs, the **Anti-Vehicle Rocket Launcher (AVRiL)** for targeting vehicles, and a **Grenade Launcher** with timed explosives. The **Sniper Rifle from the original Unreal Tournament also returns**, redesigned for **lethal headshots**. An extensive array of land, air, and space vehicles plays **crucial roles in combat strategy**. The game includes **over 95 maps**, with more than 45 being entirely new designs, featuring **vast outdoor landscapes, deep space combat zones, and confined indoor techno-arenas**.

Furthermore, Unreal Tournament 2004 introduces **32 new characters** divided among four distinct teams: the Human Thunder Crash, the Robotic Corrupt, the Iron Skull, and the Hellions. This iteration delivers a **significant technological update**, resulting in a **faster, smoother, and more engaging experience**. As one player noted, "The sheer polish and responsiveness of the gameplay in UT2004 is what sets it apart. Every shot feels impactful."

Name: Beat Saber
Description:
Beat Saber is an immersive rhythm experience you have never seen before! Enjoy tons of handcrafted levels and swing your way through the pulsing music beats, surrounded by a futuristic world. Use your sabers to slash the beats as they come flying at you – every beat indicates which saber you need to use and the direction you need to match. With Beat Saber you become a dancing superhero! Features Feel the Rhythm: Immerse yourself in the smoothest combination of music beats and visual effects in Beat Saber’s truly unique gameplay. Handcrafted Levels & Music: Unlike other rhythm games with generated content, music and levels in Beat Saber are drawn precisely by hand to enhance the music experience. Compete in Multiplayer: Challenge your friends or random opponents around the world. Challenging Campaign: Get better every day while completing objectives and challenges in the Campaign. Rise Up the Global Leaderboards: Compete against other Beat Saberists around the world in various difficulties. Easy to Learn, Fun to Master: Everyone can understand the basic game mechanics. It's easy for anyone to pick up and play. Great Exercise: Exercise while dancing and slashing the beats, Beat Saber gets you moving.

Unreal Tournament, a groundbreaking first-person shooter that launched in **1999**, fundamentally reshaped the landscape of multiplayer gaming. Its initial release was characterized by pioneering features and graphics that were remarkably sophisticated for its time. The game's thoughtful design resonated with a broad player base, offering customizable difficulty levels and intelligent artificial intelligence for its computer-controlled adversaries, commonly known as bots. According to Epic Games, the bots featured in Unreal Tournament were exceptionally adept at deathmatch combat and possessed a deep understanding of the game's intricate mechanics. This proficiency rendered them formidable opponents, ensuring an enjoyable experience even when human players were unavailable.

Furthermore, the game placed a significant emphasis on enhancing player interaction and providing extensive customization options. On-screen text and auditory cues delivered continuous updates to players, while enemy radio chatter introduced a crucial tactical dimension. Server administrators were provided with a wide array of command-line parameters, enabling profound customization of the gameplay experience. The user interface was designed for clarity and simplicity, incorporating distinct Heads-Up Displays (HUDs) tailored to each game mode. A native UBrowser facilitated the effortless discovery and joining of online matches, obviating the necessity for external applications.

Unreal Tournament also distinguished itself with compelling spectator functionalities. Spectator Cams allowed individuals to observe gameplay without actively participating, serving as both an entertainment feature and a valuable learning tool for players. A particularly transformative addition was **Jump Mode**. This innovative mode equipped players with permanent jump boots, dramatically altering the gameplay by introducing novel strategies and injecting a significant vertical dimension into combat encounters. This feature, as noted by many players, added a dynamic and exciting layer to the established combat.

© 2000, Epic Games, Inc. All rights reserved. Epic, Epic Games, Unreal, and Unreal Tournament, and Unreal (Stylized) are trademarks or registered trademarks of Epic Games, Inc. in the United States of America and elsewhere.

**Bayonetta on PC: A Stylish Action Masterpiece**

From Hideki Kamiya, the visionary director behind *Resident Evil* and *Devil May Cry*, SEGA brings the acclaimed character action game *Bayonetta* to PC. This title is celebrated for its unparalleled style and exhilarating combat.

The narrative follows Bayonetta, the last of an ancient witch lineage tasked with maintaining the balance between light, darkness, and chaos. Sealed away for five centuries, she awakens with fragmented memories, embarking on a perilous journey to uncover the truth and survive. Her path is fraught with danger, forcing her to confront legions of angelic foes and monstrous adversaries in what creators describe as "100% pure, unadulterated action."

**Core Gameplay Mechanics:**

*   **Deadly Grace:** Bayonetta combines allure with lethal combat prowess, pushing players' senses to their limit.
*   **Climax Action:** Experience a continuous onslaught of over-the-top action sequences in extreme environments.
*   **Extravagant Combat:** Utilize a diverse arsenal of weapons integrated into a fluid combat system for intricate combos and devastating special attacks.
*   **Supernatural Abilities:** Harness "Witch Time" to slow enemies and unleash brutal torture attacks like the Iron Maiden and Guillotine.

**PC Enhancements:**

The PC version offers a superior experience with:

*   **Full Steam Integration:** Enjoy achievements, cloud saves, trading cards, leaderboards, and Big Picture Mode.
*   **Superior Visual Fidelity:** Customize your experience with advanced graphical options, including resolutions up to 4K, advanced anti-aliasing, anisotropic filtering, SSAO lighting, and scalable texture/shadow quality.
*   **Bilingual Voiceovers:** Freely switch between English and Japanese voiceovers and subtitles.

For the ultimate experience, a controller is highly recommended.

N++ (NPLUSPLUS) is a thrilling, momentum-driven platformer that challenges players to navigate a minimalist sci-fi world. The core gameplay revolves around expertly maneuvering your character, utilizing momentum to dart past intricate obstacles, narrowly escape a variety of inadvertently homicidal enemy robots, and collect precious gold. This highly anticipated title marks the return of the N series to PC after a 12-year hiatus, with developers dedicating that time to meticulously refining the platforming experience.

The game emphasizes the strategic use of momentum as the key to completing its numerous levels and achieving high scores. Players will find themselves constantly engaged in intense platforming challenges within beautifully crafted, hand-made levels. Unlike procedurally generated environments, each stage in N++ has been thoughtfully designed to test your skills. The objective is simple: use your fluid movement to "solve" each level and reach the exit.

Beyond the extensive and demanding single-player campaign, N++ is packed with a wealth of features designed to offer enduring replayability. This final installment in the N series boasts an impressive 4,340 hand-made levels, ensuring a vast and varied experience. Players can also unleash their creativity with custom levels, a robust level editor, and global level sharing, allowing for an ever-expanding universe of challenges. Competitive and cooperative play are also central, with local co-op and competitive modes supporting up to four players. For those seeking the ultimate test, Hardcore Mode offers an intense single-player challenge, and hidden secret challenges await discovery. The game's aesthetic is further enhanced by 63 tracks from top electronic artists and 119 different color palettes, allowing for extensive customization. As noted by the developers, there is no skill ceiling, meaning players can continuously improve and master the game, offering bite-sized gameplay that can last a lifetime.

Name: Neon White
Description:
Neon White is a lightning fast first-person action game about exterminating demons in Heaven. You are White, an assassin handpicked from Hell to compete with other demon slayers for a chance to live permanently in Heaven. The other assassins seem familiar, though… Features: • You play as Neon White, an assassin plucked from Hell to compete with other demon slayers for a shot at redemption. • Collect “Soul Cards” to attack your foes or discard them to use unique movement abilities. • Compete for the best times by cleverly combining cards to discover massive shortcuts. • Uncover Heaven’s mysteries by getting to know the other assassins… did you know them in a past life?

Name: Inertial Drift
Description:
Set in a 90's retro future, Inertial Drift is an Arcade Racer with a devastatingly unique handling model and unbelievably satisfying twin-stick drift mechanics. Inertial Drift offers a whole new level of accessibility and challenge to the arcade racing genre - for a driving experience genuinely unlike anything you've played before. The left stick is used for steering, while the right hand Drift Stick gives you independent control over your drift. Intuitive for new players and uniquely challenging for pros. Each one of the 16 cars is a totally different beast, with unique characteristics to master. Get behind the wheel of Sport hatchbacks, Coupe's, Supercars & more! Tear through neon city streets, race around rural temple complexes and hurtle down winding mountain passes. Each racetrack is set within a bold and distinctive environment. Including vibrant cityscapes, coastal sunsets, gorgeous starry skies and snow-capped peaks. With 7 race event types there is plenty of opportunity to perfect your craft! Get competitive in a mix of races, head-to-heads, time trials and style showdowns! Think you've mastered the perfect drift? What better way to prove it. Take on other racers via local co-op and online multiplayer.

Name: Super Hexagon
Description:
Super Hexagon is a minimal action game by Terry Cavanagh, with music by Chipzel. Important facts about Hexagons: Hexagons are third order permutohedrons: The vertices of a hexagon can be formed by permuting the coordinates of the vector (1, 2, 3). The north pole of the planet Saturn has a hexagonal storm cloud pattern with 8,600 mile long sides, larger than the diameter of Earth. Though hexagon may appear to be a difficult word to rhyme, there are actually dozens of words that rhyme with it. For example: Autobahn, decagon, decathlon, electron, Kyrgzstan, Lebanon, leprechaun and marathon.

Name: DUSK
Description:
DUSK reintroduces you to a world where butchery and bloodshed must be mastered... if you're to survive 'til dawn. Inspired by Doom, Quake, Blood, Heretic, Hexen, Half-Life, Redneck Rampage and all your '90s favorites, while featuring a soundtrack by metal music mastermind Andrew Hulshult. In three distinct campaign episodes hand-crafted from straight outta the '90s, players will battle through an onslaught of mystical backwater cultists, possessed militants and even darker forces and attempt to discover just what lurks beneath the Earth. Featuring a vast arsenal of badass weaponry including sickles, swords, crossbows, rifles, dual-wielded and double barreled shotguns and incredibly necessary grenade and rocket launchers , DUSK brings unapologetic retro action from start to finish. In addition to the main campaign, DUSK features an Endless Survival Mode , putting you front and center against wave after wave of merciless enemies. And for those looking for an extra challenge, DUSK also offers the chance to go head to head online to battle your friends in DUSKWorld arena multiplayer , where darkness hosts the worst of humanity in surprising new ways...

## Lacuna: A Sci-Fi Noir Adventure Where Choices Matter

*Lacuna* is a narrative-driven sci-fi noir adventure where player decisions profoundly shape the story. You play as Neil Conrad, a CDI agent investigating a case with potentially catastrophic consequences for the solar system.

### The "Save the World Edition": Game and Good Cause

The *Save the World Edition* includes the game and its atmospheric soundtrack. Notably, Assemble Entertainment pledges 10% of its revenue from this edition to Go Give One, a World Health Organization (WHO) initiative providing COVID-19 vaccines and medical aid globally, particularly to underserved populations. This edition allows you to support *Lacuna*'s creators and contribute to global health efforts.

### Your Choices Drive the Narrative

*Lacuna* offers a focused player experience by emphasizing:

*   **Inquiry:** Uncovering clues and understanding motivations.
*   **Evidence Gathering:** Piecing together the mystery.
*   **Critical Decision-Making:** Your actions directly influence the narrative's direction and outcome.

The story branches dynamically, with no option to undo choices. The developers emphasize that the game reflects real-world consequences, with characters remembering your actions. Rushing through the game leads to its own repercussions. The narrative presents complex moral dilemmas, forcing players to confront difficult choices.

### Innovative Adventure Gameplay

*Lacuna* moves beyond traditional point-and-click adventures with:

*   **Intuitive Movement:** Platformer-style controls using WASD or a controller.
*   **Dynamic Conversation:** Fluid, natural dialogue options.
*   **Organic Dialogue:** Conversations avoid repetition for realism.
*   **Meaningful Agency:** Decisions have significant, lasting consequences.
*   **Narrative Focus:** Eliminates inventory and puzzles to prioritize the story.
*   **Immersive Mysteries:** The plot is the central driving force.
*   **Clear Interaction:** No pixel hunting; interactable elements are indicated.
*   **Uninterrupted Progression:** Puzzles are seamlessly integrated.

The game's design ensures story advancement through player engagement and decisions, leading to multiple distinct endings that reflect your journey.

Name: Her Story
Description:
A Video Game About a Woman Talking to the Police Her Story is the award winning video game from Sam Barlow, creator of Silent Hill: Shattered Memories and Aisle. A crime fiction game with non-linear storytelling, Her Story revolves around a police database full of live action video footage. It stars Viva Seifert, actress and one half of the band Joe Gideon and the Shark. How does it work? Her Story sits you in front of a mothballed desktop computer that’s logged into a police database of video footage. The footage covers seven interviews from 1994 in which a British woman is interviewed about her missing husband. Explore the database by typing search terms, watch the clips where she speaks those words and piece together her story. Unlike anything you've played before, Her Story is an involving and moving experience. A game that asks you to listen.

Embark on a **hilarious and bizarre journey** with the Freelance Police in *Sam & Max: Beyond Time and Space*. This remastered collection revitalizes Telltale's beloved second season of episodic Sam & Max games, meticulously updated by a core team of the original developers. The adventure spans from the icy North Pole to the mythical Fountain of Youth, venturing into outer space and the fiery pits of Hell.

At the core of this chaotic duo is **Sam**, a six-foot canine detective with an unwavering nose for justice. His partner is **Max**, a hyperkinetic rabbity-thing with an insatiable taste for mayhem. Together, they are the Freelance Police – an **irreverent comedy duo** whose unique brand of crime-fighting has captivated fans for over three decades. This five-episode collection plunges Sam & Max into action, facing a **grumpy Santa Claus**, a **colossal volcano**, and a **suave Eurotrash vampire**. The narrative delves into intriguing mysteries, exploring whether the paranoid shopkeeper Bosco is onto something, if diner proprietress Stinky is hiding the truth about her grandfather's disappearance, and if the flaky neighbor Sybil will find true love.

The remastered *Sam & Max: Beyond Time and Space* boasts **gorgeous HD graphics**, an **overhauled lighting system**, and **finessed lip-syncing**. The **cinematography has been refined**, the **audio remastered**, and the experience is enriched by **eight all-new musical tracks** performed by live jazz musicians. Expect the unexpected: zombies will dance, mariachis will sing, and a giant battle robot might trash the streets. When their friends' lives hang in the balance, Sam and Max will **risk their very souls** to set things right. Key features for modern players include a laugh-out-loud adventure with unexpected locations and eccentric characters, beautifully remastered visuals and audio, subtle contextual hints, optional driving mini-games, and extensive localization with English voice acting and subtitles in multiple languages.

This collection offers a truly unique experience, as noted by critics who praised its blend of humor and adventure. The remastered edition enhances the original game's charm with updated visuals and sound. The developers have ensured that the core gameplay remains intact while improving the overall presentation. According to the original development team, the goal was to preserve the spirit of the beloved series. The game's narrative is filled with quirky characters and outlandish scenarios, keeping players engaged. The remastered version also includes helpful features for new players, making it accessible to a wider audience. The addition of new music, as reported by the development studio, further elevates the immersive quality of the game. This updated version is a testament to the enduring appeal of Sam & Max.

Name: Strange Horticulture
Description:
Find and identify new plants, pet your cat, speak to a coven, or join a cult. Use your growing collection to influence the story and unravel Undermere’s dark mysteries. Welcome to Undermere, a quaint town surrounded by hag-infested forests and rugged mountains. You are the Horticulturist, owner of local plant store Strange Horticulture. As a cast of colorful customers come by your shop, you are quickly thrust into an occult mystery stretching back hundreds of years. Explore the lands beyond your store to find new plants, but be careful! The dark woods and lakes are not always friendly to a simple herbalist. You might discover powers beyond your wildest dreams - or lose your mind completely. Use context clues to determine which places to visit, and which to avoid! Using your trusty encyclopedia and clues found on your explorations, you learn more about the strange plants you come across. By identifying each plant, you will be able to use their effects to influence the story -- from hypnotic hallucinogens to powerful poisons.

Name: The Great Ace Attorney Chronicles
Description:
Immerse yourself in a dramatic yet charming and witty world of evidence-gathering, deduction and courtroom battles with this double-pack of the adventures of rookie lawyer Ryunosuke. Set in late 19th century Japan and England, each title features five murder-mystery episodes filled with all the drama, laughs, twists, and “turnabouts” you’ve come to expect from the legally labyrinthine legacy of Ace Attorney. Join Ryunosuke Naruhodo, ancestor of series mainstay Phoenix Wright, as he attempts to uncover the secrets behind an international criminal conspiracy and solve a hauntingly baffling cold case, while tackling a series of tricky trials along the way. Dozens of hours of attorney action awaits you! In the course of each case, you’ll speak to witnesses, examine evidence and clues, and attempt to deduce the dastardly intent behind the crime before proceeding to the courtroom. In court, you will hear testimonies, cross-examine witnesses, and present evidence. And of course, it wouldn’t be an Ace Attorney game if you couldn’t shout “OBJECTION!” when you know you’ve got the facts and evidence needed to contradict the prosecution’s claims and prove your client’s innocence. The game includes a convenient assistance feature in case you hit a dead end in your investigation, so even if this is your first Ace Attorney game, you can get into your amateur sleuthing adventures with ease! Will you be able to crack these clever cases? The game is afoot! NOTE: This game can be played with English audio or with Japanese audio and English subtitles.

Name: Blake: The Visual Novel
Description:
Blake: The Visual Novel is a graphic novel-style, choice-based, psychological thriller. Set in a tech-intelligent universe - become immersed in the perpetually rainy city of New Stone. Experience Blake’s journey as he encounters a clandestine nemesis, sparking a series of events that quickly force him to choose between losing his sanity or rising to the challenge. Make the right decisions and save the citizens of New Stone. Features Immersive storyline enriched with twists and turns. Choice-driven consequences - Make allies or break bonds depending on who you want to trust. Multiple endings and exclusive scenes depending on your choices. Optional puzzles and mini-games. Stunning graphic novel-style artwork, animated characters and black & white stylised pivotal scenes. HD 1080P

**Chicken Police - Paint it RED! Offers a Noir-Inspired Detective Adventure**

Dive into the gritty world of Clawville with *Chicken Police - Paint it RED!*, a narrative-driven adventure that blends classic film-noir aesthetics with unique detective gameplay. This title plunges players into a complex mystery, featuring a rich storyline and a distinctive visual style.

The game centers on Sonny Featherland and Marty MacChicken, former legendary detectives. A decade later, their partnership has fractured. Sonny, now on leave, and Marty, clinging to his past, are forced to reunite for an unusual case. The game promises a "dark story" that is "pretty funny," according to Forbes.

*Chicken Police - Paint it RED!* offers a dialogue-heavy experience, drawing inspiration from visual novels. Players interact with over 30 fully voiced characters, many requiring interrogation. The game encourages meticulous investigation, with numerous clues and evidence to uncover in Clawville. Destructoid highlighted the game's "quirky themes and original music," combined with its "animals-as-people motif and spot-on detective visuals."

The city of Clawville features over 30 locations to explore, many evolving throughout the narrative. Returning to these areas can reveal hidden secrets or new characters. The game's visual style is described as a "cinematographic masterpiece" by Rock Paper Shotgun, utilizing real photos and photorealistic 3D backgrounds. This aesthetic is heavily influenced by film-noir classics. Alpha Beta Gamer praised how the game "really nails the film noir vibe it’s going for," noting the "excellent" voice acting and "witty" writing.

Complementing the visuals is a professional voiceover boasting over 8 hours of dialogue. The original soundtrack further enhances the noir mood. *Chicken Police - Paint it RED!* delivers a cynical, humorous, and ultimately "ridiculous and riveting hardboiled detective adventure," according to Alpha Beta Gamer.
