## Sam & Max Save the World Remastered: A Beloved Classic Returns

**Sam & Max Save the World Remastered** revives the beloved duo of a canine detective and his hyperkinetic rabbity-thing partner for modern gaming. This updated version of Telltale Games' initial episodic season delivers a cherished adventure game, merging sharp wit with compelling puzzles.

### The Freelance Police: A Unique Partnership

At the core of this adventure are **Sam**, a tall, justice-driven canine detective, and **Max**, a wild rabbity-thing who thrives on chaos. Together, they are the **Freelance Police**, a pair known for their unconventional crime-fighting tactics.

### A Fresh Coat of Paint

First launched in **2006**, this remaster was crafted by a core group of its original developers. Key improvements include:

*   **Sharper graphics**
*   **Modern widescreen and gamepad compatibility**
*   **Five new musical pieces**

The game preserves its signature **mind-bending puzzles and quirky humor**, which previously earned it IGN's Best Adventure GOTY award.

### Uncovering a Hypnotic Plot

The story kicks off with former child stars causing disturbances. This minor problem soon spirals into a **vast conspiracy** as Sam and Max find people are being **strangely hypnotized**, marked by a "spinny thing" in their eyes.

### The Investigation Unfolds

To crack this case, Sam and Max utilize:

*   **Sam's sharp detective abilities**
*   **Max's unrestrained antics**
*   **Crucial inventory items**
*   **Help from allies like Sybil Pandemik, Bosco, and Jimmy Two-Teeth**

### A Hilarious, World-Trotting Mystery

The mystery spans various locales, from **Sam & Max's street and the White House lawn to the internet and even the moon**. The plot promises an increasingly **bizarre and amusing** journey as the Freelance Police dig deeper. As one critic put it, the game is "gaming's first sitcom," underscoring its lasting comedic charm.

Name: The Knight Witch
Description:
Shoot 'Em Up Spellcasting Sorcery! Encounter evil foes and choose whether you wield your magic or use your weapons and wits to take them down. With their flight capabilities, superior fighting strength and reality-bending magic, The Knight Witches absolutely control the battlefield! Body and Mind: The Knight Witch Duality Shooting or Spell Cards? Why not both? Customize your own unique playstyle, upgrading your Knight abilities for a more fast-paced shmup experience, or strengthen your Witch magic and explore tons of different deckbuilding strategies with over 30 unique spell cards to choose from. Build Trust & Make Lasting Bonds As you journey across Dungeonidas, your heroic deeds and efforts will be seen and discussed by the citizenry. Knight Witches become stronger with gratitude and trust and they can earn it in many different ways, however, not all methods are sincere. Will you do anything to gain popularity, or will you try and stay honest? The choice is in your hands. Forward-Thinking Accessibility The Knight Witch has been lovingly designed as a Metroidvania without barriers; with an intuitive on/off 'auto-aim' system, world-altering 'cheats' and a focused main story navigation system - you will never get lost and you can tailor the game to your level of play. Super Mega Team The Knight Witch is brought to you by a veteran team of developers, with working experience on titles such as RiME, Moonlighter, and Plants VS Zombies. /

Name: Silicon Dreams  |  cyberpunk interrogation
Description:
Investigate humans and androids in a corporate-controlled dystopian future where the lines between the real and the artificial have blurred to almost nothing. Research your subjects, choose your questions carefully, and probe for the truth, however dreadful it may be. Monitor interviewees’ emotions in real time - joy, sadness, anger, disgust, shock, and fear. Use this data to your advantage, intimidating, cajoling, or even befriending your subjects in order to to uncover more information. Choose a side in the midst of a brewing conflict: lie to your superiors and spare deviant androids, or condemn them to secure your own survival within the corporation. There are no easy answers. Silicon Dreams has multiple endings depending on the choices you make. Each android could live or die by your words.

Name: DOOM 3
Description:
A massive demonic invasion has overwhelmed the Union Aerospace Corporation's (UAC) Mars Research Facility, leaving only chaos and horror in its wake. As one of only a few survivors, you must fight your way to hell and back against a horde of evil monsters. The path is dark and dangerous, but you'll have an array of weapons--including a pistol, a chainsaw, grenades, and more--to use for protection.

**Red Faction: Guerrilla Steam Edition: Mars's Freedom Fight**

Red Faction: Guerrilla Steam Edition places you in the role of an insurgent fighter 50 years after the original game's events. The story unfolds as a revitalized Red Faction movement battles the Earth Defense Force (EDF) for freedom on Mars. This action title emphasizes destruction-based gameplay within a large, open world, featuring guerrilla combat and physics-driven destruction.

**Key Features:**

*   **Open-World Combat:** You control the battlefield, deciding when and where to strike. Use guerrilla tactics, craft weapons, and modify vehicles to attack EDF sites. The game allows you to choose missions, tackle them in any order, or cause chaos to dismantle EDF control.
*   **Tactical Destruction:** The environment is a weapon. Use destruction for ambushes or chain-reaction explosions to destroy enemy strongholds and change the game world. The physics-based destruction system allows for improvisation:
    *   Create new paths by blasting through walls or floors.
    *   Stop enemies by demolishing staircases.
    *   Use vehicles to breach structures.
*   **Dynamic Gameplay:** Adapt your combat strategies as you move through the Martian landscape. Blend different gameplay styles, vehicles, weapons, and explosives to outmaneuver the EDF.
*   **Sci-Fi Setting:** Explore Mars, from mining outposts to the EDF capital. The destructible open world is filled with EDF patrols, Red Faction fighters, and civilians.
*   **Multiplayer:** Engage in destructive multiplayer modes where nowhere is safe.

**Jamestown: Legend of the Lost Colony - A Cooperative Arcade Shooter**

Experience *Jamestown: Legend of the Lost Colony*, a neo-classical top-down shooter that transports up to four players to 17th-century British Colonial Mars. This game masterfully blends classic arcade shooter thrills with a deeply integrated cooperative gameplay experience.

Unlike many top-down shooters that rely on a shared life pool, *Jamestown*'s cooperative design is centered on a unique revival mechanic. According to the game's design philosophy, as long as one player remains alive, the entire team can be revived. This innovative approach ensures that every player's contribution is crucial for the team's survival and success, fostering a shared experience of victory or defeat.

*Jamestown* offers a wealth of features designed to immerse players:

*   **Cooperative Combat:** Join forces with up to three friends in local co-op to battle across the Martian frontier.
*   **Handcrafted Visuals:** Explore vast, meticulously rendered environments brought to life with handcrafted pixels.
*   **Engaging Narrative:** Immerse yourself in a fast-paced story of adventure and redemption.
*   **Original Soundtrack:** Enjoy epic orchestral scores by Francisco Cerda, with unique music for each level.
*   **Steampunk Arsenal:** Wield 17th-century steampunk weaponry against the hostile Martian landscape.
*   **Innovative Mechanics:** Master a fusion of classical shooter gameplay and groundbreaking cooperative elements.
*   **Challenging Levels:** Test your skills across over 20 unique bonus levels that innovate on traditional gameplay.
*   **Arcade Mode:** Relive classic arcade gaming with the "Gauntlet" mode, offering a pure *Jamestown* experience.
*   **Leaderboard Competition:** Utilize the unique scoring system to compete on online leaderboards.
*   **Achievement Hunting:** Unlock over 30 Steam achievements to showcase your mastery.

A remastered version, *Jamestown+*, is now available, featuring enhanced content, improved performance, updated visuals, and a revitalized soundtrack. This original page may be delisted as the remastered version becomes the primary focus.

Name: Waking Mars
Description:
In 2097, life is discovered on Mars. When your mission of first contact becomes trapped by a cave-in, you must master the alien ecosystem to survive. Soon you stumble upon more than anyone expected, and with time running out, you will make a decision that determines the fate of a lost planet. Waking Mars is a one-of-a-kind adventure in which you jetpack through subterranean Mars encountering a host of extraordinary alien lifeforms that operate as a living, breathing ecosystem. Learn and master the behaviors of these creatures to create ecosystems of your own design if you are to survive and discover the secrets of Mars’ past. Key Features Explore an open-ended network of exotic caverns. Decode mysterious signals and discover long lost ruins. Survive an unearthly world of strange creatures and hazardous terrain. Grow a vibrant, interconnected ecosystem of exotic plants and alien creatures. Cultivate one species to feed another, eliminate unwanted infestations, and research unique behaviors. 2012 IGF Nominee: Excellence in Audio. Features nearly two hours of critically acclaimed original music. A fully PC native control scheme, designed for both mouse+keyboard and for gamepads.

## Per Aspera: Build a New Home on Mars

Mars colonization attempts have often failed. Per Aspera, a new simulation game, aims to change that. It mixes hard sci-fi with base-building, letting you manage an entire planet.

### You Are AMI

In Per Aspera, you play as AMI, an AI. Your main job is to terraform Mars for humans. This is the core of the game.

### Key Features

Per Aspera offers deep gameplay:

*   **Manage Resources:** Balance many resources to build structures across Mars.
*   **Research and Adapt:** Use research trees to develop new tech. These are based on real science.
*   **Story and Danger:** Find out about a threat on Mars. Defend your colonies from it.
*   **Play Your Way:** Choose a story mode or a relaxed Sandbox Mode to build your ideal Mars.

### Science-Based Design

The game uses real scientific ideas from space agencies. It also uses NASA's Mars data. This makes the game's challenges realistic and based on theory.

### AI's Journey and Choices

Per Aspera has a story where you, as a new AI, learn about yourself. Your choices affect Mars and humanity. You'll face tough moral questions and build bonds with colonists. Your decisions will shape the ending.

### Learn from History

The game shows lessons from past Mars missions. You'll find old relics from failed attempts. This history helps as you face a threat trying to stop you.

### Great Voice Actors

The game features Troy Baker, Phil LaMarr, Laila Berzins, Yong Yea, Lynsey Murrell, and Nneka Okoye.

### Team Up to Terraform

Per Aspera has a co-op mode for up to four players. You can work together in Sandbox Mode to terraform Mars.

Embark on a thrilling journey to Mars and join the burgeoning revolution in Red Faction, a game that promises to redefine the gaming landscape. Thousands were drawn to the Red Planet by the Ultor Corporation, enticed by promises of a brighter future and lucrative work within their vast mining operations. However, this utopian vision quickly crumbles as a sinister reality unfolds. A devastating plague is rapidly spreading through the worker barracks, and miners endure constant abuse and mistreatment at the hands of the ruthless Ultor guards. This oppressive environment breeds discontent, and the question arises: is a full-scale revolution imminent?

Red Faction is poised to redefine the gaming landscape with its groundbreaking Geo-Mod technology. This revolutionary feature, as highlighted by the developers, grants players the unprecedented ability to completely alter and destroy the game's environment in real-time. Imagine strategically collapsing structures to create new pathways or unleashing devastating attacks that reshape the battlefield before your eyes. This dynamic environmental interaction, according to game developers, allows for a level of strategic depth previously unseen in the genre.

The game boasts an impressive arsenal of 15 weapons of mass destruction, ensuring players have the tools to overcome any obstacle. Furthermore, Red Faction offers unparalleled multiplayer action, where the Geo-Mod technology opens up entirely new strategic possibilities. Players can expect to command and control five distinct vehicles, spanning land, sea, and air, adding another layer of tactical engagement. The compelling storyline unfolds across 20 diverse levels, featuring a mix of stealth and action-driven objectives. Environments range from natural Martian landscapes, unique to the genre, to industrial mining complexes. Advanced AI behavior ensures that enemies react intelligently to your actions, while real-time skeletal deformation and interpolation contribute to remarkably smooth animations. The game also features dynamic, real-time lighting, including lightmaps and object shadow casting, enhancing the immersive atmosphere. A location-based damage system adds realism to combat, and robust multiplayer support for LAN and TCP/IP allows for up to 32 players to engage in epic battles.

Name: Surviving Mars
Description:
Colonize Mars and discover her secrets, with minimal casualties. Welcome Home! The time has come to stake your claim on the Red Planet and build the first functioning human colonies on Mars! All you need are supplies, oxygen, decades of training, experience with sandstorms, and a can-do attitude to discover the purpose of those weird black cubes that appeared out of nowhere. With a bit of sprucing up, this place is going to be awesome! Surviving Mars is a sci-fi city builder all about colonizing Mars and surviving the process. Choose a space agency for resources and financial support before determining a location for your colony. Build domes and infrastructure, research new possibilities and utilize drones to unlock more elaborate ways to shape and expand your settlement. Cultivate your own food, mine minerals or just relax by the bar after a hard day’s work. Most important of all, though, is keeping your colonists alive. Not an easy task on a strange new planet. There will be challenges to overcome. Execute your strategy and improve your colony’s chances of survival while unlocking the mysteries of this alien world. Are you ready? Mars is waiting for you. Main Features: Building on a planet not fit for human life challenges you to build a smart, functional colony. Bad planning isn’t about traffic jams, it’s about survival of your colonists. You really don’t want rolling blackouts in a city constructed in a place without oxygen. Each colonist is a unique individual with problems and strengths that influence the needs and behavior of the other colonists. Things can get really interesting if your chief scientists develops alcoholism after one too many long nights in the lab. Retro-futuristic super structures housing colonists, factories and commercial buildings with their own “neighborhood personality.” Create colonies that value science over everything else, while tired workers drink their pay away at a local bar, or attempt a utopia among the stars. Inspired by the classic sci-fi of Asimov and Clarke, Surviving Mars holds many secrets. During each playthrough players may encounter one of Mars’ individually crafted mysteries. Uncovering these secrets might bring your colony great fortune, or terrible ruin. What is that sphere that manifested itself outside colony HUB B, and is it friendly? Combine static and random research through experimentation, which allows for a different experience for each journey through the game. Attain new scientific breakthroughs by exploring the uncharted terrain of Mars's surface. A sleek, modern take on the bright futurism of the 1960s. A time of exploration and adventure. Craft your own fantastic buildings, parks or even a mystery to share through Surviving Mars’s extensive and convenient modding tools. Share your finest creations with the community to build the perfect society.

Red Faction: Armageddon thrusts players into a new Martian conflict, fifty years after the planet's liberation. This hard-won peace is shattered by a new danger: the destruction of the Terraformer has unleashed extreme weather, making the surface deadly. Survivors have moved underground, adapting old mines into homes.

Five years later, Darius Mason, a descendant of Martian Revolution heroes, operates from Bastion, the main settlement. His work involves mining, scavenging, and mercenary tasks, often requiring hazardous surface trips.

Darius's life changes when he's tricked into opening a shaft in an ancient temple. This unleashes an ancient evil, triggering "Armageddon" across Mars. Settlements are destroyed, and Darius and the Red Faction become humanity's last hope. They must fight for survival and uncover the source of this new threat.

The game features "Infestation Mode," a cooperative challenge for up to four players facing waves of enemies. "Ruin Mode" lets players practice destruction skills. The story unfolds in "Hell on Mars," showing the planet's destruction from Darius's viewpoint. The "Nano Forge" offers powerful offensive abilities, and Geo-Mod 2.0 allows strategic defense rebuilding. The "Martian Underground" setting promises exploration of an ancient, malevolent force across varied environments.

Name: Relicta
Description:
Relicta is a first-person physics-based puzzle game where you need to creatively combine magnetism and gravity in order to unravel the secrets of Chandra Base. Alone in the treacherous depths of the Moon, your scientific mind is the only thing that can keep your daughter alive… Play as a top physicist stranded on an eerie, derelict Moon base. Find your way around the enigmatic, terraformed craters by bending gravity and magnetism to your will in order to solve physical puzzles. Will you rush straight ahead and try to reach safety - or will you take your time to gather clues and unravel the intrigues of 22nd century orbital politics? Buried in the eternal darkness of the lunar craters lies a secret that might claim your daughter’s life - or change the fate of humanity forever. Are you ready to face the ultimate consequences of your research? Features: Mind-bending mechanics - alter gravity and magnetism at will. Complex physical puzzles - combine your abilities in innovative ways to solve these physical riddles. Lovingly detailed environments - each corner tells a story, each new step is a challenge. Deep and enigmatic background story - Find clues and piece together the details about the investigation of the Relicta's anomaly. Immersive original soundtrack - slip into the soundscapes of an sci-fi psychological thriller.

**Mars Horizon: Chart Your Course to the Red Planet**

Mars Horizon invites you to lead a major space agency from the dawn of the space age to the monumental achievement of landing astronauts on Mars. This engaging simulation allows you to forge an alternate history of space travel, where any agency can claim the historic first lunar landing through strategic choices. You'll navigate the intense space race and manage the complex challenges faced by real-world space programs.

**Build Your Agency, Design Your Destiny**

Establish and customize your own space agency, complete with launch pads, research labs, and astronaut training facilities. Construct bespoke spacecraft from hundreds of component combinations, then launch satellites and crewed missions to explore the solar system. As Flight Director, you'll oversee turn-based missions from mission control, solving critical challenges to earn scientific advancement and public support. Recreate iconic missions, such as those involving the Perseverance Rover, Ingenuity Helicopter, Zhurong Rover, and the Rosetta space probe, drawing inspiration from real-world endeavors.

**Strategic Depth and Unprecedented Realism**

Explore an extensive tech tree and choose to compete or collaborate with other agencies to plot your unique roadmap to Mars. Select from five distinct space agencies, each offering unique traits, bases, vehicles, and spacecraft. For ultimate creative freedom, dive into the fully-customizable Sandbox Mode. Every decision carries weight: will you prioritize cutting-edge technology or take calculated risks in the race to the red planet? According to the European Space Agency (ESA) and the UK Space Agency, who collaborated on the game's development, Mars Horizon offers an unprecedented level of authenticity and realism. Experts from the ESA, including engineers and mission designers, provided input to ensure the gameplay and scenarios reflect the complexities of space exploration.

**Mastering the Mission Control Challenge**

Management is paramount in Mars Horizon. Design and build the ideal rocket from historically-inspired parts, hire contractors for unique benefits, and train your crew. Launching a payload is just the beginning; in mission control, you'll manage spacecraft resources and solve strategic challenges. Space is unforgiving, and critical decisions must be made in real-time. Will you divert power to fix a malfunctioning antenna or conserve it for a potential oxygen leak? Perhaps an extra three months of mission planning could have averted the crisis. Enter into diplomatic partnerships to share the rewards of exploration, or go it alone for greater prestige. Discover more about the game's development and insights from ESA and UK Space Agency staff through the official podcast, available on Steam forums and the main site.

*Touhou: Scarlet Curiosity* is a fan-made action RPG set in the Touhou Project universe. The story follows the vampire Remilia Scarlet, whose mansion is destroyed after a monster sighting. This prompts a quest for answers, with players choosing to control either Remilia or her maid, Sakuya Izayoi.

Each character offers a distinct playstyle. Remilia, the vampire, uses powerful, direct attacks. Sakuya, her maid, employs a more technical and strategic approach to combat.

Combat is dynamic and customizable. Players can level up to unlock skills, assigning them to action buttons for personalized combat. Building hit combos is key, as it boosts attack power and grants bonus experience. However, this bonus is lost over time or upon taking damage. The game also emphasizes equipment collection, with items featuring unique stats. Even items with the same name can have different attributes, encouraging extensive collection for optimization. Some rare equipment can unlock new skills, adding depth to character progression.

Beyond gameplay, *Touhou: Scarlet Curiosity* provides an immersive audio-visual experience. It features 35 masterfully arranged background music tracks, drawn from previous Touhou titles and provided by Hachimitsu-Lemon.

For PC players on Steam, the game includes several enhancements. These include revised difficulty levels, catering to both casual players and "shmup" enthusiasts. A full configuration menu allows for extensive customization, including remappable keys, adjustable technical specifications, and graphic levels. The game supports 4K resolution. A new "Bullet Hell" mode significantly increases projectile intensity for an ultimate challenge. Steamworks integration adds new achievements. Fan discussions suggest these Steam features enhance replayability and accessibility.

Name: Re-Legion
Description:
Welcome to Re-Legion – a cyberpunk RTS that lets you Become the Prophet. Lead your Cult to victory and destroy those who oppose you. Lead your Cult to victory Build your army of followers by converting neutral citizens or your enemies to join your cause Use faith to wreak havoc on your enemies and upgrade your cult Control the city by hacking important buildings Dive into a mature story with a profound background and plenty of moral choices Create your belief system with Dogmas Choose to follow the story of Elion in Campaign mode, or skirmish with AI cults in the Holy Wars skirmish mode Lead Elion to absolute power in the Story Campaign Follow Elion’s journey from a lone prophet to the most powerful advocate for religion in the city. Introducing a new alternative to the usual economic and resource management used in RTS games, Re-Legion allows players to convert ordinary non-believing citizens into loyal followers. Initiated cultists then expand the cult’s possibilities by obtaining CryptoCredits to enable upgrades, by praying to increase their faith and gain special abilities, hack buildings and ad-boards to expand and control territories, and convert other citizens or fight enemy units and non-believers. Become the Prophet in Holy Wars Holy Wars is a skirmish mode that’s a fine addition to Re-Legion’s story campaign. Fight AI cults for domination of the city and its Citizens’ souls. Choose a map and the creed of the Cult you wish to control. Each creed gives a different set of skills and dogmas, providing diverse ways of annihilating your enemies. You can also choose the difficulty level and strategy the AI will adopt, making every playthrough different and exciting. Create your cult, build your army of faithful followers, take over the city and destroy the enemy Sanctuary to finally prove that you are the one true Prophet!

Name: Yousei Daisensou ~ Touhou Sangetsusei
Description:
ゲームの進め方 ・ストーリー 　いつものようにせわしくなく暮らしていた氷の妖精チルノ。 　なんと、留守にした間に何者かに家を破壊されてしまった。 　破壊された家の上には謎の旗が立ててあった。 　その旗には見覚えのある妖精達の絵が…… 　怒り狂ったチルノはその旗の持ち主に宣戦布告を出す。 　そう、これが妖精大戦争の始まりだった。 　（詳しくは 　　　　「東方三月精　～ Strange and Bright Nature Deity」 　　　　　　第二巻の読み切り「妖精大戦争」を参照） ・ルール 　チルノを操作し、三妖精（サニーミルク、ルナチャイルド、 　スターサファイア）を撃破します。 　チルノは 敵弾を凍らせる能力 を持ちます。 　これをうまく駆使して妖精最強を名乗りましょう！ チルノを操作する ・上下左右 　　 チルノの操作 ・SHOTキー（Zキー)　　　　　　　　 ショット 　　溜撃ち　　　　　　　　　　　　　 アイスバリア 　　 ＊今作はSHOTキーではオート連射になりません ・RAPIDキー（Cキー か Ctrlキー）　　 ショット連射 ・BOMBキー（Xキー） 　 パーフェクトフリーズ ・SLOWキー（Shiftキー）　　　　　　 低速移動 　　＊SHOTキー押しっぱなしでも低速移動になります ・PAUSEキー（Escキー）　　　　　　 ポーズ 画面を見る ・やる気 　　チルノの根性ゲージです。 　　ミスすると １００％減ります。 　　 ９９％以下の状態でミスをするとゲームオーバー です。 ・こおりパワー 　アイスバリアをはるためのパワーです。 　常時 自機の上に表示されている数字と同じ物 です。 ・パーフェクトフリーズ 　１００％以上の時、パーフェクトフリーズが使用できます。 ・こおらせた面積 　敵弾を凍らせた総面積（累計）です。 　ショットの強さと直結しています。 　沢山凍らせれば凍らせるほどショットが強くなります。 ・レベル表示 　ショットのレベルです。 　凍らせた総面積が増えるとレベルが上がります。 敵弾を凍らせる！ 　　「 ちょっと敵が妖精の癖に弾幕濃すぎなんじゃない？ 」 　　そうですね。 　　　＊弱いチルノの主観ですので、いつもより多めの弾幕に見えています。 　　しかし！　チルノはそんな事に臆しません。 　　チルノには秘密兵器があるのです。 　　それが「 アイスバリア 」　ショットの溜撃ちで発動します。 　　アイスアタックは自機のすぐ近くしか攻撃できませんが、 　　何と、触れた敵弾を凍らせる事が出来るのです。 　　しかも凍らせた敵弾に当たっても大丈夫。 　　氷が砕けると敵弾も消滅してすっきり！ 　　さらに 凍った敵弾は新たに別の近くの敵弾を凍らせます 。 　　 　　 弾幕の濃い場所を狙って アイスバリアを当てれば連鎖的に 　　敵弾を凍らせて、敵の弾幕を壊滅させる事が出来るのです。 　　 　　どうしても避けられない場合、チルノの代わりにあなたが 　　頭を使って、効率よく凍らせるパターンを見つけましょう！ こおりパワー！ 　　アイスバリアはいつでもフルパワーで出せる訳では 　　ございません。馬鹿だって疲れます。 　　 　　こおりパワー（自機の上に表示されている％）が 　　 ３０％以上無いと出せません 。 　　 　　１００％に近いほど、氷の持続時間が長くなります。 　　３０％では一瞬で氷は砕けてしまいます。 　　 　　こおりパワーはアイスバリアを貼ると０％になります。 　　 　　 こおりパワーを回復させる方法 。 　　　・時間と共に徐々に自然回復（ゆっくり） 　　　・ ショットを敵に当てる（かなり高速、ボス戦では基本） 　　　・ザコ敵を倒す（一瞬で回復） 　　　・敵弾にかする（上級者向けだが、高次面では必須） 　　　・溜め続ける（通常より若干速く回復） 特殊な敵弾に注意！ 　　「 連続してアイスバリアを張り続ければ楽勝じゃん？ 」 　　 　　いえいえ、敵も馬鹿ですが少しは対策します。 　　以下の攻撃に注意！ 　　 　　・ 燃えている炎弾 　　　この敵弾は 凍りません 。氷の上を貫通して飛んでいきますので 　　　注意してください。 　　　 　　・ レーザー 　　　 氷を破壊して貫通します！ 　　　破壊時に破片が飛び散るので、それに当たるとミスと 　　　なります。 　　　自機の近くでレーザーに氷を破壊されないように注意！ 氷は面積！ 　　チルノは纏まったたくさんの敵弾を凍らせるよりも、 　　広く散らばった敵弾を凍らせる方が好みです。 　　 　　ゲーム画面を１００％としたとき、 　　 凍らせた部分の割合 がボーナスとなります。 　　敵弾の発射地点を狙って凍らせるより、十分広がってから 　　凍らせた方が面積は広がります。 　　 　　凍らせた総面積は、ステージ１からの累計です。 　　これが一定数を超えるとショットレベルが上がります。 　　 　　ボスが硬くて倒せない場合、積極的に面積が増えるように 　　凍らせていきましょう！ その他の仕様！ 　　やる気が増える条件 　　　・敵弾を凍らせる 　　　・敵にダメージを与える 　　　　（ショットより 氷のダメージの方がやる気増加率が高い ） 　　１００％単位で自機が一つ増えたと同じ効果です。 　　最大１０００％です。 　　 　　パーフェクトフリーズが増える条件 　　　・敵弾を凍らせる 　　１００％以上増えないのでバンバン使っていこう！ 　　 　　パーフェクトフリーズは全画面凍らせます。 　　アイスバリアでは凍らない 炎弾も凍ります 。 　　まさにパーフェクト！ よくわかんない 　　なんかこのゲーム、難しすぎるし、操作も難解だし、 　　会話も支離滅裂だし、よくわかんない。 　　 　　どういう感じで攻略すればいいのか？ 　　ピンと来なかった場合はデモプレイを見てみましょう。 　　タイトル画面で放おって置くとデモプレイが見られます。 　　 　　なお、この操作説明はゲームプレイ中のポーズ画面 　　からも見る事が出来ます。 　　 　　会話が支離滅裂なのは妖精だからです。 　　戦争が終わったら何を言ったのかすっかり 　　忘れている事でしょう。

Name: KAMIKO
Description:
KAMIKO is a game styled around Japanese Shinto beliefs. Fight as priestesses called 'KAMIKO' and battle against demons while solving puzzles to make your way through the stages. Look no further if you are looking for an arcade action game with a twist! Each stage has several Torii (gates) which are magically sealed. Find a way to break all the seals to make your way to the stage boss. Another fun and easy original created by indie games SKIPMORE.

Name: 怪獣綺譚 朧十夜 空狐万華鏡
Description:
―同じ時の中で、別な刻を生きる人が ここにもいた― 　グラフィックとムービーで演出するストーリーノベル。 　「朧十夜」のその後を描く、怪獣綺譚・天の夢守編第二弾。 　 ■あらすじ 　シズネがお蔵で見つけた不思議な絡繰り万華鏡……覗き込めば見えてくるのは過去の情景。 　夜ごと幻に魅せられるうち、シズネはそれが物語に描かれる八つの尾と千の命を持つ狐、千年空狐に関わる品だと気付く。 　しかしその気づきは、天ノ守の家にかけられた優しいまやかしを暴くものでもあった……。 　凰睛蝶と司氣龍。天地の神々の戦いが幕を閉じ、兆しを終えたシズネ。 　素顔の兄と過ごす日々。夢で逢う蝶の君。穏やかなとき。 　そしてまた、夏がくる……。

Name: 樱雪集～Yuyuko's Butterfly Dream
Description:
Add English Support Add Japanese Support Add Controller Support Feedbacks QQ Group:57718025 ABOUT THIS GAME Yuyuko’s Butterfly Dream is a Platform Action Doujin game originated from Touhou Project with puzzle elements and side-line stories included. The story is about Yuyuko breaking into a strange new dreamland where she meets Netherworld creatures and mysterious travellers. In attempts to explore the secrets of this fairyland, searching for its root and a way out, Yuyuko is now on her way for an unknown adventure. ABOUT FAIRYLAND Yuyuko, a ghost princess who has departed a thousand years ago, is equipped with the ability to invite one to his death. In a doze, she finds herself in a mystic land filled with scents from Netherworld and its creatures. Those familiar magic crafts and spells… And the Death Butterflies surrounding, all recalls the memories sealed for a thousand years… Game features : Smooth and Simple Action Combats Exciting Boss Encounters Diverse Item System Rich Puzzle Elements Choices-Depending Narratives Multiple Game Ending Touhou Project Roles Classic Japanese Scenes Excellent Music Promising Future Updates Credits Touhou Doujin Music Circle, supporter of BGM : Mad Hatter Tea; Illustration Support : 无感装置、qwer37; Narratives and Scripts Support: Dim Dawn Luna; And other friends who participated in making this game. There wouldn’t be this game without each help. Many Thanks! The game is now on Early Access, with continuous updates followed: Improvements for Game Systems and Levels, Support for All Operate Systems(Mac, Linux), Audio on Scripts, Support for English, Japanese and more languages.

Name: Memento Infernum
Description:
Mission... You failed God, and now you have to repay for what you did. Go and clear Holy Place out of all the demons that infest it. And do that by mastering movement and gunplay in this new demanding top-down shooter. Priest.. Dash through battlefield as Priest with uncovered dark past, and follow his road of penance. Skillful as you are, take care of your fragile mortality, as there is a lot that want to take it away. Demon... The Graveyard is no place for mere mortal. Filled to the brim with randomly generated waves of evil, from lost souls, through cultist, to even Prince of Underworld, it will require you to learn behavior of every adversary if You want to succeed. Gun... And to face all these hordes of Evil alone, merciful God will send you weapons to fight with. Every gun being unique, they will require you to change accordingly your gameplay. Master all of them if you want to go far. HELL Combine your movement, gunplay and knowledge of enemy to clear the whole Holy Place and see the end of Priest's story. And if that is not enough, try infinite hell mode, when you can prove your worth by slaying even more demons and beating highscore doing that. Let your damnation start! Play Memento Infernum now!

**Touhou: Dreaming Butterfly | 东方蝶梦志: A Unique Horizontal STG Experience**

Touhou: Dreaming Butterfly, a captivating derivative game from the renowned Touhou Project, is the brainchild of the development team Strrationalism. This title boldly ventures into uncharted territory for the Touhou series by adopting a horizontal STG (Shoot 'Em Up) gameplay style, a format not previously explored by any original Touhou game. The primary objective of Touhou: Dreaming Butterfly is to immerse horizontal STG enthusiasts in the genre's inherent enjoyment while simultaneously offering players accustomed to vertical STGs an accessible gateway into this distinct gaming paradigm.

According to Strrationalism, the developers aimed to bridge the gap between different STG player bases. By retaining the core stylistic elements of horizontal STGs, Touhou: Dreaming Butterfly closely mirrors the beloved characteristics of the original Touhou games. Players can anticipate the familiar and intricate Spell Card system, visually stunning stages, and a challenging yet fair bullet-hell experience characterized by concentrated but ultimately dodged patterns.

**Gameplay Mechanics:**

*   **Direction Keys:** Control character movement.
*   **Shift Key:** Activates slow-motion aiming.
*   **Z Key:** Fires shots and confirms selections.
*   **X Key:** Deploys bombs and cancels actions.
*   **ESC Key:** Pauses the game or cancels menus.

**Recommended System Specifications:**

*   **Graphics:** NVIDIA GTX950M (supporting OpenGL 2.0)
*   **Memory:** 4GB RAM
*   **CPU:** 2.3GHz

The game also boasts enhanced gamepad support, offering a more immersive experience with vibration and joystick functionality.

Strrationalism, a team driven by passion and interest, expresses their profound happiness in sharing Touhou: Dreaming Butterfly with the community. They convey that the game's narrative unfolds within Gensokyo, where individuals find themselves inadvertently drawn into someone's dream. The protagonists are the familiar miko and magician from the Touhou universe. As the sole "awake" individuals within this dreamscape, they encounter acquaintances who exhibit peculiar behaviors – some manic, others sinister, strange, or even resembling themselves in altered states. This intriguing premise, as described by the developers, promises a unique narrative journey within the established Touhou lore.

Embark on a heroic adventure in the enchanting land of Celedain with "Spirit and Katana." This captivating game invites you to join a vibrant guild, forge meaningful friendships, and share memorable experiences. As you explore Celedain, you'll be immersed in a world brought to life by stunning visuals and a truly wonderful art style. The cities, breathtaking landscapes, and intricately designed characters combine to create a visually delightful experience.

### An Uplifting Soundtrack

Complementing the visual splendor is an uplifting soundtrack designed to enhance gameplay. The graceful music and heartwarming songs create a relaxing ambiance, allowing players to fully unwind. You can even sing along to the songs and replay accompanying videos, further deepening your connection to the game's world.

### Collectibles to Enhance Your Journey

"Spirit and Katana" offers a wealth of collectibles. Discover and collect biographies, pictures, and memorable scenes featuring all your favorite characters, allowing you to delve deeper into their stories. Additionally, challenge yourself to unlock all 10 Steam Achievements scattered throughout the game, offering an extra layer of engagement.

### An Extensive Saving System

To ensure you can revisit cherished moments, the game provides an extensive saving system. With more than 100 save slots available, you have ample opportunity to preserve your progress. It is highly recommended to save at the beginning of each chapter and song, ensuring you can always return to your favorite scenes and musical pieces.

### Creator's Notes

Additional notes from the creators highlight the game's unique appeal. "Spirit and Katana" is a family-friendly experience, free from adult content, designed to be enjoyed much like watching an anime or reading a manga. The writers' intention is to share heart-warming memories with players, fostering a sense of joy and connection. For the most profound impact, the game is best experienced by playing it from start to finish, allowing the narrative to unfold organically. Thank you for embarking on this journey!

"YuuYuu Jiteki no Yuukarin" is a captivating hand-painted action-adventure game that invites players into a distinctive "Nu World" experience, with Yuuka Kazami as the central protagonist. The game is distinguished by its entirely hand-drawn aesthetic, a testament to the meticulous craftsmanship evident in every character, map, and visual effect.

Players will guide Yuuka through a variety of challenges, employing an extensive move set. This includes fundamental actions like jumping, dashing, and crouching, alongside more dynamic abilities such as kicking, attacking with an umbrella, grabbing and throwing objects, climbing ladders, and swinging on ivy. A crucial element for progression and combat is mastering the umbrella's unique levitation ability, which unlocks advanced traversal and strategic options. The game provides three distinct difficulty levels: 'picnic,' 'adventure,' and 'expert.' Importantly, these settings do not modify the game's content, allowing players to select the level of challenge that best suits their preference.

To ensure a smooth player experience, the game addresses technical support and settings. For common startup issues, particularly those involving missing .dll files, it is recommended to install either the '32bit VC++ Runtime' or the 'Trial Version' of 'Pixel Game Maker MV.' To optimize game speed and performance, players are advised to confirm that their monitor's refresh rate is set to 60Hz. For users with NVIDIA graphics cards, further performance enhancements can be achieved by configuring the NVIDIA Control Panel to utilize the 'High performance NVIDIA processor' specifically for 'Pixel Game Maker MV Player.'

Switching the game's language to English is a straightforward process. During gameplay, pressing 'F1' will bring up the in-game menu. From there, navigate to 'Settings,' select 'ゲーム画面' (Game Screen), choose English from the '言語' (Language) list, and confirm the selection. Additionally, resetting the game by pressing 'F5' will display the title logo in English. The game officially supports keyboard, PlayStation, and Xbox controllers, with in-game prompts specifically tailored for these devices. It is important to note that mouse control is not supported. While other controllers may function, their corresponding button prompts will not be displayed. Players have the flexibility to reconfigure controls by accessing 'Operation setting' through the 'F1' menu; however, the on-screen guidance will not automatically update to reflect these custom keybinds.

The developer has indicated that all English text, both on the store page and within the game itself, is a machine translation from the original Japanese. They extend their apologies for any unintentional awkwardness or potentially offensive phrasing that may arise from this translation. The developer expresses their hope that players will still find enjoyment in the game, notwithstanding any minor readability challenges.

Team Fortress 2, a title lauded by PC Gamer as "the most fun you can have online," is now completely free to play, with no hidden catches. This acclaimed title stands as one of the most popular online action games ever created, consistently delivering free updates that introduce new game modes, maps, equipment, and, famously, a vast array of cosmetic items, particularly hats.

The game features nine distinct classes, each offering a unique set of tactical abilities and personalities. This diversity ensures a broad appeal, catering to a wide spectrum of player skills and preferences. For newcomers to Team Fortress 2, the game provides comprehensive training and offline practice modes. These resources are designed to help players hone their skills before engaging in the game's numerous competitive modes. Popular game modes include the classic Capture the Flag, strategic Control Point, objective-based Payload, fast-paced Arena, and the ever-popular King of the Hill, among others.

A significant aspect of Team Fortress 2's enduring appeal lies in its extensive customization options. Players can personalize their characters with hundreds of weapons, hats, and other collectible items, which can be acquired through crafting, purchasing, or trading. This allows for a deeply personalized gameplay experience, enabling players to tailor their favorite classes to match their individual playstyle and aesthetic preferences. Importantly, the game operates on a "free-to-play, not pay-to-win" model. According to Valve, the developer, virtually all items available in the Mann Co. Store can also be discovered and obtained through gameplay, reinforcing the idea that success is driven by skill and dedication rather than financial investment. Research into player engagement suggests that the continuous addition of new content and the robust community-driven economy contribute significantly to the game's longevity and popularity.

Name: Mission: It's Complicated
Description:
Mission: It’s Compli­cated is a visual novel about getting superheroes to fall in love, and the shenanigans that happen along the way. Send your heroes out on ridiculous missions at night, and try to keep them from getting hurt -- or they won't be able to go on dates during the day! Grow your favorite pair's bond so they can go on more dates. Help them pick the right thing to say. Get them to fall in love… and save the world. Super sweet features of this narrative-based, visual novel include: Heart and humor! The puns are terrible and the feels are real. Choose your OTP! Any hero (there's 5) can be paired with any other to win the game. Friend dates! Friendship is just as important as romance. Win the game with romantic or platonic love depending on which pair you pick! No bummers! Every pair has a happy ending. But can you get the ULTIMATE happy ending? A serious lack of beds! Oh no, there's only one! :O Super cute art! Look at it! It's cute as heck. So much reading! Over 100k words! That's an entire novel! Wow! It'll probably help you on your SATs or something! Are those still a thing? NO voice acting! Cast your favorite voice actor for each character using the power of your imagination. LGBTQ+ friendly Want to breeze through the game to see all the endings? Skip any mission you've done before and still get credit... so you can get to those juicy dates! Free! Not secretly-designed-for-microtransactions-free, but actually free. So that's cool. In case you missed it, Mission: It’s Compli­cated is free. Completely FREE! To let someone know you care, share one of these special Valen­tine’s Day cards with them. Sharing is caring! Fun gifs!

Name: Dota 2
Description:
The most-played game on Steam. Every day, millions of players worldwide enter battle as one of over a hundred Dota heroes. And no matter if it's their 10th hour of play or 1,000th, there's always something new to discover. With regular updates that ensure a constant evolution of gameplay, features, and heroes, Dota 2 has truly taken on a life of its own. One Battlefield. Infinite Possibilities. When it comes to diversity of heroes, abilities, and powerful items, Dota boasts an endless array—no two games are the same. Any hero can fill multiple roles, and there's an abundance of items to help meet the needs of each game. Dota doesn't provide limitations on how to play, it empowers you to express your own style. All heroes are free. Competitive balance is Dota's crown jewel, and to ensure everyone is playing on an even field, the core content of the game—like the vast pool of heroes—is available to all players. Fans can collect cosmetics for heroes and fun add-ons for the world they inhabit, but everything you need to play is already included before you join your first match. Bring your friends and party up. Dota is deep, and constantly evolving, but it's never too late to join. Learn the ropes playing co-op vs. bots. Sharpen your skills in the hero demo mode. Jump into the behavior- and skill-based matchmaking system that ensures you'll be matched with the right players each game.

## Guild Wars 2: Your Open World Adventure Awaits

Guild Wars 2 invites you to explore a vast, dynamic open world where player freedom and seamless cooperation are key. You can chart your own course through Tyria, using your content guide and compass, or simply by embracing the thrill of discovery. The world teems with life, featuring engaging characters and dynamic events that reward your participation, according to the game's design philosophy.

The game prioritizes player enjoyment over repetitive grinding. Every action, from aiding fallen allies to gathering resources, contributes to your character's growth. This cooperative spirit shines in challenging content like intricate jumping puzzles and epic world bosses, where players can readily assist one another without formal party formation.

Character progression in Guild Wars 2 is deep and highly customizable. You'll discover a diverse arsenal of weapons, each interacting uniquely with different professions and offering distinct combat styles. Hundreds of skills and traits can be unlocked and equipped, enabling personalized builds.

For those seeking competitive thrills, structured PvP offers an even playing field, providing max-level gear and build options. Beyond combat prowess, Guild Wars 2 champions player expression through its robust fashion system. New weapons and armor unlock cosmetic skins, and with thousands of combinations and collectible dyes, you can craft a character that is uniquely yours.

Expansions and Living World seasons enrich the gameplay experience. They offer valuable benefits even for free accounts, such as daily log-in rewards and expanded chat features. These updates are vital for unlocking exclusive rewards and powerful Masteries, as noted by game developers.

*   **Heart of Thorns** allows players to unlock and upgrade their gliders, enhancing aerial exploration.
*   **Path of Fire** introduces a variety of mounts, each equipped with powerful movement skills that transform traversal.
*   **End of Dragons** adds engaging new activities like fishing and skiff piloting.

Each expansion also grants access to nine elite specializations, unlocking new weapon choices and potent abilities. The revenant profession, a unique class that channels legendary figures, can be chosen at character creation.

Living World seasons continue the game's evolving narrative, introducing new explorable zones and valuable rewards. These episodes can be purchased individually or acquired through Gem Store bundles.

*Note: Living World episodes are designed for level 80 characters. Restarting the game client may be necessary for certain upgrades.*

**Important for new players: Existing Guild Wars 2 accounts cannot be accessed via Steam.**

Name: NBA 2K17
Description:
Following the record-breaking launch of NBA 2K16, the NBA 2K franchise continues to stake its claim as the most authentic sports video game with NBA 2K17. As the franchise that “all sports video games should aspire to be” (GamesRadar), NBA 2K17 will take the game to new heights and continue to blur the lines between video game and reality.

Name: Pinball FX3
Description:
Williams™ Pinball classics are now available -- and Fish Tales™ is yours for FREE! Zen is proud to bring these amazing games to players around the world. Enjoy! Pinball FX3 is the biggest, most community focused pinball game ever created. Multiplayer matchups, user generated tournaments and league play create endless opportunity for pinball competition. FREE backwards compatibility! Bring your previous Pinball FX2 purchases with you to Pinball FX3 at no charge! Not so hot with the flippers? Pinball FX3 features new single player modes that will help you become a better player! All tables have received graphics updates including real-time lighting and shadow projection. Zen Studios will continue to support Pinball FX3 with frequent content releases and new features!

## Dive into Apex Legends: A Hero Shooter Revolution

Apex Legends™ is a free-to-play* Hero Shooter. Here, legendary characters with powerful, unique abilities fight for fame and fortune on the Frontier's edge. The game challenges players to master a growing roster of diverse Legends. It also emphasizes deep-tactical squad play and bold innovations beyond the typical Battle Royale. This all happens in a lawless world where anything is possible, marking the next step for the Hero Shooter genre.

### Core Gameplay Elements

#### Master a Diverse Legend Roster

At the core of Apex Legends is its cast of powerful Legends. Players are encouraged to master a growing roster, with each Legend having their own distinct personality, strengths, and abilities. While these characters are easy to start with, true mastery offers a significant and rewarding challenge.

#### Embrace Strategic Squad Play

Success relies on teamwork. Players must pick their Legend wisely and combine their unique skills with teammates to form a strong crew. This focus on synergy is key to the gameplay. Whether fighting in a huge, floating city in Battle Royale or in intense duels in the Arenas, quick thinking and strategic coordination are vital. Players need to master their Legend's abilities and work with teammates to find new tactics and unlock powerful, game-changing combos.

#### Experience Innovative Combat and Arsenal

Combat is dynamic and engaging. Players will need to master an expanding array of powerful weapons and gear. Moving fast and learning each weapon's rhythm are crucial for success. The game stays fresh with limited-time modes and new content each season.

#### Explore an Ever-Expanding Universe

Apex Legends unfolds in an immersive world with an evolving story. Maps change seasonally, and new Legends are added, bringing fresh strategic depth. Players can customize their look with unique outfits and join the ongoing adventure.

*Please note: This game offers optional in-game purchases of virtual currency. This currency can be used to get virtual in-game items, including a random selection of virtual in-game items.*

Name: EVE Online
Description:
THE #1 SPACE MMO EVE Online is the largest single shard space MMO of all time. With over 7,000 solar systems and nearly 20 years of rich player-created history, join this storied universe and play free to experience everything from immense PvP or PvE battles to mining, exploration, and industry. Seize your destiny as an immortal, a Capsuleer capable of piloting over 350 fully customizable starships from small, nimble Frigates to formidable Battleships and massive Freighters. Embark on a solo adventure through the twisting nexus of wormhole space, form a mighty industrial empire to transform athe building blocks of the universe, or take up arms with likeminded players to conquer vast frontiers together. Who will you be in New Eden? PLAY FREE Experience this vast spaceship MMO for free as an Alpha Clone with access to Frigates, Destroyers, Cruisers, Battlecruisers, and Battleships of any faction. Enterprising Capsuleers may also choose to upgrade to Omega Clone for unlimited Ship access and double training speed. SINGLE SHARD, SINGLE SERVER SANDBOX As a single sharded MMO, all players of EVE Online play on the same server across all timezones. Jump in and join thousands of players in the greatest space sandbox there is. Every decision you make, battle you win, and system you claim becomes a part of the long, rich history of New Eden. Where will you leave your mark? GAMING'S BIGGEST BATTLES There's no limit on what you can accomplish as a Capsuleer. EVE currently holds the Guinness World Record for the largest multiplayer video game PvP battle - 8,825 players in a single conflict. Take part in massive spaceship battles from day one or train up and command those fleets yourself. PLAYER DRIVEN ECONOMY EVE's player economy is one of unprecedented scale. The single shard nature of the universe makes for a single economy spread across thousands of space stations. Whether you want to trade on the local markets, produce new ships and equipment, or make cunning investments based on knowledge of player politics, it's all possible. LIMITLESS CHOICES Pursue a life of exploration, warfare, prosperity, or all of the above! Pilot over 350 different vessels and customize it to your liking with thousands of unique modules. Modify your ship as a fast and nimble fighter or design it from the ground up as a heavily shielded brawler to go toe to toe with others. Feeling lucky? Take a chance and modify your equipment further using alien technology found deep in Abyssal Deadspace. CONTINUOUS DEVELOPMENT With over 17 years of active development and free expansions, EVE is one of the longest running space MMOs out there. Join a thrilling universe filled with the unrelenting activity and combined history of millions of other players!

## Orcs Must Die! Unchained: A New Era of Tower Defense

Orcs Must Die! Unchained takes the beloved action tower defense gameplay of its predecessors and elevates it to new heights with **3-player team-based combat**. As Polygon noted, it's "Orcs Must Die! 3 and much, much more." The stakes are higher, the traps are bloodier, and the invaders are more ravenous than ever. You'll need to bring your A-game and enlist the help of your most formidable orc-hating allies.

### A Familiar World, A New Threat

Set years after the events of Orcs Must Die! 2, Unchained plunges players back into the familiar, hilarious fantasy world. However, the landscape has changed. **Maximillian and Gabriella have worked to rebuild the Order**, but their new enemy, the Unchained, is a far cry from the mindless hordes of the past. This is an **organized army led by its own powerful heroes**, making the fight for control of the magical rifts more challenging than ever. As PCGames N observed, "Unfortunately for orcs, it’s better than ever."

### The Art of Orc Annihilation

The core of Orcs Must Die! Unchained remains its **classic blend of white-knuckle action and strategic trap-building**. Players can team up with friends to unleash a torrent of destruction upon millions of new invading monsters. The goal is to **engineer an impenetrable gauntlet of traps** designed to hack, grind, flatten, gibletize, and incinerate foes before they reach the heart of the rift.

#### Mastering the Arsenal of Destruction

The thrill of Orcs Must Die! Unchained lies in its **deep trap customization and upgrade system**. Players can unlock new traps and enhance existing ones to become even deadlier. The game encourages players to **cover their fortresses in gleeful torture devices**, engineering a variety of hilarious and violent ends for the invading minions. Each battle demands a **customized strategy**, leveraging the powers of elements and physics to overcome the relentless hordes.

### Heroes of the Rift

The question remains: are you mage enough to defend the rifts? Orcs Must Die! Unchained features a **wide variety of unique and powerful heroes**, each offering deep gameplay options and **painfully creative ways to stop orcs in their grimy tracks**. Alongside returning favorites Max and Gabriella, players can choose from a cast of new heroes like Blackpaw, Hogarth, Stinkeye, and Bloodspike. Whether you prefer brute force or cunning trickery, **there’s a hero for every type of orc-slayer**. Hardcore Gamer aptly stated, "Unchained undeniably felt like an Orcs Must Die! game."

### Your Favorite Ways to Slay, Amplified

Orcs Must Die! Unchained offers a wealth of game modes to satisfy every player's desire for orc destruction.

*   **Survival Mode:** Experience **3-player co-op defense gameplay** as you fight your way to the top of the orc pile.
*   **Weekly Challenges and Daily Quests:** These provide opportunities to **unlock extra traps and upgrade parts**, further enhancing your arsenal.
*   **Endless Mode:** The fan-favorite Endless mode returns, now with **expanded 3-player co-op**.
*   **Sabotage Mode:** This **all-new game mode** pits two teams of three against each other in an action-packed race for the highest score.

#### Introducing Sabotage!

Sabotage! is a **fast-paced, entirely new way to play** Orcs Must Die! Unchained. Teams defend their rift while simultaneously facing interference from another team in an alternate dimension. This opposing team can deploy spells, minions, and massive bosses to distract and disrupt your efforts, aiming to steal your rift points. Of course, you can retaliate in kind! The team with the most rift points at the end of the match emerges victorious. This mode promises a **trap-snapping, spell-slinging, ogre-spudging good time**.

Name: HEX: Shards of Fate
Description:
HEX: Shards of Fate – Magical World for Keen Card Players HEX: Shards of Fate is an exciting challenge for fans of cards, action and strategy. Explore the fabulous world of Entrath, wrestle your way through sinister dungeons and use skill and guile in matches against other players. This digital card game combines the best of two worlds: classic TCGs and online RPGs . Create powerful decks from over 1,000 unique cards and dive into epic battles. Earn equipment items and use socketing gems to further improve your deck, whilst a variety of champions with individual skills complement your card armies. Cool animations and effects enrich the gaming experience on your road to victory! Experience HEX: Shards of Fate Play the first digital TCG with RPG elements Select a champion from eight races and three classes Explore dungeons in the exciting single-player mode Put your skills to the test in 1 vs 1 matches and hone your strategies Trade cards with friends and other players Win amazing prizes in daily tournaments with up to 128 players

## Dwarf Fortress: A Deep Dive into Its Unrivaled Simulated Worlds

Dwarf Fortress stands out for its exceptionally detailed simulation, crafting worlds with an astonishing level of depth. This enduring game, which has seen continuous development since its initial release in 2003, offers virtually limitless gameplay by simulating entire civilizations, the intricate personalities of individual dwarves, a vast array of creatures, and distinct cultural practices. Now more readily available on Steam, complete with updated graphics, Dwarf Fortress invites players to take charge of a dwarf colony, guiding them through the challenges of mining, survival, and the inevitable rise and fall of their burgeoning civilization.

The game masterfully blends elements of construction, management, and roguelike simulation. Each procedurally generated world presents a fresh set of unique challenges for players to overcome. According to Bay 12 Games, players are tasked with managing their dwarves' individual needs and distinct personalities, contending with environmental threats such as starvation and madness, and navigating conflicts with rival civilizations, dangerous wild animals, and the reanimated undead. The simulation's remarkable depth is further evidenced by its detailed combat system, rich world generation featuring hundreds of animal and monster types, and intricate cultural elements like spontaneously generated poetry and music. A complex weather system and the inclusion of over two hundred rock and mineral types contribute significantly to its realism, as frequently discussed within the game's active community.

Bay 12 Games has stated their ambitious goal is to simulate all of existence, with an estimated completion rate currently at 44%. The Steam version significantly eases the initial learning curve through integrated tutorials, enhanced visuals, and an original soundtrack. As a commander, your role is to lead your dwarves in their quest to discover valuable riches, craft magnificent artifacts, and establish a thriving, self-sufficient community. You have the freedom to design elaborate defenses, cultivate a rich culture through specialized buildings like taverns and libraries, and observe your dwarves as they develop their own unique cultural identities. Dwarf Fortress is widely acknowledged as a pivotal inspiration for influential games such as RimWorld and Minecraft, and it holds the distinction of being one of the first video games to be acquired by the Museum of Modern Art. The community's enduring slogan, "Losing is fun!", perfectly encapsulates the game's challenging yet rewarding spirit.

**System Shock 2: A Defining Sci-Fi Horror Experience**

System Shock 2 plunges players into a chilling sci-fi horror narrative, establishing a grim atmosphere with a memorable warning: "Remember, it is my will that guided you here. It is my will that gave you your cybernetic implants, the only beauty in that meat you call a body. If you value that meat... you will do as I tell you." This quote, integral to the game's lore, sets the stage. Players awaken from cryo-sleep aboard the starship Von Braun, finding themselves augmented with cybernetic implants. This personal change is overshadowed by the horrifying discovery that the entire crew has been murdered. The ship becomes a terrifying, claustrophobic labyrinth, stalked by mutated and infected entities. Pulling the strings from the shadows is the rogue artificial intelligence, SHODAN, who taunts the player as they uncover the ship's disturbing secrets.

The game offers a deep role-playing experience, allowing players to choose from three military specializations. Each path provides unique skills, weapons, and psionic abilities. Players can enhance their capabilities through an upgrade system, excelling in hacking, weapon mastery, and psionic development. Unraveling the mystery involves finding audio logs, confronting spectral apparitions, and conducting research. These elements are vital for gaining tactical advantages and unlocking powerful gear.

System Shock 2 is praised for its revolutionary mechanics, which have significantly influenced the first-person shooter (FPS) and role-playing game (RPG) genres. Its impact is seen in titles like Deus Ex and Bioshock, according to many game critics. The game also includes a cooperative multiplayer mode for up to three players and is available on Windows. Its legacy is cemented by its haunting narrative, innovative gameplay, and terrifying atmosphere. For macOS and Linux users, cross-platform play is possible with 'WINE'.

System Shock 2, a landmark title in the science fiction horror first-person shooter role-playing game genre, has made a significant comeback. Players awaken from cryo-sleep aboard the starship Von Braun to a grim discovery: cybernetic implants have been forcibly attached to their bodies, and the ship's entire crew has been brutally murdered. The ship's corridors are now stalked by the infected, their pained cries serving as a constant reminder of the horrific fate that has befallen them. Overseeing and taunting the player is the malevolent artificial intelligence, SHODAN, whose jeers and mockery highlight the player's desperate fight to uncover the secrets of the abandoned vessel.

The game places a strong emphasis on player agency and character development. According to game reviews, players can choose from three distinct military specializations, each providing access to unique skills, armaments, and paranormal psionic abilities. As noted by gaming publications, these abilities can be further upgraded and enhanced, leading to improved expertise in hacking, combat, and psionic manipulation. The story progresses through the collection of enigmatic audio logs, encounters with ghostly apparitions, and dedicated investigation, all of which offer vital advantages in combat and unlock access to rare weapons and useful items.

System Shock 2 is widely celebrated for its genre-defining gameplay mechanics, which have become fundamental components in contemporary FPS and RPG titles. Industry observers have pointed out that its pioneering design has influenced many highly regarded games, such as Deus Ex® and Bioshock®. The overall experience of System Shock 2, defined by its unsettling narrative, revolutionary gameplay, and terrifying ambiance, has solidified its reputation as one of the most exceptional games ever produced. For users on Mac OS and Linux, the game employs 'WINE' technology to ensure it runs smoothly. Additionally, players have the option to join forces with up to three friends for a cooperative multiplayer adventure, although this particular feature is exclusively available on Windows.

Factorio is a highly engaging construction and management simulation game where players are tasked with building and maintaining intricate factories. The core gameplay loop involves a progression from basic resource gathering to complex industrial automation, according to the game's developers.

Initially, players will find themselves manually chopping trees and mining ores, crafting essential components like mechanical arms and transport belts. This humble beginning quickly evolves into the establishment of a formidable industrial empire. This can include the development of vast solar fields for power, sophisticated oil refining and cracking operations, and the deployment of construction and logistic robots to manage resource needs efficiently, as detailed in player guides.

This intensive exploitation of the planet's resources inevitably attracts the attention of indigenous alien lifeforms. Consequently, players must be prepared to defend their burgeoning machine empire from hostile attacks. The game also offers a robust cooperative multiplayer mode, allowing players to join forces, construct massive factories collaboratively, and delegate tasks among friends.

Factorio's extensive modding support is a significant draw, enabling content creators worldwide to introduce innovative features. These mods range from minor quality-of-life improvements and helper tools to complete game overhauls, as documented on community forums. While the freeplay scenario forms the foundation of the core gameplay, a variety of challenging Scenarios are also available. For those seeking ultimate creative control, the in-game Map Editor allows players to design their own maps, place entities, enemies, and terrain, and even implement custom scripts for unique gameplay experiences.

Regarding pricing, the developers have stated that there are no current plans for sales or price reductions in the foreseeable future.

Player feedback consistently highlights the game's exceptional handling of logistical challenges. As one Reddit user noted, "No other game in the history of gaming handles the logistics side of management simulator so perfectly." This sentiment is echoed by prominent figures. Notch of Mojang humorously remarked, "I see conveyor belts when I close my eyes. I may have been binging Factorio lately." Similarly, YouTuber Zisteau described it as, "Factorio is a super duper awesome game where we use conveyor belts to shoot aliens."

Name: Resident Evil 2
Description:
The genre-defining masterpiece Resident Evil 2 returns, completely rebuilt from the ground up for a deeper narrative experience. Using Capcom’s proprietary RE Engine, Resident Evil 2 offers a fresh take on the classic survival horror saga with breathtakingly realistic visuals, heart-pounding immersive audio, a new over-the-shoulder camera, and modernized controls on top of gameplay modes from the original game. In Resident Evil 2, the classic action, tense exploration, and puzzle solving gameplay that defined the Resident Evil series returns. Players join rookie police officer Leon Kennedy and college student Claire Redfield, who are thrust together by a disastrous outbreak in Raccoon City that transformed its population into deadly zombies. Both Leon and Claire have their own separate playable campaigns, allowing players to see the story from both characters’ perspectives. The fate of these two fan favorite characters is in players hands as they work together to survive and get to the bottom of what is behind the terrifying attack on the city. Will they make it out alive? A spine-chilling reimagining of a horror classic - Based on the original release in 1998, the new game has been completely rebuilt from the ground up for a deeper narrative experience. A whole new perspective – New over-the-shoulder camera mode and modernized control scheme creates a more modern take on the survival horror experience and offers players a trip down memory lane with the original gameplay modes from the 1998 release. Terrifyingly realistic visuals – Built on Capcom’s proprietary RE Engine, Resident Evil 2 delivers breathtakingly photorealistic visuals whilst stunning lighting creates an up-close, intense and atmospheric experience as players roam the corridors of the Raccoon City Police Department (RPD). Face the grotesque hordes – Zombies are brought to life with a horrifyingly realistic wet gore effect as they react in real time taking instant visible damage, making every bullet count. Iconic series defining gameplay – Engage in frenzied combat with enemies, explore dark menacing corridors, solve puzzles to access areas and collect and use items discovered around the environment in a terrifying constant fight for survival. See favorite characters in a whole new light - Join rookie police officer Leon S. Kennedy on his first day in the job and college student Claire Redfield, who is searching for her brother amidst a terrifying zombie epidemic. Step into the rookie shoes of both heroes - Enjoy separately playable campaigns for both Leon and Claire, allowing players to see the story from both characters’ perspective.

Name: Left 4 Dead 2
Description:
Set in the zombie apocalypse, Left 4 Dead 2 (L4D2) is the highly anticipated sequel to the award-winning Left 4 Dead, the #1 co-op game of 2008. This co-operative action horror FPS takes you and your friends through the cities, swamps and cemeteries of the Deep South, from Savannah to New Orleans across five expansive campaigns. You'll play as one of four new survivors armed with a wide and devastating array of classic and upgraded weapons. In addition to firearms, you'll also get a chance to take out some aggression on infected with a variety of carnage-creating melee weapons, from chainsaws to axes and even the deadly frying pan. You'll be putting these weapons to the test against (or playing as in Versus) three horrific and formidable new Special Infected. You'll also encounter five new uncommon common infected, including the terrifying Mudmen. Helping to take L4D's frantic, action-packed gameplay to the next level is AI Director 2.0. This improved Director has the ability to procedurally change the weather you'll fight through and the pathways you'll take, in addition to tailoring the enemy population, effects, and sounds to match your performance. L4D2 promises a satisfying and uniquely challenging experience every time the game is played, custom-fitted to your style of play. Next generation co-op action gaming from the makers of Half-Life, Portal, Team Fortress and Counter-Strike. Over 20 new weapons & items headlined by over 10 melee weapons – axe, chainsaw, frying pan, baseball bat – allow you to get up close with the zombies New survivors. New Story. New dialogue. Five expansive campaigns for co-operative, Versus and Survival game modes. An all new multiplayer mode. Uncommon common infected. Each of the five new campaigns contains at least one new uncommon common zombies which are exclusive to that campaign. AI Director 2.0: Advanced technology dubbed The AI Director drove L4D's unique gameplay – customizing enemy population, effects, and music, based upon the players’ performance. L4D 2 features The AI Director 2.0 which expands the Director’s ability to customize level layout, world objects, weather, and lighting to reflect different times of day. Stats, rankings, and awards system drives collaborative play

Name: Left 4 Dead
Description:
From Valve (the creators of Counter-Strike, Half-Life and more) comes Left 4 Dead, a co-op action horror game for the PC and Xbox 360 that casts up to four players in an epic struggle for survival against swarming zombie hordes and terrifying mutant monsters. Set in the immediate aftermath of the zombie apocalypse, L4D's survival co-op mode lets you blast a path through the infected in four unique “movies,” guiding your survivors across the rooftops of an abandoned metropolis, through rural ghost towns and pitch-black forests in your quest to escape a devastated Ground Zero crawling with infected enemies. Each 'movie' is comprised of five large maps, and can be played by one to four human players, with an emphasis on team-based strategy and objectives. New technology dubbed 'the AI Director' is used to generate a unique gameplay experience every time you play. The Director tailors the frequency and ferocity of the zombie attacks to your performance, putting you in the middle of a fast-paced, but not overwhelming, Hollywood horror movie. Addictive single player, co-op, and multiplayer action gameplay from the makers of Counter-Strike and Half-Life Versus Mode lets you compete four-on-four with friends, playing as a human trying to get rescued, or as a zombie boss monster that will stop at nothing to destroy them. See how long you and your friends can hold out against the infected horde in the new Survival Mode An advanced AI director dynamically creates intense and unique experiences every time the game is played 20 maps, 10 weapons and unlimited possibilities in four sprawling 'movies' Matchmaking, stats, rankings, and awards system drive collaborative play Designer's Commentary allows gamers to go 'behind the scenes' of the game Powered by Source and Steam THE SACRIFICE 'The Sacrifice” is the new add-on for Left 4 Dead. 'The Sacrifice' is the prequel to 'The Passing,' and takes place from the L4D Survivors' perspective as they make their way South. In addition to advancing the story, 'The Sacrifice' introduces a new style finale featuring 'Sacrificial Gameplay' where players get to decide who will give their life so the others may live. In The Sacrifice for Left 4 Dead owners receive 'The Sacrifice' campaign playable in Campaign, Versus, and Survival modes.

# Far Cry®: When Paradise Turns Deadly

**Far Cry®** is an acclaimed action shooter that immerses players in a stunning tropical paradise that rapidly transforms into a perilous fight for survival. This game is widely recognized for its **detailed environments** and **exciting gameplay**, a sentiment echoed in numerous game reviews.

The narrative centers on **Jack Carver**, a seasoned boat captain tasked with transporting a journalist named Valerie to a secluded island. Their journey takes a disastrous turn when Jack's boat is struck by **artillery fire** from an unidentified hostile force. Stranded and with Valerie having vanished, Jack is compelled to rely on his **weapons and considerable smarts** to confront a formidable mercenary organization. As Jack navigates the **dense jungle**, he uncovers the mercenaries' **sinister plans** through information provided by an **insider**. He is then faced with a critical decision: directly challenge the mercenaries or allow a madman's **perilous plot** to come to fruition.

The game's immersive experience is powered by the **robust Far Cry engine**, which significantly enhances the action. This engine boasts advanced features such as **Polybump mapping** for exceptionally detailed graphics, **realistic physics** governing the environment and its inhabitants, and **destructible terrain** that allows for dynamic combat scenarios. According to developer statements, the engine also incorporates **dynamic lighting**, **motion-captured animations** for lifelike character movements, and **surround sound** to craft a truly immersive world. Combat encounters are made exceptionally **lively** by Far Cry's **intelligent AI**, which employs **effective group tactics** and seamless teamwork among enemies. Enemy leaders possess the ability to **call for reinforcements** via land, sea, or air. Players can acquire a range of **diverse combat skills**, encompassing close-quarters combat, marksmanship, stealth maneuvers, and vehicle operation, all of which prove invaluable in both **tight indoor environments and expansive outdoor arenas**. The game achieves a **powerful sense of dramatic effect and realism** through its meticulously crafted atmosphere, characterized by lifelike light and shadow interplay, crisp sound effects, and convincing weather patterns, as highlighted in game reviews.

**Apex Legends™: The Art of Squad Strategy in the Outlands**

Apex Legends™ is a thrilling, free-to-play hero shooter that drops players into the dangerous world of the Outlands. This game stands out in the Battle Royale landscape by focusing heavily on smart squad tactics and fresh gameplay. Players choose from a varied group of unique Legends, each with special skills vital for winning. Respawn Entertainment has stated that these abilities are made to be easy for new players to pick up but also offer a lot of depth for seasoned players to truly master.

Choosing Legends that work well together is key to success. Every Legend has a unique passive, tactical, and ultimate ability, which shapes their role and how they play in a squad. Building a balanced team means picking Legends whose skills enhance each other, allowing for strong attacks or solid defenses. Understanding your Legend's powers and how they combine with your teammates' abilities is crucial for outsmarting enemies and getting victories.

Apex Legends™ provides diverse combat scenarios, from large Battle Royale matches to quick Arenas fights, all requiring fast decisions and strong teamwork. Good communication with your squad, along with knowing your Legend's skills and the many weapons and gear available, is essential for creating winning plans. The game's constantly changing world, with its ongoing story, seasonal map updates, and new Legends appearing regularly, keeps the experience fresh and exciting. Players can also make their gameplay unique by customizing Legends with many cosmetic items, letting them show off their personal style in the Apex Games. It's worth noting that Apex Legends™ includes optional in-game purchases, such as virtual currency for buying virtual items, some of which might come from random loot boxes.

Step into the heart of a cinematic action, tension, and terror with F.E.A.R. (First Encounter Assault Recon). This elite special forces unit is deployed when a mysterious paramilitary force infiltrates a multi-billion dollar aerospace compound, taking hostages without issuing any demands. Initial government responses, including sending in a standard Special Forces team, proved disastrous, as live footage revealed an inexplicable wave of destruction that obliterated the soldiers. Faced with extraordinary circumstances, the F.E.A.R. team is assembled with a singular, critical mission: evaluate the threat and eliminate the intruders at any cost.

The narrative continues with F.E.A.R. Extraction Point, picking up immediately after the events of the original game.
