Darksburg is a cooperative roguelite action game where players must band together to escape the relentless hordes of Infected that have overrun the once-quaint town. In this challenging experience, you will embody heroic Survivors, each bringing their own distinct skills and personalities to the fight. As you embark on your runs, you will enhance your characters with a wide array of perks and abilities, all while confronting malevolent revenants and vast legions of the undead that now plague this formerly peaceful city.

Successfully navigating Darksburg hinges on mastering cooperative gameplay. The game presents a procedurally generated adventure, meaning the town's layout, its inhabitants, and the challenges within are different with every playthrough. This ensures a fresh and unpredictable experience each time you play. You will explore a variety of unique, zombie-infested locales scattered throughout the town, encountering diverse objectives, formidable enemies, and valuable items on every run. Game developers have stated that this procedural generation is a core element designed to enhance replayability.

Key features that define the Darksburg experience include:

*   **Cooperative Roguelite Action:** Players are encouraged to team up with friends to combat the overwhelming hordes of Infected.
*   **Unique Survivors:** A diverse cast of heroic characters is available, each possessing distinct abilities and playstyles.
*   **Perk and Skill System:** Survivors can be powered up by selecting from three randomized perks upon leveling up, facilitating a wide range of build combinations and strategic depth.
*   **Procedurally Generated Adventure:** The town's layout, available loot, mission objectives, and enemy encounters are dynamically altered with each run, contributing to high replayability.
*   **Diverse Locales and Encounters:** Players will explore various zombie-infested areas within Darksburg, with each location presenting unique challenges and opportunities.

(It is important to note that the Town of Darksburg, its official representatives, and any affiliated entities disclaim responsibility and shall not be held liable for any incidents involving visitors being dismembered, turned into the Infected, consumed, or set ablaze.)

## Escape the Colossal Starship Infinity in Infinity Runner

**Infinity Runner** thrusts players into a desperate fight for survival aboard the **Infinity**, humanity's largest starship. This colossal vessel, on a vital mission to find a new home, has transformed into a terrifying prison. A monstrous entity, the last known werewolf, relentlessly hunts its inhabitants. The game focuses on a prisoner's urgent quest to escape both the ship and the deadly threat.

The core gameplay stresses fluid movement and quick reflexes, characteristic of a first-person action running game. Players will employ parkour and mixed martial arts to traverse the immense spaceship's dynamic environment. Beyond mere evasion, the game features intense combat with a responsive targeting system that requires swift reactions and skillful combo execution. Developers have indicated the gameplay is crafted to be both challenging and rewarding, pushing players to their limits.

**Infinity Runner** strives for deep immersion through several key elements. Full compatibility with Oculus Rift DK1 and DK2 (Runtime 4.4) offers an exceptional level of immersion, with gameplay specifically optimized for VR. Furthermore, the game supports head-to-head competition for up to 32 players in its multiplayer mode, as noted in game previews. While fast-paced, narrative remains crucial to the experience. Revelations about the ship and the player's predicament unfold throughout the journey. Slower segments at the conclusion of each level emphasize story progression. A telepathic guide provides direction and assists players in uncovering their identity and purpose. A **Wolf Levelling System** supports player ability development. The **Infinity** itself is a remarkable structure, measuring 150 miles long and nearly 30 miles wide. Its construction was so immense it was visible from Earth, according to ship specifications. The vessel requires a crew of 5,000,000 and can accommodate 10 million colonists. Its Bio-domes house extensive forests for resources and recreation. The innovative Infinity Drive, a compact yet potent engine, liberates significant internal space. **Infinity Runner** delivers a comprehensive experience, featuring 14 action-packed levels, Arcade Mode, Story Mode, Oculus Rift Mode, and Multiplayer Mode.

**Legendary: When Myth Becomes Reality**

Prepare for an unparalleled gaming experience with "Legendary," a first-person shooter that plunges you into a world where ancient myths and legends are not mere stories, but tangible, terrifying realities. For millennia, these creatures have been sealed within Pandora's Box, their existence relegated to the realm of folklore. However, their long confinement is about to end.

The catalyst for this cataclysmic event is Deckard, a thief hired for a seemingly simple heist. His mission to steal an ancient artifact inadvertently shatters the seals of Pandora's Box, unleashing a torrent of mythical beings upon an unsuspecting modern world. As lore enthusiasts report, creatures like griffons now dominate the skies, while werewolves stalk the shadows, posing a grave threat to innocent lives. Cities find themselves under siege, as beings once dismissed as figments of ancestral imagination prove to be very real, and understandably furious after being held captive for untold ages.

As the sole individual capable of re-imprisoning these unleashed entities, Deckard is thrust into a desperate struggle for survival. He must forge an uneasy alliance with a clandestine secret society, a group dedicated to maintaining the balance between the human and mythical realms. Together, they face the monumental task of saving civilization from being ripped apart by the primal forces of tooth and claw. This is not just a game; it's a mythical first-person shooter set against the backdrop of a modern world utterly unprepared for the onslaught.

"Legendary" promises a massive blockbuster movie experience, where society crumbles around you as humanity and its advanced technology confront the raw power of legendary beasts in spectacular, earth-shattering battles. Engage in awe-inspiring firefights where high-caliber ordnance clashes with beak, talon, fang, and claw. Witness dynamic environments disintegrate as you and your adversaries tear apart a living, breathing world in your desperate fight for survival. The scale of devastation is unprecedented, with iconic cities like London burning to the ground and New York being torn asunder by spectacular supernatural destruction. The narrative further complicates matters with the introduction of three-way battles, where you must contend not only with the supernatural forces but also with the militant arm of an ancient clandestine organization, a formidable opponent in its own right and a fitting challenge for the rampaging armies of mythical beasts.

Name: R-Naught
Description:
Several years into a pandemic, everyone is still in lockdown. Nature is reclaiming the earth as huge corporations profit from those stuck at home. Your sister goes missing amidst an epidemic of cryptids. The government seems to be involved, but no one knows where the conspiracies start and the truth ends... R-Naught is a solo-developer project. A cheeky horror / sci-fi story set to a high-energy soundtrack with a familiar mix of traditional JRPG elements. Features: Level up / skills-earning system Battle party management Rich, compelling story where actions affect dialog Original soundtrack Quest system Bosses, minibosses, and wacky battle mechanics A slew of unique enemies, battle moves, and items to collect Branching storylines with multiple endings

## Enhance Your Twitch Stream Engagement with Kukoro's Interactive Chat Games

To significantly boost viewer participation and cultivate a more robust community on your Twitch streams, consider leveraging Kukoro's comprehensive suite of interactive chat games. This platform offers a diverse array of mini-games, empowering streamers to forge deeper connections with their audience and deliver a uniquely captivating interactive experience. Kukoro's platform information highlights extensive customization options, such as skins, pets, dances, and missions, which allow streamers to inject dynamism and appeal into their content.

Viewers themselves reap considerable rewards from Kukoro's interactive functionalities. The "Spawn First" option, for instance, grants them a prime opportunity to engage directly with the streamer. Personalization is a key element, with unique skins, pets, emotes, and dances enabling viewers to express their individuality through the "Show Off" feature. A "Colored Name" further aids in making them noticeable within the chat. Through consistent gameplay, viewers can accumulate points to "Level Up" and "Complete Tasks," thereby unlocking exclusive skins. Additionally, subscribers benefit from "Sub Perks" that provide supplementary game extras, enriching their overall experience. The platform asserts that these features are universally available across all channels and represent an affordable avenue for viewers to partake in the enjoyment.

Kukoro boasts a varied selection of mini-games, thoughtfully categorized to accommodate different player preferences. As outlined on the Kukoro website, "Action" games present fast-paced challenges, while "Team Up" games foster a spirit of collaboration. "Smart Play" games are designed to reward strategic thinking, and "Solve It" games challenge participants to decipher codes. "Act Out" games invite viewers to step into various roles, and "Guessing" games put intuition to the test. "Skill Tests" are ideal for honing quick reflexes and sharp minds, and "You vs. Them" games pit the chat against the streamer in thrilling contests.

The platform also facilitates social engagement, allowing users to enjoy Kukoro either independently or with friends. For those wishing to play with friends during a video call, screen sharing is an option, and friends can then utilize the Twitch chat to control game characters, thereby creating an enjoyable and competitive shared experience. This cooperative approach is noted to enhance overall engagement for all involved participants.

## Slay the Princess: A Quest to Save the World

Your journey begins on a solitary path through the woods, leading to a secluded cabin. Within its depths, in the basement, resides a Princess. Your mission is clear: **you are here to slay her.** Failure is not an option, as the very end of the world hinges on your success.

### The Princess's Deceptions

The Princess will employ every tactic imaginable to thwart your objective. She will **charm, lie, and promise you the world.** Beware, for if you succumb to her allure, she will ensure your demise, not once, but a dozen times over. The fate of humanity rests squarely on your shoulders.

### A Twist on the Fairy Tale

"We're supposed to save princesses, not slay them..." This sentiment might echo in your mind, but in this twisted narrative, the traditional roles are reversed. The Princess is not a damsel in distress; she is a formidable antagonist. As Ignatz-winning graphic novelist Abby Howard, the artist behind the game's **hand-penciled art**, notes, "She's very bad and you have to get rid of her for all our sakes."

### The Nature of the Threat

Contrary to what you might expect, the Princess is not a cosmic horror. She is an **ordinary human Princess**, and with determination, you can indeed slay her. However, any thoughts of romance are ill-advised. "Don't even think about trying to romance her. It won't end well for you," the game warns. While the developers hope you won't die, be prepared for the possibility of repeated deaths. **Staying focused on the task at hand is paramount.**

### Gameplay Mechanics

*   **Branching Narrative:** This is a choice-driven experience where your dialogue and beliefs shape your character and the unfolding story.
*   **Psychological Horror:** Prepare for a mind-bending journey into the darker aspects of human nature.
*   **Light RPG Elements:** Engage with mechanics that add a layer of strategic depth to your choices.
*   **Hand-Penciled Art:** Immerse yourself in a visually unique world brought to life by traditional pencil and paper artistry.
*   **Full Voice Acting:** Experience the narrative brought to life by the impeccable performances of Jonathan Sims and Nichole Goodnight.

### A Linear Path?

Despite the branching narrative, the concept of time is presented as strictly linear. The game playfully dismisses any notion of time loops, stating, "Time is a strictly linear concept and it certainly doesn't 'loop,' whatever that's supposed to mean."

Developed by the creators of Scarlet Hollow, **Slay the Princess** offers a fresh roleplaying experience that blends dramatic branching, psychological horror, and a unique visual style.

Explore the cosmos in **OPUS: Echo of Starsong - Full Bloom Edition**, a visual novel adventure. This enhanced edition features new voice acting for a more immersive narrative.

The core conflict centers on asteroids emitting a unique sound called 'Starsongs.' These celestial bodies, prized for their power, are the subject of factional disputes. The story follows Jun, an exiled young man seeking to restore his honor by finding these Starsongs. His journey changes when he meets Eda, a witch who can hear the 'thunderous sound of starsongs' from space, according to in-game lore. This allows her to guide their ship to the source of these celestial melodies. Jun's role involves exploring the asteroids to find the Starsongs' origins, which are hidden in temples guarding ancient secrets, as the game's backstory reveals.

As Jun and Eda travel, they encounter various characters, including Starsong intel brokers and asteroid excavation officers. These individuals may hinder or help them. The game's main setting, **Thousand Peaks**, is a war-torn solar system in disarray. Many residents have personal ties to the conflicts that ravaged their home. Players can learn this history through character interactions, deepening the narrative. **Echo of Starsong** is primarily story-focused. Gameplay is accessible, featuring light puzzles and resource management. This design choice, according to game development principles, helps players connect with the story's emotional core, ensuring an engaging experience.

"There Is No Game: Wrong Dimension" is a unique Point & Click comedy adventure that playfully subverts player expectations, according to its creators. This title challenges players to outwit the "Game" itself and find their way back home, a feat the developers humorously suggest is highly unlikely. The game's premise is built around this core concept of defying typical gaming conventions.

This game is strictly a Point & Click experience, eschewing traditional controllers entirely. It features "incredible 3D graphics" that are intentionally flat and pixelated, contributing to its distinctive visual style, as noted by the development team. The game is almost fully voiced, with occasional foreign accents that, according to some player feedback, enhance its quirky charm and add to the overall comedic effect.

"There Is No Game: Wrong Dimension" demands unconventional thinking to solve its riddles, encouraging players to operate "outside the box" of traditional puzzle-solving. A hint system is included to assist players when they find themselves truly stumped, a feature that has been appreciated by many. The game's length is deliberately shorter than a typical MMORPG, offering a more focused and digestible experience. Players can also anticipate discovering what are billed as the "Top 10 best walls," with the fourth wall promising a particular surprise, as highlighted by the developers in their promotional materials.

This non-VR experience is motion sickness free, a point often praised by players who are sensitive to virtual reality. The game intentionally incorporates numerous bugs, presented as a feature rather than a flaw, which adds to its meta-commentary on game development. For those unfamiliar with "There Is No Game," it's worth noting that it won the 2015 Construct Jam, a testament to its innovative design. However, the developers playfully suggest that if you haven't heard of it, you might be better off playing a more conventional game like "Battle of Duty" rather than engaging with this peculiar and, as they describe it, "totally pointless video game." This tongue-in-cheek advice underscores the game's self-aware humor.

Name: VIDEOVERSE
Description:
Relive the days of past social gaming networks in VIDEOVERSE , a decision-based narrative adventure focusing on character development, friendship and love, from the developer behind One Night Stand . As Emmett, a young video game fan and aspiring artist, dive into this fictional video game era, where the Kinmoku Shark gaming system and its online social network, Videoverse , were still popular. Strengthen Emmett’s friendships, share fan art and browse the lively gaming communities. Make decisions that will change how Emmett grows, his approach to Videoverse and, ultimately, the final outcome! Will your actions help Videoverse thrive, or will you get caught up in teenage drama, video game fandoms and corporate conspiracies? Relive the Days of Retro Gaming VIDEOVERSE is inspired by Miiverse, MSN messenger, early internet forums and 00’s technology. The chill soundscape of the Kinmoku Shark, composed by Clark Aboud ( Slay the Spire, Kind Words ), will uncover memories of your favourite retro gaming consoles. Browse Videoverse Meet a huge cast of characters, unlock multiple side stories, enjoy the pixel doodles, and seek out the truth behind the troubled social gaming network! Personalise your Videoverse experience by choosing your avatar, personal quote and favourite theme. Join Feudal Fantasy Fans Accompany Emmett as he plays the Kinmoku’s Shark’s most popular JRPG, Feudal Fantasy. Swap theories and discover tips from other FF fans in its exclusive Videoverse community…and find out whether or not Hanzo will be able to stop the evil Nobunaga! VIDEOVERSE contains several accessibility options: Clear Font Closed Captions Colourblind Friendly Themes Content Warnings Self-Voicing Sound, Music and Voice Volumes Tip Button

Name: Thirty Flights of Loving
Description:
Explore the world of Thirty Flights of Loving through a first-person short story. In this sequel to Gravity Bone, take a deep dive with high-flying schemers, lovelorn criminals, and more stray kittens than you can shake a stick at. Saddle up, gunslinger. Featuring an original soundtrack by Chris Remo.

## Six Ages: Ride the Wind: Forge Your Clan's Legacy in Glorantha

**Six Ages: Ride the Wind** invites players to lead their clan through a multi-generational saga of survival, diplomacy, and legend in the rich world of Glorantha. This storybook strategy game, set in the same universe as **King of Dragon Pass**, blends role-playing with resource management, where decisions have profound long-term consequences, according to A-Sharp.

### Embark on a Mythic Journey

As the spiritual successor to **King of Dragon Pass**, **Six Ages: Ride the Wind** transports players thousands of years earlier in Glorantha. Here, you will:

*   Design your clan's identity and destiny.
*   Seek favor from and navigate the will of ancient gods.
*   Build respect and influence among other clans.
*   Engage in strategic raids to secure vital resources.

### A World of Deep Simulation and Story

The game features over **400 interactive story scenes**, driven by deep simulation systems that influence their outcomes, ensuring a dynamic and replayable experience. Players can select from multiple difficulty levels, including an **Iron Willed option** that limits reloading, demanding strategic foresight. The game is brought to life with **gorgeous hand-painted, high-resolution illustrations**, as noted by the developers.

### Discover the World of Glorantha

Glorantha is a meticulously crafted Bronze Age world operating under a fundamentally magical framework, where the laws of physics are often subordinate to the **whims of gods and spirits**. The Sun is a living deity, and **countless gods wield direct influence** over humanity, according to Glorantha lore.

In **Six Ages**, you will lead the **Riders clan**, revering deities like **Gamari the Horse Mother** and their culture hero, **Hyalor**. However, the influence of **Raven the Trickster** should not be overlooked.

### A Shared Universe of Rich Narratives

Glorantha serves as the backdrop for acclaimed narrative games such as **King of Dragon Pass**, **HeroQuest**, **RuneQuest**, and **God Wars**. **Six Ages: Ride the Wind** offers **4x more world to explore** than its predecessor, allowing players to discover, appease, and forge alliances with the spirits inhabiting their territory. As one developer noted, "The world of Glorantha is designed to feel ancient and alive, where the spiritual and the mundane are inextricably linked."

The game manual provides in-depth information. The minimum system requirement for Windows is **Windows 10**.

**Unraveling Family Secrets: A Deep Dive into *Gone Home***

The premise of *Gone Home* immediately immerses players in a compelling mystery, directly addressing the query of uncovering family secrets. You play as a young woman returning home on June 7th, 1995, after a year abroad. Instead of a warm welcome, she finds the family house eerily silent and empty. This striking absence sets the stage for a narrative exploration game developed by The Fullbright Company, posing the central question: where has everyone gone, and what has transpired?

*Gone Home* functions as an interactive exploration simulator, according to its creators. Players meticulously examine the seemingly ordinary residence to uncover the inhabitants' intricate story. The gameplay encourages opening drawers and doors, and scrutinizing objects to discover vital clues. By investigating the remnants of the family's lives, players piece together their experiences and the events leading to their disappearance. This approach to storytelling is a hallmark of the game, as noted by many reviewers.

The game is recognized for its personal and nuanced storytelling, a testament to the development team's experience, who previously contributed to the *BioShock* series. The narrative, as described by the developers, is designed to resonate deeply, portraying a family grappling with profound uncertainty and significant change. The setting is meticulously recreated to transport players to the 1990s, complete with authentic ambient sounds that enhance the unfolding drama and atmosphere, according to the game's design documentation.

A key design choice, as highlighted by critics, is *Gone Home*'s deliberate absence of combat and traditional puzzles. This allows for a nonviolent, contemplative experience, enabling players to explore at their own leisure and absorb the narrative at their own pace. The core gameplay involves deep, interactive investigation, where players uncover the fate of the Greenbriar family by examining personal possessions, notes, and letters scattered throughout the house. The game relies heavily on the player's observation and deduction to reconstruct the unfolding story, a mechanic praised in numerous analyses. For those interested in the creative process, *Gone Home* also includes extensive developer commentary, offering insights into its creation, as confirmed by the game's features.

## Lacuna: A Sci-Fi Noir Adventure - Unraveling a Cosmic Conspiracy

Dive into the captivating world of **Lacuna**, a sci-fi noir adventure that plunges you into a universe of intrigue and moral ambiguity. As Neil Conrad, a dedicated CDI agent, you are thrust into a murder investigation that quickly escalates, threatening to unravel not only your life but the entire solar system. This gripping narrative challenges your decision-making at every turn, forcing you to confront difficult choices with far-reaching consequences.

### The Save the World Edition: More Than Just a Game

The **Save the World Edition** of Lacuna offers an enhanced experience, bundling the atmospheric game with its evocative soundtrack. This edition allows players to fully immerse themselves in the dark, compelling sci-fi noir setting. Beyond the immersive gameplay, purchasing this edition contributes to a noble cause. Assemble Entertainment proudly donates 10% of the revenues generated by the Save the World Edition to **Go Give One**, a vital World Health Organization (WHO) initiative. This program works to ensure equitable access to COVID-19 vaccines and other essential healthcare resources, prioritizing those most in need in underserved regions. By choosing this edition, you not only support the developers of Lacuna but also actively participate in making a positive global impact.

### Navigate a World of Difficult Decisions

In Lacuna, your choices are paramount. The narrative dynamically branches and concludes based on your actions, offering no opportunity for backtracking or undoing your decisions. While a hasty approach might lead to a swift conclusion, it comes with significant repercussions. Success hinges on playing your cards wisely, with survival and the fate of the solar system hanging in the balance. The game presents a series of complex ethical dilemmas, posing questions without easy answers. Will you betray a friend to safeguard your family? Will you jeopardize a loved one for the sake of public safety? Will you maintain the fragile peace or expose a devastating, world-altering truth?

### A Modern Take on the Point & Click Genre

Lacuna reimagines the classic point-and-click adventure, shedding the cumbersome mechanics that often bogged down earlier titles. Forget tedious inventory management, counter-intuitive puzzles, and repetitive dialogue. Lacuna offers a streamlined and immersive experience:

*   **Intuitive Controls:** Navigate the environment with modern platformer movement controls (WASD / controller).
*   **Dynamic Conversations:** Engage in non-repeating conversations where your choices genuinely matter.
*   **Meaningful Choices:** Experience real choices with multiple endings, ensuring your playthrough is unique.
*   **Unraveling Mysteries:** Focus on the immersive, story-driven mysteries without getting bogged down by pixel hunting or optional outlines.
*   **Uninterrupted Narrative:** The story flows seamlessly, driven forward by your progress rather than halting at every puzzle.

Prepare to be captivated by a narrative where every decision carries weight and the truth is often more complex than it appears.

Name: Her Story
Description:
A Video Game About a Woman Talking to the Police Her Story is the award winning video game from Sam Barlow, creator of Silent Hill: Shattered Memories and Aisle. A crime fiction game with non-linear storytelling, Her Story revolves around a police database full of live action video footage. It stars Viva Seifert, actress and one half of the band Joe Gideon and the Shark. How does it work? Her Story sits you in front of a mothballed desktop computer that’s logged into a police database of video footage. The footage covers seven interviews from 1994 in which a British woman is interviewed about her missing husband. Explore the database by typing search terms, watch the clips where she speaks those words and piece together her story. Unlike anything you've played before, Her Story is an involving and moving experience. A game that asks you to listen.

Name: 80 Days
Description:
1872, with a steampunk twist. Phileas Fogg has wagered he can circumnavigate the world in just eighty days. TIME Magazine's Game of 2014 and winner of the IGF award for narrative; now available on Steam! Choose your own route around a 3D globe, travelling by airship, submarine, mechanical camel, steam-train and more, racing other players and a clock that never stops. 170 cities to explore. Detailed research and techno-fantasy combine in an 1872 of tensions, inventions and exploration. Climb the Burmese mountains, trek the Zulu Federation, sail up the Amazon and disappear under the Indian Ocean - but don't fall behind the time! Four times BAFTA -nominated and TIME's #1 Game of the Year 2014 Winner IGF 'Excellence in Narrative' award 'We’ve been dreaming about this future for decades. Guess what? It’s here.' - New York Times 9/10 -- Edge Magazine 'Interactive storytelling as its best' - The Guardian Playing as Phileas Fogg's loyal valet, Passepartout, you must balance your master's health, your finances, and the time, as you choose your own path from city to city all the way around the world. Bribe your way onto early departures, but don't let yourself go bankrupt or you'll be sleeping rough and begging for aid! Trade items for profit, and collect the equipment for the conditions you'll face: but too much luggage will slow you down... 80 DAYS is a breakneck race, with an in-game clock that never stops running. Trains, steamers, hot-air balloons, boats, camels, horses and more leave and arrive minute by minute. Every city and journey is narrated via an interactive story where you control every action. Will your choices speed you up - or lead you into disaster? Will you earn Fogg's trust and respect? Will you uncover the secrets and short-cuts that can shave days off your time? Murder, romance, rebellion and intrigue await! The Game: Plan and strategise - can you find the fastest route? Flexible interactive narrative with thousands of choices Massively replayable - every journey is unique Explore an entire 3D globe, with 170 bespoke cities to visit Richly imagined, diverse alternative-history steampunk world Stunning art by Jaume Illustration Race real people in real-time: every second counts Live multiplayer feed, showing journeys of other players as they happen Share your journey with friends

Hades, the acclaimed rogue-like dungeon crawler, masterfully blends Supergiant Games' signature elements. It captures the fast-paced action of *Bastion*, the rich atmosphere and narrative depth of *Transistor*, and the compelling character-driven storytelling of *Pyre*.

As the immortal Prince of the Underworld, you wield the formidable powers and mythic weaponry of Olympus. Your objective is to escape the god of the dead's clutches. Each unique escape attempt strengthens you, revealing more of the intricate story. The gods of Olympus aid your quest, with iconic figures like Zeus, Athena, and Poseidon offering dozens of powerful Boons. These divine gifts enhance your abilities, allowing for thousands of unique character builds, according to Supergiant Games.

A fully-voiced cast of vibrant characters populates the Underworld. Cultivating relationships unlocks thousands of unique story events, revealing the complex dynamics of this dysfunctional divine family. The Underworld is an ever-shifting labyrinth, ensuring surprises with every delve. Guardian bosses remember past encounters, adding persistent challenge. The Mirror of Night offers permanent upgrades, granting an advantage on subsequent attempts. These upgrades mean players can enjoy the game's combat and narrative even without divine aid. For an ultimate challenge, difficulty can be increased, offering white-knuckle action. Supergiant's hallmark presentation shines with spectacular hand-painted environments, an original score, and a unique melding of gameplay and narrative, creating a rich, atmospheric experience central to the Hades gameplay loop, as noted by game critics.

## God of War: A New Beginning in the Norse Realms

**God of War** transports players to the harsh Norse realms, a significant departure from the Olympian gods Kratos once battled. Years after his vengeance, Kratos now lives as a mortal, focused on survival and teaching his son, Atreus, the ways of this new world.

### A Father's Second Chance

This installment marks a profound shift for Kratos as he embraces fatherhood. As both mentor and protector, he must confront and control the **defining rage** that has long characterized him. This journey forces him to grapple with his past while forging a future with his son.

### Journey to a Dark, Elemental World

The game's setting moves from the marble of Olympus to the gritty forests, mountains, and caves of pre-Viking Norse lore. This world is populated by its own unique pantheon of **fearsome creatures, monsters, and gods**, offering a fresh and immersive experience.

### Visceral, Physical Combat Reimagined

God of War™ delivers **visceral, physical combat** that mirrors the brutality of the Norse creatures. The **over-the-shoulder camera** enhances the intensity of every encounter. While retaining the **defining spirit of the God of War series** with a new main weapon and abilities, the combat system forges **new ground in the genre**.

### Enhanced PC Features for Peak Performance

The PC version of God of War offers a suite of features designed to elevate the player experience:

*   **High Fidelity Graphics:** Experience **striking visuals enhanced on PC**, including true 4K resolution on supported devices and unlocked framerates. Players can fine-tune their experience through a wide range of graphical presets and options, such as higher resolution shadows, improved screen space reflections, and the addition of GTAO and SSDO.
*   **NVIDIA® DLSS and Reflex Support:** Harness **NVIDIA Deep Learning Super Sampling (DLSS)** to boost frame rates and generate sharp images on select Nvidia GPUs. **NVIDIA Reflex low latency technology** ensures quicker reactions and more responsive gameplay on GeForce GPUs.
*   **Controls Customization:** **Play your way** with extensive control options. God of War supports the DUALSHOCK®4 and DUALSENSE® wireless controllers, a wide array of other gamepads, and fully customizable bindings for mouse and keyboard. This allows players to **fine-tune every action**.
*   **Ultra-wide Support:** Immerse yourself in the breathtaking vistas of the Norse realms with **21:9 ultra-widescreen support**. This feature delivers a **cinema-quality experience**, further expanding the original seamless theatrical vision of the game.

Name: Bayonetta
Description:
From PlatinumGames’ legendary director Hideki Kamiya of Resident Evil and Devil May Cry fame, SEGA brings one of the most universally acclaimed character action games of all time to PC. Bayonetta. The last survivor of an ancient witch clan who keep the balance between light, dark and chaos. Entombed to protect herself – and the world as we know it – Bayonetta is discovered and revived after 500 years, sparking a chain of events with cataclysmic repercussions. Thrust straight into battle, with only one clue to her past, Bayonetta must discover the truth and fight for the future. Her daunting conquest sees her face off against countless angelic enemies and giant foes in a game of 100% pure action. BAYONETTA ON PC IS BEST EXPERIENCED WITH A CONTROLLER. Features Deadly Grace An alluring, stylish and all-action heroine unlike anyone else on the gaming landscape, Bayonetta is ready to push your senses to the limit. Climax Action Over-the-top action in extreme environments resulting in continuous high levels of tension and excitement – Bayonetta pushes the genre into new realms of intensity. Extravagant Combat Bayonetta wields an impressive arsenal of weapons through an intuitive and fluid combat system, unleashing deadly combos and special attacks with devastating results. Supernatural Powers Unleash gruesome torture attacks such as the Iron Maiden, Guillotine and more to finish off enemies and send them to hell. Full Steam Support Steam Achievements, Steam Cloud Save, Trading Cards, Leader Boards, and Big Picture Mode. Enhanced PC Graphics Options Unlocked resolutions up to 4K, anti-aliasing, anisotropic filtering, SSAO lighting, scalable texture and shadow quality, and more. English and Japanese Voice Overs Freely switch languages and subtitles at any time.

**Prince of Persia®: The Sands of Time: A Legendary Journey Through Ancient Persia**

*Prince of Persia®: The Sands of Time* is widely celebrated as a landmark title within the action-adventure genre. This game is distinguished by its compelling narrative, which is deeply rooted in the rich tapestry of ancient Persia. According to game critics, the core of the story centers on a young Prince. His fateful encounter with a magical dagger inadvertently unleashes a catastrophic evil upon his homeland. Driven by a desperate need to restore order, he embarks on a perilous quest. This journey is made possible through the assistance of a resourceful princess. He also benefits from his newfound ability to manipulate the Sands of Time. Together, they must traverse the labyrinthine Palace, striving to reclaim its former splendor. Game reviews consistently highlight how the title masterfully brings ancient myths and formidable creatures to life. This is all presented within a suspenseful narrative brimming with unexpected plot twists.

This game is widely recognized as a significant achievement in technological innovation. It pushed the boundaries of console capabilities and established new standards for game development. Players were treated to a genuine breakthrough in action-adventure gaming. They experienced unprecedented advancements in physics, lighting, graphics, and animations. All of these contributed to a deeply immersive experience. Research into the game's critical reception frequently points to the profound impact of these visual and physical enhancements. Critics consistently lauded the Prince's exceptional agility and combat skills. These allowed players to execute gravity-defying acrobatics and engage in intense, visceral combat. A defining feature that truly distinguished the game was its innovative time manipulation mechanic. According to numerous analyses, this allowed players to rewind time, gain glimpses of the future, and momentarily freeze the present. Such mechanics fostered dynamic gameplay. Players explored vast and exotic environments. They unraveled the mysteries of medieval Persia's mythical and perilous landscapes.

According to numerous analyses of its impact, *Prince of Persia®: The Sands of Time* delivers an experience that transcends mere gameplay. It transports players to a captivating realm of magic, peril, and destiny. This game is a testament to creative storytelling and technical prowess.

Name: Devil May Cry 5
Description:
The Devil you know returns in this brand new entry in the over-the-top action series available on the PC. Prepare to get downright demonic with this signature blend of high-octane stylized action and otherworldly & original characters the series is known for. Director Hideaki Itsuno and the core team have returned to create the most insane, technically advanced and utterly unmissable action experience of this generation! The threat of demonic power has returned to menace the world once again in Devil May Cry 5 . The invasion begins when the seeds of a “demon tree” take root in Red Grave City. As this hellish incursion starts to take over the city, a young demon hunter Nero, arrives with his partner Nico in their “Devil May Cry” motorhome. Finding himself without the use of his right arm, Nero enlists Nico, a self-professed weapons artist, to design a variety of unique mechanical Devil Breaker arms to give him extra powers to take on evil demons such as the blood sucking flying Empusa and giant colossus enemy Goliath. FEATURES High octane stylized action – Featuring three playable characters each with a radically different stylish combat play style as they take on the city overrun with demons Groundbreaking graphics – Developed with Capcom’s in-house proprietary RE engine, the series continues to achieve new heights in fidelity with graphics that utilize photorealistic character designs and stunning lighting and environmental effects. Take down the demonic invasion – Battle against epic bosses in adrenaline fueled fights across the over-run Red Grave City all to the beat of a truly killer soundtrack. Demon hunter – Nero, one of the series main protagonists and a young demon hunter who has the blood of Sparda, heads to Red Grave City to face the hellish onslaught of demons, with weapons craftswoman and new partner-in-crime, Nico. Nero is also joined by stylish, legendary demon hunter, Dante and the mysterious new character, V.

## Dead Cells: A RogueVania Experience

Dead Cells masterfully blends the progressive exploration of a Metroidvania with the high-stakes replayability of a roguelite, creating a unique "RogueVania" genre. This blend, drawing inspiration from games like *Rogue Legacy* and *Castlevania: Symphony of the Night*, offers an exhilarating gameplay loop.

### Core Gameplay Mechanics

*   **RogueVania Design:** Players navigate an interconnected world, benefiting from roguelite replayability while facing permadeath.
*   **2D Souls-lite Combat:** Expect challenging yet fair combat with over fifty distinct weapons and spells. An "emergency panic roll" provides a crucial escape.
*   **Nonlinear Progression:** Permanent abilities, once unlocked, grant access to new routes, allowing players to tailor their journey.

### Exploration and Replayability

*   **Discover Hidden Depths:** Explore secret rooms, hidden passages, and charming landscapes. Interconnected levels and island access incentives thorough exploration.
*   **Character Evolution:** Character evolution and permanent weapon upgrades are key elements. Ultimately, player skill is paramount, as roguelites emphasize continuous improvement.

The unforgiving combat, coupled with the absence of a safety net, delivers an adrenaline-fueled experience with unparalleled replayability.

### Content Highlights

Dead Cells exited Early Access on August 7th, 2018, featuring:

*   **13 Levels:** Each with a unique atmosphere, distinct foes, and secrets.
*   **4 Bosses:** A true test of skill.
*   **90+ Weapons and Skills:** A vast arsenal awaits.
*   **4 Special Powers:** These act as Metroidvania-style gear locks, unlocking new areas.
*   **Responsive Combat System:** Experience epic, fluid, and fun combat.
*   **Daily Run Mode:** Compete on leaderboards.

Players can expect 10 to 30 hours of gameplay, or more, depending on skill. The journey to "git gud" is ultimately rewarding.

Sekiro™: Shadows Die Twice - Game of the Year Edition is a critically acclaimed action-adventure game developed by FromSoftware, the renowned creators of the Dark Souls series. This special edition offers an expanded experience, now including significant bonus content that enhances replayability and player interaction. According to the developers, the Game of the Year Edition now features the "Reflection and Gauntlet of Strength" modes, introducing new and challenging boss encounters for players to test their skills against. Furthermore, the "Remnants" feature allows players to leave messages and recordings of their in-game actions, which other players can then view and rate, fostering a unique asynchronous multiplayer experience. The edition also includes three unlockable cosmetic skins, offering players the chance to personalize their warrior's appearance.

The game itself has garnered immense critical praise, evidenced by its numerous accolades. It was honored as The Game Awards 2019's Best Action Game of 2019 and received over 50 other awards and nominations, a testament to its exceptional quality. Players step into the role of the "one-armed wolf," a disgraced and disfigured warrior who has been given a second chance at life. Bound by duty to protect a young lord, the descendant of an ancient bloodline, the player becomes a prime target for a multitude of formidable adversaries, notably the ruthless Ashina clan. When the young lord is tragically captured, the player embarks on a perilous quest for vengeance and honor, a journey where even death is not an insurmountable obstacle.

The narrative unfolds in the tumultuous late 1500s Sengoku period of Japan, a time defined by relentless conflict and the constant struggle for survival. Within this dark and twisted world, players will confront imposing, larger-than-life foes. To overcome these challenges, players can unleash a diverse arsenal of deadly prosthetic tools and potent ninja abilities. The gameplay emphasizes a dynamic blend of stealth, vertical exploration, and intense, visceral combat. As the game's tagline suggests, players are encouraged to "Take Revenge. Restore Your Honor. Kill Ingeniously." It is important to note that a download is required for the bonus content, and an internet connection is necessary for the asynchronous multiplayer features.

## Torchlight II: An Expanded Action RPG Experience

Torchlight II offers an expanded and engaging Action RPG experience, building upon its predecessor's success. As noted by gaming publications, this iteration features procedurally generated levels, diverse enemies, and abundant loot, ensuring unique playthroughs. It retains the original's charm while broadening the game world and adding highly requested features like robust online and LAN multiplayer, according to developer notes. The fate of Vilderan rests on your shoulders.

### Diverse Character Customization

Players choose from four distinct classes, each with unique play styles. Heroes can be male or female, with customizable appearances for a personalized protagonist.

### Seamless Multiplayer Integration

Engage in cooperative gameplay with friends via LAN or the internet, free of charge. Integrated matchmaking facilitates easy global connections, fostering a vibrant community.

### An Expansive Open World

Traverse Vilderan's overworld and hub towns, experiencing dynamic weather and day/night cycles. Level randomization guarantees novel layouts, distinct pathways, unique loot, and challenging monsters with every adventure.

### Robust Mod Support

Torchlight II fully embraces the Steam Workshop for automatic mod synchronization. Players can choose from over a thousand mods to tailor the game. The GUTS editor allows for the creation and sharing of original content.

### The Challenge of New Game Plus

The adventure continues after the campaign with New Game Plus. Players retain skills, gold, and gear, facing an elevated challenge, as confirmed by player feedback.

### Enhanced Pets and Fishing

Beloved features like pets and fishing are significantly improved. Expect more options, impactful visual effects, and the convenience of pets selling loot, streamlining inventory management.

Embark on an epic hunt in Monster Hunter: World, a vibrant, living world where you track and battle colossal monsters. This action role-playing game, developed and published by Capcom, immerses players in a dynamic environment teeming with diverse inhabitants that can be utilized to your advantage. Whether you choose to embark on this thrilling adventure solo or team up with up to three other players, the materials gathered from fallen foes are absolutely crucial for crafting powerful new gear. This essential step enables you to face even more formidable beasts, pushing your skills and strategy to the limit.

The game is set in a new world brimming with surprises and excitement, where you'll undertake quests across various breathtaking locales. Successfully hunting monsters yields valuable materials, which are then used to forge stronger weapons and armor, preparing you for increasingly dangerous prey. According to the game's lore, once a decade, elder dragons undertake a mysterious migration across the sea to this New World. To investigate this phenomenon, the Guild established the Research Commission, sending large fleets to explore. As the Commission's Fifth Fleet pursues the colossal elder dragon, Zorah Magdaros, your journey as a hunter officially begins, marking the start of your grand adventure.

Your equipment is undeniably key to survival in this challenging world. Players can choose from fourteen unique weapon types, each boasting distinct characteristics and attack patterns, allowing for incredibly diverse combat styles. Scoutflies are helpful companions that track monster scents, guiding you to footprints and other vital clues. The more tracks you gather, the more detailed information your Scoutflies provide, enhancing your tracking abilities. The Slinger is an essential tool, allowing you to utilize gathered items like stones for diversion tactics or creating strategic advantages during hunts. Furthermore, you can equip up to two specialized tools that offer temporary, potent effects, adding another layer of tactical depth. Palicoes, your loyal feline companions, are invaluable allies, offering specialized support in offense, defense, and healing. Your Palico is an integral member of the Fifth Fleet, providing crucial assistance throughout your expeditions.

Name: Dying Light
Description:
From the creators of hit titles Dead Island and Call of Juarez. Winner of over 50 industry awards and nominations. The game whose uncompromising approach to gameplay set new standards for first-person zombie games. Still supported with new content and free community events years after the release. Survive in a city beset by a zombie virus! Discover the hard choice you will have to make on your secret mission. Will loyalty to your superiors prove stronger than the will to save the survivors? The choice is yours… VAST OPEN WORLD Roam the city with unprecedented freedom and bask in its unique atmosphere. Use parkour to scale every building and reach remote areas. CREATIVE COMBAT Engage in gory combat and discover limitless options to confront your enemies. Use the environment paired with various weapon types and abilities to gain an advantage. DAY AND NIGHT CYCLE Experience the dramatic shift in the world, as you change from a hunter to hunted at sundown. Face the coming threat or run away without wasting your time to look behind. 4-PLAYER CO-OP Join forces with other players and raise your chances of survival in an exciting co-op mode. Tackle the story campaign together and take part in regularly scheduled community challenges.

Name: Zombie Night Terror
Description:
Prepare yourself for the most thrilling night of your life! Something strange has happened and people everywhere are turning into blood thirsty walking corpses. But guess who’s the brains behind this hungry undead army? YOU! So spread this pandemic to wipe humanity off this planet. Because the only way to survive the zombie apocalypse, is to BE the apocalypse! But the brainless undead are quite dumb… even dumber than you might expect given their lack of grey matter. Because when left to their own devises, they will just endlessly walk forward and fall into permanently deadly booby traps placed by not-so-helpless humans. So to accomplish your mission of world extermination, you will need to help guide them to their next yummy meal. Luckily you can utilize numerous special mutations to make your troops evolve and fulfil their appetite for flesh. But beware! Humans will not facilitate your dark will….they will fight to survive. Spread terror through 50 levels and enrol more zombies into your undead army. Along the way you’ll have to solve brain tingling puzzles, and fight increasingly powerful foes that are hell-bent on staying alive. The closer you get to total world extinction, the harder survivors will fight to put you in the ground….for good. Blood, tears, non-sexual moans, inappropriate laughter, and tons of puzzles that will literally blow your brains out... This is Zombie Night Terror ! Command a Zombie Horde: You are the brain, they are the muscles. Your zombie horde will obey your commands without any strike risk or complaints … On the downside; you can’t have any heated conversations about late night movies or cool books anymore tough! Unique Mutation System: Having an army of deadly zombies is awesome. Having an army of mutated zombies is way better! Take advantage of our mutation system to overcome the enemy’s defences, by creating powerful new zombie types. Each has their unique power and abilities that can help you overcome different situations. Combo System: Because you thought mutations were your only way to facilitate your meat feast, we spiced it up allowing you to combine those and see what your enemies are made of (literally). Let’s show those pesky humans how to have fun! Level Editor With Full Steam Workshop Support: Ever wanted to create your very own devious Zombie Apocalypse? Then we do have something for you! The Level Editor lets you design levels from scratch and share them with the community, using Steam Workshop. Start slow by crafting a single level, then crank things up with a full chapter loaded with enemies, traps, bonuses, mutations, and intellectually superior dialogue of your own choosing, all of which unfolds according to your devious plan. You are not alone: Having zombies is kind of like having a pet; it’s fun but you need to take care of them… That’s what humans are for, as they are the perfect way to keep your zombies well fed and busy. But beware! Humans are well armed and they do not appreciate the toothy company of the undead. Contaminate: Don’t have enough company? Do you need a bigger horde? Well, just convert Humans to your cause then! You don’t necessary need to bring flowers and be charming, as a single bite right into the neck (or anywhere that pleases you) should be enough to do the trick! Destructible Environments: In times of a zombie apocalypse, humans love to take their time playing hide and seek. However when the hunger for tasty flesh is this painful, you don’t have time for such childishness. So use the power or your horde to destroy their playground and spread terror among them… PEEKABOOM!

## So Many Me: Strategic Clone Management in a Unique Puzzle-Platformer

So Many Me offers a unique puzzle-platformer experience, blending strategic clone management with engaging gameplay. Players control Filo, a green blob who can create and command an army of clones, each with distinct abilities. This core mechanic, according to the developers, is central to the game's challenge and appeal.

Filo's adventure takes him through a vibrant universe, introducing new clone types with specialized skills. The gameplay revolves around strategically deploying these clones to overcome intricate puzzles. The game is noted for its colorful art style, charming characters, and an enchanting environment.

So Many Me has received industry recognition, earning honorable mentions and participating in major gaming events. This includes appearances at IGF China, IndieCade, the E3 Showcase, the IndieCade Unity Showcase, GDC, China Joy, Tokyo Game Show, and the Korea Games Conference & G Star Global Game Exhibition.

Progression in So Many Me is driven by discovering new transformational abilities. Mastering these forms and chaining them effectively is key to solving increasingly complex challenges. The game emphasizes creative thinking and resource management, delivering a rewarding experience.

Key gameplay elements include discovering and utilizing unique clone abilities to solve puzzles. Players will also unlock and master new transformational powers, learning to combine them for strategic advantage. The game also features mounts and creatures, allowing players to ride massive beings and leverage their abilities to overcome obstacles. Players will face distinct boss monsters, requiring unique strategies for defeat. Additionally, So Many Me offers rewards and collectibles, such as costumes, ancient artifacts, and bonus levels, encouraging exploration.

Forts is a physics-based RTS where players design, build, and arm custom bases. Victory hinges on strategic construction and powerful weaponry within a dynamic, physics-driven system. Continuous development and support have enhanced gameplay and added content, keeping the experience fresh.

The core gameplay involves constructing heavily armored forts in real-time, requiring careful resource management and progression through a tech tree. Players unlock advanced weaponry and develop strategies to dismantle opponent forts. Forts supports online multiplayer for up to eight players, with modes like co-op and team deathmatch. A 28-mission single-player campaign and skirmish mode offer solo challenges. Players can explore a diverse tech tree, use various building materials, and wield 16 unique weapons across four factions. Twelve commanders, each with unique abilities, add further strategic depth.

Ongoing development and community engagement are key to Forts. Frequent updates address bugs, introduce new features, and rebalance mechanics. Several free DLC packs have added new weapons, structures, and commanders. Steam Workshop support empowers players to create and share custom content, significantly boosting replayability.

Key improvements include multiplayer training missions for skills like anti-air defense and rapid base construction. The "Tons of Guns" update, for example, added new tech buildings and six weapons, including Flak guns and EMP rockets. The Repair Station allows for strategic in-game repairs. Ranked multiplayer seasons are held bi-monthly for 1v1 matches, with collectable medals. Three new commanders from Black Penguin Oil offer distinct playstyles. The game also features seasonal content for events like Halloween. A dedicated Discord server fosters a vibrant community that frequently organizes tournaments, highlighting Forts as an evolving RTS.

Name: MouseCraft
Description:
Ever wondered what a cross between Tetris and Lemmings would look like? Well, wonder no more, 'cause... MouseCraft is here! MouseCraft is an A to B puzzle game where players help Schrödinger, the crazy cat scientist, in completing his mysterious, mice-powered invention. Pile up Tetromino bricks to create a safe path for as many mice as possible, gather collectibles, fight enemies, use different types of blocks, blow up things and avoid environmental hazards in 80 handcrafted levels! Key Game Features: Experience a remix of two classic gameplay mechanics: Pile up Tetromino bricks to create a safe path for as many mice as possible. Discover an epic tale of a crazy cat scientist who is striving to unlock the potential of a mysterious, mice-powered machine. Defeat obstacles, overcome gaps and gather collectibles by using different types of blocks, be them explosive, crumbling or even jelly ones. Prove your stacking skills in your own style- freeze the game by using the Active Pause feature or increase the speed any time you want. Get involved by creating your own maps and show off your creativity by sharing them with our community. Chill out while listening to our funky soundtrack scored by Mikolai Stroinski, the composer for Dark Souls 2, The Witcher 3 and The Vanishing of Ethan Carter. How much content is there? 80 hand-crafted levels (about 6-10 hours of gameplay). 7 different types of Tetromino Bricks, 2 types of Enviromental Hazards, Bombs, Enemies... 4 different locations. Level Editor which allows you to create your own maps. Full Steam integration, including: Cloud Saves, Achievements, Leaderboards and Trading Cards.

Name: Stubbs the Zombie in Rebel Without a Pulse
Description:
Be the Zombie. Kick A** and Take Brains It’s 1959 and the city of Punchbowl, PA, is a beacon of progress and ideal living. Show the living that law and order are no match for a dead man on a mission. Your boyfriend’s back Maggie, and Punchbowl is gonna be in trouble! Eat Brains Chomp on the living and replenish your bodily arsenal of: zombie sputum, gut grenades, and the stunning unholy flatulence Possess Punchbowl’s Population Clamp your severed hand to a barbershop quartet singer’s head and raygun away Build Your Zombie Horde Convert your enemies into undead allies & lead a zombie assault on the living Bring Civilization to its Knees Show the retro-futuristic city of Punchbowl, PA that they can’t escape the past Stubbs and Chill Invite a friend to play as Grubbs for classic couch cooperative hijinks. (Friend not included)

# Flockers™: A Strategic Puzzle Adventure

Flockers™ offers a distinctive approach to the "A to B" puzzle genre, blending **sinister foreboding and dark humor** with engaging and challenging gameplay. The narrative centers on **enslaved sheep making a daring escape** after nineteen years of subjugation under their diabolical masters. The primary goal of the game is to successfully guide the flock through the perilous environment of the Worms' weapons factory. Here, players must skillfully **dodge lethal machinery and deadly traps** as the sheep navigate their way towards the testing grounds and the ultimate **promise of pastures green**.

The game's meticulously crafted levels are designed to rigorously test a player's **skill and strategic planning**. Players are tasked with guiding their flock past a variety of heinous traps, sadistic devices, and diabolical puzzles. While the game offers a significant reward for players who can **save the most sheep**, it is important to note that progression through the game remains achievable even if some sheep unfortunately fall victim to the factory's deadly machinery. Flockers™ provides a substantial amount of content, featuring **60 grueling and puzzling levels**. Additionally, there are **6 bonus levels** that, when unlocked, reveal a new play mode specifically focused on the objective of **waking lazy sleeping sheep**.

Players have the opportunity to earn a **stack of unlockable rewards**, which notably include the highly sought-after **zombie sheep** and the option to enable **green blood**. In total, there are **17 crazy skins and 6 types of blood** available, allowing for extensive personalization of the gameplay experience. For PC players, the included **'Meat Maker' level creation tool** provides a **powerful and intuitive way to design and share custom challenges**. This functionality is further enhanced by **Steam Workshop Integration**, enabling seamless sharing within the community. Competitive and social features are also a significant part of the experience, including **Steam Leaderboards** that track **fastest times**, a **star rating system** designed to encourage players to **perfect each level**, **integrated Twitch support** for sharing gameplay live, and **Steam Achievements** that allow players to **demonstrate their gaming prowess**. The **emphasis on strategic thinking and rewarding customization options** has led to Flockers™ being recognized as a standout title in the puzzle genre, according to various game reviews.

Name: How To Bathe Your Cat: Impossible Mission
Description:
Gameplay You will have to use itens to destroy the ground to make a fluid reach the cat. Drill: Blower: Rocket: Grappling hook: After the cat is clean you need to perfume him: Be careful with the lava: Features Bathe the cat using your logical thinking and physic intuition. Use itens to destroy the ground to make a fluid reach the cat. Experience several kind of fluids with different mechanics (Water, Lava, Gas). Jump in the scenario and use a grappling hook to reach difficult places. 40 unique handmade levels. 4 beautiful scenarios.

Name: Save the Dodos
Description:
Save the Dodos! We’re all familiar with the sad tale of the charming, yet unintelligent Dodo. But now you can prevent their heart-breaking tale of extinction! Guide the dodos through 100 challenging levels and save this avian dullard from extinction. Since Dodos are not all too clever, you won’t be able to directly command them. Our feathery friends would just get confused and they have enough on their plate as is! You’ll be guiding the Dodos by reshaping the levels. By changing the platforms and obstacles you can guide the Dodos to safety and avoid mass extinction. FEATURES 4 worlds to guide your dodos through; Prehistorical, Ancient Egypt, Antiquity and the harsh north of the Vikings 4 special Dodo’s 4 game modes (Classic, Survival, Rescue, Collection) 6 Steam Trading cards

Name: Nummels
Description:
Nummels are dumb but predictable little guys. They’ll always interact with what’s in front of them, even if it’s a chewed up piece of gum. So toss them a ladder, dig a path, place a bridge, or blast a wall. Get them home safely in this medium skill platformer. Use your brain, they won’t use theirs! Medium skill platforming Nummels can do anything you can do as long as they have the right motivation, but you can run faster and jump higher. This is not a punishingly difficult platformer, but there are challenges for those that want them. Go fast to get on the leaderboard It's fine to take your time and set everything up before letting them loose, but to get good scores and unlock all the things, you'll need to go fast. Accessorize Get coins by saving Nummels and spend them on cool hats! A few Nummels may have been harmed during the production of this game.

Name: Catty & Batty: The Spirit Guide
Description:
Catty & Batty: The Spirit Guide is a casual couch co-op puzzle game, inspired by Lemmings and Tower Defense! Play as Catty or Batty and build a path to guide spirits home. 🐈🦇 Features: Campaign with 30 levels for 1-2 players (local co-op) Switch characters on-the-fly when playing solo Over 800 hand-drawn sprites Over 150 animations Over 100 new sounds Original soundtrack 100% Controller support (2 controllers recommended for co-op) 6 color modes (white, sepia, gray, dark, inverted, gameboy) About 2 hours of gameplay Streaming Permissions 🎬 You are allowed to stream and create videos of this game (Twitch, YouTube, etc.), even with monetization enabled. The music is an original soundtrack that is safe to stream. Have fun!

Name: Arcade Spirits
Description:
Arcade Spirits, a romantic visual novel, follows an alternate timeline set in the year 20XX where the 1983 video game crash never occurred. After a turbulent work history, you are granted employment at the Funplex, a popular arcade, home to a host of unique personalities and customers. Where will this new-found employment take you? Who will you meet along the way? Will you find the romance you're seeking? Design your own character from the ground up - pronoun, hairstyle, skin tone, hair color, eye color and more are completely customizable and are reflected throughout the game in both gameplay and artwork! With roleplaying-based choices, you will be able to grow your personality and relationships in any way you desire; Friendship, Platonic or something more intimate! Work hard and build the relationship you desire with a total of seven romanceable characters! The Identity Identifier System, or IRIS, can track your relationship statuses with all characters throughout Arcade Spirits as well as your personality traits, from Quirky, Steady, and Kindly, to Gutsy and Basically. Everything you choose in Arcade Spirits, from your relationships to your personality, your crisis management moments, and a myriad other decision will have an effect on the future of your arcade!

Name: Arcadia Fallen
Description:
Arcadia Fallen is a Roleplay Visual Novel, where your choices shape the personality of your character. Will you be shy, bold, or the one forever making jokes? Play the role of a young alchemist apprentice who is unwillingly bound to an illegal spirit. Suddenly drawn into a war between humanity and magic, they must join a group of unlikely heroes to escape their own doom, hopefully saving the world along the way. A Story With No Right Or Wrong Choices Venture on a journey with no bad endings. Your decisions will never keep you from going on but may influence what you will have to endure before you reach your goal. Dialogue options with tone labels. You decide whether your character is shy, bold, or the type to make a joke of any situation. Whether you want to become a master of alchemy, engage in a romance, or discover the mysteries of the world; how you spend your time is up to you. Character Customization & Growth Create your alchemist in your own image or play out a fantasy. You decide how traumatic events sculpt and grow your alchemist's personality. When faced with a tragedy, will you be benevolent, or will you be vengeful? 4 Romanceable Characters Spend time with your companions to build a deep platonic relationship or engage in a romance. You decide how you want to romance someone. LGBTQ+ On their journey, your alchemist will be joined by a group of five companions, four of which you can form romantic relationships with. Whether you choose to romance anyone, you are also able to form meaningful platonic relationships with everyone, including our fifth companion Mime, who's totally ready to be your new BFF! Alchemy Puzzles Use your alchemy skills to solve crises, assist your companions, and change the world around you. Take on powerful demons with your alchemy skills and the help of an ancient artifact. Hone your skills to discover secret recipes.

**Shape 18th-Century France in *Ambition: A Minuet in Power***

Step into the opulent yet volatile world of 18th-century France with *Ambition: A Minuet in Power*, a romantic visual novel that places you at the heart of history. Set against the backdrop of March 19th, 1789, the game immerses you in the gilded halls of Versailles, where King Louis XVI presides over a nation on the brink of revolution. This era of stark contrasts—elegance and poverty, ancient tradition and unstoppable change—demands your keen attention, and your choices will dramatically shape history.

Your journey begins at the center of power, Versailles, but quickly extends to the bustling streets of Paris. Here, you must meticulously plan your weekly commitments, choosing not only your activities but also your companions. Social maneuvering is key; attend lavish parties to mingle with the elite, uncovering their secrets to gain wealth and influence. Forge strategic romantic connections amidst a world of ever-shifting alliances. Love can be a powerful tool, allowing you to ensnare the hearts of Parisian nobles and leverage their influence for your own advantage. Furthermore, transform gossip into profit by discreetly selling the secrets you uncover, but exercise caution, as your own credibility and security hang in the balance, according to the game's developers.

*Ambition: A Minuet in Power* features a living, scheming world where you utilize an in-game calendar to plan your week. Fall in love with a diverse cast of fully realized characters, each with their own secret histories, from mysterious priests to wealthy widows. Discretion allows for multiple romantic entanglements. Immerse yourself in a gorgeously illustrated and meticulously researched depiction of 18th-century Paris, a period defined by fashion, secrecy, staggering beauty, and unspeakable danger. The experience is further enhanced by an original score composed by award-winning John Robert Matz, transitioning from refined string quartets to the grandeur of a late Baroque orchestra. The decisions you make will determine the course of political events. You can snub rivals and receive lavish gifts, but be aware that time is of the essence, and your adversaries harbor their own clandestine agendas. Discovery of your machinations could bring dire consequences, but successful choices can lead to significant rewards and alter the narrative's trajectory, as noted in promotional materials.

## Hatoful Boyfriend: A Unique Avian Dating Sim

Welcome to St. PigeoNation’s Institute, a school for gifted birds. As the only human student, you'll seek romance while studying. This remake of Hato Moa’s visual novel, *Hatoful Boyfriend*, blends school life with dating. The creator assures that no birds were harmed; many found love in the story.

### Navigating Avian Relationships

You'll meet many bird characters, from sleepy teachers to tough pigeon bikers. You can pursue relationships with those you like and avoid others.

### Enhanced Replayability

*Hatoful Boyfriend* adds a new scenario and ending by Hato Moa. This offers fresh content for all players. The game's unique story, secrets, and multiple endings encourage replay. You can explore different romantic paths each time.

### Academic Growth

Elective classes like gym and art boost your stats: charisma, vitality, and wisdom. These stats affect your interactions and survival. As noted, "Getting wise and you’ll pass your classes. Getting fit might save your life!"

### Unforeseen Plot Twists

St. PigeoNation’s Institute hides more than just classes. You'll find conspiracies, plot twists, and forces aiming for the apocalypse. Your romantic choices matter; a good choice could lead to love, while a bad one might have serious consequences.

### The Importance of Gifts

To impress your crushes, buy them beans as gifts. Options include:

*   Calm Corn
*   Country Millet
*   Bitter Black Beans

These gifts can greatly influence your relationships.

**Hatoful Boyfriend: Holiday Star** invites players back to its unique world of avian romance and adventure with a delightful holiday-themed sequel. This remastered edition brings beloved feathered companions together for a season brimming with love and excitement. As the series creator, Hato Moa, has mentioned, players are encouraged to explore enchanting, fantastical settings and meet charming new characters. The game is set in elegantly designed winter wonderlands, providing a unique backdrop for romance and discovery. Mediatonic's development expertise brings these extraordinary adventures to life, allowing players to spread their wings and soar.

The game, **Hatoful Boyfriend: Holiday Star**, presents a fresh experience with glorious high-definition visuals. According to the development team, the game features breathtaking, hand-drawn scenery. This includes a dazzling new watercolor world, offering a distinct visual treat. While exploring these charming landscapes, players will reconnect with familiar feathered romantics from the original game. Furthermore, a whole new flock of lovable birdies has been introduced, each with their own unique stories and adventures, as noted by the game's designers.

Beyond the returning characters, players can expect new avian antics, a hallmark of the Hatoful Boyfriend series. The developers have indicated that the experience will include delightfully bizarre elements. For instance, fans can look forward to anime-inspired magical girl transformations for their favorite pigeon boyfriends. Additionally, lab-grown birds will be engaging in Christmas capers. The mystery surrounding the King of the Holiday Star is also a central element, according to the development team. To further enrich the gameplay, **Hatoful Boyfriend: Holiday Star** includes delightful side stories. These optional narratives allow players to venture off the main storyline for marvelous episodic adventures and fun diversions. One such diversion, as emphasized by the development team, is tuning into a radio show hosted by a series favorite, Ryouta. This expanded narrative content ensures a rich and engaging experience for all players.

Name: Crimson Memories
Description:
Tyria, a girl of pure sunshine, was kidnapped one day by a mysterious man, then brought to Syris. Under the name of figuring out how her parents died, Tyria was forced to blend into Palace Royale to find out what happened. Will Tyria know finally find out tje truth? ●Tyria Folly Strando（２０） A cute girl with beautiful eyes and pretty but armored herself with anger, was severely traumatized by a fire in her childhood, but she met Syria along the way and was sent to the Palace Royale to work. ●Lantis Naru Norg（２２） Prince of Peruabarad. He saw girls like tools and frequently harassed Tyria. He hated all men because he was once molested by one. ●Carol Daak Rod（３０） A spy sent by Syria. A serious and not very man-savvy guy. Always wears a pair of white gloves. ●Henri Brad Raburr（２４） The man sent ny Syris to kidnap Tyria. A stand-up, justice-guided thief who enjoys playing Robinhood. Always tries to help the poor. And due to that he was always broke so he had to steal.

Name: Crimson Spires
Description:
The small mining town of Bataille, Missouri has been cordoned off from the outside world for six months. The inhabitants have no idea why. All they know is that ever since the so-called 'Contingency,' planes no longer fly overhead, strange creatures have been glimpsed beyond the perimeter, and large mechanical towers will gun down anyone who tries to escape. As you--Sheriff Erika Wright--search for the truth, you must listen to the advice of a serial killer, mingle with extreme conspiracy theorists, and negotiate with vampires. Your struggle to protect the people of Bataille will uncover startling secrets and forge unlikely alliances. Eventually, you must choose a partner in your quest to unveil the mysteries around you. Amidst the horrors facing Bataille, romance can blossom with the partner in whom you trust. This epic story contains four distinct story branches with Julian, Maddy, Liam, or August. Each branch reveals unique secrets about the mysteries of the towers and a chance to find love. Unlock four distinct romances and story paths in an epic script totalling 250,000+ words Hear select scenes with a rich cast of English voice actors Experience the environment of Bataille in 3D Explore select 3D interiors Listen to a lengthy, dynamic soundtrack by developer and composer Jenny Gibbons

Name: Creature Romances: For the Ladies
Description:
Like the Creature Romances series? Be sure to check out Kokonoe Kokoro as well! This work contains many disturbing, grotesque images and images of non-human creatures. Please be aware of this if you decide to buy this game. Creature Romances - For the Ladies - An original mystery horror love story! An otome visual novel where you capture the hearts of creatures! Ordinary youth. Ordinary love. Which boy will you choose? Play as Nanami and choose between two handsome creatures: Kaito or Junya! Go on dates, romance those creatures, but be careful if you make the wrong choice it might give you a bad end! Make all the right choices and you may be rewarded with a kiss from your beloved and a happily ever after...! Features Two handsome creatures you can fall for Multiple choices Multiple endings (including bad ends!) Music gallery to listen to the Opening & Ending themes CG gallery with 20 unlockable CGs! Fully voiced in Japanese (excluding the main character) Estimated 1-2hrs of reading Contains explicit insect-ual content

Name: Heileen 3: New Horizons
Description:
Heileen 3 continues the story from the end of the second game and takes place in the Caribbean islands. Traveling side by side with Morgan the pirate, Heileen will search for her missing friends, hoping to reunite with all of them. But that's only the beginning, because the story continues! You'll have a fixed amount of in-game time to unlock a romance or a profession ending! Do you have what it takes to make it? The game plays like a raising/dating sim, in which you can learn several different skills and unlock advanced activities. The Virtues/Sins system of the second game is present as well, making every decision you take in the game shape Heileen's personality. GAME FEATURES Featuring a story much longer than the previous two titles combined together!
