The game aims to provide a deeply personal and impactful experience for all who play.

## Become a Battle Researcher in Coromon and Save Velua

Embark on an epic adventure as a Battle Researcher in Coromon, a creature-catching RPG that blends classic gameplay with modern twists. Your journey begins on your first day at Lux Solis, a global research society, when a mysterious force attacks. This event propels you into a quest to build a formidable squad of Coromon, track down these enigmatic invaders, and confront a rising threat to the world of Velua.

### Tame, Train, and Battle Your Coromon Squad

Coromon offers the thrilling experience of taming and training its unique wildlife. You'll battle wild creatures, skilled trainers, and titanic bosses. The core gameplay involves catching, training, and battling with your Coromon. Assemble a diverse team from over 100 unique creatures, each with distinct elements, traits, and skills, allowing for deep strategic customization.

### Master a Strategic Stamina-Based Battle System

The game features a strategic stamina-based battle system where every action consumes energy. Careful skill selection is paramount. Players can strategically deal damage, deplete enemy stamina through status effects, or nullify abilities with dozens of conditions to secure victory. This system requires careful management of your Coromon's energy.

### Unravel a Grand Narrative of Mystery and Intrigue

Your initial day at Lux Solis is the prologue to a grander adventure. You'll be thrust into a story of significant scope as a mysterious, alien threat emerges. It's up to you to aid Lux Solis in thwarting their sinister plans. Your pursuit spans six major zones and numerous cities, connected by dozens of explorable routes. Discover quests, hidden secrets, and valuable items in diverse environments, from glacial caverns to scorching deserts. The narrative unfolds across six major zones, filled with plot twists and revelations.

### Customize Your Experience and Challenge

Coromon allows players to tailor their gameplay experience. Difficulty options fundamentally alter mechanics, letting you set the challenge level. Options range from a "Relaxed Playthrough" to a "Tactical Depth" mode. For a high-stakes challenge, fan-favorite "Randomizer" and "Nuzlocke" modes offer demanding twists.

### Create Your Unique Trainer

Beyond your Coromon, create your trainer with hundreds of customizable elements for hair, fashion, and more. Coromon is described as a tribute to classic RPGs, aiming to stay loyal to core gameplay while introducing new features and retaining an iconic retro aesthetic with modernized pixel art.

Name: Yooka-Laylee
Description:
Yooka-Laylee is an all-new open-world platformer from genre veterans Playtonic! Explore huge, beautiful worlds, meet (and beat) an unforgettable cast of characters and horde a vault-load of shiny collectibles as buddy-duo Yooka (the green one) and Laylee (the wisecracking bat with the big nose) embark on an epic adventure to thwart corporate creep Capital B and his devious scheme to absorb all the world’s books… and convert them into pure profit! Using their arsenal of special moves, our heroes will tackle a huge variety of puzzles and platforming challenges in their search for Pagies, the golden bounty used to unlock — and expand — stunning new worlds, each jammed to the gills with oddball characters, hulking bosses, minecart challenges, arcade games, quiz shows, multiplayer games… and much more! KEY FEATURES: INTRODUCING OUR NEW BUDDY DUO : Yooka and Laylee boast an awesome arsenal of abilities built for platforming fun and unlocked with added freedom from the serpent salesman Trowzer. CARVE YOUR OWN PATH : Purchase and unlock moves with freedom, choose to expand your favourite worlds into even larger, more complex playgrounds and equip unique Tonic gameplay modifiers to customise your play style. Every player will have a unique experience. A COLLECT-EM-UP FOR THE MODERN ERA : Seek out a roster of shiny collectibles with gameplay progression at their core (as well as other, more valuable materials), such as the dual action Butterfly Energy or tricky Ghost Writers! A CAST TO LAST : Meet (or beat) a huge cast of memorable characters brought to life by the art and audio teams behind legendary platform games, and destined to endure in future adventures as part of Playtonic Universe. Expect all manner of grunts, squeaks and squawks. A DREAM SOUNDTRACK : David Wise (Donkey Kong Country) and Grant Kirkhope (Banjo-Kazooie) combine for a melodic masterpiece! Seriously, clean out your ears – they’re in for a treat. BUDDY UP : Establish your own buddy-duo and adventure through Yooka-Laylee in co-op mode! Taking control of a unique co-op character, a second player can assist Yooka and Laylee by stunning enemies and helping them tackle tricky challenges. No piggyback required. AND A WHOLE LOT MORE : Discover unique boss fights, mine cart challenges, retro-tastic Arcade games, quiz shows and 8 unique multiplayer games!

**Pumpkin Jack: A Spooky 3D Platformer Adventure**

Dive into an epic quest as Jack, the Mythical Pumpkin Lord, in the spooky 3D platformer, Pumpkin Jack. This game invites players to explore otherworldly landscapes and assist the forces of Evil in their mission to vanquish the Good. The game's premise, as outlined by its developers, sees players acting under the direct will of the Devil himself.

Pumpkin Jack presents a vibrant and eerie world, characterized by a colorful cartoon setting that transports players through lurid landscapes. Each level is meticulously crafted with alluring atmospheres, featuring vibrant color palettes and high-quality lighting effects. This distinct visual style, which draws inspiration from classic PS2 graphics, cultivates a unique cartoon universe that is both spooky and captivating, according to game reviews.

To survive the dynamic, real-time battles against challenging beasts, players must master the art of combo attacks, dodging, and precise timing. Unlocking and strategically choosing weapons is crucial for defeating all adversaries. Beyond combat, Pumpkin Jack incorporates engaging physics-based puzzles that test players' understanding of gravity and reflection. As Jack, players can utilize his flaming head for various actions, such as burning books, hammering moles, and creating paths for magic spheres. Each level introduces novel gameplay mechanics, ensuring a fresh and exciting experience throughout the adventure, as noted by game critics.

Jack is not alone on his quest. Helpful companions offer assistance, including a haughty hooty owl that provides guidance and a snarky crow eager to offer long-range attack support. Together, they navigate the Arc En Ciel Kingdom, a mythical realm shattered by a curse, and confront Jack's nemesis. This collaborative approach to gameplay is a key feature highlighted in player feedback.

**Snake Pass: A Unique Physics-Based Puzzle Platformer Experience**

Snake Pass offers a truly distinctive physics-based puzzle platformer experience, a creation of Sumo Digital. This charming game challenges players to "think like a snake" as they guide Noodle the Snake and his companion, Doodle the Hummingbird. Their shared objective is to navigate their home, Haven Tor, which has been thrown into disarray by a mysterious intruder. The duo's crucial mission is to restore peace by retrieving the lost Keystones and returning them to the magical gates that safeguard Haven Tor.

The core gameplay in Snake Pass is exceptionally unique, demanding that players master Noodle's serpentine movements. You will need to slither through dense vegetation, coil around bamboo structures, and climb strategically to overcome a variety of obstacles. The game is meticulously designed to immerse you in the perspective of a snake, leveraging its natural locomotion and the game's robust physics engine to solve intricate puzzles. According to developers, the game originated from Sumo Digital's first Game Jam, where Seb Liese initially created it as a heartfelt tribute to his favorite childhood games and his beloved pet snake.

The game boasts 15 carefully designed levels, each presenting fresh challenges that rigorously test your snake-like abilities. Players will gradually learn and adeptly apply Noodle's unique movement mechanics to uncover the mystery of the intruder and ultimately restore Haven Tor. Hidden collectibles are strategically placed throughout the environments, strongly encouraging thorough exploration and rewarding observant players. The overall experience is further enhanced by an original, captivating soundtrack composed by David Wise and an unlockable Time Trial mode for those seeking to truly master the game's challenges. Early feedback indicates that the concept generated considerable excitement after a demo was showcased at public events, which strongly appealed to gamers and ultimately led to full production.

Name: Call of Duty®
Description:
Call of Duty® delivers the gritty realism and cinematic intensity of World War II's epic battlefield moments like never before - through the eyes of citizen soldiers and unsung heroes from an alliance of countries who together helped shape the course of modern history. Play through the chaos of battle as part of a well-trained squad, that lays down covering fire and pulls its wounded to safety. In addition to authentic squad movements and tactics, each soldier's distinct personality and training comes out on the battlefield. No one soldier or nation single-handedly won the war. For the first time, Call of Duty® captures the war from multiple perspectives, through the eyes of American, British and Russian soldiers. Battle through 24 missions spanning 4 interconnected historical campaigns. Take on mission objectives ranging from sabotage and all-out assault to stealth, vehicle combat and rescue. Authentic weapons, locations, vehicles and sounds of war all contribute to the realism, immersing you in the most intense World War II experience yet. © 2003 Activision Publishing, Inc. Activision and Call of Duty are registered trademarks of Activision Publishing, Inc. All rights reserved. All other trademarks and trade names are the properties of their respective owners.

Name: Total War: EMPIRE – Definitive Edition
Description:
Complete your Total War collection with this Definitive Edition of Total War: EMPIRE, which includes all DLC and feature updates since the game’s release: Take on the Warpath Campaign and lead one of 5 new Native American factions in an epic war to defend your lands and drive out the invaders. Build up your armies with the Elite Units of the East, Elite Units of the West, Elite Units of America and the Special Forces Units & Bonus Content packs, which together add over 50 elite new units. Total War: EMPIRE Definitive Edition offers hundreds and hundreds of hours of absorbing gameplay and every bit of content made for the game. See below for full details. About Total War: EMPIRE Control the land, command the seas, forge a new nation, and conquer the globe. Total War: EMPIRE takes the Total War franchise to the eighteenth century Age of Enlightenment a time of political upheaval, military advancements, and radical thought, captured in stunning detail. Total War: EMPIRE introduces a host of revolutionary new features, including true 3D naval combat. For the first time in the Total War series, you will be able to intuitively command single ships or vast fleets upon seascapes rich with extraordinary water and weather effects that play a huge role in your eventual glorious success or ignominious defeat. After pummelling your enemy with cannon fire, close in to grapple their ship and prepare to board, taking control of your men as they fight hand-to-hand on the decks of these wooden behemoths. In addition, Total War: EMPIRE will see further enhancements to the Total War series’ signature 3D battles and turn-based campaign map. Real-time battles will pose new challenges with the addition of cannon and musket, challenging players to master new formations and tactics as a result of the increasing role of gunpowder within warfare. And the Campaign Map, the heart of Total War introduces a variety of new and upgraded elements, including new systems for Trade, Diplomacy and Espionage with agents; a refined and streamlined UI; improved Advisors; and a vastly extended scope, taking in the riches of India, the turbulence of Europe and, for the first time, the untapped potential of the United States of America. About The Warpath Campaign A new detailed North American Campaign Map expands the Total War: EMPIRE experience, with 5 brand new Native American factions, new units and technologies. Experience battles in the new Warpath Campaign and lead one of the 5 new factions in an epic war to defend your lands and drive out the invaders. Or take these units and their unique strengths into multiplayer battles. • 5 New Playable Factions including the Iroquois, Huron, Plains, Pueblo and Cherokee nations. • Expanded North American Territories - A new, more detailed North American Campaign Map featuring new regions and a new start date. • New Elite Units including Mohawk Elite Warriors, Cheyenne Dog Soldiers, Navajo Scout Warriors and many more. • Two New Agent Types - Infiltrate enemy territory with the new Shaman unit and sabotage the opposition with the cunning Scout. • 18 New Tribal Technologies including Spirit Medicine, the Call of the Wild and Dreamwalking creating a brand new tribal technology tree. • New Winning Objectives for each of the playable factions. About Elite Units of the East The Elite Units of the East adds 12 new elite units to the Maratha and Ottoman factions and expands the map further East than any previous Total War game. Most of these soldiers' expertise developed on the battlefield - some are fearsome brigands, others of them are drawn from a strong academic background, learned warriors. They will provide a vast array of tactical options: intimidating and cowing your enemies. • Haydut Irregulars (Ottoman Empire) • Wallachian Boyars (Ottoman Empire) • Bosnian Panduks (Ottoman Empire) • Circassian Armoured Cavalry (Ottoman Empire) • Armenian Archers (Ottoman Empire) • Libyan Kuloglu (Ottoman Empire) • Palestinian Auxiliaries (Ottoman Empire) • Cairo Janissaries (Ottoman Empire) • Mounted Nizam-I-Cedit (Ottoman Empire) • Rajput Zamindars (Maratha) • Poligars (Maratha) • Barawardi (Maratha) About Elite Units of the West The Elite Units of the West introduces 14 completely unique units from all the major Western factions. Featuring all new infantry and cavalry units, equipped with the best weapons and having undergone the most rigorous of training, the Elite Units of the West bring even more options on the battlefield to all tacticians seeking to defeat their enemies. • Hungarian Grenadiers (Austria) • Horse Guards (Britain) • Swiss Guards (France) • Blue Guards (United Provinces) • Gardes du Corps (United Provinces) • Guard Grenadiers (Poland-Lithuania) • 2nd Hussars (Prussia) • Bosniaks (Prussia) • Frei-Korps (Prussia) • Gardes à cheval (Russia) • Siemenovski Foot Guards (Russia) • Walloon Guards (Spain) • Legion of the United States (United States) • US Marines (United States) About Elite Units of America The Elite Units of America adds 15 new elite units to the American, British and French factions of Total War: EMPIRE. In the last half of the 18th century, the political upheaval from thirteen of British Colonies in North America ultimately led to the 1776 Declaration of Independence and changed History forever. The 15 units have all played a major part in the American Revolution. Though their background owes a lot to European military traditions, their identity is tied to the destiny of the United States and gave these men courage and audacity like no other soldier on the battlefield. • 1st Delaware (United States) • 1st Maryland (United States) • 2nd Continental Light Dragoons (United States) • 2nd New York (United States) • 33rd Foot (Britain) • Brunswick Dragoons (Britain) • Hessian Grenadiers (Britain) • King’s Royal Regiment of New York (Britain) • Lee’s Legion (United States) • Morgan’s Provisional Rifle Corp (United States) • Pulaski’s Legion (United States) • Royal Deux-Ponts Regiment (France) • Royal Welch Fusiliers (Britain) • Company of Select Marksmen/Fraser’s Rangers (Britain) • Tarleton’s Light Dragoons (Britain) About Special Forces Units & Bonus Content The Special Forces Units introduces six of the most influential military forces of the 18th Century. True to the period, these exclusive elite units become available on the campaign map via a certain faction or once a specific geographical region is under control. This pack also includes three more exclusive Elite Units. • HMS Victory • Rogers' Rangers • Ottoman Organ Gun • Ghoorkas • Corso Terrestre Guerillas • Bulkeley's Regiment • Death's Head Hussars • The USS Constitution • The Dahomey Amazons

Name: Broforce
Description:
When evil threatens the world, the world calls on Broforce - an under-funded, over-powered paramilitary organization dealing exclusively in excessive force. Brace your loins with up to four players to run ‘n’ gun as dozens of different bros and eliminate the opposing terrorist forces that threaten our way of life. Unleash scores of unique weapons and set off incredible chain reactions of fire, napalm, and limbs in the name of freedom. The Broforce: Deliver your own brand of shock and awe with dozens of bros each with their own unique weaponry and special attacks designed to dispatch freedom across the world. Bro-Op & Deathmatch: Battle terrorism with up to four players in cooperative mode or sever ties with your bros and face each other in several bombastic competitive modes. Explosion Run: Join up with other bros to tackle these unique time attack levels under the pressure of exploding terrains and mass chaos. Fully Destructible Everything: Destructible terrain opens up a slew of strategic options while the abundance of Exploding Red Barrels of Justice™ can literally level the playing field with one shot. Level Editor: Design your own playground of destruction with a robust level editor and become the envy of all the other bros by sharing them online. Browse through scores of custom user created levels and complete them to rate their Bro-ness.

## Chicken Police - Paint it RED!: A Noir Detective Adventure

**Chicken Police - Paint it RED!** is a narrative-driven noir adventure that immerses players in a compelling mystery. This unique title masterfully blends a complex interrogation system with classic film-noir elements, promising an unforgettable detective experience. The game centers on the legendary, yet strained, partnership of **Sonny Featherland and Marty MacChicken**. Once renowned detectives, a decade later finds Sonny semi-alcoholic and on leave, while Marty is a star detective in denial. They must reunite for a case unlike any they've faced, navigating palpable tension as they delve into a bizarre investigation in the city of Clawville.

**Chicken Police** offers a story-rich, dialogue-heavy adventure inspired by visual novels and classic adventure games. Players will interact with over 30 fully voiced characters, engage in rigorous interrogations, and collect clues, evidence, and personal information from Clawville's shady inhabitants. The city features over 30 distinct locations that evolve throughout the narrative, allowing players to revisit areas and uncover deeper insights. According to **Forbes**, the game's "dark story will be pretty funny," while **Destructoid** was captivated by its "quirky themes and original music." **Rock Paper Shotgun** highlighted it as an "upcoming noir detective adventure with grizzled chickens," and **Alpha Beta Gamer** commended its ability to "nail the film noir vibe" with "excellent voice acting, interesting story, and witty writing."

The game boasts a stunning visual style, utilizing real photos and photo-realistic 3D backgrounds. Its aesthetic draws heavily from classic film-noir, with influences from games like *Grim Fandango* and *L.A. Noire*, as well as animated features like *Porco Rosso* and *BoJack Horseman*. This immersive mood is amplified by a beautiful original soundtrack and professional voice acting. The 100% voice-acted cast, featuring over 8 hours of spoken dialogue, includes talent from studios behind acclaimed performances in *The Wolf Among Us* and *Horizon Zero Dawn*. Clawville, once an Edenic sanctuary, has devolved into the darkest corner of the Wilderness. **Chicken Police** serves as a cynical satire, capturing the mood of 1940s film-noir with a gritty, hopeless tone and a generous dose of dark humor.

Name: Sam & Max 201: Ice Station Santa
Description:
He's the most ancient and powerful opponent they've ever faced, a hairy, bloated, pagan God - Santa Claus! With Christmas presents on the attack and carols of gunshots drowning out the bells, Sam & Max must storm the North Pole to bring down a less-than-jolly foe. Can the Freelance Police make sense of this Christmas conundrum in time to save the world's children from a holiday tainted by tears, turmoil, and Torture-Me-Elmer? The first of five hilarious episodes Memorable characters and thousands of lines of funny dialogue Intuitive point and click gameplay Unique built-in hint system tailored to the player's needs Original jazz soundtrack

Name: Assassin’s Creed® III
Description:
The American Colonies, 1775. It’s a time of civil unrest and political upheaval in the Americas. As a Native American assassin fights to protect his land and his people, he will ignite the flames of a young nation’s revolution. Assassin’s Creed® III takes you back to the American Revolutionary War, but not the one you’ve read about in history books... Key Features: As a Native American assassin, eliminate your enemies with guns, bows, tomahawks, and more! From bustling city streets to chaotic battlefields, play a critical role in the most legendary events of the American Revolution including the Battle of Bunker Hill and Great Fire of New York. Experience the truth behind the most gruesome war in history: the American Revolution. Introducing the Ubisoft-AnvilNext game engine, stunning new technology that will revolutionize gaming with powerful graphics, lifelike animations, immersive combat, and advanced physics.

Name: The Corporate Machine
Description:
The Corporate Machine™ is Stardock's classic 2001 real-time economic strategy game, available now on Steam. Dive back into the timeless battle for one of the most ruthless environments ever created: international trade. Corporations exist in a constant state of war: Plotting to destroy their rivals, CEOs chase world domination through economic strategies less deadly but more complex than any military maneuver. Control the market, or face the prospect of buyout and bankruptcy. Build your business empire, dominate the industry, and amass a fortune you will need that private island to fully enjoy.

Name: Wargame: Airland Battle
Description:
2 SIDES, 12 NATIONS, 750 UNITS: THE STRATEGY GAME REFERENCE IS BACK! Richer, more beautiful and more accessible, Wargame AirLand Battle is the sequel to the explosive real-time strategy game Wargame European Escalation! 1985. After several months of tension between NATO and the Warsaw Pact, an incident in the North Sea suddenly sets the world on fire, starting an all-out war. Command the entire military resources of the period, and plunge into the heart of a new dynamic campaign! With the arrival of air forces, select from a phenomenal array of 750 units (including tanks, planes, helicopters, and infantry) to build your army. Engage in spectacular battles with unmatched strategic depth, on huge battlefields as large as 150km², powered by a new graphics engine. Impressive in solo play, Wargame AirLand Battle is even more engaging online. The game features ultra-complete multiplayer modes, where up to 20 players do battle simultaneously!

Name: Time Loader
Description:
Time Loader is a story-driven, physics-based puzzle platformer with a twist. At the helm of a small robot, you’ll travel back to the 90s to prevent a tragic accident. Explore the house of your creator, solve brain-teasing puzzles, acquire unique and powerful upgrades, and see common household items from an entirely new perspective! But remember: meddling with time has serious consequences. You may succeed in changing the past, but can you deal with the result of your actions? Gameplay Features: Subverted perspectives Even the most familiar objects look different when you’re the size of a toy car. Will you watch your every move or dive head-first into this dangerous new world? An arsenal to choose from Boosters, harpoons, screwdrivers… choose among dozens of upgrades to tackle each level and get the job done! Dynamic and branching narratives Don’t just relive the past: change it! Every choice you make will influence the story and may lead to a different outcome. So do us a favor: change the past responsibly! A complimentary dose of nostalgia Time Loader features music, references, and items straight out of the ‘90s. Relive your childhood or, if you’re too young for it, just gawk in awe at how primitive humanity used to be back then! /

Name: Call of Juarez: Gunslinger
Description:
CAN YOU STAND AGAINST THE DEADLIEST GUNSLINGERS WHO EVER LIVED? From the dust of a gold mine to the dirt of a saloon, Call of Juarez® Gunslinger is a real homage to the Wild West tales. Live the epic and violent journey of a ruthless bounty hunter on the trail of the West’s most notorious outlaws. Blurring the lines between man and myth, this adventure made of memorable encounters unveils the untold truth behind some of the greatest legends of the Old West. Key Features: Meet the legendary outlaws Billy the Kid, Pat Garrett, Jesse James… Face down the West’s most notorious gunslingers and live the untold stories behind the legends. Dispense your own justice With a gun holster tied to your leg, become a ruthless bounty hunter on a journey made of all-out gun battles. Prevail in deadly gunfights Master the art of blasting pistols, shooting rifles and dodging bullets. Unleash lethal combos to gun down multiple enemies in split seconds. Become the West’s finest Choose the specific gun-fighting skills you want to develop and acquire new shooting abilities to become the West’s finest gunslinger. Experience a lawless land Blaze a trail through the wilderness of the Old West and live an epic adventure through stunning Western landscapes.

The Witcher 2: Assassins of Kings Enhanced Edition delivers a mature and thought-provoking role-playing game (RPG) experience, placing players in the boots of Geralt of Rivia, a professional monster slayer. This installment is particularly lauded for its intricate and unique design, especially on the PC. The game immerses players in a turbulent era marked by the struggle of powerful factions for dominance, as the Northern Kingdoms teeter on the edge of war. However, these grand military conflicts are ultimately eclipsed by a profound and deeply embedded conspiracy that propels the story.

According to many players and critics, the Enhanced Edition represents a significant leap forward from the original game. It introduces entirely new adventures set in previously uncharted territories. These additions are brimming with new characters, captivating mysteries, and formidable monsters, all contributing to a richer and more compelling narrative. The addition of a new pre-rendered cinematic introduction, expertly created by Tomasz Bagiński, along with fresh animations and cutscenes, substantially enhances the storytelling. Furthermore, the Version 2.0 improvements seamlessly integrate all previously released downloadable content and updates. This all-encompassing package features an Arena Mode, catering to players who crave endless combat challenges, and an extensive tutorial system, designed to assist newcomers in easily navigating Geralt's intricate world. For those seeking an even greater test, the Dark Mode offers a punishing difficulty level, emphasizing careful preparation and strategic combat, and includes unique dark-themed items.

Beyond the core game content, the Enhanced Edition thoughtfully includes a wealth of bonus digital items. These valuable extras encompass the official game soundtrack, a detailed world map to assist with exploration, a comprehensive quest handbook for guidance, the essential game manual, and the "Reasons of State" digital comic book. These additions collectively contribute to a more rewarding and immersive experience for devoted fans of the Witcher universe.

**The Witcher: Enhanced Edition Director's Cut** plunges players into a dark, morally complex fantasy world, a defining characteristic of this celebrated role-playing game. Its lasting appeal is attributed to a rich narrative, unforgettable characters, and dynamic, strategic real-time combat.

Players assume the role of Geralt of Rivia, a professional monster slayer. The game offers extensive character customization, allowing players to shape Geralt's abilities with over 250 distinct skills, combat proficiencies, and magical powers. This gritty fantasy setting, drawing inspiration from Andrzej Sapkowski's novels, presents a world where ethical boundaries are frequently indistinct.

The game's non-linear narrative is lauded for its surprising twists and morally challenging choices that significantly influence its unfolding. Quests can be approached in multiple ways, ultimately leading to one of three distinct endings, each a direct result of player decisions. Combat is both complex and accessible, designed to emulate medieval sword fighting. Players can utilize six combat styles, potent potions, an advanced alchemy system, weapon enhancements, and powerful spells. According to a report by Metric Minds studio, the game boasts an impressive 600 authentic combat animations, meticulously created using motion capture technology.

Building upon the original game, the Enhanced Edition introduces substantial gameplay and technical enhancements. Over 5,000 lines of dialogue were re-recorded in English, and the German version received a complete rework. More than 200 new gesture animations were incorporated, enhancing character expressiveness. An alchemy sack simplifies ingredient management, and a sort-and-stack feature streamlines item organization. Technical improvements include reduced loading times, increased stability, more responsive combat, and faster inventory loading. An auto-save feature is also available. Additionally, a system that randomizes in-game model appearances contributes to greater visual variety.

Beyond the main game, The Witcher Enhanced Edition provides a wealth of bonus material. This includes an interactive comic book, the D'jinni Adventure Editor, two new adventures offering over 5 hours of additional gameplay, the official soundtrack, "Making of" videos, an official game guide, and two detailed maps of the game's vast world.

Name: Nancy Drew®: The Haunted Carousel
Description:
Nancy Drew®: The Haunted Carousel is a first-person perspective, point-and-click adventure game. The player is Nancy Drew and has to solve a mystery. Explore rich environments for clues, interrogate suspects, and solve puzzles and mini-games. You, as Nancy Drew, have just entered a tightening circle of fear and crime as you explore a seaside amusement park that’s swirling with secrets. An antique carousel horse as been stolen! Now, late at night, the merry-go-round takes off on bizarre riderless journeys to nowhere. Are the painted ponies searching for their missing lead horse, or is there another explanation for the midnight rides? Take a spin with danger to unravel the mystery of a ghostly carousel! Dare to Play. Play mini-games in the arcade Reconstruct a historic carousel Keep track of clues and suspects with your laptop Erase Mistakes with the 'Second Chance' option Use a cell phone to take and make calls anywhere   About The Nancy Drew Adventure Series The original #1 selling PC adventure series. See a comparison of the Dossier and Adventure Series

Name: Middle-earth™: Shadow of Mordor™
Description:
Note: certain features for the Middle-earth: Shadow of Mordor videogame will no longer be available beginning Dec. 31, 2020. Affected Features: • The Nemesis Forge feature will no longer be available. Therefore, players will no longer be able to transfer their in-game Nemeses from Middle-earth: Shadow of Mordor to Middle-earth: Shadow of War. • Vendetta missions and Leaderboards will no longer be available. • WBPlay will no longer be available, but the epic runes 'Orc Hunter' and 'Gravewalker' will automatically be awarded to all players. Winner of over 50 “Best of 2014” Awards including Game of the Year, Best Action Game and Most Innovative Game.

## S.T.A.L.K.E.R.: Shadow of Chernobyl - Survive the Zone

The Chernobyl Exclusion Zone, established after the 1986 nuclear disaster, was irrevocably transformed by a second catastrophic explosion in 2006. This event created a perilous landscape known as The Zone, now teeming with mutated creatures, lethal radiation, and mysterious anomalous energy. The military enforces a strict cordon, with shoot-on-sight orders for any intruders.

Despite the extreme dangers, by 2012, The Zone continues to draw mercenaries, bounty hunters, and explorers. They are motivated by persistent reports of 'artifacts' possessing anomalous energy, which they seek to sell on the black market or use to uncover the truth behind The Zone's existence. These individuals, known as S.T.A.L.K.E.R.s, encompass various roles including Scavengers, Trespassers, Adventurers, Loners, Killers, Explorers, and Robbers. Your challenge is to forge your own path to survival within this unforgiving environment.

S.T.A.L.K.E.R.: Shadow of Chernobyl delivers an immersive storyline within a dynamic, non-linear open world. Explore accurately modeled locations from the Chernobyl Exclusion Zone. The game's 'Survival FPS' gameplay blends action, stealth, survival, and RPG elements. An advanced Enemy Threat Evaluation AI ensures NPCs react dynamically to their surroundings. Realistic combat mechanics, a dynamic day-night cycle, and weather system influence gameplay. Powered by the 'X-Ray Engine,' the game features advanced physics and dynamic lighting for a truly atmospheric experience. Intense multiplayer action supports up to 32 players.

Step aboard the legendary 1914 Orient Express for an unforgettable mystery adventure with "The Last Express Gold Edition." This acclaimed title, meticulously crafted by Jordan Mechner, the visionary behind the iconic "Prince of Persia" series, is widely lauded as one of the finest adventure games ever created. It plunges players into a world of intrigue and suspense, set against the opulent backdrop of the Orient Express.

The narrative unfolds in July 1914, on the very precipice of World War I. The train embarks on its final, fateful voyage from Paris to Constantinople. Players assume the role of Robert Cath, an American doctor. He is summoned by his close friend, Tyler Whitney, to join him on this historic journey. Driven by an urgent desire to understand the reason behind his friend's summons, Robert Cath makes a startling discovery. Tyler is found dead in his compartment, clutching a cryptic scroll written in Russian. This discovery ignites a thrilling investigation. Players are compelled to explore every nook and cranny of the train. From neighboring compartments to the elegant restaurant car, every location offers clues and opportunities to advance the investigation.

"The Last Express" masterfully weaves a complex narrative. It is filled with unexpected plot twists, clandestine conspiracies, passionate romance, and the chilling reality of murder. All of this unfolds aboard the luxurious Orient Express. This immersive train ride becomes a dynamic stage for players. They can engage in conversations, listen in on hushed discussions, or even eavesdrop on vital exchanges. Through these interactions and thorough investigation, players must unravel the mystery. They need to discover who murdered Robert Cath's best friend and, more importantly, the compelling reasons behind the crime. The game is celebrated for its distinctive, modern art style, which lends a unique visual flair to the experience. Furthermore, the game features multiple branching endings, underscoring the principle that player choices have tangible consequences. An immersive and tense real-time system further enhances the feeling of urgency and engagement throughout the adventure. According to game critics, the game's innovative approach to storytelling and player agency sets it apart.

Name: Nancy Drew®: Curse of Blackmoor Manor
Description:
Nancy Drew®: Curse of Blackmoor Manor is a first-person perspective, point-and-click adventure game. The player is Nancy Drew and has to solve a mystery. Explore rich environments for clues, interrogate suspects, and solve puzzles and mini-games. All is not well in Blackmoor Manor, a Fourteenth Century English mansion haunted by a tragic past. You, as Nancy Drew, embark on your first international adventure to visit Linda Penvellyn, your neighbor's daughter and newlywed wife of a British diplomat. A mysterious malady keeps Linda hidden behind thick bed curtains. Is she hiding from something or someone, or is a more menacing threat stalking her? Face your fears to find the truth! Dare to Play.™ Travel to England and solve challenging puzzles to break the manor’s evil curse. Snoop and sleuth through gorgeously detailed rooms for clues. Meet intriguing suspects, including a sardonic talking parrot. Erase mistakes by using the ‘Second Chance’ feature. Play at your own pace with Junior and Senior detective levels.   About The Nancy Drew Adventure Series The original #1 selling PC adventure series. See a comparison of the Dossier and Adventure Series

Name: Nancy Drew®: Danger on Deception Island
Description:
Nancy Drew®: Danger on Deception Island is a first-person perspective, point-and-click adventure game. The player is Nancy Drew and has to solve a mystery. Explore rich environments for clues, interrogate suspects, and solve puzzles and mini-games. A much-anticipated vacation to a remote island in the Pacific Northwest abruptly runs aground when you, as Nancy Drew, discover that an unseen assailant has vandalized the whale-watching boat owned by your host, Katie Firestone. But that’s just the first in a string of nasty 'accidents.' Is the trouble in Snake Horse Harbor related to the orphaned orca whale roaming the nearby channel, or is there a deeper threat shrouded in the approaching fog? Plunge into danger to bring a mysterious island’s secrets to the surface! Dare to Play. Kayak in coastal waters and caves. Solve puzzles using Morse code and the Anagram Buster. Build sandcastles, dig for clams, and play chess. Choose from Junior or Senior Detective difficulty levels.   About The Nancy Drew Adventure Series The original #1 selling PC adventure series. See a comparison of the Dossier and Adventure Series

Name: Nancy Drew®: Secret of the Old Clock
Description:
Nancy Drew®: Secret of the Old Clock is a first-person perspective, point-and-click adventure game. The player is Nancy Drew and has to solve a mystery. Explore rich environments for clues, interrogate suspects, and solve puzzles and mini-games. The year is 1930. A fiery explosion at the Lilac Inn leaves its owner, Emily Crandall, teetering on the edge of sanity and propels you, as Nancy Drew, headlong into adventure. A will left behind by an eccentric millionaire could solve Emily’s problems, and fortunately, you’ve got a car and can drive anywhere you want. But watch out! When you’re on the trail of a desperate villain, the road can get very bumpy! Dare to Play.™ Drive Nancy’s blue roadster Go back in time to 1930 Play miniature golf Based on the first Nancy Drew book   About The Nancy Drew Adventure Series The original #1 selling PC adventure series. See a comparison of the Dossier and Adventure Series

Name: Nancy Drew®: Legend of the Crystal Skull
Description:
Nancy Drew®: Legend of the Crystal Skull is a first-person perspective, point-and-click adventure game. The player is Nancy Drew and has to solve a mystery. Explore rich environments for clues, interrogate suspects, and solve puzzles and mini-games. Bruno Bolet was the proud owner of the Whisperer, a crystal skull rumored to protect its holder from almost any cause of death  except murder. When Bruno passed away, his nephew Henry came to wrap up his affairs, but he couldn't find the skull among the clutter of the creepy Bolet manor. You'll need to team up with Nancy's best friend Bess Marvin to find this mystical artifact before it falls into the wrong hands! Dare to Play Play as Nancy and Bess Marvin Outwit Bruno's pet iguana, alligator, and spider Infiltrate a secret society, unlock crypts, and collect glass eyeballs. Play arcade-style games  bowl, blast angry wasps, and dodge chomping teeth. Play Junior or Senior detective level and erase mistakes without starting over   About The Nancy Drew Adventure Series The original #1 selling PC adventure series. See a comparison of the Dossier and Adventure Series

Unreal Tournament 2004: Editor's Choice Edition offers a fast-paced, multiplayer first-person shooter experience centered on intense combat within advanced arenas. The game features ten distinct game modes, supporting both strategic team play and chaotic free-for-all matches. Players assume the roles of futuristic gladiators, competing against up to 32 opponents in a variety of meticulously designed indoor and outdoor environments.

Key modes enhance the multiplayer experience. Assault Mode challenges teams to attack and defend fortified bases, with scenarios ranging from combat on moving trains to defending the human homeworld. Onslaught Mode requires opposing teams to capture strategic points to destroy the enemy's power core. This mode emphasizes vehicular combat in expansive outdoor arenas, allowing players to utilize a wide array of machines.

The game includes a wealth of enhanced gameplay elements. A comprehensive selection of land, air, and space vehicles are integral to combat strategy, varying from agile fighters to larger, multi-person vehicles. Over 95 maps are available, including more than 45 new environments designed for various game modes. All weapons from Unreal Tournament 2003 are present, along with three new additions: the Mine Layer, the Anti-Vehicle Rocket Launcher (AVRiL), and the Grenade Launcher. The iconic Sniper Rifle from the original Unreal Tournament also returns, redesigned. Thirty-two new characters are introduced across four distinct teams: Thunder Crash, Corrupt, Iron Skull, and Hellions. Unreal Tournament 2004 also showcases significant technological improvements, resulting in a faster and more immersive gameplay experience, according to [source].

Unreal Tournament: Game of the Year Edition significantly advanced the multiplayer first-person shooter genre with its innovative features and intense gameplay. This 1999 award winner established a new benchmark for the genre, offering impressive graphics and a wide array of options that surpassed player expectations.

The game accommodates players of all skill levels through distinct modes. Novice Mode is designed for newcomers, reducing bot speed and damage for a gentler introduction to the fast-paced action. This mode serves as an ideal training ground. Conversely, Hardcore Mode is for seasoned veterans, increasing the challenge with swift bots that display superior dodging, jumping, and combat skills, providing a much tougher experience.

Unreal Tournament also includes several key enhancements. Bots are programmed with near-perfect deathmatching skills and an expert grasp of game rules, making them formidable opponents. Radio chatter, delivered via both on-screen text and audio cues, enhances communication, allowing players to request backup or covering fire. Crucially, hearing opponents' radio chatter adds a strategic layer, according to game developers. Server administrators benefit from extensive command-line access for fine-grained control and customization. The improved user interface features a streamlined Heads-Up Display (HUD) tailored to each game type, delivering essential information efficiently. The UBrowser system simplifies finding and joining online games, allowing players to select a server and jump directly into the action. Spectator Cams offer an engaging viewing experience, enabling players to move between camera points or attach cameras to specific participants, a valuable tool for learning. Finally, Jump Mode, which doubles player jump height, fundamentally alters gameplay dynamics and introduces new strategic possibilities.

© 2000, Epic Games, Inc. All rights reserved. Epic, Epic Games, Unreal, and Unreal Tournament, and Unreal (Stylized) are trademarks or registered trademarks of Epic Games, Inc. in the United States of America and elsewhere.

Name: DUSK
Description:
DUSK reintroduces you to a world where butchery and bloodshed must be mastered... if you're to survive 'til dawn. Inspired by Doom, Quake, Blood, Heretic, Hexen, Half-Life, Redneck Rampage and all your '90s favorites, while featuring a soundtrack by metal music mastermind Andrew Hulshult. In three distinct campaign episodes hand-crafted from straight outta the '90s, players will battle through an onslaught of mystical backwater cultists, possessed militants and even darker forces and attempt to discover just what lurks beneath the Earth. Featuring a vast arsenal of badass weaponry including sickles, swords, crossbows, rifles, dual-wielded and double barreled shotguns and incredibly necessary grenade and rocket launchers , DUSK brings unapologetic retro action from start to finish. In addition to the main campaign, DUSK features an Endless Survival Mode , putting you front and center against wave after wave of merciless enemies. And for those looking for an extra challenge, DUSK also offers the chance to go head to head online to battle your friends in DUSKWorld arena multiplayer , where darkness hosts the worst of humanity in surprising new ways...

Name: Battlerite
Description:
Battlerite ​ ​is​ ​a​ ​PvP​ ​arena​ ​brawler​ ​and​ ​the​ ​spiritual​ ​successor​ ​to​ ​the critically​ ​acclaimed​ ​Bloodline Champions.​ ​Experience​ ​the​ ​unique​ ​combination​ of a ​​top​-down​ ​shooter​ ​meeting a ​fast​-paced fighting​ ​game and take ​part​ ​in​ ​highly​ ​competitive,​ ​adrenaline-fueled​ ​2v2​ ​and​ ​3v3​ ​battles.​ ​ Engage​ ​in quick​ ​and​ ​intense​ ​action​ ​as​ ​you​ ​take​ ​control​ ​over​ ​one​ ​of​ many Champions,​ ​each​ ​with unique abilities to master.​ ​Welcome​ ​to​ ​a​ ​world​ ​where​ ​Champions​ ​dedicate​ ​their​ ​lives​ ​to​ ​the Arena. QUICK​ ​ARENA​ ​ACTION ​​​ Master the Arena​ ​in​ explosive​ ​battles​ ​of reaction.​ Choose your Champion, team up with friends, and dive into combat - for glory awaits only those who seek it. PRECISE​ ​GAMEPLAY​ ​MOVEMENT Aim skill-shots and dodge​ ​projectiles​ ​with​ ​the​ ​use​ ​of​ ​WASD​ ​movement​ ​& cursor​-​based​ ​aiming.​ Wield total control over your champion and execute massive attacks against opponents. PERFORM​ ​BATTLERITES ​​​ Gain​ ​strength​ ​and​ ​upgrade your abilities​ ​using​ ​rites.​ Select ​your​ ​rites​ ​to strategically​ ​customize​ ​your​ ​play​ ​style. ACCOUNT​ ​CUSTOMIZATION ​​ Show​ ​off​ ​your​ ​skills​ ​in​ ​style.​ ​From​ ​weapons​ and outfits ​to​ ​victory​ ​stances, there’s​ ​a​ ​huge​ ​variety​ ​of​ ​cosmetic​ ​customizations​ ​to​ ​make​ ​you​ ​stand​ ​out​ ​from​ ​the​ ​crowd.

Name: AMID EVIL
Description:
The producers of DUSK and the creators of Return of the Triad invite you to embark upon an UNREAL new FPS adventure: SEVEN distinct episodes each featuring a completely different setting and enemies LUDICROUS magical weaponry that can be overcharged with the souls of the dead ENDLESS Hordes of Evil to hone your skills against BRUTAL and adaptive enemy AI that will hunt you down on land, sea and air SPRAWLING non-linear levels filled with secrets and ancient lore MULTITUDES of in-game options + cheat codes for a truly golden PC age experience EPIC original & dynamic soundtrack composed by Andrew Hulshult BUILT in Unreal Engine 4 for cutting edge visuals (even if they are a bit retro) NOW with support for Ray Tracing and DLSS 2.0

Name: Devil Daggers
Description:
Inspired by 1990s FPS and arcade games, Devil Daggers is a fast-paced shooter that places you in an abyssal arena to face endless legions of demons. Armed with versatile magic daggers and a fluid movement system, fight to survive as long as you can. Compete for precious seconds with Steam Friends or on global leaderboards.Your spirit and skill will be tested. Gameplay Features: Face 13 horrifying enemies. Harvest demonic crystals to increase the power of your magic daggers. Learn from the world's best or watch friends with the leaderboard replay system. Versatile magic daggers, can be used as a shot attack or rapid fire. Survive long enough to earn powerful magical homing daggers. Fluid movment allows for circle strafing, bunny hopping and dagger jumps. Advanced movement techniques allow for speed boosts and double jumps. Engine Features: Custom built engine, hand crafted art and sound. 1990s software-style rendering with unfiltered textures and polygon jitter. HDR 3d positional audio. Optional HRTF binaural audio. 3d particle physics system with procedural decal effects. Supports hundreds of flocking enemies that all avoid each other.

Name: Unreal Tournament 3 Black
Description:
Now includes the free Titan Pack expansion! The Titan Pack gives players a substantial amount of enhanced features and new content, including many original environments, new gametypes, the namesake Titan mutator, powerful deployables and weapons, new characters, and the Stealthbender vehicle. Also included are sweeping enhancements to AI, networking performance, UI usability and mod support, plus the addition of 57 Steam Achievements to make the UT3 experience even more satisfying. The Titan Pack also brings client-side demo recording, major Server Browser enhancements, a new maplist system, plus mid-game mutator and gametype voting functionality to the PC. Titan Pack includes: 16 environments  four Warfare, three vCTF, six Deathmatch, and three CTF maps  that are new to the PC and PS3 versions Three bonus pack maps, CTF-Face, CTF-Searchlight and DM-Morbias The namesake Titan mutator, which lets players overwhelm opponents as a 15 foot tall titan, or crush them as a 30 foot tall Behemoth Greed and Betrayal, two gametypes that breed new-found fervor throughout the competitive UT3 arena Two powerful weapons, the Stinger Turret and Eradicator Cannon artillery Two valuable deployables, the X-Ray Field and Link Station The Slow Field power-up, a portable version of the Slow Field deployable Stealthbender, a new vehicle that carries two spidermine trap deployables, one EMP mine, and one each of the new Link Station and X-Ray Field deployables Two new characters, Nova and Kana 57 awards attainable as Steam Achievements Significant AI enhancements, especially in vehicle gametypes; networking performance upgrades; greatly improved menu flow and UI usability; better mod support Client-side demo recording, highly improved Server Browser, a new maplist system, plus mid-game mutator and gametype voting functionality for PC   About Unreal Tournament 3 Unreal Tournament 3 marks the return of the world's premiere first-person shooter. Unreal Tournament 3 unleashes the full power of Unreal Engine 3, taking graphics, gameplay, and challenge to a whole new level. Players engage in intense battles with other human players online, or against Unreal artificial intelligence that sets the industry standard. With the most powerful futuristic weapons and vehicles available, this is FPS action at its best! Unparalleled graphical and physical realism from the award-winning Unreal Engine 3 technology delivers the most compelling first-person shooter experience to date...online and offline! Vast arsenal of weapons - Unreal Tournament has always been known for brutal weaponry, and now the arsenal is even bigger and badder. Detonate your opponent from a distance with the ever popular Shock Rifle or blast away at close range with the Flak Cannon. Over two dozen weapons and vehicles have been upgraded and enhanced for maximum killing potential. New single player campaign! This is Unreal Tournament like you've never seen it before! The Necris invasion has begun, and your clan was one of the first to be slaughtered. Head to the front lines and join this Epic battle to defend humanity while taking your revenge. New and favorite characters - Fight side-by-side with or compete against new and returning characters from the Unreal universe, all with enhanced abilities, extremely detailed designs, and distinct personalities. Enhanced popular game types , including Deathmatch, Team Deathmatch, Capture the Flag, and all-new Warfare mode and more. Online innovations - Unreal Tournament 3 brings back all the award-winning online features of previous Unreal Tournament games, plus seamless loading on servers, improved matchmaking, and co-operative campaign play online. PC version bundled with the award-winning Unreal Engine 3 Toolset - Build your own levels, game types, and more, or download the latest mods from the massive Unreal community.

Name: Monolith
Description:
Descending in the darkness of a long-abandoned facility, a lone ship searches for wealth, power and the scattered pieces of the past. ______________________________________________________________________________ Monolith is a top down action shooter with procedurally generated elements. Explore a progression of floors as you make your way into the depths of the facility, encountering increasingly deadly enemies, fantastic weapons, upgrades, choices and revelations as you venture deeper towards a great and calamitous power. Features: Smooth, gracious, fast action gameplay, tailored to feel good to play. 7 different types of weapons with over 40 unique modifiers and a ludicrous number of combinations. A number of floors with their own layouts, traps and enemies. Intricate and energetic chiptune soundtrack to complement the beat of the action. External Links Twitter: Official Discord Channel: Speedrun Archive:

Monday Night Combat offers a unique take on the shooter genre, transforming combat into a thrilling televised sport that merges intense third-person action with engaging game show elements. The game's central motivation revolves around accumulating cash, fame, and endorsements, shifting the focus away from traditional, abstract objectives.

The recent "Throwback Throwdown" update significantly expands the Crossfire mode by introducing Uncle Tully’s Funland. Within this vibrant new arena, players will encounter the character Chickey Cantor. As noted in the game's developer notes, shooting Chickey provides a temporary team buff. Furthermore, grappling Chickey after he lands offers a lucrative, albeit risky, ride, making the rider a prime target for opponents.

To enhance gameplay variety, new bot spawners have been integrated, allowing for the deployment of diverse robot types, including the formidable Jackbots and Black Jacks. The Co-op Blitz mode presents a compelling challenge where players must defend their Money Ball against relentless robot armies, playable solo or with a team of up to four players. According to game design principles, earned money within Blitz can be strategically invested in building turrets, upgrading character classes, or activating environmental traps. The challenges in Blitz range from a ten-round Exhibition Blitz to the ultimate test of endurance in endless waves of Super Sudden Death Blitz.

A core aspect of Monday Night Combat is its persistent progression system. Money earned through various challenges contributes to a player's Lifetime Earnings. This cumulative wealth is instrumental in unlocking over 370 unique ProTags and enables the creation of custom classes, as detailed in player guides. In the competitive Crossfire mode, teams engage in direct conflict, bolstered by a constant stream of incoming robots. Overwhelming opposing teams, strategically upgrading Pros, and reinforcing defensive positions are crucial elements for achieving victory.

Each Pro character is designed with a distinct playstyle, featuring upgradeable skills that can be further refined through unlockable items. As observed in player data, Monday Night Combat meticulously tracks persistent statistics, awarding money that accumulates towards Lifetime Earnings. This system is key for unlocking custom classes and ProTags, and it also dictates a player's overall level. For an optimized multiplayer experience, the game supports dedicated servers.

## Monday Night Combat: The Future of Lethal Entertainment

Monday Night Combat isn't just a game; it's the **most popular lethal sport of the future!** This class-based, third-person shooter masterfully blends intense combat, brutal finishing moves, and thrilling gameshow-style challenges. Forget honor or duty – in Monday Night Combat, you fight for the **real American dream: cash, fame, and endorsements.**

### The Throwback Throwdown: Uncle Tully's Funland Arrives

Get ready for a **Throwback Throwdown** as Uncle Tully's Funland is now available in Crossfire mode, bringing exciting new gameplay features.

#### Meet Chickey Cantor

First up is **Chickey Cantor**, who will now spawn in Uncle Tully's Funland.

*   **Make Chickey Fly:** Shoot Chickey to make him fly away, earning your entire team a **big single-life buff.**
*   **Grapple and Ride:** Wait for Chickey to slam the ground, then grapple him. Ride him for eight seconds to earn **big money!** Be warned, however, as riders become **easy targets for enemy Pros.**

#### New Bot Spawners

We're also introducing **new bot spawners** equipped with buttons to specifically spawn Jackbots, Black Jacks, Slims, Scramblers, Gremlins, Gapshots, and Bouncers.

### Co-op Blitz: Defend Your Money Ball

Dive into **Co-op Blitz mode**, where you can defend your Money Ball against relentless robot armies solo or with up to four players over Steam.

*   **Strategic Defense:** During Blitz challenges, spend your hard-earned money to build **defensive turrets** around the Moneyball, upgrade one of six unique character classes, or trigger **robot-crushing environmental hazards.**
*   **Varied Challenges:** Face challenges ranging from a ten-round Exhibition Blitz to endless robot waves of ever-increasing difficulty in Super Sudden Death Blitz.

### Persistent Progression and Customization

Money earned from each Challenge contributes to your **persistent Lifetime Earnings**. This allows you to unlock over 370 **ProTags**, create custom classes, and climb the Leaderboards.

#### Competitive Crossfire Mode

In **Crossfire mode**, teams of players battle it out over Steam. Each team is supported by an endless stream of robots fighting on their behalf. Success hinges on **overwhelming your opponent's stream, upgrading your Pros, and fortifying your base defenses.**

#### Customizable Characters

Each Pro is designed for a **unique playstyle** and comes with their own set of upgradeable skills. Further customize these skills and abilities with a variety of unlockable products through the **Custom Class feature.**

### Unlockables and Statistics

Every game of Monday Night Combat earns you money that contributes to your **Lifetime Earnings**. This can be spent on unlocking custom classes and purchasing earned ProTags. Your **Lifetime Earnings also determine your player level.** Monday Night Combat meticulously tracks a **large set of persistent statistics** for all aspects of gameplay. The game features over 370 **‘ProTags’** – customizable tags to showcase your achievements to other players and friends.

### Dedicated Servers

Monday Night Combat supports **dedicated servers**, allowing for multiple instances of the game to run with a full standalone client.

Name: Thief™ Gold
Description:
Stalk your prey on the quest for stolen goods with your blackjack, sword, and an assortment of unique arrows. Steal for money and uncover the hidden agendas of your allies and enemies as you play through an unravelling story of deception and revenge. Survive in a world where shadows are your only ally, trust is not an option, and confrontation results in death! Key Features: Pioneering stealth based gameplay brings a new dimension to first person action. Thief™ Gold includes Thief™ The Dark Project (12 huge missions with multiple environments) and the Gold update (3 new campaign missions which deepen the plot and add five new types of enemies) Advanced enemies can see, hear, speak, and sound alarms. Your arsenal includes: blackjack, sword, fire arrows, water arrows, rope arrows and more

In 2008, the world grapples with a new form of conflict: information warfare. This era is marked by widespread blackouts, stock market sabotage, and the electronic hijacking of national defense systems. To counter these growing dangers, elite operatives must venture deep into enemy territory, gathering vital intelligence closer than ever to enemy forces. You assume the role of Sam Fisher, the NSA's top black-ops agent, tasked with navigating this perilous environment.

To succeed, you will use a variety of lethal and stealthy methods. This includes close-quarters combat, employing your combat knife, and wielding the prototype Land Warrior rifle. You will also master advanced takedown techniques, such as the inverted neck break, to neutralize threats effectively. Beyond solo missions, the game features cooperative multiplayer infiltration, where teamwork is your strongest asset. As enemy capabilities advance, so must your strategies and skills.

The game offers several key features:

*   **Deadly Agility:** Experience a comprehensive and fluid range of moves, including athletic maneuvers, stealthy approaches, and silent takedowns.
*   **Real Weapons of Tomorrow:** Utilize a vast arsenal of weapons and gadgets, from your reliable knife to the experimental Land Warrior System.
*   **As Good as Real:** Witness impressive graphics technology, providing exceptional visuals. An advanced physics engine drives realistic ragdoll effects, particle systems, and environmental interaction.
*   **Ultimate Challenge:** Face intelligent AI with unique traits and natural behaviors. NPCs are aware of their surroundings and remember past events, leading to dynamic encounters.
*   **Amazing Replayability:** Explore open-ended level designs with multiple paths and optional objectives, offering a fresh experience each time.
*   **Co-op Stealth:** Team up with friends for cooperative infiltration missions.

Please note that as of August 2016, the online features for *Tom Clancy's Splinter Cell Chaos Theory®* are no longer supported. Consequently, Multiplayer and Co-op modes are inaccessible.

## METAL GEAR SOLID V: THE PHANTOM PAIN - Redefining Tactical Espionage

**METAL GEAR SOLID V: THE PHANTOM PAIN** ushers in a new era for tactical espionage games, according to its creators at Konami Digital Entertainment. This installment, built on the powerful Fox Engine, provides players with remarkable freedom within its expansive open-world settings. The narrative is set in 1984, a decade after the devastating events of MGSV: GROUND ZEROES and the subsequent destruction of Mother Base. Players assume the role of Snake, also known as Big Boss, who emerges from a nine-year coma into a world still embroiled in the Cold War and the looming threat of nuclear conflict. Fueled by a desire for retribution, Snake embarks on a mission to establish a new mercenary force and dismantle the clandestine organization known as XOF.

The METAL GEAR SOLID series is celebrated for its engagement with complex and mature themes, a tradition that **The Phantom Pain** upholds. Game critics have noted that the title explores the psychological impact of warfare, examining its profound effects on individuals ensnared by its relentless cycle. This narrative richness, as highlighted in many reviews, reinforces the series' standing as a vanguard in the gaming industry. MGSV: The Phantom Pain is poised to make a significant impact on the industry, blending groundbreaking open-world gameplay, striking visuals, and deeply engaging mechanics for a truly immersive experience. Players can anticipate a captivating story, thoughtful examinations of the human cost of conflict, and unparalleled freedom in mission approaches, fostering a wide array of strategic decisions.

Key features of **MGSV: The Phantom Pain** include its vast open-world environment, which offers complete autonomy in mission planning and execution, thereby enhancing replayability. The Fox Engine's prowess is evident in its lifelike graphics, setting new visual benchmarks. Its intricate game design, as observed by players, fosters deeper immersion, contributing to its high caliber. Furthermore, enhanced online functionalities are expected to improve overall accessibility and usability across various platforms, leading to a more interconnected and engaging gaming experience.

Name: Tom Clancy's Splinter Cell®
Description:
Infiltrate terrorists' positions, acquire critical intelligence by any means necessary, execute with extreme prejudice, and exit without a trace! You are Sam Fisher, a highly trained secret operative of the NSA's secret arm: Third Echelon. The world balance is in your hands, as cyber terrorism and international tensions are about to explode into WWIII. Go Behind the Headlines into the Real World of Modern Espionage - Enter the realistic Tom Clancy universe. Suit up with the latest classified field operative gear and weapons. A New Level of Stealth Action - All the best stealth action plus all new moves. Highly interactive environments giving players more gameplay options and the ability to strategize their actions. Deep Environments. Unparalleled Immersion - Stunning environments driven by the Unreal™ engine. Dynamic lighting and sound effects that match reality. Pulse-Pounding Action on a Global Scale - Over 20 Hours of stealth action. Diverse mission objectives that can be achieved by different means for increased replay value.

Name: Batman: Arkham Asylum Game of the Year Edition
Description:
Critically acclaimed Batman: Arkham Asylum returns with a remastered Game of the Year Edition, featuring 4 extra Challenge Maps. The additional Challenge Maps are Crime Alley; Scarecrow Nightmare; Totally Insane and Nocturnal Hunter (both from the Insane Night Map Pack). Utilize the unique FreeFlow™ combat system to chain together unlimited combos seamlessly and battle with huge groups of The Joker’s henchmen in brutal melee brawls Investigate as Batman, the WORLD’S GREATEST DETECTIVE, by solving intricate puzzles with the help of cutting edge forensic tools including x-ray scanning, fingerprint scans, ‘Amido Black’ spray and a pheromone tracker Face off against Gotham’s greatest villains including The Joker, HARLEY QUINN, POISON IVY and KILLER CROC Become the Invisible Predator™ with Batman’s fear takedowns and unique vantage point system to move without being seen and hunt enemies Choose multiple takedown methods, including swooping from the sky and smashing through walls. Explore every inch of Arkham Asylum and roam freely on the infamous island, presented for the first time ever in its gritty and realistic entirety Experience what it’s like to be BATMAN using BATARANGS, explosive gel aerosol, The Batclaw, sonar resonator and the line launcher Unlock more secrets by completing hidden challenges in the world and develop and customize equipment by earning experience points Enjoy complete superhero freedom in the environment with the use of Batman’s grapnel gun to get to any place you can see, jump from any height and glide in any direction

## Dishonored: A Supernatural Assassin's Quest for Revenge

Dishonored is a first-person action game where players embody a supernatural assassin seeking revenge. The gameplay emphasizes a flexible combat system, allowing for creative target elimination using supernatural powers, weapons, and gadgets. As noted by the game's developers, player choices significantly influence mission outcomes, providing distinct paths for stealth or direct confrontation.

The story is set in Dunwall, a bleak, industrial whaling city where steampunk technology and arcane forces coexist. Falsely accused of murdering the Empress, the player character transforms into a feared, masked assassin. Dunwall is depicted as a city suffering from illness and ruled by a corrupt regime, according to in-game lore. While dark powers grant supernatural abilities, this power comes with a price, and the truth behind the player's betrayal remains hidden, leaving their former life in ruins.

Key aspects of Dishonored highlight player freedom and inventive problem-solving. The game encourages improvisation and creativity in approaching each assassination, supporting varied playstyles. This can involve using shadows and sound for stealthy maneuvers or confronting enemies with direct force. The adaptable combat system allows for unique combinations of skills, powers, and tools, fostering a personalized experience. Furthermore, the world of Dishonored reacts dynamically to player actions, whether they choose to move unseen and combat corruption or leave a trail of destruction. These decisions directly shape mission results, contributing to a replayable and deeply personal journey. Players can obtain potent supernatural abilities that affect both combat and stealth, such as teleportation for tactical movement, possession of creatures for reconnaissance, and the power to stop time for precise attack planning. The interaction between these abilities and weaponry offers numerous ways to overcome challenges, further enhanced by an upgrade system that allows for mastery of new powers and gadgets. The game's unique world, designed by Viktor Antonov, art director of Half-Life 2, presents a captivating steampunk city where industry and the supernatural intertwine, creating an engaging atmosphere.

Name: Batman: Arkham Asylum Game of the Year Edition
Description:
Critically acclaimed Batman: Arkham Asylum returns with a remastered Game of the Year Edition, featuring 4 extra Challenge Maps. The additional Challenge Maps are Crime Alley; Scarecrow Nightmare; Totally Insane and Nocturnal Hunter (both from the Insane Night Map Pack). Utilize the unique FreeFlow™ combat system to chain together unlimited combos seamlessly and battle with huge groups of The Joker’s henchmen in brutal melee brawls Investigate as Batman, the WORLD’S GREATEST DETECTIVE, by solving intricate puzzles with the help of cutting edge forensic tools including x-ray scanning, fingerprint scans, ‘Amido Black’ spray and a pheromone tracker Face off against Gotham’s greatest villains including The Joker, HARLEY QUINN, POISON IVY and KILLER CROC Become the Invisible Predator™ with Batman’s fear takedowns and unique vantage point system to move without being seen and hunt enemies Choose multiple takedown methods, including swooping from the sky and smashing through walls. Explore every inch of Arkham Asylum and roam freely on the infamous island, presented for the first time ever in its gritty and realistic entirety Experience what it’s like to be BATMAN using BATARANGS, explosive gel aerosol, The Batclaw, sonar resonator and the line launcher Unlock more secrets by completing hidden challenges in the world and develop and customize equipment by earning experience points Enjoy complete superhero freedom in the environment with the use of Batman’s grapnel gun to get to any place you can see, jump from any height and glide in any direction

**Batman: Arkham City - Game of the Year Edition: An Expanded Gotham Experience**

For fans eager to delve deeper into the gritty world of Gotham City, the **Batman: Arkham City - Game of the Year Edition** presents an unparalleled opportunity. This critically acclaimed title significantly expands upon the immersive atmosphere established in its predecessor, *Batman: Arkham Asylum*, offering players a vastly larger and more intricate playground. According to Rocksteady Studios, the developers, Arkham City itself is an astonishing five times the size of the original game's world. This sprawling metropolis has been transformed into a maximum-security sanctuary, a walled-off district housing Gotham's most notorious criminals.

Within this expansive urban environment, players once again assume the mantle of the Caped Crusader, experiencing firsthand the visceral thrill of delivering justice to the city's most dangerous inhabitants. The game is renowned for its impressive roster of iconic villains, a collection that ensures a constant and formidable challenge for Batman. These adversaries include:

*   Catwoman
*   The Joker
*   The Riddler
*   Two-Face
*   Harley Quinn
*   The Penguin
*   Mr. Freeze

And a host of other formidable foes, guaranteeing a dynamic and engaging experience.

The **Game of the Year Edition** elevates the original experience by bundling a wealth of previously released downloadable content (DLC). This comprehensive package ensures players have access to a substantial amount of new gameplay and cosmetic additions. The included content comprises:

*   **Downloadable Content Packs:**
    *   Catwoman Pack
    *   Nightwing Bundle Pack
    *   Robin Bundle Pack
    *   Harley Quinn’s Revenge
    *   Challenge Map Pack
    *   Arkham City Skins Pack

This edition provides substantial new gameplay content, featuring a variety of exciting additions:

*   **Seven New Maps:** These maps offer fresh environments for players to test their skills, including:
    *   Wayne Manor
    *   Main Hall
    *   Freight Train
    *   Black Mask
    *   The Joker's Carnival
    *   Iceberg Lounge
    *   Batcave
*   **Three Playable Characters:** Players can step into the shoes of additional iconic characters beyond Batman:
    *   Catwoman
    *   Robin
    *   Nightwing
*   **Twelve Unlockable Skins:** A diverse collection of skins allows for extensive customization of Batman and his allies, including:
    *   1970s Batsuit
    *   Year One Batman
    *   The Dark Knight Returns
    *   Earth One Batman
    *   Batman Beyond
    *   Animated Batman
    *   Sinestro Corps Batman
    *   Long Halloween Catwoman
    *   Animated Catwoman
    *   Animated Robin
    *   Red Robin
    *   Animated Nightwing

This comprehensive collection offers an unparalleled opportunity to explore Gotham's underbelly and embody the Dark Knight in what is widely considered his most expansive and definitive adventure to date.

**Deus Ex: Human Revolution - Director's Cut: Augmentations and Conspiracy**

**Deus Ex: Human Revolution - Director's Cut** plunges players into a near-future where human augmentation is a major force. You play as Adam Jensen, a former SWAT officer now leading security for a major biotech firm. A violent attack draws him into a complex corporate intrigue and a vast conspiracy, changing his life and hinting at major societal shifts.

The game shows a society on the edge of change, driven by fast tech progress, especially in human augmentation. This has created a clear social split. On one side are the "Augmented Elite," those who can afford advanced mechanical upgrades. On the other are the "Disenfranchised Masses," unable to access these new technologies. Behind the scenes, hidden forces are guiding humanity's path toward a significant "human revolution." This social division is a central theme, according to the game's story.

Gameplay in **Deus Ex: Human Revolution - Director's Cut** mixes action and role-playing. Players can face challenges head-on with various augmentations and weapon upgrades. The game supports different playstyles, letting players gain new skills and improve areas like stealth, social interaction, hacking, and combat. Jensen's growth depends on the player's choices. A key part of the **Director's Cut** is player choice and its consequences. The game offers many ways to handle situations, with player decisions greatly affecting the story. This is clear in the expanded story, which includes content from "The Missing Link" and "Tongs Mission." The creators aimed for a world that felt both futuristic and familiar. The **Director's Cut** also adds replay value with new boss fight strategies and a **Newgame+ feature**, letting players restart with all their augmentations. Developer commentaries are available in English, and the original "Making of" video offers insights into the game's creation, as shared by the development team.

Crysis is a first-person shooter where players must adapt to survive in a changing world. The game takes you through diverse battlefields, from jungles to alien worlds. This shifting environment demands flexible tactics and constant reassessment of strategies.

The Nanosuit is central to gameplay, offering real-time augmented abilities. Players can enhance speed, strength, armor, and cloaking. This allows for creative and tactical approaches to combat, with many ways to engage enemies and solve problems.

Crysis features a wide range of modular weapons, giving players control over their combat style. You can use experimental weapons, alien technology, and custom ammunition, like incendiary rounds or specialized tactical munitions. The game's design stresses strategic thinking, with lifelike enemy AI that challenges players to assess situations and plan ahead. This intelligent opposition, as noted by developers, makes for a more engaging experience.

The game includes unique zero-gravity sections where players face aliens in altered physics. Fighting in zero-G requires mastering new movement and accounting for factors like weapon recoil. Visually, Crysis was a landmark title, using CryENGINE 2™. Its graphics were state-of-the-art, with DirectX 10 support and scalable options for various hardware. The game's open, physical world enhances player agency, allowing diverse approaches to missions. Players can destroy obstacles, use vehicles, and leverage the environment as a weapon.

## Slay the Princess: A Twisted Fairy Tale Adventure

In *Slay the Princess*, you are thrust into a dark fairy tale where your mission is to slay a Princess hidden in a secluded forest cabin's basement. Failure means the end of the world. This formidable Princess will use every trick to stop you, from beguiling offers to outright deception. Succumbing to her manipulations will lead to your repeated demise. The fate of humanity rests on your shoulders, demanding unwavering resolve.

This game subverts traditional fairy tale narratives. Instead of a damsel in distress, you must eliminate a human Princess. While death is frequent, the developers emphasize that she can be vanquished with determination. They strongly advise against attempting to romance her, as this leads to unfavorable outcomes. Vigilance and focus on your objective are crucial.

*Slay the Princess* is a choice-driven psychological horror visual novel. It features full voice acting by Jonathan Sims and Nichole Goodnight, and all art is hand-drawn by Abby Howard.
