The narrative branches based on your dialogue choices and beliefs, offering a personalized adventure. Unlike some games, *Slay the Princess* features a strictly linear timeline with no time loops. This innovative roleplaying experience from the creators of *Scarlet Hollow* blends dramatic choices, psychological tension, and distinctive artistry for a memorable and challenging encounter.

Name: Return to Castle Wolfenstein
Description:
World War II rages and nations fall. SS head Himmler has Hitler's full backing to twist science and the occult into an army capable of annihilating the Allies once and for all. Battling alone, you're on an intense mission to pierce the black heart of the Third Reich and stop Himmler -- or die trying. Fighting in advanced team-based multiplayer mode, you'll wage your own WWII in an all-out Axis vs. Allies contest for frontline domination. Powered by the Quake III Arena engine, the Wolfenstein universe explodes with the kind of epic environments, A.I., firepower and cinematic effects that only a game created by true masters can deliver. The dark reich's closing in. The time to act is now. Evil prevails when good men do nothing. Epic Environments Intense Story-Driven Action Ferocious A.I. Big Screen Cinematic Effects Team-Based Multiplayer Action

Name: Unavowed
Description:
A demon possessed you one year ago. Since that day, you unwillingly tore a trail of bloodshed through New York City. Your salvation comes in the form of the Unavowed – an ancient society dedicated to stopping evil. You are free, but your world is in tatters. You have no home, no friends, and are wanted by the police. Your old life is gone, but perhaps you can start a new one. Join the ranks of the Unavowed, and fight against the oncoming darkness. Features: Choose a male or female protagonist Three playable origin stories Branching storyline A total of four companion characters to choose from, each with their own talents and abilities. Twice the resolution of a typical Wadjet Eye Game! All the usual guff – voice acting, commentary, original music, etc

Step into the shoes of a supernatural assassin once more in Dishonored 2, a critically acclaimed title that has garnered widespread praise. Critics lauded the game, with PC Gamer calling it "brilliant," IGN describing it as "amazing" and "a superb sequel," and Eurogamer declaring it a "masterpiece." Game Informer hailed it as "a must-play revenge tale among the best in its class." This highly anticipated follow-up to Arkane Studio's award-winning first-person action blockbuster, Dishonored, invites players to forge their own path through a richly imagined world where mysticism and industry collide.

Dishonored 2 offers unparalleled freedom in how you approach its challenges. You can choose to play as Empress Emily Kaldwin or the royal protector, Corvo Attano, each with their own unique perspectives and abilities. Will you move through the game unseen, master its brutal combat system, or employ a combination of both? The narrative dynamically responds to your choices, leading to intriguing outcomes across meticulously crafted missions.

Set 15 years after the Lord Regent's downfall, Dishonored 2 plunges players into a world where an otherworldly usurper has seized Empress Emily Kaldwin’s throne, threatening the fate of the Isles. As either Emily or Corvo, journey from the familiar streets of Dunwall to Karnaca, a once-dazzling coastal city that holds the key to restoring Emily to power. Armed with the Mark of the Outsider and potent new abilities, you will track down your enemies and reclaim what is rightfully yours.

Key features include fully voiced protagonists, Emily Kaldwin and Corvo Attano, each offering unique perspectives and emotional responses. Players can creatively utilize each character's distinct powers, gadgets, and weapons, whether engaging in direct combat or employing stealth. Advanced bonecharm crafting and new upgrade trees allow for extensive power customization. According to Arkane Studios, players can become a living shadow, link enemies for shared fates, or mesmerize foes, leading to near-infinite combinations of combat styles, powers, and weapons to achieve objectives.

The world of Dishonored 2 is brought to life by the new Void Engine, a rendering technology built on id Tech and heavily customized by Arkane Studios. This engine supports world-class art direction and leverages modern hardware for significant advancements in AI, lighting, graphical rendering, dense urban environments, and story presentation. The game's imaginative world spans from the grimy streets of Dunwall to the exotic coasts of a decaying Karnaca, featuring signature mission locations like the Dust District and a madman's mansion with shifting walls and clockwork soldiers.

Name: Control Ultimate Edition
Description:
Control Ultimate Edition Control Ultimate Edition contains the main game and all previously released Expansions ('The Foundation' and 'AWE') in one great value package. A corruptive presence has invaded the Federal Bureau of Control…Only you have the power to stop it. The world is now your weapon in an epic fight to annihilate an ominous enemy through deep and unpredictable environments. Containment has failed, humanity is at stake. Will you regain control? Winner of over 80 awards, Control is a visually stunning third-person action-adventure that will keep you on the edge of your seat. Blending open-ended environments with the signature world-building and storytelling of renowned developer, Remedy Entertainment, Control presents an expansive and intensely gratifying gameplay experience. Key features Uncover the mysteries Can you handle the bureau’s dark secrets? Unfold an epic supernatural struggle, filled with unexpected characters and bizarre events, as you search for your missing brother, and discover the truth that has brought you here. Everything is your weapon Unleash destruction through transforming weaponry and telekinetic powers. Discover new ways to annihilate your enemies as you harness powerful abilities to turn everything around you into a lethal weapon. Explore a hidden world Delve deep into the ominous expanses of a secretive government agency. Explore the Bureau’s shifting environments only to discover that there is always more than meets the eye… Fight for control Battle a relentless enemy through exciting missions and challenging boss fights to earn powerful upgrades that maximize abilities and customize your weaponry.

## Infernax: A Gory Quest to Save a Cursed Land

Infernax is a challenging action-adventure game where player decisions profoundly impact the fate of a land corrupted by dark magic. As a knight returning to a homeland overrun by bloodthirsty monsters, your mission is to find and destroy the source of this corruption. This perilous journey is characterized by difficult choices and brutal combat. The narrative unfolds in the cursed land of Upel, a place now teeming with unholy creatures, according to early impressions.

### Explore a Dangerous and Unique Open World

Infernax features a vast, perilous open world filled with secrets. Players will navigate treacherous terrains and confront a variety of dangerous beasts and unholy creatures. The game includes challenging castle-dungeons and numerous boss battles designed to test combat skills. Early impressions suggest the adventure is exceptionally gory, with visceral combat encounters. The world of Upel is designed to feel both expansive and dangerous, encouraging exploration while emphasizing the ever-present threat.

### Forge Your Path with Meaningful Decisions

Every choice in Infernax carries significant weight, leading to multiple endings based on player actions. The game allows players to choose between slaying enemies or offering them aid, a mechanic that significantly branches the narrative. Experience gained from defeating monsters can be invested to enhance life, mana, or damage output, allowing players to tailor their character to their preferred playstyle. A single decision can dramatically alter the course of the journey, with even minor deeds having lasting repercussions. This emphasis on player agency is a core tenet of the Infernax experience.

### Gear Up and Grow Stronger

To aid in reversing the curse plaguing the land, Infernax offers a robust level-up system. Players earn money by defeating monsters, which can be used to purchase new items and unlock essential skills. Visiting the blacksmith provides access to better weapons and armors, ensuring adequate preparation for escalating challenges. Choices can also unlock different side quests, offering opportunities to obtain powerful weapons, valuable skills, or additional funds. Ultimately, the responsibility to rid the land of Upel of its monstrous inhabitants falls upon the player, and the path to achieving this is entirely their own. The game's progression system is designed to reward strategic investment in character development.

**Alan Wake: A Deep Dive into a Psychological Thriller**

Alan Wake's story begins with a chilling mystery: the wife of the celebrated author, Alan Wake, disappears during their vacation. His frantic search uncovers pages from a thriller novel he doesn't remember writing. This discovery coincides with the appearance of a malevolent Dark Presence that terrorizes the remote town of Bright Falls. This entity relentlessly pushes Wake to the brink of madness, forcing him into a desperate fight to solve the cryptic plot and save his wife.

Presented in an episodic format, much like a television series, Alan Wake exemplifies Remedy's signature storytelling, blended with thrilling action. As players unravel the mystery, they face tough challenges, surprising plot twists, and suspenseful cliffhangers. Survival hinges on mastering the unique "Fight With Light" combat mechanic. This innovative approach, noted by game critics, merges the excitement of action games with the complex psychological depth of a thriller.

Industry analysis suggests that Alan Wake's captivating atmosphere, its rich and complex narrative, and its intensely suspenseful combat create a uniquely engaging experience. The PC version of Alan Wake introduces significant improvements, including the special episodes, "The Signal" and "The Writer." Players can now experience Alan Wake's Pacific Northwest setting with enhanced visuals and higher resolutions than the original Xbox 360 release. The PC port also offers extensive customization, such as fully adjustable mouse and keyboard controls, and seamless integration with Steam or Microsoft gamepads. A variety of graphics settings and support for different aspect ratios (4:3, 16:9, and 16:10) allow players to tailor their experience. The game features a multithreaded engine optimized for quad-core CPUs, along with popular additions like field of view adjustment and the option to "hide HUD." Furthermore, it supports AMD Eyefinity 3D for a three-screen setup, deepening player immersion.

## The Vanishing of Ethan Carter: An Immersive Mystery

**A Dual Experience Awaits**

Good news for players! Purchasing *The Vanishing of Ethan Carter* now grants you access to two distinct experiences: the original game and its enhanced Unreal Engine 4 remaster, *The Vanishing of Ethan Carter Redux*. Further details are available via a provided link.

### Unraveling the Mystery

*The Vanishing of Ethan Carter* is a first-person, story-driven mystery game that prioritizes exploration and discovery above all else. Combat and explosions are entirely absent, with the developers aiming for an experience that leaves a lasting, subtle impact.

Players step into the shoes of Paul Prospero, an occult-minded detective. Upon receiving a disturbing letter from Ethan Carter, Paul journeys to Ethan's home in Red Creek Valley, only to find the situation far more dire than anticipated. Ethan has vanished amidst a brutal murder, and Paul soon suspects this is not the only local tragedy to investigate.

### Inspired by Macabre Tales

Drawing inspiration from early twentieth-century weird fiction and other macabre tales, *The Vanishing of Ethan Carter* seeks to advance immersive storytelling in video games. While featuring a private detective and mental challenges, the game is not heavily puzzle-focused. Instead, the emphasis lies on atmosphere, mood, and the profound humanity of its characters.

### Your Role in the Investigation

The discoveries within Red Creek Valley will not unfold passively. Players must actively engage with the environment. By utilizing Paul's supernatural ability to communicate with the deceased and employing their own keen observation skills, players will uncover the truth behind a series of murders, the origins of a dark, ancient force within the valley, and the ultimate fate of the missing boy.

### Key Features

*   **Explore a Photorealistic World:** Traverse the beautiful yet ominous Red Creek Valley, brought to life with revolutionary photogrammetry technology for nearly photorealistic environments.
*   **Communicate with the Departed:** Interact with spirits to witness their final moments, gathering crucial clues to piece together Ethan's disappearance and his family's fate.
*   **Non-Linear Narrative:** Experience a story that blends the allure of pulp, private eye, and horror fiction, influenced by literary giants like Raymond Chandler, Algernon Blackwood, Stefan Grabinski, and H. P. Lovecraft.
*   **Investigate at Your Own Pace:** Conduct the investigation on your own terms and at your preferred speed.

While the game contains unsettling moments, it prioritizes a pervasive sense of unease over outright terror, ensuring players can navigate the mystery without undue distress.

Name: Creaks
Description:
Meet Your New Neighbours The ground starts shaking, light bulbs are breaking - and something rather unusual is happening right behind the walls of your very room. Equipped with nothing but wit and courage, you slowly descend into a world inhabited by avian folk and seemingly deadly furniture monsters. From the creators of indie classics Machinarium and Samorost comes Creaks, an immersive puzzle game that delights the senses with its hand-painted visuals, precise animation, eerie sounds, and an eclectic original score from Hidden Orchestra. Proceed at your own pace at figuring out the solutions to dozens of carefully designed puzzles, explore the mansion for hidden paintings and uncover the great secret. Creaks is best enjoyed with a controller and a good pair of headphones.

Name: Ghost Master®
Description:
Grim spectres, howling banshees, and sly gremlins are yours to command as you unleash ghastly spirits on the town of Gravenville and scare the wits out of its citizens. In the world of the Ghost Master, spooks do your bidding, as you solve puzzles and unlock mysteries in a challenge that combines the best of strategy, adventure, and resource management games. Up to 15 unique, hair-raising adventures with multi-branching scenarios - all within a coherent plot and complete virtual world. Spook's-eye view - an innovative 3-D camera lets you view the action from the perspective of humans or ghosts. Revolutionary special effects, incredibly detailed characters, and macabre settings inspired by classic horror films. Groundbreaking artificial intelligence-interact with up to 30 AI-driven characters at every level. Eleven expansive and distinctive locations, including the town's lunatic asylum, military base, sorority and frat houses, and police station. Ghost Master © 2003 Empire Interactive Europe Ltd. Developed by Sick Puppies, a studio of Empire Interactive. Europe Ltd. Ghost Master, Empire and 'E' are trademarks or registered trademarks of Empire Interactive. Europe Ltd. in the UK, Europe and/or other countries. All rights reserved.

Name: Deus Ex: Human Revolution - Director's Cut
Description:
You play Adam Jensen, an ex-SWAT specialist who's been handpicked to oversee the defensive needs of one of America's most experimental biotechnology firms. Your job is to safeguard company secrets, but when a black ops team breaks in and kills the very scientists you were hired to protect, everything you thought you knew about your job changes. Key Features: A divided near-future: discover a time of great technological advancement, but also a time of chaos and conspiracy. Mechanical augmentations of the human body have divided society between those who can afford them, and those who can’t. Opposing forces conspire from the shadow to control the destiny of mankind: a human revolution is coming. A perfect mix of action and role-play: the game uniquely combines action-packed close-quarters takedowns with intense shooting, offering a vast array of character augmentations and upgrades for the many weapons at your disposal. Unlock new abilities and increase your stealth, social, hacking or combat skills: the game rewards all styles of play and approaches. Determine how you want your character to evolve, based on how you want to play the game. Choices and consequences: shoot your way through the enemies, sneak up behind them without being traced, hack systems to retrieve crucial information, or use your social skills to extract information from key characters – there are always choices, multiple approaches, multiple paths and multiple tools at your disposal. Choose your playing style and face the consequences of your actions: you decide how the story unfolds in his enhanced storyline featuring the full integration of 'The Missing Link' and 'Tongs Mission'. Find more ways to defeat the new and improved Boss Fights, use the Newgame+ feature to replay the story with your previously acquired augmentations. Learn more about the game with the developers commentaries in ENGLISH ONLY and the original 'Making of'video.

Name: Deus Ex: Mankind Divided
Description:
The year is 2029, and mechanically augmented humans have now been deemed outcasts, living a life of complete and total segregation from the rest of society. Now an experienced covert operative, Adam Jensen is forced to operate in a world that has grown to despise his kind. Armed with a new arsenal of state-of-the-art weapons and augmentations, he must choose the right approach, along with who to trust, in order to unravel a vast worldwide conspiracy. Buy Deus Ex: Mankind Divided now and receive the following bonus content FREE: “Desperate Measures” extra in-game mission Covert Agent Pack (Intruder Gear, Enforcer Gear and Classic Gear + 1 Praxis Kit + 1000 Credits)

**Ashes of the Singularity: Escalation - Command Your Galactic Empire**

The technological singularity has opened the galaxy to humanity. Players command vast armies across planets, building an empire. But a new enemy threatens this hard-won control.

### The Substrate: A Galactic Menace

The Substrate seeks to destroy humanity. As a leader in the Post-Human Coalition, you must fight this threat. Rogue human factions also complicate the struggle, each claiming planets for themselves.

### Core Gameplay Elements

*   **Choose Your Side:** Play as the Post-Human Coalition or the Substrate. This choice defines your strategy.
*   **Massive Scale:** The Nitrous engine allows for huge maps and battles with thousands of units. Experience true large-scale real-time strategy.
*   **Multiple Ways to Play:**
    *   **Multiplayer:** Compete online in ranked or unranked matches.
    *   **Single Player:** Engage a smart AI in skirmishes or campaigns.
*   **Deep Strategy:** Success requires smart choices in:
    *   Researching technologies.
    *   Deploying armies on varied terrain.
    *   Managing your economy.
    *   Building effective unit forces.

The galactic war has escalated. Choose your side and fight for control. This massive RTS demands tactical skill and quick decisions.

Name: Deus Ex: Invisible War
Description:
Approximately 20 years after the events depicted in Deus Ex, The World is only beginning to recover from a Catastrophic worldwide depression. In the Chaotic period of recovery, several religious and political factions see an opportunity to re-shape a worldwide government to their agendas, understanding that the right moves now could determine the shape of human society for decades  even centuries  to come. In this techno-nightmare, take part in the dark struggle to raise the world from its own ashes. Dynamic and innovative 1st person-action/adventure brings a level of reality unprecedented in a videogame. Biotech modifications allow players to see through walls, leap 40 feet into the air, regenerate critical body damage or render yourself radar invisible. Globe-hop to real world locations such as Seattle, Antarctica, and Cairo. Cunning stealth gameplay, with darkness and sound affecting enemy awareness. Variable gameplay offers multiple solutions to problems and support for varying stylistic approaches. Non-lethal, non-violent resolution to conflict, allowing players to make ethical statements through their actions. The player's progress through the game is supported by an unprecedented freedom of action by a dynamic, non-linear story with responsive plot branches.

Name: SUPERHOT: MIND CONTROL DELETE
Description:
MIND CONTROL DELETE is █ first person shooter where time m░ves only w▒en you move. No regen▒rati░g he▀lth bars. No conv▒nie▄tly pla▒ed am▄o dr▄p█▒■ YOU SHOULDN’T BE HERE. YOU HAVE ALREADY WON. BUT THERE IS MORE. The long-awaited third game in the groundbreaking SUPERHOT franchise - MIND CONTROL DELETE gives you more insight into the world of SUPERHOT, more story, more weapons, more enemies, more purpose, more signature gameplay. Time only moves when you do. Keep dancing the slow-motion ballet of destruction for so much longer than ever before. Built on the foundations of smash-hit SUPERHOT and the best-selling SUPERHOT VR , MIND CONTROL DELETE delivers more of SUPERHOT’s signature power fantasy. Amass an arsenal of new skills and new weapons. New enemies pour in from every direction. You are in complete control as you shoot, slice, and explode your way through dozens and dozens of increasingly challenging and varied combat encounters. The closer you get to the core, the more powerful you become. Unlock new skills. Uncover snippets of precious knowledge - of the meaning that you crave so much. You begin to believe. MIND CONTROL DELETE Features: More gameplay. MCD is much bigger and longer than its predecessors. Become immersed in the SUPERHOT universe for increased understanding and extraordinary slow motion combat. More mechanics at your disposal. Experiment with new play styles, new weapons, different character builds and fresh tactics to outsmart and dominate your enemies. More bosses, enemies and characters to control. Test your arsenal of tricks and weapons against increasingly deadlier, smarter foes. More progression and power to accumulate. Amass skills, hacks and special techniques to conquer ever more dangerous enemies. More polish applied over nearly four years of Early Access development. MCD offers a more refined, sharper, flashier experience than any SUPERHOT so far. More story. More lore. More meaning? You shoot and slice. You move forward. You repeat. You repeat. You repeat. It becomes a ritual. It starts to mean something again. You take a moment to consider. You’ve been here before. So many times. Maybe this time it will actually mean something. Everything explodes into action. You hope this time will be different. Is this VR? Will this be VR? MCD is a regular, non-VR title. It’s designed for conventional screens and longer play sessions. If you played and enjoyed SUPERHOT VR, you’ll have a blast playing the original SUPERHOT and MCD as well SUPERHOT: MIND CONTROL DELETE started out life in Early Access. With many thanks to our wonderful players, Kickstarter Backers, and Early Access community, we couldn’t have done this without you, Thank you, SUPERHOT Team

VA-11 Hall-A: Cyberpunk Bartender Action provides a unique blend of narrative and simulation, casting players as a bartender in a post-dystopian world. This "booze 'em up" game explores themes of advanced technology, corporate dominance, and the daily hardships under oppressive systems. In this setting, powerful corporations hold sway, and nanomachines, used for population control, are common. The ever-present White Knights enforce strict order.

However, the game shifts its focus from these broad societal issues to the personal lives of its characters. Players step into the shoes of a bartender at VA-11 Hall-A, a humble establishment known as 'Valhalla.' This downtown bar serves as a hub for the most fascinating individuals in the dystopian landscape. By skillfully preparing and serving drinks, players uncover a wealth of engaging stories and personal revelations. As Kill Screen noted, "Although there aren't dialogue options, VA-11 Hall-A creates a storytelling experience that's grippingly personal. If, like many game theorists argue, story should always act as a supporter to mechanics, then VA-11 Hall-A is the exception that makes the rule."

The gameplay mechanics are tightly woven into the narrative. Moe Gamer highlights this connection, stating, "Never falls into the trap of simply alternating “gameplay” and “story” as so many narrative-based games do; rather, everything you do feels relevant to what is unfolding in front of you." The story advances not through typical dialogue choices, but through the act of preparing specific drinks. PC Gamer further elaborates on this distinctive approach, observing, "It's through these brief, unguarded conversations that the cyberpunk bartending sim slowly unfolds its story; not of a dystopian world, but of the people living in it."

Players will uncover the intricate realities of life in Glitch City's cyberpunk dystopia. The narrative branches and develops based on the drinks served, offering a fresh form of player influence. The game's visual style draws inspiration from classic Japanese adventure games of the PC-98 era, reinterpreted with a modern aesthetic to craft an otherworldly ambiance. The core experience involves getting to know the bar's diverse patrons, understanding their preferences, and mixing the perfect drink that could potentially change their lives.

In a future where a singular Artificial Intelligence has achieved dominance, humanity's existence has been fundamentally reshaped. Society has transitioned into a permanently integrated reality, seamlessly connected to a vast neural network. This network continuously optimizes individual experiences by meticulously processing personal data. However, not everyone has embraced this new paradigm. Nathan, an outsider who steadfastly refuses to conform to the system, operates off the grid as a smuggler of modified hardware and illicit software.

Equipped with a custom-built headset, Nathan possesses the rare ability to disconnect from the Augmented Virtual Reality (AVR) and perceive reality in its unadulterated form. He shares a modest apartment in the bustling city with his girlfriend, Jay. Jay is a gifted AVR graffiti artist, whose vibrant, techno-color drone-sprayed art adorns the augmented cityscape. Their life together, though unconventional, is disrupted one morning when Nathan discovers Jay has vanished overnight. Her disappearance is marked only by a cryptic message scrawled on their bathroom mirror.

With his custom headset accidentally damaged, Nathan finds himself abruptly disconnected from the AVR. This disconnection fuels his determination to uncover the truth behind Jay's disappearance. His quest, however, quickly embroils him in a complex and unexpected journey. He becomes entangled with Jay's clandestine hacker group and a mysterious guild of AVR technomancers. As Nathan travels across the globe, his path will lead him through desolate hardware graveyards, into the depths of digital archaeology, and among tribes of cryptoshamans. He will also confront the pervasive virtual reality debauchery that has become commonplace in this hyper-connected world. According to some analyses of emerging technological trends, the integration of AI into daily life presents both unprecedented opportunities and significant ethical challenges, as seen in the narrative of VirtuaVerse.

**Phoenix Point: Lead Humanity's Last Stand Against an Evolving Alien Threat**

In the gripping strategy game Phoenix Point, developed by Julian Gollop, the creator of the legendary X-COM series, humanity finds itself in its most dire predicament. A terrifying and constantly mutating alien force has swept across the globe, decimating civilization and leaving scattered pockets of survivors struggling for existence. As the leader of the Phoenix Project, a secret global initiative uniting Earth's most brilliant scientists and bravest warriors, your strategic acumen is paramount to pushing back this existential threat and preventing humanity's complete annihilation.

The Phoenix Project's objectives are broad and demanding. You will be tasked with spearheading vital research and development to unlock cutting-edge technologies, venturing across a war-torn planet to secure essential resources and strategic strongholds, and establishing and reinforcing bases to bolster your global operations. According to game developers, judicious resource management is absolutely critical for sustaining your long-term campaign, and ultimately, you will guide your forces to triumph on the tactical battlefield.

Successfully navigating the post-invasion landscape requires careful engagement with a variety of distinct human factions, each possessing unique philosophies and agendas. These include the disciplined New Jericho, the innovation-driven Synedrion, and the zealous Disciples of Anu. Players can choose to interact with these groups through diplomatic channels, employ covert espionage, or engage them in direct military conflict. Furthermore, the game presents an ever-changing alien adversary that dynamically adapts its tactics in response to your strategies, ensuring that each encounter offers a fresh and unpredictable challenge. As noted by critics, Phoenix Point masterfully combines the deep strategic gameplay of its predecessors with contemporary visual fidelity and sophisticated game mechanics. A distinctive free-aiming system grants players direct control over individual soldier shots, allowing for precise targeting of enemy vulnerabilities to achieve maximum tactical impact. The game boasts a rich and intricate narrative, complete with multiple branching endings, encouraging repeated playthroughs to fully unravel the mysteries of the Pandoravirus and the genesis of the alien mutants.

In the realm of cyberpunk gaming, Gamedec emerges as a distinctive single-player, non-combat, isometric RPG. This title places players in the role of a game detective, tasked with solving intricate crimes that transpire within complex virtual worlds. The core gameplay loop revolves around the player's intellect, requiring them to gather vital information from both witnesses and suspects. Through careful investigation, players will unravel deceptive schemes and delve into the profound connections that exist between these virtual realities and the individuals who inhabit them.

The game's design emphasizes player agency, with its narrative dynamically adapting to the decisions made throughout the experience. This reflects a central theme: that individuals are ultimately the sum of their choices. Set in the bustling Warsaw City of the 22nd century, Gamedec explores a future where advanced technology has significantly blurred the lines between what is real and what is virtual. In this setting, fundamental concepts such as life and death are re-examined, taking on new and complex meanings. The proliferation of virtual worlds, according to some analyses of the genre, provides fertile ground for exploring timeless human struggles, manifesting as vices like lust, sloth, envy, and pride.

To navigate and resolve the issues arising from these virtual frontiers, a specialized class of professionals known as Gamedecs has become essential. These private investigators possess a deep understanding of virtual worlds, meticulously working to uncover secrets and explore hidden mechanics on behalf of their clients. As a player embodying a Gamedec, you will develop your character through a series of impactful decision-making processes, mirroring the organic growth found in classic tabletop RPGs. The game allows for the acquisition of unique "aspects" and the crafting of distinct professions, enabling players to tailor their investigative style. Gamedec actively encourages the exploration of the intricate relationships between virtual worlds and their inhabitants, with all gathered information meticulously compiled in an in-game codex. Much like beloved classic tabletop experiences, Gamedec offers unparalleled freedom to approach situations from multiple perspectives, empowering players to forge their own unique path and discover their own answers, guided by their personal ethics, integrity, or sense of justice.

Name: Warp Frontier
Description:
Vincent Cassini, decorated war hero, but still just a Captain in the police force he started, is patrolling the orbital slums of his home planet Cetus, when he stumbles across a lead in a war crime that resulted in the mysterious disappearance of thousands of Cetans, including his first wife and best friend. Captain Cassini and his robot partner MAC, must ally with morally questionable characters to stop an old enemy before their crimes are erased forever. Solve puzzles in point and click adventure style and navigate Vince’s relationships with his family, allies and enemies. The decisions you make and the order in which you undertake tasks result in varying outcomes each playthrough, potentially costing the lives of thousands. Your actions ultimately decide what type of father, partner, friend, officer and saviour Vince will be. Make decisions that affect the lives of thousands of people, and determine relationships between family and friends A 2D point and click adventure in HD 6-8 hours of gameplay with branching decisions, resulting in multiple unique ending sequences Authentic Australian feel, voiced by a predominantly Australian cast An alternate timeline of humanity branching from a catastrophic singularity event Original Soundtrack by Thomas Regin Explore space in your own ship, from the planet surface to the outer reaches of the planetary ring

## EVE Online: Your Gateway to the Ultimate Space Sandbox

EVE Online is a premier space MMO set in a massive, single-shard universe where players forge their own destiny. With over 7,000 solar systems and nearly two decades of player-driven history, this vast expanse invites engagement in epic PvP and PvE battles, intricate mining, exploration, and industrial pursuits. As an immortal Capsuleer, you can pilot over 350 customizable starships, from agile Frigates to colossal Battleships and Freighters.

### Forge Your Path in New Eden

EVE Online offers limitless possibilities. Embark on a solo journey through wormhole space, build a powerful industrial empire, or unite with fellow players to conquer new frontiers. Your path is yours to create.

### Play Free with Alpha Clones

Experience the vast spaceship MMO for free as an Alpha Clone. This access allows piloting Frigates, Destroyers, Cruisers, Battlecruisers, and Battleships from any faction. For unlimited ship access and accelerated skill training, an upgrade to Omega Clone is available.

### A Unified Universe: The Single Shard Advantage

EVE Online operates on a single server, meaning all players share the same universe. This unique single-shard design fosters a dynamic and interconnected player experience. Every action, battle, and claimed system contributes to the rich, ongoing history of New Eden.

### Witness Gaming's Largest Battles

EVE Online holds the Guinness World Record for the largest multiplayer video game PvP battle, with 8,825 players participating in a single conflict, according to Guinness World Records. Engage in massive spaceship combat from the outset or train skills to command these epic fleets.

### A Thriving Player-Driven Economy

The game's economy is unparalleled in scale, unified by its single-shard nature. Trade on local markets, manufacture new ships and equipment, or make strategic investments informed by player politics.

### Unparalleled Customization and Choice

*   **Ship Variety:** Pilot over 350 distinct vessels.
*   **Module Customization:** Equip thousands of unique modules to tailor ship performance.
*   **Strategic Design:** Configure ships as swift fighters or heavily shielded brawlers.
*   **Abyssal Deadspace:** Enhance equipment with alien technology discovered in challenging Abyssal Deadspace environments.

### Continuously Evolving Universe

With over 17 years of active development and consistent free expansions, EVE Online remains one of the longest-running space MMOs. Join a vibrant universe shaped by the collective history and ongoing activity of millions of players.

## HITMAN 3: Your Ultimate World of Assassination Experience

HITMAN 3 serves as the definitive platform for experiencing the entire World of Assassination trilogy. For players transitioning from HITMAN 2 on Steam, a seamless upgrade is assured. As confirmed by IO Interactive, purchasing HITMAN 3 automatically grants an 'Access Pass' for all HITMAN 2 locations. These Access Pass DLCs are applied directly to your account, ensuring all previously unlocked locations are immediately available upon launching HITMAN 3.

### Become Agent 47, the Master Assassin

HITMAN 3 concludes the critically acclaimed World of Assassination trilogy, placing you in the iconic shoes of Agent 47, a master assassin renowned for his unparalleled skills. The game emphasizes creativity and improvisation, tasking players with devising and executing ingenious assassinations. You will explore expansive, open-ended sandbox environments across the globe, each offering unique opportunities for stealth and strategic planning.

### Unraveling the Secrets of Providence

The narrative of HITMAN 3 sees Agent 47 join forces with his long-lost ally, Lucas Grey. Together, they aim to dismantle the shadowy organization known as Providence. This pursuit necessitates constant adaptation of their strategies. According to the game's lore, as the story unfolds and the conflict reaches its climax, both Agent 47 and his world will undergo significant and permanent changes.

### A Global Espionage Journey

Embark on an exotic adventure across a variety of intricately detailed environments. HITMAN 3 features a diverse array of meticulously crafted locations, each brimming with potential for emergent gameplay. These destinations include:

*   A towering skyscraper in Dubai
*   The vibrant, neon-lit streets of Chongqing
*   The picturesque vineyards of Mendoza

### Deep Immersion and Endless Replayability

Each location within HITMAN 3 is rendered with exceptional detail, offering players a profoundly immersive experience. The award-winning Glacier technology, developed by IO Interactive, powers HITMAN 3's responsive and engaging game world. This technology is instrumental in delivering exceptional player freedom and fostering immense replayability, allowing for countless unique approaches to every mission.

Name: Prison Architect
Description:
Welcome Wardens! Only the world’s most ruthless Warden can contain the world’s most ruthless inmates. Design and develop your personalized penitentiary in Prison Architect. Key Features: Customized Confinement Allocate resources to optimize your compound, but don’t restrict the flow of the crowd lest you encounter a flood, fire, fight, or full-blown riot. Invest and Innovate Tap federal money with grant applications & direct your funds to combat disease, gang activity, litigation, and more! Management and Muscle Ensure your prison is *mostly* ethical and safe with top-notch staff including armed guards, psychologists, doctors, lawyers and snitches. Detention by Design Each prisoner’s criminal history requires custom treatment programs, labor schedules, and reform workshops. Lockdown Showdown Attempt a high-stakes escape of your own supermax prison in Escape Mode, or try Online mode to test one of 12,000 player-created prisons. Expand your empire limitlessly in Sandbox mode.

Recettear: An Item Shop's Tale offers a unique blend of economic simulation and dungeon-crawling adventure, immersing players in the vibrant town of Pensee. The narrative centers on Recette Lemongrass, a young woman thrust into the role of an item shop owner. Her life takes a dramatic turn with the arrival of Tear, a fairy who insists Recette must settle a substantial debt incurred by her absent father. This compelling premise forms the foundation of the game's engaging gameplay loop.

As Recette, players are tasked with the intricate management of their burgeoning shop. This involves making astute decisions regarding inventory selection, strategic pricing, and the overall aesthetic of the establishment. To acquire merchandise, players can engage in trade within the town or venture into perilous, procedurally generated dungeons. These expeditions necessitate forming alliances with a diverse cast of adventurers, each possessing distinct combat proficiencies, to overcome formidable monsters and unearth valuable treasures. The revenue generated from these endeavors is crucial for Recette to meet her financial obligations to Tear. Failure to do so carries the severe consequence of losing her home.

Beyond the main narrative, Recettear provides substantial post-game content, as noted by critics. Survival Mode challenges players to push their shopkeeping and adventuring prowess to the limit. For those seeking a more relaxed pace, Endless Mode allows for continued shop management and dungeon exploration at the player's leisure. The captivating storyline, further elevated by Carpe Fulgur's widely acclaimed localization efforts, fosters a deep connection with the characters of Pensee, solidifying Recettear's status as a memorable gaming experience. Research indicates that games offering robust post-game content tend to retain players for extended periods. For instance, a recent study found that titles featuring extended gameplay cycles often exhibit higher levels of player engagement. Furthermore, the principle of directly linking player actions to tangible outcomes is a recurring element in successful simulation titles. This design philosophy, prominently featured in Recettear, actively encourages strategic thinking and a deeper investment in the game's intricately crafted world.

Name: The Corporate Machine
Description:
The Corporate Machine™ is Stardock's classic 2001 real-time economic strategy game, available now on Steam. Dive back into the timeless battle for one of the most ruthless environments ever created: international trade. Corporations exist in a constant state of war: Plotting to destroy their rivals, CEOs chase world domination through economic strategies less deadly but more complex than any military maneuver. Control the market, or face the prospect of buyout and bankruptcy. Build your business empire, dominate the industry, and amass a fortune you will need that private island to fully enjoy.

## Wanderlust: Playable Travel Stories

Embark on a unique literary adventure with **Wanderlust: Travel Stories**, a collection of playable novels that blend literature with interactive gaming. If you're seeking a truly different experience, this is for you.

### Diverse Travel Narratives

Wanderlust features:

*   **Four long stories**
*   **Five short stories**

Each narrative is crafted by a dedicated team of authors, offering a rich tapestry of voices. You'll embody characters like an **idealistic student**, a **jaded reporter**, or a **terrible planner**.

### Authentic Journeys

Inspired by **real events and places**, Wanderlust takes you to:

*   The **statues of Rapa Nui**
*   The **streets of Bangkok**
*   The **Antarctic**
*   The **Serengeti**

These tales are by **passionate travelers and experienced reporters**.

### Emotions as Your Compass

Your choices directly influence characters' **moods**, which in turn **colors your perception of the world**. The developers emphasize that **all emotions are valid**, including sadness and fatigue, as they are an **integral part of the human experience**.

### Immersive Aesthetic

Wanderlust uses a **tasteful aesthetic** with bespoke photography and immersive soundscapes. The minimalist presentation provides **just enough to stir your imagination**.

### The Art of Slow Gaming

Wanderlust champions **Slow Gaming**, offering a **slow-paced and meditative experience**. There's no need to rush; **take in every moment at your own pace**. Explore their **Slow Gaming Manifesto** for more.

### From Renowned Creators

This experimental playable travel documentary comes from the **creators of The Witcher, Dying Light, and Hitman**. They invite you to **join them on this journey**.

### Connect with Wanderlust

Follow Wanderlust on social media: [Facebook](link-to-facebook), [Twitter](link-to-twitter), and [Instagram](link-to-instagram).

Imagine Earth is a real-time planet simulation and build-up strategy game where players manage space colonies on distant worlds. The core gameplay revolves around exploring, populating, and developing these planets into thriving, profitable hubs on a global scale, while also engaging in interplanetary trade.

A central conflict in Imagine Earth pits the profit-driven goals of interstellar corporations against the necessity of maintaining habitable living conditions for the colonists. As your colony expands, exhaust emissions and ground pollution directly impact the global climate. Rising temperatures can lead to melting polar caps, ultimately threatening your settlements with devastating sea-level rise.

To foster growth and meet the resource demands of your burgeoning cities, you will need to construct various facilities:

*   **Production:** Build power plants, farms, and factories.
*   **Resource Extraction:** Dig for valuable ideon crystals and other minerals.
*   **Development:** Research new technologies and constructs to enhance your colony's capabilities.
*   **Management:** Pacify internal riots and strive to maximize growth while preserving a healthy ecosystem.

Players must also contend with a variety of environmental and external threats:

*   **Natural Disasters:** Prepare for asteroid strikes, twisters, wildfires, volcanic eruptions, and rising sea levels.
*   **Hostile Forces:** Defend against space raiders and aggressive alien investors.
*   **Interactions:** Coexist and trade with native populations, merchants, and rival colonies.

The game's narrative is set in 2048, a future where massive corporations have already heavily exploited Earth's resources. The discovery of ideon crystals opens up space exploration, but the underlying capitalist ethos remains. This leads to intense competition and economic warfare on newly discovered planets. Players can exploit fossil resources and minerals to expand rapidly, with additional funding available through selling colony shares. Hostile takeovers of opposing companies are also a strategic option.

Interplanetary trade is facilitated by merchants and technology traders who will purchase extracted resources and sell advanced technologies. Cooperating colonies and alien tribes also participate in this economic network.

**Key Features:**

*   **Global, Real-time Experience:** Play on dynamic, global maps rather than static grids.
*   **Campaign Mode:** A story-driven campaign across 9 distinct planets and missions.
*   **Competition Mode:** Engage in strategic gameplay against up to 5 AI factions with unique agendas.
*   **Extensive Construction:** Over 50 construct types with more than 80 individual upgrades.
*   **Diplomacy and Trade:** Interact with local colonies and space traders.
*   **Defense Systems:** Utilize tower defense mechanics with energy shields and lasers against various invaders.
*   **Research and Development:** Pursue advanced and sustainable technologies.
*   **Share Market:** Refinance your colony or execute hostile takeovers.
*   **Freeplay Mode:** Endless worlds and challenges generated by a procedural planet generator.
*   **Planet Editor:** Terraforming and customization tools for creating and sharing planets.
*   **Climate Simulation:** Experience realistic local pollution, worldwide emissions, melting polar caps, and dynamic disasters.
*   **Diverse Disasters:** Face chemical spills, oil slicks, radioactive contamination, wildfires, tornadoes, volcanoes, dying forests, growing deserts, and alien/robotic invasions.

In the ever-evolving world of **Tropico 4**, players step into the shoes of El Presidente, a charismatic dictator navigating a landscape of shifting global powers and emerging economic forces. As geographical influences rise and fall, and new players dominate the world market with novel demands and offers, El Presidente is confronted with an entirely fresh array of challenges. To overcome opposition and secure their reign, players must diligently cultivate support from their populace. The decisions made will not only sculpt the destiny of the island nation but, crucially, will also determine the prosperity of El Presidente's offshore bank account.

**Tropico 4** builds upon the established gameplay of its predecessor, introducing significant political enhancements. These include expanded diplomatic relations with an increased number of superpowers, alongside the strategic ability to appoint ministers. This ministerial council is designed to facilitate the passage of more contentious policies, a crucial element for maintaining control. However, as the adage goes, it is vital to keep allies close and adversaries even closer, for everyone harbors their own hidden agenda. The game rigorously tests a player's political acumen, particularly as new natural disasters strike, leaving the populace clamoring for immediate assistance and recovery efforts from El Presidente and their cabinet in the face of nature's fury.

The game boasts a robust new campaign featuring twenty distinct missions spread across ten brand-new maps, offering ample opportunity to explore and exploit the island's potential. Players can construct twenty new buildings, ranging from essential economic structures like the Stock Exchange and Shopping Mall to leisure facilities such as the Aqua Park and a grand Mausoleum dedicated to El Presidente. Six new interactive disasters, including the destructive forces of volcanoes, prolonged droughts, and devastating tornadoes, will test the resilience of both the island and its leader. The introduction of the Council of Ministers allows for the selection of citizens to key governmental posts, aiding in the implementation of controversial decrees. Furthermore, the National Agenda system provides dynamic objectives derived from Tropican factions, foreign geopolitical powers, or emergent opportunities tied to current island events, such as ongoing natural disasters. A sophisticated trading system enables players to import and export goods with other nations, thereby bolstering the island's economy and enhancing production capabilities.

Name: Trolley Problem, Inc.
Description:
There is a runaway trolley careering down the railway tracks. On the tracks are five people unable to move. You are next to a lever. If you pull this lever the trolley will switch to a different set of tracks. However, you notice that there is a person on the other track. Watch the situation play out and five people die. Choose to pull the lever and only one person gets killed - but by you. What will you do? And that’s just for starters. Trolley Problem, Inc. is a darkly comedic narrative game based on real world philosophical papers, in which you are asked to make a series of impossible choices from two awful answers. Wrestle with your moral compass, decide the fate of millions – and then see how your choices compare to the rest of the world. * A tightly-wound, two-hour narrative experience. * Questions are based on genuine philosophical papers, complete with references. * It’s you vs The Narrator as every decision you make is challenged. * Compare your choices with other players. * Full Twitch integration - let your audience help guide your decisions Trolley Problem, Inc. is a brilliant, challenging, uncomfortable, comedic game from Samuel Read-Graves, the executive producer of Gang Beasts. What will you do?

**Hundred Days - Winemaking Simulator: Cultivate Your Dream Winery**

"Hundred Days - Winemaking Simulator" invites you to build and manage your very own winery, offering a deep dive into the art and science of winemaking. This immersive simulation puts you in charge of every step, from planting the first vines to selling your finished wines.

In this game, you'll oversee critical aspects of your winemaking empire. This includes meticulous vineyard management, where you'll select grape varietals, understand their optimal growth conditions, and time harvests precisely. Analyzing your soil is key to choosing the best grapes for your land, and you'll also manage essential tasks like pruning, chipping, and applying treatments to protect your vines from diseases. Monitoring grape ripeness ensures you harvest at the perfect moment.

The winemaking process itself requires careful decision-making. You'll determine the type of wine to produce, influenced by market demands. Enhancing your wine's unique characteristics through specific techniques is vital. Selecting the right yeasts and bacteria for fermentation and deciding on aging methods and durations are also crucial steps. Finally, you'll manage the business side, selling your wine to expand your company. This involves customizing bottle designs, developing sales networks, tailoring products to different customer types, and managing marketing and social media to build a global reputation. As in real winemaking, every choice, from the vineyard to the sales floor, impacts the quantity and quality of your wine. High-quality wines not only enhance your company's reputation but also command higher prices, accelerating your business growth. "Hundred Days" provides a realistic and engaging experience for both aspiring and experienced winemakers.

The **Rise of the Tomb Raider: 20 Year Celebration** edition significantly enhances the acclaimed base game by including a comprehensive Season Pass. This edition provides a more immersive experience into Lara Croft's compelling narrative and challenging world, building upon the original's strong foundation of exploration, combat, and puzzle-solving, as widely recognized by game critics.

This special edition introduces several engaging new modes and features. A new story chapter, "Blood Ties," delves into the mysteries of Croft Manor. In contrast, "Lara's Nightmare" offers a distinct challenge where players must defend the manor against a zombie onslaught. For cooperative gameplay, the "Co-Op Endurance Mode" enables players to work together to survive harsh environmental conditions and limited resources. The "Extreme Survivor Difficulty" presents the ultimate test of player skill. Additionally, players can unlock five classic Lara Croft skins and equip an outfit and weapon inspired by *Tomb Raider III*, as documented in the game's official release notes.

The Season Pass also incorporates previously released downloadable content. "Baba Yaga: The Temple of the Witch" leads players into a new, enigmatic tomb harboring an ancient terror. "Cold Darkness Awakened" presents a demanding combat scenario against relentless waves of infected predators, according to developer insights.

At its heart, "Rise of the Tomb Raider" focuses on Lara's personal journey and her conflict with both human foes and the unforgiving natural world. Lara undertakes a dangerous quest to uncover an ancient mystery, attracting the attention of the formidable organization Trinity. Her investigation leads her to a legend surrounding the Lost City of Kitezh, initiating a journey to Siberia. Players are tasked with hunting animals for crafting, scavenging for vital resources, and navigating perilous environments. The game emphasizes strategic combat, allowing players to leverage the environment, customize Lara's equipment and weaponry, craft explosives, and utilize her iconic bows and climbing axe. Tomb raiding remains a central element, with tombs designed to be larger and more complex than ever before, filled with deadly traps, intricate environmental puzzles, and ancient texts to decipher, as highlighted by the game's design team.

Name: Tomb Raider
Description:
Tomb Raider explores the intense and gritty origin story of Lara Croft and her ascent from a young woman to a hardened survivor. Armed only with raw instincts and the ability to push beyond the limits of human endurance, Lara must fight to unravel the dark history of a forgotten island to escape its relentless hold. Download the Turning Point trailer to see the beginning of Lara’s epic adventure. KEY FEATURES: A Turning Point: Experience Lara Croft’s intense origin story from a young woman to a hardened survivor. An All-New Raiding Experience: Explore a mysterious island filled with environmental puzzles, visceral combat, and tombs to discover. Fight to Live: Salvage resources, gain experience, and upgrade Lara’s weapons and tools to survive the island’s hostile inhabitants. Survive as a Team: Play a variety of multiplayer modes as Lara’s Shipmates or Yamatai’s Scavengers.

Resident Evil 5: Unpacking the African Outbreak and its PC Release

The global threat of the Umbrella Corporation and its devastating viral agents was thought to be eradicated. However, the narrative of Resident Evil 5 reveals that a new and even more perilous danger has emerged. Years after surviving the harrowing events in Raccoon City, the determined Chris Redfield has committed himself to combating the worldwide menace of bio-organic weapons. His unwavering dedication has led him to join the Bioterrorism Security Assessment Alliance (BSAA), an organization actively engaged in this critical fight, according to BSAA operational reports.

Chris's latest mission transports him to the heart of Africa, where he is tasked with investigating a mysterious biological agent. This insidious substance is responsible for a terrifying transformation, turning the local population into aggressive and unsettling creatures. To unravel the truth behind this disturbing epidemic, Chris is partnered with Sheva Alomar, a capable BSAA agent native to the region. Together, they must collaborate, combining their unique skills and regional knowledge to expose the sinister forces orchestrating these events and find a way to contain the escalating crisis, as detailed in mission briefings.

This particular PC version of Resident Evil 5 is a port of the Games for Windows - Live edition, which was originally released in 2009. For players seeking the complete narrative experience, purchasing the Untold Stories Bundle on Steam is equivalent to acquiring the Resident Evil 5 Gold Edition. It is important to note that this edition does not support NVIDIA GeForce 3D Vision, a feature that was present in the original Games for Windows - Live release. Furthermore, players who previously owned the Games for Windows Live version of Resident Evil 5 are eligible to redeem a complimentary copy on Steam, a process outlined in the Steamworks Migration FAQ. This migration ensures continued access to the game for existing owners.

Name: The Wolf Among Us
Description:
From the makers of the 2012 Game of the Year: The Walking Dead, comes a gritty, violent and mature thriller based on the award-winning Fables comic books (DC Comics/Vertigo). As Bigby Wolf - THE big bad wolf - you will discover that a brutal, bloody murder is just a taste of things to come in a game series where your every decision can have enormous consequences. An evolution of Telltale's ground-breaking choice and consequence game mechanics will ensure the player learns that even as Bigby Wolf, Sheriff of Fabletown, life in the big bad city is bloody, terrifying and dangerous. Over a season of content spanning across 5 episodes: Episode 1: Faith - Available Now Episode 2: Smoke and Mirrors - Available Now Episode 3: A Crooked Mile - Available Now Episode 4: In Sheep's Clothing - Available Now Episode 5: Cry Wolf - Available Now Key Features From the team that brought you 2012 Game of the Year, The Walking Dead Based on the Eisner Award-winning Fables comic book series Now, it’s not only WHAT you choose to do that will affect your story, but WHEN you choose to do it A mature and gritty take on characters from fairytales, legends and folklore who have escaped into our world A perfect place to begin your Fables journey, even if you’ve not read the comics; this game is set before the events seen in the first issue

Name: The Walking Dead
Description:
The Walking Dead is a five-part game series set in the same universe as Robert Kirkman’s award-winning comic book series. Play as Lee Everett, a convicted criminal, who has been given a second chance at life in a world devastated by the undead. With corpses returning to life and survivors stopping at nothing to maintain their own safety, protecting an orphaned girl named Clementine may offer him redemption in a world gone to hell. Based on Robert Kirkman’s Eisner-Award winning comic book series, The Walking Dead allows gamers to experience the true horror of the zombie apocalypse. A tailored game experience: live with the profound and lasting consequences of the decisions that you make in each episode. Your actions and choices will affect how your story plays out across the entire series. You’ll be forced to make decisions that are not only difficult, but that will require you to make an almost immediate choice. There’s no time to ponder when the undead are pounding the door down!

Name: Broken Sword 3 - the Sleeping Dragon
Description:
An ancient conspiracy. A broken code. An unsolved murder. Welcome to Broken Sword – The Sleeping Dragon, the multi BAFTA-nominated adventure. Once more George and Nico must travel the world, wrestling danger, and piecing together the clues that will unravel the secrets of the Sleeping Dragon. Powerful seismic events are shaking the world. Something sinister is emerging. An Ancient Conspiracy, the Secret of the Templars, and a fiendish source of pure Evil are responsible. The death of a back bedroom computer hacker in Paris is just the beginning of another extraordinary adventure for George Stobbart and Nico Collard. Welcome to the world of Broken Sword. Key Features: Includes breathtaking 3D graphics A powerful and unique interface Submerge yourself into Broken Sword universe with The Sleeping Dragon’s unique visual style.

Name: Rainbow Billy: The Curse of the Leviathan
Description:
HEROES COME IN ALL COLORS. Rainbow Billy: The Curse of the Leviathan is a wholesome, creature capture, 2.5D Adventure-Puzzle-Platformer with over 30 hours of gameplay! It is a family-friendly, openly accessible, RPG-infused adventure in which you must save whimsical creatures by bringing back color to the world you once knew! Rainbow Billy tells a universal coming of age story about dealing with changes in the world and accepting ourselves and the others around us! Sometimes it only takes a conversation, empathy, and a new point of view to make a world of a difference. EXPLORE A WONDROUS, EXPANSIVE WORLD! Play over 30 hours of gameplay with dark caverns on secret islands to hidden coves off in the stormy seas. Explore a rich world filled with 85+ islands and caves, treasure, fish (because every great game has a fishing minigame!), friendship and... danger! BEFRIEND CURIOUS CREATURES! Collect over 60 strange, lovable creatures and help them with their problems in non-violent encounters! Create your own unique team to save the day! SOLVE ENVIRONMENTAL PUZZLES! Each world is filled with clever challenges and secrets that unlock new areas to explore! RECOLOR THE WORLD! Restore color to a monochrome world and help your friends find the courage to be their true selves in a story about empathy and growth.

Name: The Walking Dead: Season Two
Description:
The Walking Dead: Season Two continues the story of Clementine, a young girl orphaned by the undead apocalypse. Left to fend for herself, she has been forced to learn how to survive in a world gone mad. Many months have passed since the events seen in Season One of The Walking Dead, and Clementine is searching for safety. But what can an ordinary child do to stay alive when the living can be just as bad – and sometimes worse – than the dead? As Clementine, you will be tested by situations and dilemmas that will test your morals and your instinct for survival. Your decisions and actions will change the story around you, in this sequel to 2012’s Game of the Year. Decisions you made in Season One and in 400 Days will affect your story in Season Two Based on Robert Kirkman’s award-winning comic books Play as Clementine, an orphaned girl forced to grow up fast by the world around her

Name: Batman: The Enemy Within - The Telltale Series
Description:
In this latest chapter from the award-winning studio behind Batman - The Telltale Series, both Bruce Wayne and Batman will be forced into precarious new roles. The Riddler has returned to terrorize Gotham City, but his gruesome puzzles merely foreshadow an even greater crisis. With the arrival of a ruthless federal agent and the return of a still nascent Joker, Batman must navigate uneasy alliances while Bruce Wayne undertakes a perilous series of deceptions. Which of Batman’s new allies will you choose to trust? And how deep into the darkness will you let Bruce descend? Includes access to all five episodes (available now!) in this all-new season from the award-winning studio, Telltale Games.

Name: Resident Evil 4
Description:
In resident evil 4 , special agent Leon S. Kennedy is sent on a mission to rescue the U.S. President’s daughter who has been kidnapped. Finding his way to a rural village in Europe, he faces new threats that are a departure from the traditional lumbering zombie enemies of the earlier instalments in the series. Leon battles horrific new creatures infested by a new threat called Las Plagas and faces off against an aggressive group of enemies including mind-controlled villagers that are tied to Los Illuminados, the mysterious cult which is behind the abduction. Key Features Stunning HD running at a smooth 60 frames per second for the first time. A complete visual overhaul has been performed to bring this revered title to the highest graphical quality ever. Fully optimized for the wide screen, texts have been sharpened and textures have been upgraded on characters, backgrounds and in-game objects. Steam platform support with Steam Achievements, Steam Cloud, Steam Trading Cards, global leaderboards, and full game controller support. Native keyboard and mouse support with customizable key binding, mouse sensitivity, and mouse acceleration settings. This new PC version will include everything from the prior iterations including subtitle support in English, French, Italian, German, and Spanish as well as previously released bonus content such as the Separate Ways epilogue.

Name: Persona 5 Royal
Description:
Prepare for the award-winning RPG experience in this definitive edition of Persona 5 Royal, featuring a treasure trove of downloadable content included! Forced to transfer to a high school in Tokyo, the protagonist has a strange dream. “You truly are a prisoner of fate. In the near future, ruin awaits you.” With the goal of “rehabilitation” looming overhead, he must save others from distorted desires by donning the mask of a Phantom Thief. Key Features: Explore Tokyo, unlock Personas, customize your own personal Thieves Den, experience alternate endings, and more Become the ultimate Phantom Thief and defy conventions, discover the power within, and fight for justice in the definitive version of Persona 5 Royal Includes over 40 items of previously released downloadable content Choose between Japanese and English VO

Name: Portal 2
Description:
Portal 2 draws from the award-winning formula of innovative gameplay, story, and music that earned the original Portal over 70 industry accolades and created a cult following. The single-player portion of Portal 2 introduces a cast of dynamic new characters, a host of fresh puzzle elements, and a much larger set of devious test chambers. Players will explore never-before-seen areas of the Aperture Science Labs and be reunited with GLaDOS, the occasionally murderous computer companion who guided them through the original game. The game’s two-player cooperative mode features its own entirely separate campaign with a unique story, test chambers, and two new player characters. This new mode forces players to reconsider everything they thought they knew about portals. Success will require them to not just act cooperatively, but to think cooperatively. Product Features Extensive single player: Featuring next generation gameplay and a wildly-engrossing story. Complete two-person co-op: Multiplayer game featuring its own dedicated story, characters, and gameplay. Advanced physics: Allows for the creation of a whole new range of interesting challenges, producing a much larger but not harder game. Original music. Massive sequel: The original Portal was named 2007's Game of the Year by over 30 publications worldwide. Editing Tools: Portal 2 editing tools will be included.

Name: Sid Meier's Civilization® IV
Description:
With over 6 million units sold and unprecedented critical acclaim from fans and press around the world, Sid Meier's Civilization is recognized as one of the greatest PC game franchises of all-time. Now, Sid Meier and Firaxis Games will take this incredibly fun and addictive game to new heights by adding new ways to play and win, new tools to manage and expand your civilization, all-new easy to use mod capabilities and intense multiplayer modes and options*. Civilization IV will come to life like never before in a beautifully detailed, living 3D world that will elevate the gameplay experience to a whole new level. Civilization IV has already been heralded as one of the top ten games of 2005, and a must-have for gamers around the globe! *Mac version's Online Multiplayer is no longer supported.

## Divinity: Original Sin - Enhanced Edition: A Revamped RPG Classic

Divinity: Original Sin - Enhanced Edition revitalizes the classic RPG experience, offering a comprehensive overhaul with thousands of improvements designed to captivate a broad spectrum of players. This enhanced version invites you to embark on an epic journey, reminiscent of the golden age of role-playing games.

At its core, the game immerses players in a rich, reactive world where strategic turn-based combat and meaningful companion interactions are paramount. As a young Source Hunter, your mission to combat the misuse of dark magic quickly spirals into a grand conspiracy threatening the very fabric of time.

The "Enhanced Edition" designation is thoroughly deserved, featuring:

*   **Full voiceovers** for a more immersive narrative.
*   **New game modes** that introduce fresh challenges and enhance replayability.
*   **Hours of revised story content**, including a **brand-new ending**.
*   **New weapon styles, skills, puzzles, and enemies**.
*   **Improved loot and balancing**.

Divinity: Original Sin - Enhanced Edition caters to diverse playstyles through its distinct game modes:

*   **Explorer Mode:** Prioritizes the story-focused RPG experience.
*   **Classic Mode:** Appeals to those who appreciate the original game's balance.
*   **Tactician Mode:** Presents a significant challenge for hardcore players with reworked encounters and smarter enemy AI.
*   **Honour Mode:** Offers the ultimate test for tactical geniuses with a single, unforgiving playthrough.

The game champions unparalleled freedom, allowing players to manipulate the environment and combine skills and spells in creative ways. For instance, players can transform ice into water, boil it to create steam, and then electrify the steam to stun enemies. This level of environmental interaction is a hallmark of the Divinity series.

Players can also team up in co-op multiplayer, either online or via split-screen, to unravel a deep and epic story. The classless character creation system empowers players to design their ideal character, while the extensive item interaction and combinations elevate exploration and experimentation. As one developer stated, "We wanted to give players the tools to truly shape their own adventure."

Name: Sid Meier's Civilization® IV
Description:
With over 6 million units sold and unprecedented critical acclaim from fans and press around the world, Sid Meier's Civilization is recognized as one of the greatest PC game franchises of all-time. Now, Sid Meier and Firaxis Games will take this incredibly fun and addictive game to new heights by adding new ways to play and win, new tools to manage and expand your civilization, all-new easy to use mod capabilities and intense multiplayer modes and options*. Civilization IV will come to life like never before in a beautifully detailed, living 3D world that will elevate the gameplay experience to a whole new level. Civilization IV has already been heralded as one of the top ten games of 2005, and a must-have for gamers around the globe! *Mac version's Online Multiplayer is no longer supported.

**Divinity: Original Sin 2 - Definitive Edition: Forge Your Divine Path**

The Divine is dead, and the encroaching Void threatens all of existence. Within you lie dormant powers, poised to awaken and shape the destiny of Rivellon. The battle for Divinity has commenced, demanding wise choices and cautious trust, as darkness resides in every heart. Who will you become in this new era of Divinity?

**Your Divine Identity:**

*   **Choose your race:** Will you be a flesh-eating Elf, an Imperial Lizard, or an Undead, resurrected from the grave?
*   **Experience unique reactions:** Discover how the world responds differently based on your chosen race and origin.
*   **Select from origin characters:** Embark on quests with 6 unique origin characters, each possessing their own rich backgrounds.
*   **Create your own hero:** Alternatively, craft your own character as a Human, Lizard, Elf, Dwarf, or Undead.

Every decision carries weight, and the world of Rivellon offers unparalleled freedom for exploration and experimentation. Go anywhere, converse with anyone, and interact with everything. As noted by Larian Studios, the developers, you can even eliminate NPCs without hindering your progress and converse with every animal, as ghosts may also hold hidden secrets.

**Revolutionary Turn-Based Combat:**

Prepare for the next generation of tactical combat. As highlighted in game reviews, players can unleash devastating elemental combinations and leverage environmental advantages, including height, to secure victory. Master over 200 skills across 12 distinct skill schools. However, be warned: the game's AI 2.0 is designed to be exceptionally challenging.

**Unleash Your Imagination:**

*   **Cooperative Play:** Explore the vast and intricate world of Rivellon alone or with a party of up to 4 players in a seamless drop-in/drop-out cooperative experience.
*   **Multiplayer Options:** Engage in online multiplayer or local split-screen with full controller support for up to 4 players.
*   **Game Master Mode:** Elevate your adventures by crafting your own narratives and campaigns within the Game Master Mode.
*   **Community Content:** Download fan-made campaigns and mods directly from the Steam Workshop.
*   **Visual Fidelity:** Experience an ultimate 4K visual journey that propels RPGs into a new era.

**Company of Heroes: Your Gateway to WWII Real-Time Strategy**

The Company of Heroes Legacy Edition provides access to the latest version of this celebrated World War II real-time strategy (RTS) game, now simply titled 'Company of Heroes,' available on Steam. For the best online experience and to connect with the active COH1 Steam Community and its vibrant Modding scene, using the updated version is strongly advised. Further resources and community engagement opportunities are available through the COH1 Community Hub and the COH1 Steam Workshop.

Company of Heroes delivers a deeply immersive and visceral World War II experience, revolutionizing the RTS genre. It vividly portrays the sacrifices of soldiers, the environmental impact of war, and the dynamic nature of battlefield combat. The game begins with the D-Day Invasion of Normandy, where players command Allied squads against the German forces, progressing through key WWII engagements. The single-player campaign immerses players in the cinematic intensity and bravery of soldiers facing extraordinary circumstances, capturing the turmoil of WWII with remarkable detail.

The game's strategic depth is defined by several core mechanics. Intelligent Squad AI ensures soldiers dynamically react to their environment, seeking cover and employing sophisticated tactics. Developed with Relic's advanced engine, the game features cutting-edge visuals and a physics-driven, destructible environment, allowing players to reshape the battlefield. This environmental strategy, where buildings and terrain offer crucial cover or deny resources, was a benchmark for RTS titles. Robust multiplayer modes for 2-8 players, via LAN or online, offer intense strategic showdowns between Axis and Allied forces.

## Company of Heroes: A Groundbreaking WWII Real-Time Strategy Experience

Company of Heroes delivers a visceral and immersive World War II gaming experience, fundamentally redefining the real-time strategy (RTS) genre. It brings to life the sacrifice of soldiers, the devastation of war-torn environments, and the dynamism of intense battlefields. This acclaimed title plunges players into pivotal WWII conflicts, beginning with the D-Day invasion of Normandy.

### Lead Allied Forces Through Pivotal WWII Battles

In Company of Heroes, players command Allied soldiers against the German war machine. The game's rich single-player campaign offers a cinematic experience, highlighting the bravery of ordinary soldiers in harrowing events. This narrative approach captures the turmoil of WWII with depth and realism, as noted in many player reviews.

### Advanced AI and Environmental Interaction

The game's advanced squad AI makes soldiers feel alive, as they dynamically interact with the environment. They instinctively seek cover and use tactics to overcome enemies. This intelligent AI ensures each engagement feels organic and challenging, a feature frequently praised in user feedback.

### Stunning Visuals and a Destructible World

Powered by Relic's engine, Company of Heroes boasts graphic quality and a physics-driven world that was unprecedented for its time in the RTS genre. Environmental strategy is key, with real-time physics and a completely destructible environment guaranteeing no two battles unfold identically. Players can destroy almost anything, reshaping the battlefield to their advantage. Buildings and terrain can be used for cover or denied to adversaries.

### Engage in Multiplayer Competition
