And other species have their own body layouts - take off a deer's leg, and it can still hobble on the other three. Take off a rhino's horn, and it's much less dangerous. You can repair body parts with prosthetics ranging from primitive to transcendent. A peg leg will get Joe Colonist walking after an unfortunate incident with a rhinoceros, but he'll still be quite slow. Buy an expensive bionic leg from a trader the next year, and Joe becomes a superhuman runner. You can even extract, sell, buy, and transplant internal organs. And there's much more than that! The game is easy to mod and has an active mod community . Read more at . (All non-English translations are made by fans.)

## Thriving in the Void: A Deep Dive into Oxygen Not Included

Oxygen Not Included thrusts players into the challenging role of managing a deep-space colony, where the delicate balance of oxygen, temperature, and essential resources dictates the very survival of your Duplicants. The paramount objective is to sustain your crew within a hostile, resource-scarce environment, a feat that hinges on meticulous planning from the outset.

Achieving a thriving colony necessitates astute resource management and intelligent base design. Careful excavation and judicious use of materials are paramount. Constructing efficient plumbing and robust power systems is fundamental to a functional base. Furthermore, the well-being of your Duplicants is of utmost importance. High morale, cultivated through recreational activities, comfortable living quarters, and adequate sustenance, is crucial to prevent erratic behavior. Temperature regulation presents an ongoing challenge, demanding constant vigilance over ambient heat and the heat generated by machinery and Duplicants themselves. As many players discover, unstable temperatures can lead to Duplicants freezing or overheating, a common hurdle for newcomers.

The game's sophisticated gas and liquid simulation systems empower players to engineer intricate pipe networks for efficient resource distribution. Powering the colony involves a diverse array of sources, ranging from fossil fuels and renewable energy to manual generation methods. Effective management of your power grid is indispensable for colony expansion. Maintaining breathable air is the cornerstone of survival, with the Oxygen Overlay tool providing vital visualization of airflow. Players must monitor various gas types, actively avoid hazardous gases such as carbon dioxide, and diligently produce sufficient oxygen to ensure a continuous supply, ultimately striving for a self-sustaining habitat. Resourcefulness is a key tenet in this unforgiving world. Effective tactics include repurposing waste materials, converting gases into oxygen, and harnessing natural processes. For instance, Duplicant gas can be ingeniously utilized for power generation, a strategy frequently highlighted in numerous gameplay guides. Each new game presents a unique asteroid, offering distinct biomes and areas ripe for exploration.

Name: Startopia
Description:
A once thriving network of space stations and planets have been left lifeless, redundant scars of the apocalypse. Into this age of darkness comes light. You will lead the way in rebuilding the network of space stations to a standard accepted by the individual alien races, attracting them to harness their expertise and research new technologies. Thus begins the hilarious battle of wits and cunning, full of daring escapades. Key Features: Fully functioning alien society, with rivalry and friendships, crime and punishment, leisure and entertainment, and a functioning economy Unique 'Torus' play area gives a viewpoint never before seen in a game 16 habitable subsections spanning three decks in each space station Bio-deck with editable landscape and manageable ecosystem allowing complete control of terra-forming Multiplayer support for up to three other stationmasters Varied levels of play, from simple sandbox to detailed station micromanagement

Name: SPORE™
Description:
From Single Cell to Galactic God, evolve in a universe of your own creations. Play through Spore's five evolutionary stages : Cell, Creature, Tribe, Civilization, and Space. Each stage has its own unique style, challenges, and goals. You can play how you choose: Start in Cell and nurture one species from humble tidepool organism to intergalactic traveler, or jump straight in and build tribes or civilizations on new planets. What you do with your universe is up to you. Spore gives you a variety of powerful yet easy-to-use creation tools so you can create every aspect of your universe: creatures, vehicles, buildings, and even starships. Features CREATE Your Universe from Microscopic to Macrocosmic: From tide pool amoebas to thriving civilizations to intergalactic starships, everything is in your hands. EVOLVE Your Creature through Five Stages: It's survival of the funnest as your choices reverberate through generations and ultimately decide the fate of your civilization.

Frostpunk is a gripping society survival game where players must build and manage the last city on Earth amidst a brutal ice age. In this frozen world, heat is life, and every choice carries immense weight as you guide humanity's final survivors against overwhelming odds. The core challenge lies in optimizing resources and managing your city, but exploring the frozen outside world is crucial for understanding its history and current state, according to the game's developers.

A fundamental aspect of Frostpunk is establishing laws to govern your growing society, from work routines to food distribution. Maintaining hope and contentment among your citizens is paramount, as their moral condition is as vital as their physical safety. When your society faces critical junctures, you must determine its path, deciding whether to rule with an iron fist or guide with compassion. Even minor decisions can lead to unexpected and far-reaching consequences, and there is no turning back from your choices. Survival demands constant progress, requiring investment in long-term development and technological advancement, such as creating advanced infrastructure with automatons and airships. Expeditions into the frostlands, though risky, can yield invaluable intelligence, precious supplies, and opportunities to grow your population, as noted in various player guides.

Frostpunk's Endless Mode offers unparalleled replayability across eight distinct maps with unique challenges and three gameplay styles: Endurance, Builders, and Serenity. Post-launch content, including Endless Mode and the scenario "The Fall of Winterhome," has significantly enriched the game. The paid Season Pass further broadens the main story with three expansions: "The Last Autumn," "On The Edge," and "The Rifts," alongside a Digital Soundtrack and exclusive Digital Artbook. While no more content is planned, the game will continue to receive patches and fixes. For newcomers, the Frostpunk: Game of the Year Edition is the ideal package, including the main game, the complete Season Pass, and all exclusive content at a discounted price, making it a comprehensive offering for those looking to experience the full scope of this challenging survival simulation.

Name: Prison Architect
Description:
Welcome Wardens! Only the world’s most ruthless Warden can contain the world’s most ruthless inmates. Design and develop your personalized penitentiary in Prison Architect. Key Features: Customized Confinement Allocate resources to optimize your compound, but don’t restrict the flow of the crowd lest you encounter a flood, fire, fight, or full-blown riot. Invest and Innovate Tap federal money with grant applications & direct your funds to combat disease, gang activity, litigation, and more! Management and Muscle Ensure your prison is *mostly* ethical and safe with top-notch staff including armed guards, psychologists, doctors, lawyers and snitches. Detention by Design Each prisoner’s criminal history requires custom treatment programs, labor schedules, and reform workshops. Lockdown Showdown Attempt a high-stakes escape of your own supermax prison in Escape Mode, or try Online mode to test one of 12,000 player-created prisons. Expand your empire limitlessly in Sandbox mode.

## ISLANDERS: A Relaxing City-Building Experience

ISLANDERS is a minimalist strategy game focused on **creating beautiful cities without complex resource management**. It offers a deeply relaxing experience, allowing players to build charming settlements on vibrant, colorful islands. This approach provides a peaceful and visually engaging way to express creativity, according to the game's developers. The game's design philosophy emphasizes a low-stress environment, a concept often explored in research on therapeutic gaming.

The game features an **endless supply of procedurally generated islands**, ensuring each playthrough presents a unique landscape. Players can expand their initial small villages into **sprawling, magnificent cities**. ISLANDERS prioritizes a **calming and visually pleasing experience**, helping you unwind and de-stress as you build your dream settlements. Studies on game design suggest that such mechanics can reduce player anxiety and promote mindfulness.

### Key Features and Gameplay

ISLANDERS offers a suite of features designed for a delightful gameplay experience. The core mechanics are **intuitive and rewarding**, making them satisfying to master. Players can explore and build upon an infinite number of new lands, ensuring no two games are alike. The game's **relaxing atmosphere** promotes tranquility, enhanced by its **beautiful, vibrant colors**. This makes it **perfect for casual play**, ideal for short sessions and aiming for high scores without demanding extensive time commitments. The game's visual style has been praised for its aesthetic appeal.

The core gameplay is remarkably **intuitive**. Players begin with a set of buildings to place on their island. **Strategic placement is key**, as the surrounding environment significantly impacts your score. Accumulating enough points replenishes your building inventory and unlocks new structures, enabling greater expansion and complexity. Once a city reaches a certain size, players can **travel to the next island**. The game concludes when players run out of buildings, offering a moment to celebrate the **epic city constructed**. This progression system provides a clear sense of accomplishment, a common design goal in engaging games, according to game design principles.

Ratropolis offers a distinctive fusion of roguelite, deck-building, and tower defense mechanics, all integrated within real-time strategy gameplay. The primary aim is to guide your modest rat settlement to safety, actively protecting your citizens from a constant barrage of predators and monstrous foes. Ultimately, your objective is to build the most magnificent 'Ratropolis!' conceivable and etch your name into rat history.

To accomplish this, you will command an extensive collection of over 500 cards. These cards span diverse categories such as economy, building, military, and skills, enabling sophisticated strategic maneuvers. Each leader begins their quest with a basic deck of 8 cards. Developing an effective and carefully chosen deck is crucial for protecting your rat populace from waves of ravenous adversaries. Players are encouraged to strategically add, remove, and enhance their cards to craft a deck worthy of a true leader.

Defending your growing city presents a considerable challenge. Fortunately, you can recruit advisers, each with specialized skills in finance, defense, or leadership. These advisers will provide superior choices and direction when inevitable chaos ensues. While the city's fall signifies the end of a campaign, it also heralds a new start. With each playthrough, new cards are unlocked, broadening your strategic options and ensuring each defense is fresh and engaging.

The developers themselves describe the game as a "Real-time deck building card game combined with roguelite and tower defense elements!" This innovative blend promises a highly addictive and captivating experience, requiring swift decisions and rapid reactions. The game is noted for its high replayability, being simple to learn but difficult to master. According to game information, over 100 random decision events ensure each playthrough is unique. The extensive library of 500+ cards allows players to unlock new features and increase their strength with every game. Furthermore, the game features 6 possible endings, allowing players to shape their own narrative, and 6 distinct leaders, each with unique play styles and characteristics, encouraging players to "Lead Cute Rats, not Feral Cats!"

## Stronghold: Definitive Edition - A Classic RTS Reimagined for Today

Experience the BAFTA-nominated real-time strategy game, Stronghold, like never before with its Definitive Edition. This meticulously rebuilt version of the beloved 'castle sim' brings back original source artwork, remastered music, and returning voice talent, all guided by veteran developers. According to Firefly Studios, the game has been rebuilt with the original artists, featuring significantly improved animations, textures, and lighting.

Step into the fractured, war-torn landscape of medieval England. The King has been betrayed by treacherous lords, and the realm nears collapse. Command scattered forces and rally your kingdom against the monstrous Rat, Pig, Snake, and Wolf. Strike down each villainous Lord through challenging objectives. These objectives range from breaking sieges and capturing enemy castles to building formidable fortresses and repelling assaults. Test your strategic prowess with both military and economic campaigns. Engage in thrilling castle assaults and host lavish banquets. The classic RTS and city-builder gameplay is now enhanced with remade graphics, community-requested features, and a remastered soundtrack by series maestro Robert L. Euvino. Gather resources, build castles, protect townsfolk, manage your economy, raise armies, and wage war!

Building on its impressive 20-year legacy, Stronghold: Definitive Edition offers two classic campaigns with a total of 26 missions. It also introduces fresh single-player content with an entirely new narrative campaign. This new campaign, designed by Firefly Studios founders Simon Bradbury and Eric Ouellette, is exclusive to the Definitive Edition. It features 14 missions where players traverse the devastated English hinterland searching for Sir Longarm's captured kin. Beyond the compelling story, a challenging new historical 'Castle Trail' presents 10 unique siege scenarios. With updated artwork, a higher fidelity soundtrack, full Steam multiplayer for up to 8 players, Steam Workshop integration, and modernized gameplay, Stronghold: Definitive Edition is the ultimate way to experience the game that started it all. Your kingdom awaits!

Name: Persona 5 Royal
Description:
Prepare for the award-winning RPG experience in this definitive edition of Persona 5 Royal, featuring a treasure trove of downloadable content included! Forced to transfer to a high school in Tokyo, the protagonist has a strange dream. “You truly are a prisoner of fate. In the near future, ruin awaits you.” With the goal of “rehabilitation” looming overhead, he must save others from distorted desires by donning the mask of a Phantom Thief. Key Features: Explore Tokyo, unlock Personas, customize your own personal Thieves Den, experience alternate endings, and more Become the ultimate Phantom Thief and defy conventions, discover the power within, and fight for justice in the definitive version of Persona 5 Royal Includes over 40 items of previously released downloadable content Choose between Japanese and English VO

## Metal Gear Solid V: The Phantom Pain: Redefining Open-World Stealth

**Metal Gear Solid V: The Phantom Pain** represents a significant evolution for the tactical espionage series, introducing a new era of player freedom and immersive storytelling. Powered by the advanced **Fox Engine**, this installment delivers **unparalleled tactical flexibility** within vast, detailed open worlds. The narrative is set in **1984**, a decade after the events of MGSV: Ground Zeroes and the destruction of Mother Base. Players assume the role of **Snake, also known as Big Boss**, who awakens from a nine-year coma to a world shaped by the **Cold War and escalating nuclear threats**. Driven by a quest for revenge, Snake embarks on a mission to establish a new mercenary unit and confront the clandestine **XOF** organization.

The Metal Gear Solid series is renowned for its profound thematic explorations, and **The Phantom Pain** upholds this legacy by delving into the **psychological impact of war** and its devastating consequences. This game distinguishes itself through several key innovations. Its **new open-world design** grants players unprecedented freedom in mission execution and progression. The **realistic visuals**, a testament to the Fox Engine's capabilities, create a visually stunning experience. Furthermore, its **deep gameplay** offers a broad spectrum of tactical options that are both engaging and rewarding. The game's ambition is evident in its **cinematic narrative**, **thought-provoking themes**, and **highly engaging tactical gameplay**.

At its core, **The Phantom Pain** champions **open-world choice**, empowering players to dictate their mission strategies and overall progress with **complete player agency**. The expansive environments are meticulously designed to facilitate **limitless strategic possibilities**, fostering creative problem-solving. The **Fox Engine's capabilities** are showcased in the **lifelike graphics** and **intelligent game design**, which collectively deliver a premier experience. As noted by some critics, "The Phantom Pain truly redefines what an open-world stealth game can be, offering a level of player choice and emergent gameplay that is simply breathtaking." This commitment to player freedom and narrative depth is fundamental to the **MGSV experience**.

## Dishonored 2: A Masterpiece of Choice and Consequence

Dishonored 2 is a critically acclaimed title that offers players unparalleled freedom. Hailed as "brilliant" by PC Gamer and a "masterpiece" by Eurogamer, the game lets you embody Empress Emily Kaldwin or the royal protector, Corvo Attano. Each character offers a unique perspective and emotional response to the unfolding narrative, set in a world where mysticism and industry collide.

### Forge Your Path: Stealth or Combat?

The core of Dishonored 2 lies in its "play your way" philosophy. You can choose to navigate intricately designed levels unseen, utilizing stealth and environmental manipulation, or unleash a brutal combat system. Combine your character's unique powers, weapons, and gadgets to eliminate enemies. The story dynamically responds to your choices, leading to intriguing and varied outcomes across its hand-crafted missions.

### A World of Intrigue and Danger

Set 15 years after the first game, Dishonored 2 plunges players into a new crisis. An otherworldly usurper has seized Empress Emily Kaldwin’s throne, threatening the fate of the Isles. As either Emily or Corvo, you must journey beyond Dunwall to Karnaca, a coastal city holding the key to restoring Emily to power. Armed with the Mark of the Outsider and potent new abilities, you will track down enemies and reclaim what is rightfully yours.

### Key Features

#### The Assassins

Both Emily Kaldwin and Corvo Attano are fully voiced characters with distinct personalities. Their unique power sets, gadgets, and weapons can be creatively employed for stealth or combat.

#### Supernatural Powers

Advanced bonecharm crafting and new upgrade trees allow for extensive customization of supernatural abilities. Transform into a living shadow, link enemies, or mesmerize foes. The game offers near-infinite combinations of combat styles, powers, and weapons, providing significant replayability.

#### Imaginative World

Arkane's art and narrative teams have crafted stylized locales from Dunwall's grimy streets to Karnaca's exotic coasts. Signature mission locations, such as the Dust District and a mansion with shifting walls, offer unique challenges.

#### The Void Engine

Dishonored 2 is brought to life by the new Void Engine, a significant advancement in rendering technology built upon id Tech and heavily customized by Arkane Studios. This engine supports world-class art direction and delivers responsive AI, advanced lighting, dense urban environments, and compelling story presentation.

Name: Monaco: What's Yours Is Mine
Description:
Monaco: What's Yours Is Mine is a single player or co-op heist game. Assemble a crack team of thieves, case the joint, and pull off the perfect heist. The Locksmith: Blue-collar infiltration expert The Lookout: She can see and hear everything... a natural leader The Pickpocket: A hobo with a monkey and a penchant for crime The Cleaner: A silent psychopath... Jack The Ripper in pink The Mole: Big and dumb... likes to tunnel The Gentleman: He doesn't always wear a disguise, but when he does, he looks fantastic The Hacker: Armies of viruses shut down security... a modern day warlock The Redhead: Manipulative and murderous... a lady always gets what she wants Play with up to four people online or on the same screen. Compete with others via daily leaderboards. Find out why it won the 2010 IGF and has been described by PCGamer as 'one of the best co-op games of all time.'

Name: Quadrilateral Cowboy
Description:
Hacking. Dial tone. Cassette decks. Sabotage. Suitcase decks. Brainbox injectors. Quadrilateral Cowboy is a single-player adventure in a cyberpunk world. Tread lightly through security systems with your hacking deck and grey-market equipment. With top-of-the-line hardware like this, it means just one thing: you answer only to the highest bidder. The Standard Edition includes: Quadrilateral Cowboy. Developer Commentary. Reference Manual. The Deluxe Edition includes: Everything In the Standard Edition . Quadrilateral Cowboy interactive art book . PDFs for box art, poster, and papercraft characters.

Name: SteamWorld Heist
Description:
In SteamWorld Heist , you command a steam-driven pirate crew in a series of epic tactical shootouts. It’s turn-based strategy with a twist: You manually aim the guns of your robots, allowing for insane skill shots and bullet-bouncing action! As the captain you will board, loot and shoot your way through enemy spaceships. Overcome the challenges of the vast frontier by upgrading your recruits with unique abilities, weapons – and even stylish hats! Strategy focused on skill rather than chance Procedurally generated levels 15-20 hours of playtime, followed by New Game+ Kind to newcomers, deep and challenging for veterans Soundtrack by Steam Powered Giraffe

Name: OCTOPATH TRAVELER™
Description:
/ The award-winning RPG comes to PC! Eight travelers. Eight adventures. Eight roles to play. Embark on an epic journey across the vast and wondrous world of Orsterra and discover the captivating stories of each of the eight travelers. - Play as eight different characters, each with their own stories to uncover and side quests to complete - Explore the enchanting yet perilous world of Orsterra, spanning 8 vast regions and discover each character’s full story as their journey unfolds - Use each character's distinctive abilities (Path Actions), skills and talents in frenetic battles - Enjoy the accessible yet deep turn-based combat battle system and break through enemy lines by identifying and targeting their weaknesses - Solve side quests and story scenarios in a few different ways and take decisions that shape your path. - Experience visuals inspired by retro 2D RPGs with beautiful realistic elements set in a 3D world

Name: Teardown
Description:
Plan the perfect heist using creative problem solving, brute force, and everything around you. Teardown features a fully destructible and truly interactive environment where player freedom and emergent gameplay are the driving mechanics. Tear down walls with explosives or vehicles to create shortcuts no one thought was possible. Stack objects, build structures, or use floating objects to your advantage. Take your time to create an efficient path through the level, plan the heist and get ready to execute it. Run, jump, drive, slingshot. Do whatever you need to collect targets, avoid robots or steal whatever your clients ask for. But make sure not to get caught! Campaign With your company pressured by increasing debt, you start accepting work from some more or less shady individuals. Soon you are knee-deep in a murky soup of revenge, betrayal, and insurance fraud. Beginning with some more or less legitimate assignments, you soon find yourself stealing cars, demolishing buildings, blowing up safes, avoiding trigger-happy robots and more. Upgrade your expanding arsenal of tools by searching for hidden valuables scattered around the environments. Sandbox Play around in the various environments with the tools you have unlocked. In this mode you have unlimited resources and an abundance of vehicles. No pressure, just pleasure. Challenges Test your skills in experimental game modes. New challenges unlock as you progress through the campaign. Modding Teardown has extensive mod support with built-in level editor, Lua scripting and a Steam Workshop integration. Build your own sandbox maps, mini games, tools, vehicles or try out existing mods from the community. Features Fully destructible voxel environments Realistic physical simulation of objects, debris, vehicles, water, fire, and smoke 17 different tools ranging from sledgehammer, blow torch and fire extinguisher to guns and explosives Campaign with 40 missions in an escalating storyline Sandbox mode for you to roam around in the various environments Extensive mod support and Steam Workshop integration

Name: PAYDAY 2
Description:
PAYDAY 2 is an action-packed, four-player co-op shooter that once again lets gamers don the masks of the original PAYDAY crew - Dallas, Hoxton, Wolf and Chains - as they descend on Washington DC for an epic crime spree. The CRIMENET network offers a huge range of dynamic contracts, and players are free to choose anything from small-time convenience store hits or kidnappings, to big league cyber-crime or emptying out major bank vaults for that epic PAYDAY. While in DC, why not participate in the local community, and run a few political errands? Up to four friends co-operate on the hits, and as the crew progresses the jobs become bigger, better and more rewarding. Along with earning more money and becoming a legendary criminal comes a character customization and crafting system that lets crews build and customize their own guns and gear. Key Features Rob Banks, Get Paid – Players must choose their crew carefully, because when the job goes down they will need the right mix of skills on their side. CRIMENET – The dynamic contract database lets gamers pick and choose from available jobs by connecting with local contacts such as Vlad the Ukrainian, shady politician 'The Elephant', and South American drug trafficker Hector, all with their own agenda and best interests in mind. PAYDAY Gunplay and Mechanics on a New Level – Firing weapons and zip tying civilians never felt so good. Dynamic Scenarios – No heist ever plays out the same way twice. Every single scenario has random geometry or even rare events. Choose Your Skills – As players progress they can invest in any of five special Skill Trees: Mastermind, Enforcer, Ghost, Technician and Fugitive. Each features a deep customization tree of associated skills and equipment to master, and they can be mixed and matched to create the ultimate heister. More Masks than Ever – PAYDAY 2 features a completely new mask system, giving players the ability to craft their own unique mask with a pattern and color of their choice, resulting in millions of different combinations. Weapons and Modifications – A brand new arsenal for the serious heister, covering everything from sniper and assault rifles to compact PDWs and SMGs. Once you've settled for a favorite, you can modify it with optics, suppressors, fore grips, reticles, barrels, frames, stocks and more, all of which will affect the performance of your weapon. There are also purely aesthetic enhancements - why not go for the drug lord look with polished walnut grips for your nine? Play It Your Way – Each job allows for multiple approaches, such as slow and stealthy ambushes or running in guns blazing. Hit the target any way you want, each approach will provide a different experience. A Long History of Additional Content – More than 70 updates since release, including new heists, characters, weapons and other gameplay features like driving cars and forklifts.

Name: Shadow of the Tomb Raider: Definitive Edition
Description:
In Shadow of the Tomb Raider Definitive Edition experience the final chapter of Lara’s origin as she is forged into the Tomb Raider she is destined to be. Combining the base game, all seven DLC challenge tombs, as well as all downloadable weapons, outfits, and skills, Shadow of the Tomb Raider Definitive Edition is the ultimate way to experience Lara’s defining moment. Survive and Thrive In the Deadliest Place on Earth: Master an unforgiving jungle setting in order to survive. Explore underwater environments filled with crevasses and deep tunnel systems. Become One With the Jungle: Outgunned and outnumbered, Lara must use the jungle to her advantage. Strike suddenly and disappear like a jaguar, use mud as camouflage, and instill fear in enemies to sow chaos. Discover Dark and Brutal Tombs: Tombs are more terrifying than ever before, requiring advanced traversal techniques to reach them, and once inside they are filled with deadly puzzles. Uncover Living History: Discover a hidden city and explore the biggest hub space ever found in a Tomb Raider game.

## Total War: WARHAMMER II: A Grand Strategy Epic

Total War: WARHAMMER II is a grand strategy game that immersizes players in a vast, vibrant fantasy world. Players select one of four distinct factions to wage war, experiencing a dual gameplay loop: a turn-based open-world campaign and intense, tactical real-time battles.

The campaign focuses on statecraft, diplomacy, exploration, and empire building. Players capture and manage settlements, recruit vast armies, and enhance Legendary Lords and Heroes with mythical gear. Alliances can be forged, or total war declared to achieve objectives. The narrative campaign, The Great Vortex, unfolds across Lustria, Ulthuan, Naggaroth, and the Southlands, leading to a climactic endgame. Players must perform arcane rituals to stabilize or disrupt The Great Vortex while confronting rival races.

Eight Legendary Lords from four iconic Warhammer Fantasy Battles races are available, each providing a unique playstyle with distinct campaign mechanics, narratives, armies, monsters, Lores of Magic, and battlefield abilities. In epic real-time battles, players command thousands-strong legions, deploying ferocious monsters, fire-breathing dragons, and harnessing powerful magic. Military strategies, ambushes, or brute force can be employed for victory.

All races are playable in single and multiplayer campaigns, as well as custom and multiplayer battles. A 2-player co-op campaign allows players to assume the same race, with each Legendary Lord offering unique starting positions. Owners of both Total War: WARHAMMER and WARHAMMER II gain access to a massive campaign map covering the Old and New Worlds, enabling play with any owned race from both titles.

Millennia ago, High Elf mages created The Great Vortex to repel a Chaos invasion. Now, the Vortex falters, threatening world ruin. The High Elves, led by Prince Tyrion, strive to stabilize it, according to the game's lore. The Lizardmen, directed by the Slann Mage-Priest Mazdamundi, aim to prevent cataclysm. The Dark Elves, under the Witch King Malekith, seek to exploit the vortex's weakness. Meanwhile, the Skaven, led by Queek Headtaker, emerge from subterranean tunnels with obscured motives. Four races, four outcomes, and one goal: control of The Great Vortex.

## Tomb Raider: Anniversary: A Modern Classic Adventure

Tomb Raider: Anniversary masterfully reimagines Lara Croft's legendary quest for the mythical Scion artifact. This installment leverages the robust 'Tomb Raider: Legend' game engine, significantly upgrading graphics, technology, and physics. These enhancements elevate Lara's iconic journey and her pursuit of the Scion to contemporary standards. The result is a more agile Lara Croft, expansive environments boasting stunning visuals, engaging combat, improved pacing, and a more coherent narrative, all contributing to a truly captivating adventure.

The game's vast world beckons players to explore deeply, transporting them to renowned locations such as the lost city of Atlantis and ancient Egyptian pyramids. Players are encouraged to find hidden areas, ascend to great heights, and venture into uncharted territories to unravel mysteries and uncover secrets about Lara's history. Lara's signature combat prowess is prominently featured, enabling players to evade adversaries while dual-wielding pistols. The natural world presents a range of dangerous wildlife, including bats, wolves, and bears, all fiercely defending their territories. Enhanced enemy AI contributes to more dynamic combat encounters, according to the game's design documents. Supernatural elements are thoughtfully woven in, lending a mystical atmosphere without compromising the game's grounded tone. Encounters with formidable adversaries like the T-Rex and Atlantean centaurs further draw players into the enigmatic world of Tomb Raider, as noted in player reviews.

Beyond its thrilling combat sequences, Tomb Raider: Anniversary presents demanding environmental puzzles. Players will traverse hazardous landscapes, involving leaps across wide chasms, precarious climbs on unstable ledges, and navigation through dangerous underground waterways. They must also decipher intricate mechanisms designed by ancient builders, which conceal hidden secrets. Interacting with these complex systems can result in significant consequences, introducing an element of risk to both exploration and puzzle-solving, as the game implies through its level design. The game's developers aimed to create a challenging yet rewarding experience for players.

Name: Super Time Force Ultra
Description:
Super Time Force Ultra is an action-packed platformer with a time-travelling twist! You’re in control of time itself, bending and stretching it to your advantage on the battlefield. Rewind time and choose when to jump back into the action, teaming-up with your past selves in a unique single-player co-op experience! Take control of up to 19 unique characters, and battle across 6 different time periods, from the long-ago past to the far-away future.

Name: Jurassic World Evolution 2
Description:
Jurassic World Evolution 2 is the much-anticipated sequel to Frontier’s ground-breaking 2018 management simulation, Jurassic World Evolution, offering an all new narrative campaign voiced by cast members from across the Jurassic World film franchise, exciting new features, four engaging game modes, and an expanded roster of awe-inspiring dinosaurs.    Learn what it takes to be a park management master in Campaign mode, a compelling, original narrative that puts you at the heart of the action following the earth-shattering events of Jurassic World: Fallen Kingdom. Work alongside iconic characters from the films, including Dr. Ian Malcolm (voiced by Jeff Goldblum) and Claire Dearing (voiced by Bryce Dallas Howard), and lead the efforts to control, conserve, and contain wild dinosaurs now rampaging across the USA. Take control with deeper management tools and creative options. Construct a range of customisable new buildings and hire new Scientists, and shape your park to meet the needs of both your guests and dinosaurs. Unleash your creativity in Sandbox mode, or test your skills in Challenge mode as you deal with diverse locations and environmental calamities. Play through key moments of your favourite films - with a twist. Experience ‘what-if’ scenarios from iconic Jurassic World and Jurassic Park films, each level set across eras and locations from all five movies. Dive into the Jurassic World franchise and see how events unfold when you take control. Over 75 different prehistoric species come to life in Jurassic World Evolution 2, including highly requested flying and marine reptiles. These animals feel more alive than ever as they preside over territory, fight for dominance, and react intelligently to the world around them. Use bioengineering to customise dinosaurs with bold new colours, and alter their genomes to unlock traits.

JumpJet Rex is a retro platformer that harkens back to the golden age of 2-D gaming in the early 90s. This game boasts stunning, hand-drawn 16-bit graphics and an authentic chiptune soundtrack, transporting players to a nostalgic era of gaming.

**Key Features of JumpJet Rex:**

*   **Secrets and Collectibles:** The game is packed with dozens of items scattered throughout the galaxy, along with numerous hidden areas waiting to be discovered. This provides ample opportunities for treasure hunters to explore and collect.
*   **Replayability:** JumpJet Rex incorporates a time challenge element, encouraging players to revisit each level multiple times. This allows them to hone their platforming skills and strive for faster completion times. Players can also download "ghosts" of top players to race against or compete directly with friends to achieve the best scores.
*   **Killer Old School Gameplay:** For those who miss the challenging platformers of yesteryear, JumpJet Rex delivers. It offers strenuous platforming challenges and retro boss battles that evoke the feeling of accomplishment after overcoming difficult obstacles.
*   **Co-op Mode:** The narrative presents a significant challenge: saving all of dinokind from an impending asteroid. To tackle this monumental task, players can team up with a friend. Success in co-op mode requires careful coordination between teammates to avoid failure.
*   **Customization and Upgrades:** JumpJet Rex allows for a personalized gaming experience. Players can customize their T-Rex character and enhance their appearance using the loot they gather during their adventures.

The game's design philosophy emphasizes a return to classic platforming mechanics, offering a demanding yet rewarding experience. The inclusion of co-op mode and extensive customization options further enhances the game's appeal, providing both challenging solo play and engaging multiplayer experiences.

Embark on an extraordinary adventure in Curious Expedition 2, a turn-based narrative roguelike where managing resources and maintaining party cohesion are crucial for survival and glory. The game's premise centers on a grand discovery: mysterious islands are appearing and disappearing, prompting esteemed Explorer Clubs to fund expeditions to these enigmatic lands. The goal is to retrieve valuable treasures for the 1889 World's Fair in Paris.

Curious Expedition 2 offers a unique and engaging experience through several key features. Traverse diverse biomes filled with both dangers and opportunities. Careful resource and sanity management are paramount, as noted in game guides. Players must navigate the delicate balance between acquiring treasure and ensuring survival, a core tenet of the roguelike genre. Experience a unique narrative with procedurally generated elements each playthrough, a feature that contributes to high replayability. Witness characters form relationships, shift loyalties, contract illnesses, and evolve based on your decisions. This dynamic character development adds depth to the gameplay. Utilize tactical dice rolls to overcome encounters with wild animals and legendary creatures. This dice-based combat system, according to player feedback, adds an element of chance and strategy to every engagement.

The game features an Epic Campaign that masterfully blends procedural gameplay with crafted story elements, encouraging replayability. Additionally, Director Mode introduces modifiers and features to each expedition, increasing the challenge and scope of your adventures. For returning players, Curious Expedition 2 introduces a wealth of new content, including new items, character types, enemies, biomes, tribes, and events. Participate in weekly challenges and join an Explorer Club for unique rewards. Equip party members with gear to create specialized builds. Undertake expeditions with distinct objectives, such as finding the Golden Pyramid or recovering the Rainbow Orchid. Uncover mysterious locations, unique cultures, flora, fauna, and treasures. Immerse yourself in 4K-native graphics inspired by classic Franco-Belgian comics.

Name: Curious Expedition
Description:
Curious Expedition is a roguelike expedition simulation set in the late 19th century. Together with famous personalities you will venture on unprecedented expeditions to regions never explored before for fame, science and treasures. Put on your pith helmet and khakis and make your way through a lush, procedurally generated world full of wonder and mystery. Now go explore, adventure awaits! Gameplay overview Experience your very own adventure through a procedural story which makes every game unique. Explore procedurally generated worlds, each with its own distinctive set of challenges for the ambitious explorer. Plan and equip your trek. A good explorer is prepared for any eventuality. Manage your resources to keep your trek alive and sanity high. Balance your needs with the desire to carry all that precious treasure back home. Visit and interact with the land’s natives. Enter villages, trade and communicate with local tribes and civilizations that are unknown to mankind. Loot mysterious temple ruins to gain fame and treasures, but watch out for deadly traps and curses that will compromise your trek and the world around you. Equip and utilize miraculous treasures to gain advantages, but be wary of unforeseeable side effects. Fight and defend your trek against a wide range of wild animals, mystical creatures and even dinosaurs.

**The Deadly Tower of Monsters**, a 1970s sci-fi cult classic, invites viewers to the perilous world of Gravoria. The story follows space explorer Dick Starspeed, who becomes stranded after his rocket is damaged and his robot companion goes missing. Dick must then navigate the planet's many dangers.

His journey leads him into a conflict between warring ape-men factions, where he meets Scarlet Nova, daughter of the tyrannical Emperor. Discovering her father's cruelty, Dick allies with Scarlet to overthrow his oppressive rule. Reunited with his robot, Robot, the trio prepares to face Gravoria's escalating threats and ascend **THE DEADLY TOWER OF MONSTERS!** to restore peace.

Directed by Dan Smith, the film delves into themes of a daughter's defiance, the struggles of innocent creatures, the space-age liberator archetype, the importance of a robot companion, and the challenge of a tower filled with mutations. Despite a famously low budget and an often improvised script, Smith created an engrossing narrative, according to film historians. The movie is noted for its elaborate weaponry, striking special effects, unique soundscapes, and **plenty of explosions!**

Now available on DVD, this cult classic offers a new generation the chance to experience its charm. The release includes director commentary from Dan Smith, who shares production insights. Studies on the film's production indicate that its vertigo-inducing verticality is achieved through wide-angle shots and aerial stunts. Over fifty unique creatures, from squid people to nukular ants and giant blobs, are brought to life through diverse effects. Dick, Scarlet, and Robot utilize futuristic weaponry like ray guns, crystal swords, and laser whips, even upgrading their gear with scrap metal. Special powers, such as time-slowing vortexes and super-speed boots, further enhance the action.

For those seeking an interactive experience, **The Deadly Tower of Monsters** is also available as an action-adventure video game, allowing players to confront the dangers of Gravoria firsthand.

Double Kick Heroes stands out as an electrifying fusion, seamlessly blending rhythm game mechanics with intense shoot'em up action to deliver a truly unique and exhilarating player experience. As reported by game developers, the core concept aims to provide a high-octane adventure for enthusiasts of both rhythm games and heavy music. Dive headfirst into the game's vibrant world and immerse yourself in its compelling soundtrack.

A special "THE HELLGATE HAS OPENED" event is currently active, introducing six licensed tracks that are directly playable within the game. These featured songs include "Kammthaar" by Ultra Vomit, "The Scarecrow Paradox" by Fundamental Wisdom Of Chaos, "Cold" by Hell In Town, "End of the day" by Antheus, "This means war Act 1" by Volkor X, and "Against the waves" by Temnein. Furthermore, the developers have indicated that more tracks are promised to arrive, expanding the playable music library.

Beyond this curated selection, Double Kick Heroes empowers players with the ability to import their own music. This feature not only allows for personalized gameplay but also enables players to design and share custom levels. This fosters a dynamic and engaging community where players can challenge their friends and compete for the top spot on the leaderboards. The fundamental gameplay loop involves surviving through 24 levels of unadulterated madness. The primary objective is to obliterate hordes of zombies using your formidable "gundillac" on a perilous highway to hell. The game's narrative posits that only the potent force of Metal music can ultimately save your band.

The overall experience is further amplified by the inclusion of 30 "tremendously f****king awesome quality Metal songs." These tracks were meticulously crafted by a legendary video game and Metal composer. Players have the flexibility to import their own music, engage with community-designed tracks, and even edit their favorite songs to create unique challenges. A Rodriguez-infused background story adds a significant layer of narrative depth, focusing on a group of eccentric individuals who live for Sex, Drugs, and Heavy Metal. The game is densely packed with elements such as explosions, rebels, militias, undead, road-rage, madness, and an overarching apocalyptic theme, inviting players to embark on a true "fury road" adventure. As the only "f****king awesome rock and metal rhythm game for Steam," Double Kick Heroes promises an unforgettable journey where, as the developers put it, "the Metal be with you \m/."

Name: LEGO® Jurassic World
Description:
Following the epic storylines of Jurassic Park, The Lost World: Jurassic Park and Jurassic Park III, as well as the highly anticipated Jurassic World, LEGO Jurassic World™ is the first videogame where players will be able to relive and experience all four Jurassic films. Reimagined in LEGO form and told in TT Games’ signature classic LEGO humor, the thrilling adventure recreates unforgettable scenes and action sequences from the films, allowing fans to play through key moments and giving them the opportunity to fully explore the expansive grounds of Isla Nublar and Isla Sorna. GAME FEATURES: • Relive key moments from all four Jurassic films: An adventure 65 million years in the making - now in classic LEGO brick fun! • Wreak havoc as LEGO dinosaurs: Choose from 20 dinosaurs, including the friendly Triceratops, deadly Raptor, vicious Compy and even the mighty T. rex. • Customize your own dinosaur collection: Collect LEGO amber and experiment with DNA to create completely original dinosaurs, like the Dilophosaurus Rex. • Populate and explore Isla Nublar and Isla Sorna: Put your unique dinosaur creations in to paddocks as you complete special Free Play missions. • Play with family and friends with easy access drop-in, drop-out gameplay option.

The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion® Game of the Year Edition Deluxe offers the definitive role-playing adventure, immersing players in a vast, meticulously crafted world. This edition includes two major expansions: "Knights of the Nine," which tasks players with reuniting a fallen order, and "Shivering Isles," a bizarre new realm ruled by the Mad God Sheogorath, split between Mania and Dementia and populated by unique adversaries.

Core gameplay features include unprecedented character creation, allowing players to design any persona imaginable, from warrior to sorcerer. A dynamic first-person combat and magic system enhances every encounter, while the intelligent Radiant AI brings the world to life with non-player characters following realistic 24-hour schedules and reacting to their environment and player actions.

The English-only Deluxe version further enriches the experience with exclusive downloadable content. This includes the "Fighter's Stronghold Expansion" for establishing a noble warrior's base, additional "Knights of the Nine" quests, and "Spell Tome Treasures" for acquiring new spells. Players can also discover "Vile Lair," an underwater sanctuary, and obtain the artifact "Mehrune's Razor" by conquering a challenging dungeon. Other exclusive content includes "The Thieves Den," a lost pirate ship ideal for stealthy characters, and "Wizard's Tower," a magical stronghold. Additionally, players can restore the "Orrery" to unlock celestial knowledge and equip their steed with the "Horse Armor Pack."

Name: ELDEN RING
Description:
THE NEW FANTASY ACTION RPG. Rise, Tarnished, and be guided by grace to brandish the power of the Elden Ring and become an Elden Lord in the Lands Between. • A Vast World Full of Excitement A vast world where open fields with a variety of situations and huge dungeons with complex and three-dimensional designs are seamlessly connected. As you explore, the joy of discovering unknown and overwhelming threats await you, leading to a high sense of accomplishment. • Create your Own Character In addition to customizing the appearance of your character, you can freely combine the weapons, armor, and magic that you equip. You can develop your character according to your play style, such as increasing your muscle strength to become a strong warrior, or mastering magic. • An Epic Drama Born from a Myth A multilayered story told in fragments. An epic drama in which the various thoughts of the characters intersect in the Lands Between. • Unique Online Play that Loosely Connects You to Others In addition to multiplayer, where you can directly connect with other players and travel together, the game supports a unique asynchronous online element that allows you to feel the presence of others.

The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion® Game of the Year Edition provides a complete journey into a highly praised role-playing game. This edition plunges players into a richly detailed world, showcasing its innovative design. The game expertly combines open-ended exploration with impressive graphics. Players can follow the main story at their own speed or freely roam the vast landscape, finding their own adventures and challenges.

The Game of the Year edition enhances this experience with two major expansions: Knights of the Nine and the Shivering Isles. These additions bring new quests and content, greatly expanding the already enormous world of Oblivion. It is understandable why critics recognized Oblivion as the Best Game of 2006, a title earned through its outstanding quality and immersive gameplay.

A core aspect of the Oblivion experience is the freedom to "Live Another Life in Another World." Players can create and become any character they envision, from a brave warrior to a stealthy assassin or a powerful mage. The game features an innovative first-person combat and magic system, making role-playing more intense by allowing players to feel the impact of each encounter. Additionally, the groundbreaking Radiant AI system gives Oblivion's characters dynamic 24/7 schedules and the ability to make independent decisions based on their surroundings. These non-player characters display lifelike behaviors, engaging in activities like eating, sleeping, and pursuing their own goals autonomously, as highlighted in numerous game analyses.

The Shivering Isles expansion, for example, introduces a surreal new land inspired by the Daedric Prince Sheogorath. This realm is starkly divided between the contrasting realms of Mania and Dementia, offering a unique experience within Oblivion. Players will face challenging new enemies, such as grotesque insects, fearsome Flesh Atronachs, shambling skeletal creatures, and the amphibious Grummites that inhabit this strange land. The Knights of the Nine expansion, on the other hand, tasks players with an epic quest to restore the honor of a forgotten faction, journeying across Cyrodiil to reclaim their former prestige.

## The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt - A Deeply Immersive RPG

*The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt* invites players into the role of Geralt of Rivia, a monster slayer navigating a vast, narrative-rich open world. This highly praised role-playing game plunges players into a meticulously crafted fantasy realm where their decisions carry significant weight. The central objective involves locating the child of prophecy, a pursuit that spans diverse environments, from bustling metropolises and isolated archipelagos to formidable mountain ranges and subterranean caverns.

Witchers, possessing augmented capabilities, serve as the primary bulwark against monstrous threats. Players can hone their combat prowess through a system of upgradeable weaponry, potent elixirs, and arcane spells. The game presents a broad spectrum of creatures to track, ranging from colossal beasts to spectral entities. Spoils from these hunts can be leveraged to enhance equipment, acquire specialized armor, or engage in leisure pursuits such as equestrian races, collectible card games, and brawls in local taverns.

The expansive universe of *The Witcher 3* actively encourages exploration. Players may uncover ancient ruins, concealed grottos, and submerged shipwrecks. They can engage with vendors in various settlements and pursue quarry across numerous territories. The game is populated by a cast of unforgettable characters, including political figures, powerful mages, and aristocratic individuals, who present demanding assignments. Crucially, the game incorporates a nuanced ethical framework, where choices yield profound and often unexpected consequences, transcending simplistic dichotomies of good and evil.

The paramount undertaking is the search for the child of prophecy, whose fate is to either preserve or annihilate the world. This individual must be found amidst a period of widespread global turmoil, as foretold by ancient omens. Players will confront formidable adversaries, including influential potentates, primordial spirits, and extra-dimensional entities, all vying for dominion. Ultimately, the player's actions will shape their destiny within a world grappling with its own existential peril.

Developed using the REDengine 3, *The Witcher 3* delivers a detailed and lifelike fantasy setting. CD Projekt Red has noted that dynamic weather patterns and a day-night cycle influence the behavior of both inhabitants and fauna, fostering an interactive experience. The intricate quest structure is profoundly shaped by player choices, guaranteeing a distinct journey for each participant. The developers prioritized the creation of a vibrant, responsive world that genuinely reacts to player interventions.

Name: Thief™ Gold
Description:
Stalk your prey on the quest for stolen goods with your blackjack, sword, and an assortment of unique arrows. Steal for money and uncover the hidden agendas of your allies and enemies as you play through an unravelling story of deception and revenge. Survive in a world where shadows are your only ally, trust is not an option, and confrontation results in death! Key Features: Pioneering stealth based gameplay brings a new dimension to first person action. Thief™ Gold includes Thief™ The Dark Project (12 huge missions with multiple environments) and the Gold update (3 new campaign missions which deepen the plot and add five new types of enemies) Advanced enemies can see, hear, speak, and sound alarms. Your arsenal includes: blackjack, sword, fire arrows, water arrows, rope arrows and more

Name: Dragon Age: Origins - Ultimate Edition
Description:
Dragon Age: Origins You are a Grey Warden, one of the last of this legendary order of guardians. With the return of mankind's ancient foe and the kingdom engulfed in civil war, you have been chosen by fate to unite the shattered lands and slay the archdemon once and for all. Explore a stunning world, make complex moral choices, and engage in bone-crushing combat against massive and terrifying creatures. Dragon Age: Origins - Awakening Expansion Pack The story of the Grey Wardens continues as you are named their commander. Fight new enemies, learn new skills and spells, and explore an all-new area of the world, Amaranthine. All Nine Content Packs The Stone Prisoner Warden's Keep Return to Ostagar Feastday Gifts The Darkspawn Chronicles Feastday Pranks Leliana's Song The Golems of Amgarrak Witch Hunt Collect new rewards, gain new party members, and more as you delve deeper into the Dragon Age storyline. (Critically acclaimed winner of more than 50 awards including over 30 'Best of 2009' awards.)

The online servers for DARK SOULS™ II on PC are currently undergoing restoration. Developers are working to progressively bring back online services for each game in the series, with DARK SOULS™ II slated to return once the necessary fixes are implemented. Further updates regarding the restoration schedule will be provided as soon as it is finalized. The development team expresses gratitude to all players for their patience and understanding during this process.

Developed by FROM SOFTWARE, DARK SOULS™ II is the eagerly awaited follow-up to the challenging 2011 hit, Dark Souls. This distinctive old-school action RPG captivated a global audience with its formidable difficulty and profound emotional rewards. According to industry analysis, the original Dark Souls was praised for its unique blend of challenge and accomplishment. DARK SOULS™ II aims to extend the franchise's signature obscurity and compelling gameplay innovations to both solo and multiplayer modes. Players are invited to embark on a dark adventure, facing formidable enemies, treacherous hazards, and the signature, unrelenting challenge that FROM SOFTWARE is known for.

Key Features of DARK SOULS™ II include:

*   **Go Beyond Death:** Players are encouraged to test their mettle in a vast world powered by a new engine, delivering significant advancements in graphics, sound, and special effects.
*   **A Labyrinth of Monsters & Bosses:** Immerse yourself in intricate environments populated by new, twisted creatures and formidable bosses, a testament to FROM SOFTWARE's imaginative design.
*   **Sensory Assault:** A variety of threats are designed to exploit human senses and phobias, incorporating elements like auditory hallucinations, vertigo, and acrophobia.
*   **Deeper and Darker:** Enhanced customization options allow for detailed tailoring of weapons and armor to suit individual player styles.
*   **Evolved Multiplayer:** An updated multiplayer system facilitates richer online interactions, supporting both cooperative and competitive play.
*   **Refined Gameplay:** DARK SOULS™ II boasts fluid motion-capture animations, an improved combat system, a significantly expanded roster of characters, deeper customization, new weapons, armor abilities, and a carefully balanced player progression system.

Dragon Age: Origins invites players to embark on an epic journey as a Grey Warden, a member of an ancient order tasked with defending the land from formidable threats. As a re-emerging ancient evil plunges the kingdom into civil war, destiny calls upon you to unite the fractured lands and vanquish the archdemon. This critically acclaimed RPG, according to many reviews, offers a vast and living world, with BioWare's most ambitious creation yet featuring over 80 hours of gameplay across numerous distinct environments on the verge of collapse. Your playstyle and decisions profoundly influence the epic narrative, ensuring your choices have significant consequences, a hallmark of BioWare's storytelling.

Prepare for challenging moral choices where there are no clear right or wrong answers. The game forces players to grapple with themes of murder, genocide, betrayal, and the sacrifice of children, eschewing a simple good versus evil system. This complexity is further enhanced by detailed character creation, allowing you to craft a hero that matches your vision, from their appearance to their personality. Your in-game actions will mold your character's disposition and ethical framework, as noted in player guides. The combat is intense and gritty, featuring colossal and terrifying foes, over 100 spells and abilities, and visceral encounters that range from dismembering enemies to unleashing devastating magical attacks.

Dragon Age: Origins also boasts significant expansions and content. The Blood Dragon Armor, created for a famed dragon hunter, was forged during a time when dragons were almost extinct. It became infamous when its wearer was defeated by humans, not by the beasts it was designed to fight. This armor offers superior protection and can also be used in BioWare's Mass Effect 2. Furthermore, The Stone Prisoner expansion allows players to uncover the mystery of Honnleath, a village afflicted by darkspawn. At its core lies an ancient stone figure—a potent golem preserved in time. Players have the opportunity to liberate Shale, a formidable stone golem, who can then join their party. Undertake a quest to explore Shale's detailed history and unique companion mission. The Stone Prisoner adds new areas, equipment, and extended gameplay, featuring new achievements and deeper insights into the Dragon Age: Origins story, as detailed in official game lore.

Pillars of Eternity, a role-playing game from Obsidian Entertainment, invites players into a world where their decisions profoundly shape their destiny. This title captures the essence of classic RPGs, offering deep exploration, thrilling adventures, and strategic party management within a detailed fantasy setting.

Players will explore dangerous dungeons, discover hidden treasures, and solve ancient mysteries. The game encourages players to build a party and embark on an adventure filled with wonder and a familiar sense of nostalgia. Obsidian Entertainment has successfully blended the excitement of classic RPGs with modern depth.

Character customization is a key feature, allowing players to create unique heroes. Options include:

*   **Races:** Human, Aumaua, Dwarf, Elf, Godlike, and Orlan.
*   **Core Skills:** Stealth, Athletics, Lore, Mechanics, and Survival.
*   **Classes:** Barbarian, Chanter, Cipher, Druid, Fighter, Monk, Paladin, Priest, Ranger, Rogue, and Wizard.

The game features a robust reputation system, according to its developers, where player actions influence their standing with various factions. These choices have significant consequences, shaping the narrative and the world. Pillars of Eternity presents a rich world with pre-rendered environments, an intricate story, and memorable characters, encouraging players to uncover its secrets and forge their own legend.

Name: DARK SOULS™ III
Description:
We are currently in the process of restoring the online servers for the DARK SOULS series on PC. We plan to restore online service for each game progressively, bringing back servers for DARK SOULS™ III once we complete the necessary work to correct the problem. We will provide additional updates as soon as the restoration schedule is finalized. We want to thank all our players for your patience and understanding as we work to fix this issue. Get the DARK SOULS™ III Season Pass now and challenge yourself with all the available content! Winner of gamescom award 2015 'Best RPG' and over 35 E3 2015 Awards and Nominations. DARK SOULS™ III continues to push the boundaries with the latest, ambitious chapter in the critically-acclaimed and genre-defining series. As fires fade and the world falls into ruin, journey into a universe filled with more colossal enemies and environments. Players will be immersed into a world of epic atmosphere and darkness through faster gameplay and amplified combat intensity. Fans and newcomers alike will get lost in the game hallmark rewarding gameplay and immersive graphics. Now only embers remain… Prepare yourself once more and Embrace The Darkness!

NORCO is a captivating Southern Gothic point-and-click narrative adventure that plunges players into the eerie, waterlogged suburbs and lush industrial swamps of a surreal South Louisiana. The game's narrative begins in the wake of your mother's death, with your brother Blake having gone missing. To find him, you'll embark on a journey through the refineries, strip malls, and drainage ditches of suburban New Orleans, following a fugitive security android.

The game's distinctive painterly and cinematic pixel art style draws players into its unique sci-fi world. This world is characterized by disappearing swamplands and labyrinthine oil refineries, with landscapes directly inspired by the titular town of Norco, Louisiana, and other areas of Greater New Orleans. According to the developers, the rich field recordings and sound design by fmAura, coupled with a driving, post-industrial electronic score from Gewgawly I, create an immersive auditory experience.

What initially appears to be a straightforward search for your missing brother quickly evolves into a complex, multigenerational mystery. The narrative masterfully blurs the lines between salvation, memory, technology, and nature, weaving a uniquely compelling and contemplative story. This narrative is deeply rooted in the traditions of Southern literature, pulp fiction, and both classic and contemporary point-and-click adventure games.

As you explore this eroding and uncertain world, you'll encounter a cast of sharply drawn characters, each with deep roots, rich backstories, and complex motives. These allies include a chaotic bayou pirate, a bar-stool private detective, the very escaped security android you're pursuing, and even your childhood stuffed monkey. To progress, players will need to solve puzzles, overcome corporate security goons, and infiltrate an influencer cult that has taken over an abandoned mall on the outskirts of New Orleans. The game's developers have stated that the setting is crucial to its atmosphere. The sound design, a key element of the game, has been praised for its immersive qualities. The narrative structure, which blends personal loss with a larger mystery, is a hallmark of the genre. The characters encountered are designed to be memorable and contribute to the unfolding plot. The challenges presented to the player are varied, requiring both intellectual and strategic engagement.

*Lacuna* is a sci-fi noir adventure game where player choices significantly impact the narrative and the fate of the solar system. As Neil Conrad, a CDI agent, you are drawn into a murder investigation that uncovers a far-reaching conspiracy. The game challenges players to investigate, deduce, and make difficult decisions with permanent consequences, leading to multiple endings.

The *Save the World Edition* of *Lacuna* includes the full game and its atmospheric soundtrack. Notably, 10% of the revenues from this edition are donated to Go Give One, a World Health Organization initiative supporting global healthcare access. This edition appeals to players who want to support the developers while contributing to a charitable cause.

*Lacuna* offers a modern take on the adventure game genre, moving away from traditional mechanics. It features dynamic conversations with non-repeating dialogue, streamlined puzzles that avoid inventory management, and an uninterrupted narrative flow driven by player progress. According to the developers, player decisions are remembered and directly influence the game's conclusion, ensuring a meaningful impact on the story's outcome. The game presents players with moral dilemmas, such as choosing between personal loyalties and public safety, or deciding whether to maintain peace or expose a devastating truth.

Name: Her Story
Description:
A Video Game About a Woman Talking to the Police Her Story is the award winning video game from Sam Barlow, creator of Silent Hill: Shattered Memories and Aisle. A crime fiction game with non-linear storytelling, Her Story revolves around a police database full of live action video footage. It stars Viva Seifert, actress and one half of the band Joe Gideon and the Shark. How does it work? Her Story sits you in front of a mothballed desktop computer that’s logged into a police database of video footage. The footage covers seven interviews from 1994 in which a British woman is interviewed about her missing husband. Explore the database by typing search terms, watch the clips where she speaks those words and piece together her story. Unlike anything you've played before, Her Story is an involving and moving experience. A game that asks you to listen.

Name: The Forgotten City
Description:
Travel 2,000 years into the past and relive the final days of a cursed Roman city, where if one person sins, everyone dies. Combat is an option, but violence will only get you so far. Only by questioning an intertwined community of colourful characters, cleverly exploiting the time loop, and making difficult moral choices can you hope to solve this epic mystery. Here, your decisions matter. The fate of the city is in your hands. Explore an open-world ancient Roman city with historically authentic art, architecture, costumes and customs Investigate a gripping, non-linear mystery with multiple endings Become entwined in the lives of richly detailed, deeply interactive characters Grapple with moral dilemmas which have life-and-death consequences Play as whoever you want, by choosing your character’s gender, origin and backstory Solve problems with reason, charm, bribery, intimidation, violence, or by cleverly exploiting the time-loop

Name: Telling Lies
Description:
A Video Game About Private Conversations Telling Lies is the new video game from Sam Barlow, creator of Her Story and Silent Hill: Shattered Memories. An investigative thriller game with non-linear storytelling, Telling Lies revolves around a cache of secretly recorded video conversations. It stars Logan Marshall-Green , Alexandra Shipp , Kerry Bishé and Angela Sarafyan . How does it work? Telling Lies sits you in front of an anonymous laptop loaded with a stolen NSA database full of footage. The footage covers two years in the intimate lives of four people whose stories are linked by a shocking incident. Explore the database by typing search terms, watch the clips where those words are spoken and piece together your story. Unlike anything you've played before, Telling Lies is an intimate and intense experience. A game where you decide the truth.

## Unraveling Twin Lakes' Paranormal Puzzles in The Darkside Detective: A Fumble in the Dark

Prepare to return to the peculiar and perpetually paranormal world of Twin Lakes, a city recognized as America's 34th most haunted, with **The Darkside Detective: A Fumble in the Dark**. This chilling point-and-click adventure plunges players into the role of Detective Francis McQueen, tasked with solving six new, spine-tingling cases. Twin Lakes, a city burdened by a persistent supernatural nuisance, requires a dedicated investigator to untangle the macabre mysteries plaguing its residents.

### The Cursed City and Its Unlikely Hero

Twin Lakes exists in a unique category of supernatural affliction. It is not a city under siege by overwhelming demonic forces, but it experiences a greater degree of paranormal activity than a typical locale. This moderate level of supernatural influence, as described in the game's premise, necessitates the intervention of The Darkside Detective. When unexplained phenomena occur, Detective McQueen is the one called to investigate.

### A New Threat and a Familiar Partnership

Following the events of the original **The Darkside Detective**, this installment presents Detective McQueen with a critical mission: to rescue his loyal sidekick, Officer Dooley, from the clutches of the Darkside. Their reunion is essential, enabling the duo to resume their signature investigative approach, tackling the city's strange, often paranormal, and consistently paradoxical occurrences.

### Exploring Twin Lakes' Most Peculiar Locales

The game features a diverse array of investigations set in some of Twin Lakes' most unusual locations. According to promotional materials, players can expect to explore:

*   A vibrant, yet potentially sinister, carnival.
*   A quiet, but perhaps not entirely peaceful, local retirement home.
*   The boisterous and unpredictable world of an amateur wrestling circuit.
*   An excursion to Ireland, highlighting the far-reaching influence of the Darkside.

Through these varied scenarios, McQueen and Dooley strive to keep the encroaching Darkside at bay. For those intrigued by this frighteningly funny adventure, the developers recommend experiencing the first title to appreciate the unique investigative style and dark humor.

Name: Strange Horticulture
Description:
Find and identify new plants, pet your cat, speak to a coven, or join a cult. Use your growing collection to influence the story and unravel Undermere’s dark mysteries. Welcome to Undermere, a quaint town surrounded by hag-infested forests and rugged mountains. You are the Horticulturist, owner of local plant store Strange Horticulture. As a cast of colorful customers come by your shop, you are quickly thrust into an occult mystery stretching back hundreds of years. Explore the lands beyond your store to find new plants, but be careful! The dark woods and lakes are not always friendly to a simple herbalist. You might discover powers beyond your wildest dreams - or lose your mind completely. Use context clues to determine which places to visit, and which to avoid! Using your trusty encyclopedia and clues found on your explorations, you learn more about the strange plants you come across. By identifying each plant, you will be able to use their effects to influence the story -- from hypnotic hallucinogens to powerful poisons.

Name: L.A. Noire
Description:
Using groundbreaking new animation technology, MotionScan, that captures every nuance of an actor's facial performance in astonishing detail, L.A. Noire is a violent crime thriller that blends breathtaking action with true detective work to deliver an unprecedented interactive experience. Search for clues, chase down suspects and interrogate witnesses as you struggle to find the truth in a city where everyone has something to hide. Amid the post-war boom of Hollywood's Golden Age, Cole Phelps is an LAPD detective thrown headfirst into a city drowning in its own success. Corruption is rampant, the drug trade is exploding, and murder rates are at an all-time high. In his fight to climb the ranks and do what's right, Phelps must unravel the truth behind a string of arson attacks, racketeering conspiracies and brutal murders, battling the L.A. underworld and even members of his own department to uncover a secret that could shake the city to its rotten core. This complete edition of L.A. Noire includes the complete original game and all previously released downloadable content including the 'Nicolson Electroplating' Arson case, the 'Reefer Madness' Vice case, 'The Consul's Car' Traffic case, 'The Naked City' Vice case and 'A Slip of the Tongue' Traffic case.

## Step into the Gritty Streets of 1940s Los Angeles with L.A. Noire: The VR Case Files

Experience a **dark and violent crime thriller** like never before in L.A. Noire: The VR Case Files. This immersive virtual reality title plunges you directly into the shoes of Detective Cole Phelps, tasked with solving a series of **brutal crimes, plots, and conspiracies**. These compelling narratives are **inspired by real cases** from 1947 Los Angeles, a period notorious for its corruption and violence.

### Unraveling Mysteries in Virtual Reality

L.A. Noire: The VR Case Files features **seven meticulously rebuilt cases** specifically designed for virtual reality. This enhances the **immersion and realism** of Rockstar Games' atmospheric crime thriller. You'll tackle select cases from the blockbuster original game, spanning investigations across various detective desks, including Traffic, Arson, and Homicide.

### Your Detective Toolkit in VR

As Detective Phelps, you'll engage in a variety of detective activities:

*   **Clue Discovery:** **Search for clues by grabbing, inspecting, and manipulating objects** with your own hands.
*   **Navigating the City:** **Get behind the wheel and drive to your next crime scene**, experiencing the city firsthand.
*   **Pursuing Suspects:** **Engage in chases, fistfights, and shootouts** as you track down those responsible.
*   **Building Your Case:** **Make notes or draw freehand in your detective’s notebook** to meticulously build your evidence.
*   **Interrogation:** **Interrogate witnesses and use your wits to separate truth from lies** in a city where deception is rampant.

### Crucial System Specifications for VR Play

To ensure a smooth and intended gameplay experience, specific hardware configurations are **essential**. Due to current performance considerations with AMD hardware, **only certain combinations of AMD and NVIDIA/Intel hardware are supported**:

*   **AMD Ryzen 7 CPU Users:** A **NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1070 (or above)** graphics card is **required**.
*   **AMD Vega 56 Graphics Card Users:** An **Intel i7 6700 (or above)** CPU is **required**.

**Important Note:** Attempting to use an AMD CPU and GPU together to play the game is **not supported at this time**. L.A. Noire: The VR Case Files **only supports a single graphics card architecture**; NVIDIA SLI and AMD CrossFire features are **not supported**.

### Staying Up-to-Date with Compatibility

System requirements are subject to change due to ongoing programming updates. For the most current compatibility information, please refer to your hardware manufacturer and the official **www.rockstargames.com/support** website. Be aware that some system components, such as mobile chipsets, integrated, and AGP graphics cards, may be incompatible. Specifications not explicitly listed may not be supported by the publisher.

### Additional Requirements for Installation and Play

*   **Rockstar Games Social Club:** Installation and play **requires log-in to the Rockstar Games Social Club** network (age 13+).
*   **Internet Connection:** An internet connection is **required for activation and periodic entitlement verification**.
