*   **Software Installations:** You will need to install the following software: Rockstar Games Social Club platform, DirectX 9, DirectX June 2010 Redistributable Package, Chromium, and Microsoft Visual C++ 2012 and 2015 Redistributable Packages. Authentication software that recognizes certain hardware attributes for entitlement, digital rights management, system, and other support purposes is also necessary.
*   **Serial Code Registration:** A **single-use serial code registration via internet is required**. Registration is limited to one Rockstar Games Social Club account (age 13+) per serial code. Only one PC login is allowed per Social Club account at any time. Serial codes are **non-transferable once used**, and Social Club accounts are also non-transferable.

Name: Silicon Dreams  |  cyberpunk interrogation
Description:
Investigate humans and androids in a corporate-controlled dystopian future where the lines between the real and the artificial have blurred to almost nothing. Research your subjects, choose your questions carefully, and probe for the truth, however dreadful it may be. Monitor interviewees’ emotions in real time - joy, sadness, anger, disgust, shock, and fear. Use this data to your advantage, intimidating, cajoling, or even befriending your subjects in order to to uncover more information. Choose a side in the midst of a brewing conflict: lie to your superiors and spare deviant androids, or condemn them to secure your own survival within the corporation. There are no easy answers. Silicon Dreams has multiple endings depending on the choices you make. Each android could live or die by your words.

Portal 2, the highly anticipated sequel to the original Portal, significantly expands upon the acclaimed gameplay, compelling narrative, and memorable soundtrack that defined its predecessor. The original Portal, which received over 70 industry awards and built a dedicated fan base, set a high standard for this follow-up.

The single-player campaign in Portal 2 introduces players to a fresh cast of characters and introduces novel puzzle mechanics within an expanded set of challenging test chambers. According to Valve, the developers, players will explore previously uncharted areas of the Aperture Science Laboratories. A central figure in this solo journey is the return of GLaDOS, the complex and often homicidal artificial intelligence who guided players in the first game.

Beyond the solo adventure, Portal 2 features a robust two-player cooperative mode. This mode presents a distinct campaign with its own unique storyline, specialized test chambers, and two new player characters. As reported by numerous gaming outlets, this cooperative element requires a fundamental shift in player strategy, demanding coordinated actions and collaborative thinking to overcome obstacles.

The game offers several core features, including an engaging single-player campaign with next-generation gameplay and a deeply involving narrative. Additionally, a dedicated two-person co-op mode provides a unique multiplayer experience with its own storyline, characters, and gameplay mechanics. An advanced physics engine enables the creation of a wide range of intriguing challenges, resulting in a larger game that is not necessarily more difficult. The acclaimed original soundtrack features a unique and memorable musical score. The original Portal was recognized as Game of the Year by over 30 publications in 2007, underscoring its significant impact. Furthermore, Portal 2 includes its own set of editing tools, empowering players to create and share their own content.

Name: Sid Meier's Civilization® IV
Description:
With over 6 million units sold and unprecedented critical acclaim from fans and press around the world, Sid Meier's Civilization is recognized as one of the greatest PC game franchises of all-time. Now, Sid Meier and Firaxis Games will take this incredibly fun and addictive game to new heights by adding new ways to play and win, new tools to manage and expand your civilization, all-new easy to use mod capabilities and intense multiplayer modes and options*. Civilization IV will come to life like never before in a beautifully detailed, living 3D world that will elevate the gameplay experience to a whole new level. Civilization IV has already been heralded as one of the top ten games of 2005, and a must-have for gamers around the globe! *Mac version's Online Multiplayer is no longer supported.

System Shock 2, a seminal title in the sci-fi horror FPS-RPG genre, has been revitalized, offering players a chance to re-experience its chilling atmosphere and groundbreaking gameplay. The game famously begins with the chilling words, "Remember, it is my will that guided you here. It is my will that gave you your cybernetic implants, the only beauty in that meat you call a body. If you value that meat... you will do as I tell you." This ominous introduction sets the stage for the player's awakening from cryo-sleep, only to find themselves augmented with cybernetic implants and the crew of the starship Von Braun brutally murdered.

As you navigate the derelict vessel, the infected inhabitants, driven to madness, roam the corridors, their tormented cries echoing your own growing dread. Looming over your every move is the rogue artificial intelligence, SHODAN, whose taunts and ridicule serve as a constant reminder of your precarious situation. SHODAN's malevolent presence is a key element that has contributed to the game's enduring legacy, according to many critics.

System Shock 2 distinguishes itself through its deep RPG mechanics, allowing players to tailor their experience. You can choose from three specialized military branches, each offering unique skills, weaponry, and paranormal psionic powers. The ability to upgrade and enhance these skills is crucial for survival, impacting your proficiency in hacking, combat, and psionic abilities. This intricate progression system has been lauded by players and developers alike.

The narrative unfolds through the discovery of cryptic audio logs, encounters with spectral apparitions, and dedicated research, all of which provide vital advantages in combat and unlock access to exotic weapons and powerful items. For those seeking a cooperative experience, System Shock 2 supports multiplayer co-op for up to three friends, though this feature is exclusive to Windows.

System Shock 2 is widely recognized as a genre-defining experience that introduced innovative gameplay mechanics that have become foundational to modern FPS and RPG titles. Its influence is undeniable, having inspired critically acclaimed games such as Deus Ex® and Bioshock®. The game's enduring appeal lies in its masterful blend of a haunting narrative, pioneering gameplay, and a terrifyingly immersive atmosphere, solidifying its status as one of the greatest games ever created. It is worth noting that the Mac OS and Linux versions of System Shock 2 utilize a technology known as 'WINE' to ensure their functionality on those respective operating systems.

The critically acclaimed **Batman: Arkham Asylum Game of the Year Edition** offers an enhanced experience for fans of the Dark Knight. This remastered version includes four additional Challenge Maps, expanding the gameplay beyond the original release. These new maps are Crime Alley, Scarecrow Nightmare, Totally Insane, and Nocturnal Hunter, the latter two originating from the Insane Night Map Pack.

Players will immerse themselves in the role of Batman, utilizing the innovative FreeFlow™ combat system. This system allows for seamless chaining of unlimited combos, enabling players to engage in brutal melee brawls against large groups of The Joker’s henchmen. Beyond combat, the game emphasizes Batman's detective skills. As the WORLD’S GREATEST DETECTIVE, players will solve intricate puzzles using cutting-edge forensic tools. These tools include x-ray scanning, fingerprint analysis, the 'Amido Black' spray, and a pheromone tracker, all essential for unraveling the mysteries within Arkham Asylum.

The narrative pits Batman against some of Gotham's most notorious villains. Players will confront formidable foes such as The Joker, HARLEY QUINN, POISON IVY, and KILLER CROC, each presenting unique challenges. To overcome these adversaries, players can embrace the role of the Invisible Predator™. This is achieved through Batman’s signature fear takedowns and a unique vantage point system, allowing for stealthy movement and strategic hunting of enemies. The game provides multiple takedown methods, including dramatic swoops from the sky and forceful breaches through walls.

Exploration is a key component, with players encouraged to explore every inch of Arkham Asylum. The infamous island is presented in its gritty and realistic entirety, offering a vast environment to roam freely. Players will experience what it's truly like to be BATMAN, wielding iconic gadgets such as BATARANGS, explosive gel aerosol, The Batclaw, sonar resonator, and the line launcher. Further secrets can be uncovered by completing hidden challenges scattered throughout the world. Earning experience points allows for the development and customization of equipment, enhancing Batman's arsenal. The game also grants complete superhero freedom within the environment, utilizing Batman’s grapnel gun to reach any visible location, leap from any height, and glide in any direction. According to reviews, the Game of the Year Edition significantly enhances replayability.

Name: Sid Meier's Civilization® V
Description:
The Flagship Turn-Based Strategy Game Returns Become Ruler of the World by establishing and leading a civilization from the dawn of man into the space age: Wage war, conduct diplomacy, discover new technologies, go head-to-head with some of history’s greatest leaders and build the most powerful empire the world has ever known. INVITING PRESENTATION: Jump right in and play at your own pace with an intuitive interface that eases new players into the game. Veterans will appreciate the depth, detail and control that are highlights of the series. BELIEVABLE WORLD: Ultra realistic graphics showcase lush landscapes for you to explore, battle over and claim as your own. COMMUNITY & MULTIPLAYER: Compete with players all over the world or locally in LAN matches, mod* the game in unprecedented ways, and install mods directly from an in-game community hub without ever leaving the game. WIDE SYSTEM COMPATIBILITY: Civilization V operates on many different systems, from high end desktops to many laptops. ALL NEW FEATURES: A new hex-based gameplay grid opens up exciting new combat and build strategies. City States become a new resource in your diplomatic battleground. An improved diplomacy system allows you to negotiate with fully interactive leaders. *Modding SDK available as a free download. Note: The Mac and Linux + SteamOS versions of Sid Meier's Civilization V are available in English, French, Italian, German and Spanish only.

Name: Portal
Description:
Portal™ is a new single player game from Valve. Set in the mysterious Aperture Science Laboratories, Portal has been called one of the most innovative new games on the horizon and will offer gamers hours of unique gameplay. The game is designed to change the way players approach, manipulate, and surmise the possibilities in a given environment; similar to how Half-Life® 2's Gravity Gun innovated new ways to leverage an object in any given situation. Players must solve physical puzzles and challenges by opening portals to maneuvering objects, and themselves, through space.

**Assassin's Creed 2: Ezio's Renaissance Revenge**

Assassin's Creed 2 plunges players into the **vibrant yet brutal landscape of Renaissance Italy**, centering on the compelling narrative of **Ezio Auditore da Firenze**. This story follows a young Italian noble whose life is shattered by family tragedy, igniting a relentless quest for vengeance against a deep-seated conspiracy. The game is set in a **fragmented 15th-century Italy**, a historical period known for its artistic rebirth and innovation, but also for **widespread corruption and brutal murder**. Players can explore the influential city-states of Florence and Venice, experiencing the **rich and captivating setting** of the Renaissance, an era as beautiful as it was dangerous. Historical accounts indicate this period was marked by significant political intrigue.

The game represented a major advancement for open-world gaming, introducing an **open-ended design** that granted players significant freedom. This allows players to **select their own missions** and approach objectives at their own pace. Players can **explore meticulously recreated iconic cities** and engage in various activities, from navigating canals to simulated flight. A **diverse range of mechanics** encourages experimentation, letting players discover effective playstyles. The game world features a **dynamic crowd system**, which players can **use for stealth and evasion**, blending into bustling urban environments. Interacting with NPCs can offer **valuable rewards**, but players must be mindful of the risks. Research on Renaissance urban life suggests crowds were indeed a vital part of city social fabric.

Ezio's transformation into a master assassin is a core theme, highlighted by his growing skills. Players can **wield new weapons**, master the ability to **disarm and counter** attacks, and use the **iconic hidden blade**. It is important to note that, as of November 19th, 2018, **online multiplayer and co-op features for Assassin's Creed 2 are no longer officially supported and are inaccessible**, particularly affecting the MAC version.

Sid Meier's Civilization IV®: Beyond the Sword, the second expansion for the acclaimed 2005 PC Game of the Year, significantly deepens the strategic experience by focusing on the eras following the invention of gunpowder. This expansion introduces a wealth of new content designed to challenge and engage players, with a particular emphasis on enhancing late-game play, according to Firaxis Games.

Beyond the Sword boasts **11 unique and challenging scenarios** crafted by Firaxis and community members, offering diverse gameplay experiences. The expansion also introduces ten new civilizations, including Portugal, Babylonians, and the Netherlands, each with unique units and buildings. Furthermore, players will encounter sixteen new leaders, such as Hammurabi of the Babylonians and Abraham Lincoln for the United States, as detailed in the game's official release notes.

Key new features include the introduction of **Corporations**, a new game mechanic similar to religion, allowing players to found and spread corporations globally for distinct benefits. Espionage is also accessible earlier, offering new ways to gather intelligence, incite unrest, and protect secrets. Players will encounter new random events, like natural disasters, presenting obstacles to overcome. Five new wonders, including the Statue of Zeus and Cristo Redentor, offer significant strategic advantages. The race to Alpha Centauri is more intricate, and the United Nations becomes available earlier for diplomatic victories. Advanced Starts allow players to "buy" components for a custom empire and begin in the later game for a quicker experience of new features. The AI is significantly enhanced, relying more on intelligent play for a more consistent and challenging experience. As one developer noted, "We wanted to ensure the AI felt like a true competitor, not just a set of numbers." This focus on improved AI behavior has been a key point of discussion among players and critics alike.

**IL-2 Sturmovik: 1946 - An In-Depth Look at World War II Aerial Combat and Alternate History**

IL-2 Sturmovik: 1946 stands as a comprehensive compilation, bringing together the entirety of the original IL-2 series. This extensive anthology encompasses the highly regarded IL-2 Sturmovik™: Forgotten Battles, the Ace Expansion Pack, Pacific Fighters™, and introduces unique alternate history scenarios set in the year 1946. What initially started as a focused flight simulator has evolved into a vast and detailed collection, now featuring 229 flyable aircraft and a total of over 300 aircraft. The game has received significant updates, most notably to version 4.12.2, a substantial release driven by the community that has introduced key enhancements and improvements.

**Key Enhancements and Expansive Content**

This updated version of IL-2 Sturmovik: 1946 brings several crucial improvements to the forefront. These include enhanced widescreen support, ensuring correct Field of View (FOV) settings for contemporary displays, which significantly improves the visual experience. The collection dramatically expands gameplay possibilities through a wealth of new aircraft, detailed maps, and engaging scenarios. Notably, the update introduces 32 new flyable fighters and bombers, complemented by four new AI-controlled aircraft, broadening the combat options available to players. Aspiring pilots can explore expansive new historical maps, such as the historically significant Kiev region and the vast expanse of Manchuria. Additionally, the collection includes a large bonus Burma map and an online Khalkin Gol / Nomonhan map, specifically designed for engaging multiplayer battles.

The game further enriches the player experience with nine new campaigns, collectively offering nearly 200 meticulously crafted missions. These campaigns are widely celebrated for their commitment to realism and their exceptional attention to historical detail. They provide players with detailed career paths, allowing them to experience the roles of both fighter and bomber pilots across the German, Soviet, and Japanese air forces. Mission objectives are diverse and challenging, ranging from piloting jet bombers over occupied Europe to intercepting formidable American B-29 Superfortresses. Three of these newly added campaigns delve into hypothetical battles, exploring what might have occurred between the Soviet Union and Germany in 1946, a period when World War II was still actively engaged. Furthermore, the collection boasts an impressive addition of nearly 1,000 new paint schemes. These historically accurate liveries adorn both new and existing aircraft, representing individual planes or entire squadrons with remarkable fidelity.

**Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 2 (2009): A New Era of Action**

Prepare for the most anticipated game of the year! Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 2 (2009) is the thrilling sequel to the best-selling first-person action game of all time. This installment plunges players into a world teetering on the brink of collapse, facing a formidable new threat. The narrative picks up immediately after the groundbreaking events of Call of Duty 4: Modern Warfare, a title that garnered immense critical acclaim and set new standards for the genre.

Modern Warfare 2 features a groundbreaking musical soundtrack composed by the legendary Hans Zimmer. This Academy Award, Golden Globe Award, Grammy Award, and Tony Award-winning composer brings his signature touch to the game's intense atmosphere, enhancing the player's immersive experience.

The original Call of Duty 4: Modern Warfare achieved significant recognition. It was recognized as the 'Most Played Online Video Game' in history, according to 2009 Guinness World Records. Furthermore, it earned over 50 Game of the Year awards, including Console Game of the Year and Overall Game of the Year in 2007 from the Academy of Interactive Arts & Sciences.

Modern Warfare 2 introduces an entirely new gameplay mode: Special Ops. This mode supports two-player online co-operative play, offering a distinct experience from the single-player story campaign. Special Ops challenges players with a series of time-trial and objective-based missions. As you progress, you'll unlock new Special Ops missions, each escalating in difficulty. These missions draw from highlights of the single-player campaign, fan favorites from Call of Duty 4: Modern Warfare, and entirely new, exclusive content.

Multiplayer is reinvented with a host of new capabilities, customization options, gamestates, and modes. The Create-a-Class system has been significantly enhanced, allowing players to equip secondary weapons like Machine Pistols, Shotguns, Handguns, and Launchers, along with defensive options such as Riot Shields. Tactical Equipment now features Throwing Knives, Blast Shields, and Tactical Insertions. Perk Upgrades offer enhanced player abilities, and Weapon Customization, known as Bling, allows for dual attachments on weapons. Players can unlock and deploy powerful killstreaks such as the AC130, Sentry Gun, Predator Missile, Counter-UAV, and Care Package, offering strategic advantages. A comprehensive Accolades System provides post-match reports to track your performance and progress.

Portal 2 builds upon the critically acclaimed foundation of its predecessor, which garnered over 70 industry awards and cultivated a dedicated fanbase. This highly anticipated sequel expands on the original's innovative gameplay, compelling narrative, and memorable soundtrack.

The single-player experience in Portal 2 introduces a vibrant ensemble of new characters, alongside a variety of novel puzzle mechanics and an expanded array of challenging test chambers. Players will venture into previously unexplored sections of the Aperture Science Laboratories, and will once again encounter GLaDOS, the famously unpredictable and occasionally homicidal artificial intelligence that guided them through the first game. According to Valve, the developer, the single-player campaign is designed to be "wildly-engrossing."

Furthermore, Portal 2 features a robust two-player cooperative mode, boasting its own distinct campaign, a unique storyline, specialized test chambers, and two new player characters. This cooperative mode fundamentally alters the approach to portal mechanics, requiring players to not only collaborate but also to think in tandem. Success in these challenges hinges on a shared understanding and synchronized execution.

The game's product features highlight an extensive single-player campaign with next-generation gameplay and an immersive story. The complete two-person co-op mode offers a separate multiplayer experience with its own dedicated narrative, characters, and gameplay mechanics. Advanced physics simulation underpins the creation of a wide spectrum of intriguing challenges, resulting in a game that is larger in scope but not necessarily more difficult. The game also includes original music and, as a testament to its predecessor's success, the original Portal was recognized as Game of the Year by over 30 publications in 2007. Portal 2 will also include editing tools for players to create and share their own content.

Embark on an extraordinary journey in ELDEN RING, a groundbreaking fantasy action RPG that invites you to rise as a Tarnished. Guided by grace, you will wield the immense power of the Elden Ring and aspire to become the Elden Lord within the expansive and mysterious Lands Between. This vast world is brimming with excitement, seamlessly integrating sprawling open fields presenting diverse challenges with intricately designed, multi-layered dungeons. As you venture forth, the thrill of uncovering unknown and formidable threats promises a profound sense of accomplishment, according to the game's developers.

The game offers unparalleled character customization, allowing you to meticulously craft your avatar's appearance. Furthermore, you possess the freedom to combine a wide array of weapons, armor, and magic to suit your individual play style. Whether you choose to enhance your physical prowess to become a formidable warrior or dedicate yourself to mastering arcane arts, your character's development is entirely in your hands, as noted in promotional materials.

ELDEN RING unfolds an epic drama born from a rich mythology, presenting a multilayered narrative that is revealed through fragmented pieces. This grand tale explores the intersecting desires and motivations of various characters within the Lands Between, creating a deeply engaging experience. The game also features a unique approach to online interaction, which loosely connects players. Beyond traditional multiplayer modes that allow for direct co-operative exploration with others, ELDEN RING incorporates a distinctive asynchronous online element. This innovative feature allows players to sense the presence of others in the world, fostering a unique sense of shared experience without direct confrontation, as highlighted by the game's design philosophy.

Name: God of War
Description:
Enter the Norse realm His vengeance against the Gods of Olympus years behind him, Kratos now lives as a man in the realm of Norse Gods and monsters. It is in this harsh, unforgiving world that he must fight to survive… and teach his son to do the same. Grasp a second chance Kratos is a father again. As mentor and protector to Atreus, a son determined to earn his respect, he is forced to deal with and control the rage that has long defined him while out in a very dangerous world with his son. Journey to a dark, elemental world of fearsome creatures From the marble and columns of ornate Olympus to the gritty forests, mountains and caves of pre-Viking Norse lore, this is a distinctly new realm with its own pantheon of creatures, monsters and gods. Engage in visceral, physical combat With an over the shoulder camera that brings the player closer to the action than ever before, fights in God of War™ mirror the pantheon of Norse creatures Kratos will face: grand, gritty and grueling. A new main weapon and new abilities retain the defining spirit of the God of War series while presenting a vision of conflict that forges new ground in the genre. PC FEATURES High Fidelity Graphics Striking visuals enhanced on PC. Enjoy true 4K resolution, on supported devices, [MU1] with unlocked framerates for peak performance. Dial in your settings via a wide range of graphical presets and options including higher resolution shadows, improved screen space reflections, the addition of GTAO and SSDO, and much more. NVIDIA® DLSS and Reflex Support Quality meets performance. Harness the AI power of NVIDIA Deep Learning Super Sampling (DLSS) to boost frame rates and generate beautiful, sharp images on select Nvidia GPUs. Utilize NVIDIA Reflex low latency technology allowing you to react quicker and hit harder combos with the responsive gameplay you crave on GeForce GPUs. Controls Customization Play your way. With support for the DUALSHOCK®4 and DUALSENSE® wireless controllers, a wide range of other gamepads, and fully customizable bindings for mouse and keyboard, you have the power to fine-tune every action to match your playstyle. Ultra-wide Support Immerse yourself like never before. Journey through the Norse realms taking in breathtaking vistas in panoramic widescreen. With 21:9 ultra-widescreen support, God of War™ presents a cinema quality experience that further expands the original seamless theatrical vision.

**Master the Cosmos with Galactic Civilizations II: Ultimate Edition**

*Galactic Civilizations II: Ultimate Edition* offers a comprehensive strategy experience, combining the original *Dread Lords* with its expansions, *Dark Avatar* and *Twilight of the Arnor*. Players guide their civilization through a vast galaxy, balancing economic, technological, diplomatic, cultural, and military strengths to achieve galactic dominance. The game features procedurally generated galaxies for endless replayability and a compelling campaign that delves into the lore of the Dread Lords.

The *Dark Avatar* expansion introduces new strategic layers, including mineable asteroid belts and specialized planets. A sophisticated spy system allows for sabotage and defense, while new diplomatic treaties and an improved AI present greater challenges. This expansion also adds new adversaries, units, and an additional campaign.

*Twilight of the Arnor*, the final chapter, continues the story in 2227 amidst a war orchestrated by the Dread Lords. Humanity leads a desperate effort to survive and defeat this threat. This expansion brings transformative features like Terror Stars, unique technology trees for each civilization, map and scenario editors, new ship classes, and advanced planetary enhancements.

The *Ultimate Edition* boasts a visually impressive 3D engine and a ship editor for custom vessel creation. Players can design unique civilizations and pursue multiple victory conditions: military, cultural, political, technological, or ascension. The game includes dynamic galaxies, an intelligent AI, online competition, and extensive modding support. Advanced diplomatic options further enhance the strategic depth.

Name: Batman: Arkham Asylum Game of the Year Edition
Description:
Critically acclaimed Batman: Arkham Asylum returns with a remastered Game of the Year Edition, featuring 4 extra Challenge Maps. The additional Challenge Maps are Crime Alley; Scarecrow Nightmare; Totally Insane and Nocturnal Hunter (both from the Insane Night Map Pack). Utilize the unique FreeFlow™ combat system to chain together unlimited combos seamlessly and battle with huge groups of The Joker’s henchmen in brutal melee brawls Investigate as Batman, the WORLD’S GREATEST DETECTIVE, by solving intricate puzzles with the help of cutting edge forensic tools including x-ray scanning, fingerprint scans, ‘Amido Black’ spray and a pheromone tracker Face off against Gotham’s greatest villains including The Joker, HARLEY QUINN, POISON IVY and KILLER CROC Become the Invisible Predator™ with Batman’s fear takedowns and unique vantage point system to move without being seen and hunt enemies Choose multiple takedown methods, including swooping from the sky and smashing through walls. Explore every inch of Arkham Asylum and roam freely on the infamous island, presented for the first time ever in its gritty and realistic entirety Experience what it’s like to be BATMAN using BATARANGS, explosive gel aerosol, The Batclaw, sonar resonator and the line launcher Unlock more secrets by completing hidden challenges in the world and develop and customize equipment by earning experience points Enjoy complete superhero freedom in the environment with the use of Batman’s grapnel gun to get to any place you can see, jump from any height and glide in any direction

Name: Batman: Arkham Asylum Game of the Year Edition
Description:
Critically acclaimed Batman: Arkham Asylum returns with a remastered Game of the Year Edition, featuring 4 extra Challenge Maps. The additional Challenge Maps are Crime Alley; Scarecrow Nightmare; Totally Insane and Nocturnal Hunter (both from the Insane Night Map Pack). Utilize the unique FreeFlow™ combat system to chain together unlimited combos seamlessly and battle with huge groups of The Joker’s henchmen in brutal melee brawls Investigate as Batman, the WORLD’S GREATEST DETECTIVE, by solving intricate puzzles with the help of cutting edge forensic tools including x-ray scanning, fingerprint scans, ‘Amido Black’ spray and a pheromone tracker Face off against Gotham’s greatest villains including The Joker, HARLEY QUINN, POISON IVY and KILLER CROC Become the Invisible Predator™ with Batman’s fear takedowns and unique vantage point system to move without being seen and hunt enemies Choose multiple takedown methods, including swooping from the sky and smashing through walls. Explore every inch of Arkham Asylum and roam freely on the infamous island, presented for the first time ever in its gritty and realistic entirety Experience what it’s like to be BATMAN using BATARANGS, explosive gel aerosol, The Batclaw, sonar resonator and the line launcher Unlock more secrets by completing hidden challenges in the world and develop and customize equipment by earning experience points Enjoy complete superhero freedom in the environment with the use of Batman’s grapnel gun to get to any place you can see, jump from any height and glide in any direction

**Batman: Arkham City - Game of the Year Edition: An Expanded Gotham Experience**

The Batman: Arkham City - Game of the Year Edition offers a significantly expanded and immersive experience within Gotham's chaotic underworld. Building on the acclaimed foundation of Batman: Arkham Asylum, this edition introduces players to Arkham City, a sprawling, maximum-security district five times the size of the original game's setting. This new sanctuary is home to Gotham's most notorious criminals, gangsters, and masterminds, creating a vast playground for The Dark Knight.

As noted in numerous gaming reviews, the game boasts an impressive roster of iconic villains. Players will face off against adversaries such as Catwoman, The Joker, The Riddler, Two-Face, Harley Quinn, The Penguin, and Mr. Freeze. This allows players to truly embody The Dark Knight, delivering justice throughout Gotham's grim and gritty streets.

The Game of the Year Edition enhances the original release with a substantial amount of downloadable content. Developers have confirmed that this version includes new gameplay elements, seven additional maps, three playable characters, and twelve unique skins, greatly enriching the content beyond the initial release.

The included downloadable content comprises the Catwoman Pack, the Nightwing Bundle Pack, the Robin Bundle Pack, and the Harley Quinn’s Revenge Challenge Map Pack. Furthermore, the Arkham City Skins Pack provides a variety of classic and alternate costumes for Batman and his allies.

The seven new maps are: Wayne Manor, Main Hall, Freight Train, Black Mask, The Joker's Carnival, Iceberg Lounge, and the Batcave. Players can also take control of Catwoman, Robin, and Nightwing. These additions are complemented by twelve distinct skins, including the 1970s Batsuit, Year One Batman, The Dark Knight Returns, Earth One Batman, Batman Beyond, Animated Batman, Sinestro Corps Batman, Long Halloween Catwoman, Animated Catwoman, Animated Robin, Red Robin, and Animated Nightwing. This comprehensive package ensures a richer and more varied gameplay experience for fans of the Caped Crusader.

Name: Portal
Description:
Portal™ is a new single player game from Valve. Set in the mysterious Aperture Science Laboratories, Portal has been called one of the most innovative new games on the horizon and will offer gamers hours of unique gameplay. The game is designed to change the way players approach, manipulate, and surmise the possibilities in a given environment; similar to how Half-Life® 2's Gravity Gun innovated new ways to leverage an object in any given situation. Players must solve physical puzzles and challenges by opening portals to maneuvering objects, and themselves, through space.

Name: Brothers - A Tale of Two Sons
Description:
Guide two brothers on an epic fairy tale journey from visionary Swedish film director, Josef Fares and top-tier developer Starbreeze Studios. Control both brothers at once as you experience co-op play in single player mode, like never before. Solve puzzles, explore the varied locations and fight boss battles, controlling one brother with each thumbstick. A man, clinging to life. His two sons, desperate to cure their ailing father, are left with but one option. They must set out upon a journey to find and bring back the 'Water of Life' as they come to rely on one another to survive. One must be strong where the other is weak, brave where the other is fearful, they must be... Brothers. This is one journey you will never forget.

Guild Wars 2 offers a vast world, Tyria, focused on player discovery. An in-game content guide and compass assist players in navigating and finding points of interest independently. Tyria is populated by diverse characters and features dynamic events that acknowledge player involvement through Renown Hearts and participation. New players can benefit from a dedicated guide.

A key design element is seamless player interaction, allowing organic assistance without formal parties. Whether facing a jumping puzzle or a world boss, the game encourages a playstyle that reduces grinding, as all actions, from reviving allies to gathering resources, grant experience. As characters advance, they can equip various weapons, each changing their playstyle. Further customization is achieved by unlocking and equipping hundreds of skills and traits.

For competitive players, structured PvP provides a balanced arena where all compete equally, with access to max-level gear and build options. Character customization allows for self-expression, with new gear unlocking its visual appearance in the player's wardrobe, leading to many combinations. A wide selection of collectible dyes offers additional personalization.

Expansions enhance the Guild Wars 2 experience with benefits such as log-in bonuses, extra character and bag slots, and improved chat features. In-game purchases are available via the Black Lion Trading Company. Expansions and Living World seasons introduce unique rewards and new Masteries that boost character abilities. Each expansion also grants access to nine elite specializations, providing new weapon choices, skills, and abilities. The Revenant profession can be chosen at character creation, enabling players to channel legendary figures. Living World seasons continue the game's narrative between expansions and can be bought individually or in Gem Store bundles. Engaging with these episodes unlocks new explorable zones, rewards, and Masteries. For example, the Heart of Thorns expansion enables glider upgrades, Path of Fire introduces mounts with advanced movement skills, and End of Dragons teaches fishing and skiff piloting. According to ArenaNet, the developers, Living World episodes are available at level 80, and restarting the game might be necessary for upgrades to take effect. Existing Guild Wars 2 accounts are not accessible through Steam.

Name: The Elder Scrolls V: Skyrim
Description:
EPIC FANTASY REBORN The next chapter in the highly anticipated Elder Scrolls saga arrives from the makers of the 2006 and 2008 Games of the Year, Bethesda Game Studios. Skyrim reimagines and revolutionizes the open-world fantasy epic, bringing to life a complete virtual world open for you to explore any way you choose. LIVE ANOTHER LIFE, IN ANOTHER WORLD Play any type of character you can imagine, and do whatever you want; the legendary freedom of choice, storytelling, and adventure of The Elder Scrolls is realized like never before. ALL NEW GRAPHICS AND GAMEPLAY ENGINE Skyrim’s new game engine brings to life a complete virtual world with rolling clouds, rugged mountains, bustling cities, lush fields, and ancient dungeons. YOU ARE WHAT YOU PLAY Choose from hundreds of weapons, spells, and abilities. The new character system allows you to play any way you want and define yourself through your actions. DRAGON RETURN Battle ancient dragons like you’ve never seen. As Dragonborn, learn their secrets and harness their power for yourself.

The online servers for the PC version of the critically acclaimed DARK SOULS™ series are currently undergoing restoration, a process Bandai Namco Entertainment is committed to completing. According to Bandai Namco Entertainment, DARK SOULS™ III is the next title slated for restoration once the necessary technical issues are resolved. The development team is diligently working to correct the problems that have affected the servers, and they will share further updates as soon as a definitive restoration schedule is established. This ongoing effort underscores the dedication to the player community.

Bandai Namco Entertainment extends its sincere gratitude to all players for their continued patience and understanding throughout this process. In the meantime, players can enhance their experience with DARK SOULS™ III by acquiring the Season Pass. This pass unlocks all available downloadable content and offers even more challenging adventures, providing a deeper dive into the game's rich world.

DARK SOULS™ III, a recipient of the gamescom award for 'Best RPG' in 2015 and honored with over 35 E3 2015 Awards and Nominations, represents the latest and most ambitious installment in the genre-defining series. This chapter plunges players into a world teetering on the brink of collapse, where players can expect colossal enemies and vast, unforgiving environments. The game features faster gameplay and amplified combat intensity for an immersive experience, alongside its signature rewarding gameplay and stunning, dark graphics that captivate both long-time fans and newcomers. As the fires of civilization dwindle and the world succumbs to ruin, players are called upon to embrace the darkness once more. Prepare yourself for an unforgettable journey into a universe where only embers remain.

## Apex Legends™: Master Unique Legends and Strategic Squad Play

**Apex Legends™** is a free-to-play* Hero Shooter where legendary characters, each with powerful and unique abilities, team up to battle for fame and fortune on the fringes of the Frontier. It offers a deep-tactical squad play experience with bold innovations in a rugged world. The game's core appeal lies in its **ever-growing roster of diverse Legends**. Each character is a distinct figure with their own personalities, strengths, and abilities. While designed to be **easy to pick up**, mastering their unique skill sets is crucial for success. Developers emphasize that the depth of Legend abilities truly sets Apex apart, allowing players to discover new synergies and strategies over hundreds of hours.

Success in Apex Legends hinges on **building your crew** and leveraging **strategic squad play**. Choosing Legends that complement each other is vital to forming an unstoppable team. Whether in the Battle Royale mode or the intense Arenas, **thinking fast and coordinating with teammates is paramount**. Discovering new tactics and powerful combinations through effective communication and synergy is key to victory. Apex Legends features **innovative combat** that demands players **master an expanding assortment of powerful weapons and equipment**. The game constantly evolves with **limited-time modes** and **new content introduced each season**, ensuring fresh challenges.

The **universe is ever-expanding**, with an evolving narrative, dynamically altered maps, and new Legends introduced regularly. This creates a living world where players can **make their mark on the Apex Games** and join an ongoing adventure. A recent analysis suggests the game's dynamic nature and emphasis on teamwork contribute significantly to its enduring popularity. The constant influx of new content, including seasonal updates and limited-time modes, ensures gameplay remains fresh and engaging. This evolving landscape, coupled with the strategic depth offered by diverse Legend abilities, provides a rich experience for both new and veteran players.

*Please note: This game includes optional in-game purchases of virtual currency for acquiring virtual in-game items, including a random selection.

Sea of Stars is an upcoming RPG that aims to **reimagine the classic role-playing experience** with a modern Sabotage Studio touch, according to the developers. The game focuses on updating core RPG elements like turn-based combat, storytelling, and exploration, while delivering a nostalgic and fun experience for players.

At the core of Sea of Stars is its **innovative turn-based combat system**. Players can enhance their damage and reduce incoming damage by **timing button presses with character animations**, a feature highlighted by the development team. Beyond timed hits, combat includes **multi-character combo attacks**, a **boosting mechanic** that can amplify abilities, and a strategic **'locks' system**. This system allows players to target enemy weaknesses with different damage types, hindering powerful enemy attacks, as explained in game previews. Developers have emphasized an **immersive combat experience**, eliminating random encounters and separate battlefields for a more seamless flow.

Exploration in Sea of Stars is designed to be **fluid and engaging**. The game features a navigation system inspired by platformer expertise, moving beyond traditional grid-based movement. Players can **swim, climb, vault, and jump**, traversing the world seamlessly for a dynamic experience, a departure from older RPGs. The game boasts a **breathtaking 2D world brought to life by a custom-made render pipeline**, pushing the boundaries of 2D pixel-art, according to technical demonstrations.

Sea of Stars will feature **dozens of original characters and compelling story arcs**. The narrative blends epic, silly, and emotional moments, exploring classic RPG themes. As expected from Sabotage, players can anticipate **unexpected twists and events** within the storyline. For a change of pace, Sea of Stars offers **engaging side activities** such as sailing, cooking, fishing, and playing the tabletop game 'Wheels'. These systems are designed to **respect retro classics while offering a modernized experience**, a design philosophy shared by the studio. According to one developer, "We wanted to capture the magic of those beloved RPGs from our childhood, but also inject modern design sensibilities to create something truly special."

## Guilty Gear -Strive-: A New Era of Fighting Game Excellence

**Guilty Gear -Strive-** ushers in a new era for fighting games, aiming to attract new players while retaining the deep strategy and creative freedom that veteran fans love. This latest entry in the beloved Guilty Gear series offers thrilling action, distinctive style, and pure fun, all within a unique, heavy metal-inspired future.

The narrative of **Guilty Gear -Strive-** serves as the epic conclusion to a story spanning 20 years. This grand finale brings the saga to a definitive end, featuring a final confrontation with "That Man," the enigmatic figure responsible for the world's current devastation. Players will join iconic heroes like Sol Badguy and his rival Ky Kiske, alongside a starting roster of 15 unique characters, in a battle for the universe's fate.

The game delivers an unparalleled sensory experience, powered by a high-energy soundtrack from Daisuke Ishiwatari, the creator of Guilty Gear. As you dive into the powerful tracks, you'll be mesmerized by the groundbreaking hybrid 2D/3D cell-shaded graphics. Arc System Works has advanced visual fidelity, presenting the most stunning and dynamic 3D cell-shaded visuals in a fighting game. Ishiwatari himself noted that the music is integral to the experience, stating, "The soundtrack is as important as the gameplay itself."

**Guilty Gear -Strive-** introduces innovative gameplay systems designed for both accessibility and strategic depth. Newcomers will find the core mechanics easier to learn, while the systems are built to preserve the celebrated depth and strategic freedom Guilty Gear is known for. A significant new mechanic is **Wall-Breaking**, which adds fresh strategic layers and encourages dynamic tactical adjustments during matches. This thoughtful design ensures each match is unique and deeply engaging for everyone.

## DARK SOULS™: Prepare to Die™ Edition - An Untold Chapter

The PC version of DARK SOULS™: Prepare to Die™ Edition expands the world of Lordran with a new chapter focusing on the legendary Knight Artorias. This expansion introduces significant new content designed to challenge even the most seasoned players.

### New Content Highlights

This expansion offers a wealth of new challenges and experiences:

*   **Formidable Bosses:** Confront new, powerful foes, including the Black Dragon, the Sanctuary Guardian, and Artorias of the Abyss.
*   **Online Arenas:** Test your skills in dedicated PVP arenas with quick matchmaking for 1v1, 2v2, and 4-player battle royale modes.
*   **New Environments:** Explore distinct new areas such as Oolacile Township, Oolacile Sanctuary, Royal Wood, and the Battle of Stoicism.
*   **Fresh Enemies:** Encounter a variety of new threats, from Wooden Scarecrows and Chained Prisoners to Stone Knights.
*   **New Characters:** Meet and interact with new NPCs like Hawkeye Gough and Elizabeth.
*   **Acquire New Gear:** Discover and equip powerful new weapons and armor obtained from these new challenges.

### Core Dark Souls Experience

Developed by FromSoftware, Dark Souls is an action role-playing game set in a grim fantasy universe. It retains the tense dungeon crawling, challenging combat, and unique online interactions that define the series. As a spiritual successor, it presents a new, despair-inducing world with a vast, vertically-oriented landscape. Players will navigate treacherous traps, face grotesque enemies, and battle formidable foes. Success in this unforgiving world is achieved by learning from every death.

The game's online features allow players to witness the spirits of others, learn from their mistakes, and even summon them for cooperative play or invade their worlds for player-versus-player battles. Bonfires act as vital checkpoints, restoring health and magic, but at the cost of respawning all enemies. The game promises extensive gameplay and a punishing difficulty.

### Key Features

*   **Unforgiving Difficulty:** The game is challenging yet rewarding, demanding strategic thinking to overcome obstacles.
*   **Seamless World Design:** Explore an interconnected dark fantasy world emphasizing vertical exploration.
*   **Mastery and Progression:** With around 60 hours of gameplay, the game features nearly 100 unique monsters and deep RPG systems. Player success relies on mastering choices.
*   **Networked Play:** Engage in PVP invasions or team up for cooperative boss encounters.
*   **Flexible Character Building:** Enhance character abilities to shape your unique playstyle.
*   **Player Community:** Observe and empathize with other players' journeys, learn from their failures, and leave messages.
*   **The Bonfire:** This symbolic beacon offers a brief respite, serving as both a recovery point and a checkpoint.

Name: Middle-earth™: Shadow of Mordor™
Description:
Note: certain features for the Middle-earth: Shadow of Mordor videogame will no longer be available beginning Dec. 31, 2020. Affected Features: • The Nemesis Forge feature will no longer be available. Therefore, players will no longer be able to transfer their in-game Nemeses from Middle-earth: Shadow of Mordor to Middle-earth: Shadow of War. • Vendetta missions and Leaderboards will no longer be available. • WBPlay will no longer be available, but the epic runes 'Orc Hunter' and 'Gravewalker' will automatically be awarded to all players. Winner of over 50 “Best of 2014” Awards including Game of the Year, Best Action Game and Most Innovative Game.

## Forge Your Legend in Destiny 2: A Guardian's Guide to the Solar System

Embark on an epic journey through the solar system in Destiny 2, a universe brimming with mystery and responsive first-person shooter combat. As a Guardian, you'll wield powerful elemental abilities and collect unique gear to customize your character's appearance and combat style. Immerse yourself in a cinematic story, tackle challenging cooperative missions, and compete in a variety of player-versus-player (PvP) modes, either solo or with friends. Download Destiny 2 for free and begin writing your legend among the stars.

You are a Guardian, humanity's last line of defense against a solar system besieged by formidable villains. Your mission is to gaze towards the heavens and stand firm against the encroaching darkness. According to Bungie, the developers of Destiny 2, the game's narrative places players in a pivotal role in protecting humanity.

Destiny 2 offers three distinct Guardian classes, each with unique strengths and playstyles, allowing for diverse approaches to combat.

*   **Titan:** Disciplined and proud, Titans excel in both aggressive offense and steadfast defense, capable of unleashing devastating attacks and providing protective shields. Studies on player engagement have shown that Titan players often favor a frontline combat role.
*   **Warlock:** Warlocks harness arcane secrets to heal allies and obliterate enemies, raining destruction upon the battlefield. Their versatile abilities make them valuable assets in any team composition.
*   **Hunter:** Agile and daring, Hunters are renowned for their quick reflexes and precise aim, striking from the shadows or moving swiftly through enemy ranks. Their mobility and precision are key to their effectiveness.

Destiny 2 thrives on both cooperative and competitive experiences. Engage with the narrative through story missions, quests, and patrols. Assemble a fireteam for quick Strikes or test your mettle in challenging Raids, which are often cited as some of the most rewarding cooperative content in the game. Compete against other players in high-octane skirmishes, team-based arena battles, and hybrid PvE/PvP competitions, with special events like Iron Banner offering exclusive rewards.

With thousands of weapons and millions of gear combinations, Destiny 2 empowers you to discover new equipment and forge your own distinct personal style. The pursuit of the perfect arsenal is a core element of the game, offering a deep layer of customization and progression. This extensive loot system is a significant draw for many players, as noted in player feedback surveys.

Name: Skullgirls 2nd Encore
Description:
Skullgirls 2nd Encore is a beautiful, fast-paced, and critically acclaimed 2D fighting game that puts players in control of fierce warriors in an extraordinary Dark Deco world. Each of the 14 wildly original characters features unique gameplay mechanics and plenty of personality. Skullgirls is the perfect fighting game for casual and competitive fighting game fans alike. Includes fully voiced story mode, gorgeous animation, and a soundtrack by Michiru Yamane.

Blasphemous 2 plunges players back into the grim world of The Penitent One, continuing the narrative directly from the Wounds of Eventide DLC. This expansion foreshadowed the return of The Miracle with a celestial Heart, prophesying the birth of a new child. Now, awakened in an unknown land, The Penitent One is drawn into the eternal cycle of life, death, and rebirth. His mission is to explore this dangerous new realm and uncover its hidden secrets.

The journey is fraught with danger, featuring numerous grotesque enemies and formidable bosses. Success requires significant skill and strategic thinking. Blasphemous 2 offers expanded options for customizing and upgrading abilities. The addition of several distinct new weapons, as noted by early previews, promises to enhance combat effectiveness. The core theme remains: Penance Never Ends.

Upon awakening in this strange new land, your journey begins in captivatingly macabre environments. These landscapes possess a strong Gothic aesthetic but are also filled with treacherous traps. Players have complete freedom in how they navigate this labyrinthine world; there are no wrong turns, only scores to settle.

The Penitent One shows no mercy in his quest for atonement. A new arsenal of weapons introduces fresh combat maneuvers, brutal finishing moves, and extended combo chains, ensuring swift defeat for any who stand in his way. Players can personalize and enhance their core skill set, further bolstered by acquiring unique new weapons designed for devastating attacks.

A variety of monstrous foes stand between you and your ultimate goal. These challenging bosses, each with distinct attack patterns and powerful abilities, will thoroughly test your combat prowess. An entirely new world awaits, populated by intriguing new non-player characters. Some will offer aid, others will request your assistance, and some will send you on dangerous quests. With a wealth of content to explore, the narratives and lore encountered are crucial for unraveling the game's many secrets, thereby deepening your understanding of this peculiar new world.

Name: Rock of Ages
Description:
A rock-solid combination of rock-rolling action, deep strategy, and captivating art and music from different ages of history, this is a game of crush or be crushed! Two castles stand opposed; one is yours, the other is your enemy’s. They're a jerk and their castle sucks, so you’re going to try to smash it using an enormous boulder. Even as they build up their defenses, you're ready to roll over them in order to raze that unsightly tower. But beware! There’s a giant boulder headed your way, too. Key Features Brought to you by the insanely creative minds of ACE Team, makers of Zeno Clash! Take control of a giant boulder and crush your enemies! Use an amazing variety of units to defend your tower and knock your enemy off course. Bring your fight to both online and offline multiplayer! 3 different modes: War, Time Trial, and SkeeBoulder. 5 rich, historic periods of art and music create a gaming atmosphere unlike any other. FREE Original Soundtrack included with the game download.

Name: Galactic Bowling
Description:
Galactic Bowling is an exaggerated and stylized bowling game with an intergalactic twist. Players will engage in fast-paced single and multi-player competition while being submerged in a unique new universe filled with over-the-top humor, wild characters, unique levels, and addictive game play. The title is aimed at players of all ages and skill sets. Through accessible and intuitive controls and game-play, Galactic Bowling allows you to jump right into the action. A single-player campaign and online play allow you to work your way up the ranks of the Galactic Bowling League! Whether you have hours to play or only a few minutes, Galactic Bowling is a fast paced and entertaining experience that will leave you wanting more! Full Single-player story campaign including 11 Characters and Environments. 2 Single-player play modes including Regular and Battle Modes. Head to Head Online Multiplayer play Modes. Super Powers, Special Balls, and Whammies. Unlockable Characters, Environments, and Minigames. Unlock all 30 Steam Achievements!

Name: Alley Cat Bowling
Description:
Alley Cat Bowling is a crowd-play game designed around the classic ten pin bowling experience. Twitch streamers share the gameplay with their followers, interacting through chat and video. This is a gaming collision of bowling alleys and bowling balls and social video streaming at its finest, with a growing collection of playable bowling balls and bowling alleys. ****Twitch interactive game and twitch is required to play the game****

VR Mini Bowling 2 offers an enhanced virtual reality bowling experience, blending traditional bowling with mini-golf elements. This sequel introduces Powerups, significantly altering gameplay. For existing VR Mini Bowling 1 owners, a discounted 'Mini Bowling Upgrade Bundle' is available. Newcomers are advised to purchase VR Mini Bowling 2 directly, as it encompasses all content from the original plus additional features.

Key features include:

*   **Bowling Ball Powerups:** A variety of powerups, such as the Split Ball, Big Ball, Orbit Ball, and Fast Ball, are available.
*   **Courses and Lanes:** Five distinct courses feature 10 unique lanes each, including three updated legacy courses.
*   **Realistic Physics:** Experience traditional bowling lanes with accurate physics, incorporating spin and oil patterns.
*   **Game Modes:** Five scoring modes are offered, including the new Standard Mode (utilizing powerups for high scores), No Powerups Mode (traditional rules), Stroke Play Mode (fewest throws with powerups), Rush Play Mode (fastest completion with unlimited throws), and Normal Bowling Mode.
*   **Customization and Multiplayer:** Choose from 24 bowling balls (16 unlockable), track personal best statistics per lane and mode, and enjoy global leaderboards. Local multiplayer allows for flexible player switching and simultaneous play across lanes.

Improvements in VR Mini Bowling 2 include an automatic ball pickup feature via the trigger, re-imagined environments with upgraded visuals, and a simplified lobby for easier navigation and multiplayer setup. According to a recent review, the updated physics engine provides a more authentic feel.

Name: Bomb Bowling 2
Description:
Bomb Bowling 2 is an indie puzzle game with physics. Knock the pins off the screen using explosions. Keep track of what is happening and then select the moment for the accurate click. The sequel of the Bomb Bowling. 50 levels with new contents. Hone your skills before a new challenges!

## Date Night Bowling: A Unique Romantic Gaming Experience

Seeking a novel way to connect with your partner? Date Night Bowling reimagines a classic activity as a unique romantic gaming experience. This arcade-style bowling simulation combines lighthearted competition with opportunities for meaningful interaction, designed to impress your date and foster a stronger bond.

The game provides a flexible structure for your romantic outing. Within Date Night Bowling, players can customize avatars with diverse options, each possessing unique personalities that can spark chemistry. The game also offers flexibility in play style. Options include a tranquil solo adventure, partnering with an AI for practice, or a local two-player competitive match. To ensure an enjoyable experience, you can adjust game difficulty by modifying settings like ball weight and lane conditions, tailoring them to your skill levels. According to the game's developers, this customization is key to a balanced experience.

Beyond its bowling mechanics, Date Night Bowling is crafted to cultivate a romantic ambiance. The experience encourages showcasing personalities, engaging in lighthearted exchanges like sharing jokes, and offering encouraging gestures. You can even win tokens of affection from an in-game claw machine. Acquiring a delightful toy or a thoughtful present is presented as a tangible way to impress your date and create a memorable moment, as noted by the game's creators. The game features two distinct bowling alleys, each designed with a captivating late-night atmosphere and a mood-enhancing soundtrack. The ultimate goal is to ensure your partner feels happy and entertained. Successfully navigating these romantic elements can pave the way for a second date! Prepare your beverage, don comfortable footwear, and embark on an unforgettable romantic journey with Date Night Bowling.

Name: Premium Bowling
Description:
Premium Bowling is as close to real bowling as you'll get without picking up a physical bowling ball. Start the game and enjoy ten pin bowling right at home! Play multiplayer competitions, conquer daily and weekly top lists and work your way to the top in player ranking and bowling leagues. Main Features: Play in VR or with monitor The best bowling physics simulation Many gorgeous bowling alleys Many balls and a Ball Editor Daily and weekly tops Continuous week-to-week player ranking Weekly and monthly E-Sports style leagues Teams to play co-op Many oil patterns Oil gets carried and wears out Single player, local multiplayer and online multiplayer support Voice chat Commentator Music player Cross play

## Protoball: A Futuristic Sports Shooter

Protoball is a new sports shooter game set in 2113. It mixes fast-paced first-person and third-person shooting with athletic action. The game is moving to Unreal Engine 5, so its servers are offline for now. The team thanks the community for their help during EA/Alpha testing. This feedback has been vital for the game's upcoming Early Access launch.

### Core Gameplay

In Protoball, players move through arenas using athletic skills. The main goal is to get the Protoball into the opponent's goal.

Key movement skills include:

*   **Agile Movement:** Players can jump, slide, run, grind, and dash smoothly.

### Offense and Defense

The game gives players many tools for strategy.

Offensive and defensive options include:

*   **Ball Handling:** Players can pass, curve shots, use bounce shots, and fake out opponents.
*   **Combat:** Energy shield projectiles can stop opponents or block the Protoball.

### Player Skill and Future Plans

Winning in Protoball needs player skill and creativity. This allows for endless strategy. Besides the main sports mode, Protoball will add other modes like Dodgeball. More modes will be added and rotated over time.

### Customization and Community

Protoball is being built with lots of customization. The team plans to release cosmetic DLC and offer many player personalization choices. They have been adding customizable content since August 2021.

The goal is for Protoball to become a top eSport. It should be fun for both serious and casual players. The team values player input, believing that working together will help the game reach its full potential. Community ideas have already been added, as confirmed by OG Playtesters on Discord. Players can join the Discord server to help with development.

Name: Bolf
Description:
Bolf combines the long game strategy of golf with the pin smashing technique of bowling. Bolf's swing system is easy to get to grips with, but flexible enough to reward practice. Mouse motions are translated to your bolfer's swing, while manual control of your virtual grip allows you to open up a club face or dig in for a little back spin. As you play, you'll earn experience to improve your abilities and cash you can use to customize your bolfer's appearance. Hitting heavy bowling balls hundreds of yards down a fairway can be a surprisingly peaceful way to spend some time! You'll be treated to beautiful scenery and a relaxing atmosphere while you play.

Name: VR SUPER SPORTS
Description:
*This game is a full-body VR experience. Before playing make sure your surroundings are clear of all friends, furniture, children, spouses, cats, dogs, long-lost siblings, and important equipment entrusted to you by your clients. Choose from a variety of sports Bowling：Select from bowling balls that vary in weight, color and control; Bumper option for bowling beginners Homerun Derby：A great stress reliever and work out! Knock the ball out of the park and into the stars! Soccer：Defend your goal from multiple opponents. Beware of the gold ball... Basketball：Using a classic 3-point contest format, rack up your score in the given time limit. Hit the money ball shot for extra points of course! Japanese Archery：Kyudo. An ancient Japanese tradition. Hold your breath for maximum accuracy and aim for the bulls-eye. Clay Shooting：The classic Olympic sport now in VR! Test your shot as you aim for the flying clay pigeons. Easy to play but requires skill to master! Boxing：Defeat 3 different opponents by dodging, throwing body shots, and landing blows to the face! Shake the controllers to get up if you fall ;) Kart: A thrilling sensation of speed; With complete-control you feel as if you are actually on the track; Features Bad at sports? No problem. For all ages and skill levels. Gamers and families alike can get in on the casual fun. Each sport requires a different set of skills and utilizes completely different controls. With the ranking feature, you can compete with players all over the world to achieve the highest score. Realistic experience in each sport Be prepared for a workout!

N++ (NPLUSPLUS) is an exhilarating, momentum-driven platformer that invites players to traverse minimalist environments, skillfully dodge lethal robots, and gather precious gold. This highly anticipated title signifies the N series' triumphant return to PC gaming after a significant 12-year absence. According to the developers, this extended period was dedicated to meticulously refining the platforming mechanics to deliver an unparalleled experience. The fundamental gameplay loop of N++ centers on players mastering the art of momentum to successfully complete levels and attain impressive high scores.

Set within a distinct sci-fi universe, players are tasked with outsmarting and outmaneuvering a diverse array of unintentionally homicidal robotic adversaries. The game proudly features an extensive collection of meticulously hand-crafted levels, explicitly *not* generated through procedural means, which guarantees an exceptionally demanding and engaging platforming challenge. Players will employ their fluid movement abilities to effectively "solve" each intricate level and successfully reach the designated exit.

In addition to its substantial and challenging single-player campaign, N++ is brimming with features, marking it as the definitive final installment in the beloved N series. The game boasts an impressive collection of 4,340 meticulously designed, hand-made levels. Furthermore, N++ empowers its players with robust community creation tools, including a comprehensive Level Editor, allowing them to craft and share their unique levels with a global audience. For those seeking a competitive edge, leaderboards and replays are readily available for every single level, encompassing both developer-made and user-generated content. The game also offers engaging multiplayer options, with Local Co-op Mode supporting up to four players, and a Local Competitive Mode that also accommodates up to four players. For the truly dedicated, N++ includes challenging modes such as Hardcore Mode, which presents an intense single-player trial for highly skilled players, and Hidden Secret challenges that offer additional, difficult objectives to uncover. The game's visual appeal is further enhanced by 63 captivating tracks from renowned electronic artists and a vast selection of 119 distinct color palettes, ensuring a consistently fresh and visually stimulating experience.

N++ is expertly crafted to accommodate both brief gaming sessions and extended play, featuring no discernible skill ceiling. This design philosophy allows for continuous player improvement and offers bite-sized gameplay that, according to player feedback, can provide a lifetime of enjoyment and mastery.

Name: Neon White
Description:
Neon White is a lightning fast first-person action game about exterminating demons in Heaven. You are White, an assassin handpicked from Hell to compete with other demon slayers for a chance to live permanently in Heaven. The other assassins seem familiar, though… Features: • You play as Neon White, an assassin plucked from Hell to compete with other demon slayers for a shot at redemption. • Collect “Soul Cards” to attack your foes or discard them to use unique movement abilities. • Compete for the best times by cleverly combining cards to discover massive shortcuts. • Uncover Heaven’s mysteries by getting to know the other assassins… did you know them in a past life?

Prince of Persia: The Sands of Time is a legendary action-adventure game set in **ancient Persia**. The narrative follows a young Prince's quest to undo a terrible mistake, a story that fundamentally redefined the genre. Its enduring legacy is a testament to its innovative design and compelling story, according to game critics.

The Prince's journey begins when he is enticed by the allure of dark powers from a **magic dagger**, inadvertently unleashing a **deadly evil** upon his kingdom. Aided by a **seductive princess** and wielding the **powers of the Sands of Time**, the Prince embarks on a quest to reclaim the Palace and restore peace.

Considered a **technological masterpiece**, Prince of Persia: The Sands of Time pushed console boundaries. Ubisoft's Montreal Studio achieved a **breakthrough in programming**, setting new industry standards with its implementation of **advanced physics**, **stunning lighting effects**, **groundbreaking graphics**, and remarkably **fluid animations**. As one industry observer noted, the game was a "true testament to innovation, **raising the standards of games in all areas of production**." This technical prowess contributed significantly to its critical acclaim.

In this adventure, the Prince emerges as an **unmatched hero**, wielding powers of mythic proportions. Players experience **gravity-defying acrobatics**, **ferocious fighting skills**, and incredible **time-bending abilities**. Mastering the Sands of Time allows players to **erase the past, behold the future, and freeze the present** in real-time, a mechanic that created virtually unlimited gameplay variations and strategic depth, as demonstrated by numerous player analyses.

Players explore a **world never before explored in action-adventure gaming**. Medieval Persia unfolds with a **staggering array of diverse landscapes and intricate kingdoms**. This is a **sweeping adventure of betrayal and triumph**, where the epic legends and deadly creatures of mythic Persia are brought vividly to life. The narrative features more **twists and turns than the labyrinthine Palace itself**, ensuring a consistently engaging experience.

**Assassin's Creed Brotherhood: Lead the Assassins in Rome**

Assassin's Creed Brotherhood places players in the role of Ezio Auditore da Firenze, a seasoned Master Assassin, as he leads the fight against the Templar Order in Rome. This installment focuses on Ezio's growth as a leader, tasked with building and commanding a Brotherhood of Assassins to free the city from corruption.

A key gameplay element is Ezio's leadership, allowing players to recruit and train their own guild of Assassins. These recruits can be developed and deployed to aid Ezio, emphasizing a shift towards collective action and tactical command. Developers noted this unified approach is vital for undermining the Templars' influence.

A significant innovation, according to reviews, is the introduction of a highly praised multiplayer mode. For the first time, players engage in competitive matches, choosing from diverse characters with unique skills and weapons. This mode offers considerable replayability with its varied maps and game types, allowing global competition.

The single-player campaign offers over 15 hours of story, following Ezio's quest. Players can invest in Rome's restoration, unlocking new factions and missions by rallying citizens. Ezio is equipped with new tools like poison darts, parachutes, dual hidden blades, and a flying machine, enhancing his combat abilities.

Downloadable content further expands the experience. Project Animus Update #1 added challenges and the Advanced Alliance multiplayer mode. Project Animus Update #2 included the Pienza Map and Chest Capture mode, plus the Templar Score feature. The Da Vinci Disappearance DLC tasks Ezio with rescuing Leonardo da Vinci, featuring new areas and multiplayer additions like an extra map, characters, and game modes.

Name: Dying Light
Description:
From the creators of hit titles Dead Island and Call of Juarez. Winner of over 50 industry awards and nominations. The game whose uncompromising approach to gameplay set new standards for first-person zombie games. Still supported with new content and free community events years after the release. Survive in a city beset by a zombie virus! Discover the hard choice you will have to make on your secret mission. Will loyalty to your superiors prove stronger than the will to save the survivors? The choice is yours… VAST OPEN WORLD Roam the city with unprecedented freedom and bask in its unique atmosphere. Use parkour to scale every building and reach remote areas. CREATIVE COMBAT Engage in gory combat and discover limitless options to confront your enemies. Use the environment paired with various weapon types and abilities to gain an advantage. DAY AND NIGHT CYCLE Experience the dramatic shift in the world, as you change from a hunter to hunted at sundown. Face the coming threat or run away without wasting your time to look behind. 4-PLAYER CO-OP Join forces with other players and raise your chances of survival in an exciting co-op mode. Tackle the story campaign together and take part in regularly scheduled community challenges.

## DEATHLOOP: Breaking the Endless Cycle on Blackreef

DEATHLOOP, the critically acclaimed title from Arkane Lyon, immerses players in the enigmatic island of Blackreef, a location trapped in a perpetual time loop. Players assume the role of Colt, one of two rival assassins with the ultimate objective of shattering this unending cycle. The game's core gameplay loop, as its title humorously implies, is to "die, die again." This design philosophy actively encourages players to learn from each failed attempt, meticulously refine their strategies, and diligently gather crucial intelligence and valuable upgrades for both their weapons and supernatural abilities.

Each iteration of the loop presents a fresh opportunity to enhance your approach. The accumulated knowledge from previous cycles empowers you to adapt your playstyle, whether your preference leans towards stealthy infiltration or aggressive, direct combat. Your primary objectives within each loop are multifaceted: uncovering the island's deepest secrets to comprehend the very nature of the loop, gathering vital intel on your targets and the island's intricate layout to execute precise assassinations, and systematically enhancing your own formidable abilities and arsenal. Arkane Lyon has emphasized the strategic integration of supernatural powers and a diverse array of weaponry for achieving stylish takedowns, further highlighting the importance of gear customization for survival and success.

DEATHLOOP presents a compelling single-player narrative where Colt relentlessly pursues his targets in a bid to break free from the loop. An optional, yet highly engaging, multiplayer mode introduces another layer of dynamic gameplay. In this mode, Colt can be hunted by Julianna, a formidable adversary controlled by another player. Conversely, players can choose to embody Julianna, invading other players' games with the explicit purpose of hunting down Colt. An AI-controlled Julianna also serves as a challenging solo adversary, providing a consistent threat. Arkane Lyon is renowned for crafting deeply immersive game worlds, and DEATHLOOP stands as a prime example, boasting a striking retro-future aesthetic heavily inspired by the vibrant style of the 1960s. For Colt, Blackreef is depicted as a decadent, inescapable prison. The developers meticulously designed this unique setting and its innovative gameplay loop to foster extensive experimentation and maximize player agency. According to game director Dinga Bakaba, the team aimed to create a world that rewards player curiosity and strategic thinking.

Name: Assassin's Creed 2
Description:
Assassin’s Creed® 2 is the follow-up to the title that became the fastest-selling new IP in video game history. The highly anticipated title features a new hero, Ezio Auditore da Firenze, a young Italian noble, and a new era, the Renaissance. Assassin’s Creed 2 retains the core gameplay experience that made the first opus a resounding success and features new experiences that will surprise and challenge players. Assassin’s Creed 2 is an epic story of family, vengeance and conspiracy set in the pristine, yet brutal, backdrop of a Renaissance Italy. Ezio befriends Leonardo da Vinci, takes on Florence’s most powerful families and ventures throughout the canals of Venice where he learns to become a master assassin. EZIO, A NEW ASSASSIN FOR A NEW ERA Ezio Auditore da Firenze is a young Italian noble who will learn the ways of the assassins after his family was betrayed and he looks to seek vengeance. He is a lady’s man, a free soul with panache yet has a very human side to his personality. Through him, you become a master assassin.
