RENAISSANCE ITALY Italy in the 15th century was less a country and more a collection of city-states where families with political and economic strength began to take leadership roles in cities like Florence and Venice. This journey through some of the most beautiful cities in the world takes place in a time in history where culture and art were born alongside some of the most chilling stories of corruption, greed and murder. A NEW-FOUND FREEDOM You will be able to perform missions when you want and how you want in this open-ended world that brings back free-running and adds elements such as swimming and even flying to the adventure. The variety in gameplay adds another layer for you to truly play through the game any way you choose. DYNAMIC CROWD Discover a living, breathing world where every character is an opportunity for the player. Blending in with the crowd is easier, working with in-game characters provide ample rewards but can also lead to surprising consequences. BECOME A MASTER ASSASSIN Perfect your skills to become a master assassin where you brandish new weapons, learn to disarm enemies then use their weapons against them, and assassinate enemies using both hidden blades. Please note that as of November 19th, 2018, the online features for this game are no longer supported. The Multiplayer mode / Co-op mode will no longer be accessible. (MAC ONLY)

**Rise of the Tomb Raider™: 20 Year Celebration - An Expanded Adventure**

The "20 Year Celebration" edition of Rise of the Tomb Raider presents a comprehensive expansion, integrating the acclaimed base game with a full Season Pass. This package significantly enhances Lara Croft's latest adventure with a wealth of new content, making it the definitive way to experience her journey. According to reports, this expanded edition aims to provide players with an even deeper dive into Lara's world, offering a truly immersive experience.

This comprehensive expansion introduces several key additions designed to enrich the gameplay experience. Players can now explore Lara's ancestral home in the new "Blood Ties" story, uncovering its secrets and delving into her past. Following this narrative, the "Lara's Nightmare" mode challenges players to defend Croft Manor against hordes of zombies, offering a thrilling twist. For the first time in the series, players can team up with a friend in online Co-Op Endurance mode, facing extreme conditions and survival challenges together. A new "Extreme Survivor" difficulty setting further tests players' mettle with demanding survival mechanics, as noted by game reviewers. The celebration also includes nostalgic gear, such as an outfit and weapon inspired by Tomb Raider III, and five classic Lara Croft skins for customization, adding a touch of fan service.

In addition to these new features, the "20 Year Celebration" edition seamlessly integrates existing downloadable content. This includes "Baba Yaga: The Temple of the Witch," where players explore a new tomb filled with ancient terror, and "Cold Darkness Awakened," which pits players against waves of infected predators. These additions, combined with the core game's features, create an unparalleled adventure. The core game itself features Lara's quest to uncover an ancient mystery and her pursuit by the organization Trinity. Her journey to Siberia in search of the Lost City of Kitezh is central to the plot. Furthermore, the game emphasizes "Woman vs. Wild" survival elements and the "Guerilla Combat" system. The return to intricate tomb raiding with deadly traps and environmental puzzles is also a hallmark of the experience, as highlighted in game analyses.

Step into Renaissance Italy with Assassin's Creed® 2, a world of artistic brilliance and political turmoil. This celebrated title follows Ezio Auditore da Firenze, a young noble whose life is upended by family betrayal and a quest for vengeance. The game expertly merges historical detail with exciting action, delivering a captivating narrative.

The story focuses on Ezio, a nobleman whose life is shattered by a devastating betrayal, leading to the loss of his family. This tragedy transforms him from a carefree noble into a master assassin. Players guide Ezio as he refines his combat and stealth abilities, seeking retribution. The 15th-century Italian setting is vividly depicted, showcasing powerful city-states and the era's cultural rebirth alongside its corruption. Iconic cities like Florence and Venice are meticulously recreated as Ezio's operational areas.

Assassin's Creed 2 enhances player agency with its open-world design. Missions can be approached at one's own pace, allowing for diverse strategies. The game expands on the series' free-running, adding swimming and limited flight for new traversal and tactical options. The world feels dynamic, with a sophisticated crowd system offering stealth and interaction opportunities. Players can blend into crowds, and engaging with NPCs can provide information or rewards, sometimes with unexpected outcomes. Assassination mechanics are varied, including weapon mastery and effective counter-attacks. The hidden blades remain key for stealthy takedowns. As of November 19th, 2018, online features are no longer supported for this game (MAC ONLY).

Dishonored 2 invites players to step back into the shoes of a supernatural assassin in a world where mysticism and industry are deeply intertwined. This highly anticipated sequel, which critics have lauded as "brilliant" and a "masterpiece," unfolds a compelling narrative of revenge. Players have the choice to embody either Empress Emily Kaldwin or her loyal royal protector, Corvo Attano, with each character offering distinct perspectives and emotional responses to the unfolding events.

The game's story commences fifteen years after the fall of the Lord Regent. An outside force has seized Empress Emily Kaldwin's throne, plunging the Isles into chaos. Assuming the roles of either Emily or Corvo, players embark on a journey from the familiar streets of Dunwall to Karnaca, a once-prosperous coastal city that holds the key to Emily's restoration. Armed with the Mark of the Outsider and a suite of new abilities, players are tasked with hunting down their enemies and reclaiming what was unjustly taken.

Key features that define the experience in Dishonored 2 include:

*   **The Dual Protagonists:** Both Emily Kaldwin and Corvo Attano are fully voiced characters, each possessing unique personalities and emotional depth. Players can creatively utilize each character's distinct powers, tools, and weaponry to navigate the game's environments, choosing between direct combat or a more stealthy approach.
*   **Supernatural Powers:** The game offers enhanced bonecharm crafting and new upgrade paths, allowing for extensive customization of supernatural abilities. Players can transform into a living shadow, link enemies together for shared repercussions, or even charm their opponents. Dishonored 2 provides a vast array of combinations for combat styles, powers, and weapons to achieve objectives.
*   **An Immersive World:** Dishonored 2 presents meticulously detailed and stylized locations, ranging from the grimy streets of Dunwall to the sun-drenched shores of Karnaca. The game's world is a character in itself, rich with lore, intricate design, and memorable individuals. Specific mission areas, such as the Dust District and a peculiar mansion with dynamically shifting walls, offer unique and engaging challenges.
*   **The Void Engine:** Developed using id Tech and further refined by Arkane Studios, the new Void Engine significantly enhances the game's rendering capabilities. According to Arkane Studios, it supports an advanced artistic vision and leverages current hardware to deliver responsive artificial intelligence, striking visual fidelity, detailed cityscapes, and an engaging narrative presentation.

Spelunky 2 expands upon the beloved roguelike platformer, introducing a new generation of explorers to the Moon in their quest for treasure and lost family. This sequel retains the unique, randomized challenges of its predecessor while offering a vast adventure for both new and returning players.

The world of Spelunky 2 is significantly more dynamic, featuring expanded areas, characters, traps, and items. New interactions between these elements, along with branching paths and multi-layered levels, add a third dimension to the classic 2D gameplay. Dynamic liquid physics enhance the reactive and alive feel of the world, and players can even tame and ride animals.

Back at Base Camp, unlocked characters gather between runs, offering encouragement and advice. As players explore, this camp evolves into a thriving community, providing a safe space for breaks, shortcuts, and practice. Spelunky 2 emphasizes experimentation and player-driven stories within its interactive world, becoming more personalized with each playthrough.

Key features include new areas, monsters, traps, and items, alongside an extra dimension accessible through a second playfield layer containing hidden areas. Multiple routes offer personalized runs, and players can find and ride mounts with special abilities. New NPCs can be interacted with in various ways, and classic Spelunky concepts like shops and ghosts have been updated to challenge veteran players. Improved liquid physics, deadly poisons, curses, and enhanced lighting and special effects contribute to a richer experience. Deeper mysteries may even require community effort to unravel, and the game potentially features more eggplants.

Braid is a critically acclaimed puzzle-platformer where players manipulate time to solve intricate challenges. The game invites you to explore a painterly world, journeying through distinct environments to rescue an abducted princess. Each world introduces a unique temporal power, fundamentally altering how time behaves and shaping the nature of the puzzles you'll encounter.

The core of Braid's design lies in its innovative time mechanics, which offer a variety of temporal effects to create its signature puzzles. These include the ability to rewind your actions, the presence of time-immune objects, temporal mechanics tied to space, the introduction of parallel realities, and time dilation to slow down or speed up time. According to numerous reviews, Braid respects players' time with no filler content, ensuring every puzzle reveals something new about its universe.

Key features enhance the player experience, such as Steam Cloud Support for seamless progress saving. Braid offers forgiving yet challenging gameplay; death and failure are impossible, with the challenge stemming from intellectual puzzle-solving rather than demanding platforming skills. Players explore diverse worlds, collect puzzle pieces, and solve challenges by creatively manipulating time. The game features a beautiful painterly art style and a lush soundtrack. Its non-linear narrative offers real-world metaphors for temporal manipulations, allowing players to explore consequences without penalty. Furthermore, gameplay is non-linear, allowing players to tackle puzzles in any order and return to difficult ones later.

N++ (NPLUSPLUS) is a thrilling, momentum-based platformer that immerses players in a minimalist sci-fi world. The central gameplay loop hinges on the expert utilization of momentum to overcome a variety of obstacles, evade relentless homicidal robots, and gather precious gold. This highly anticipated title marks the return of the N series to PC after a significant 12-year hiatus. During this extended period, the development team dedicated their efforts to meticulously refining the platforming mechanics and overall player experience.

The game places a strong emphasis on fluid movement and strategic problem-solving within its meticulously hand-crafted levels, which are notably not procedurally generated. Players are tasked with mastering their agility to effectively "solve" each stage and successfully reach the exit. N++ provides a deep and engaging experience, featuring a substantial single-player campaign. As the concluding installment in the N series, this entry is brimming with features designed to ensure endless replayability and foster diverse gameplay.

According to the developers, N++ offers an extensive amount of content, boasting 4,340 hand-made levels. Beyond these, players can discover hidden secret challenges that add an extra layer of difficulty and reward. The game also champions creative freedom and community engagement. It includes a robust Level Editor, empowering players to craft their own custom challenges. Furthermore, the Global Level Sharing feature allows for the seamless playing and sharing of these player-created levels worldwide.

For those seeking social or competitive experiences, N++ provides both Local Co-op Mode and Local Competitive Mode, each supporting up to 4 players. The game also caters to those who enjoy a significant challenge with its Hardcore Mode, a particularly punishing single-player experience. Customization and presentation are key aspects, with 119 distinct color palettes available for personalization. The game's atmosphere is further enhanced by a captivating soundtrack featuring 63 tracks from a roster of top electronic artists. Performance tracking is integrated through leaderboards and replays for every level, including those created by players.

N++ is thoughtfully designed to accommodate both brief gaming sessions and extended play. Its "no skill ceiling" design philosophy, as stated by the creators, allows for continuous improvement and mastery, offering bite-sized gameplay that can, in essence, last a lifetime.

Name: The Making of Karateka
Description:
Prince of Persia creator Jordan Mechner was a college student when he created one of the biggest-selling games of 1984: Karateka. Now, in a new interactive documentary from Digital Eclipse, the story of how a teenager with an Apple II created one of the most groundbreaking, influential games of all time. THE ORIGIN STORY OF A LEGENDARY GAME CREATOR Discover how Karateka was made through an exhaustive archive of design documents, playable prototypes, and all-new video features. Like walking through a museum, you can explore the interactive timelines at your own pace. PLAY THE ACCLAIMED ORIGINALS Enjoy pixel-perfect versions of the original Karateka games and a variety of never-before-seen early prototypes, with rich quality-of-life features like save anywhere, rewind, chapter select, and director's commentary. TWO REMASTERED GAMES Karateka Remastered is an all-new version of the original game featuring cutting-room-floor content, commentary, achievements, and more. Deathbounce: Rebounded is a fast and frantic twin-stick shooter based on Jordan's unpublished prototype. A GROUNDBREAKING MASTERPIECE Discover how Karateka became one of the first games to include cinematic scenes, a moving original soundtrack, rotoscoped animation, and a Hollywood-style love story, influencing the decades of games that followed. THE GOLD MASTER SERIES New from Digital Eclipse (Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Cowabunga Collection, Atari 50: The Anniversary Celebration), the Gold Master Series presents iconic games in an innovative 'interactive documentary' format, putting the shared history of games and their creators into one comprehensive package.

## Grapple Dog: Swing into Action with Pablo!

Prepare for an exhilarating 2D pixel-art platformer experience with **Grapple Dog**! This vibrant game places you in the paws of Pablo, a heroic dog equipped with an awesome grappling hook, ready to tackle tricky challenges and save the world. Join Pablo and his crew of fearless adventurers as they sail across six colorful worlds, determined to stop the robotic overlord Nul from his destructive plans.

**Grapple Dog** offers a wealth of features designed to keep players entertained and engaged. Prepare for a whirlwind of jumping, swinging, and gem collecting, complemented by the joy of driving a little boat and, as many players have noted, the delightful option of dog petting. The game boasts six distinct and colorful worlds, each containing 33 meticulously crafted levels. These levels are brimming with hidden collectibles, secret areas to investigate, spectacular boss battles to conquer, and challenging bonus levels to master.

Embark on a lighthearted quest alongside Pablo, the Grapple Dog, and his merry band of adventurers. Together, you'll set sail to thwart the evil robotic overlord Nul and protect the world from his tyranny. **Grapple Dog** caters to all playstyles. Seasoned platformer enthusiasts can hone their skills with optional collectibles and a challenging speedrun Time Trial mode, while those who prefer to play without restrictions can utilize the many in-built accessibility options. The game features a bold, colorful art style brought to life by a pixel art veteran, complemented by a funky fresh soundtrack. According to the developers, the game delivers buttery smooth 60fps gameplay, ensuring every moment is a delight.

Name: Celeste
Description:
Help Madeline survive her inner demons on her journey to the top of Celeste Mountain, in this super-tight, hand-crafted platformer from the creators of multiplayer classic TowerFall. A narrative-driven, single-player adventure like mom used to make, with a charming cast of characters and a touching story of self-discovery A massive mountain teeming with 700+ screens of hardcore platforming challenges and devious secrets Brutal B-side chapters to unlock, built for only the bravest mountaineers IGF “Excellence in Audio” finalist, with over 2 hours of original music led by dazzling live piano and catchy synth beats Pie The controls are simple and accessible - simply jump, air-dash, and climb - but with layers of expressive depth to master, where every death is a lesson. Lightning-fast respawns keep you climbing as you uncover the mysteries of the mountain and brave its many perils. This is it, Madeline. Just breathe. You can do this.

**Ghost Song: Unraveling Cosmic Terror on Lorian's Moon**

Prepare for an atmospheric 2D adventure of self-discovery, ancient mysteries, and cosmic terror in *Ghost Song*. This captivating game immerses players on the desolate moon of Lorian, where a long-dormant Deadsuit awakens, combat-ready with a clear, albeit mysterious, purpose. As this formidable suit, you are tasked with venturing beneath the surface to unearth the truth behind Lorian's secrets. The developers have stated that the game aims to deliver a profound experience of exploration and narrative depth, according to their design philosophy.

The gameplay of *Ghost Song* centers on exploration and combat within a beautifully illustrated, Metroidvania-inspired 2D world. Players will delve into winding caverns illuminated by eerie bioluminescent flora, navigating twisting alien tunnels and long-abandoned laboratories. As you progress, you'll acquire potent new abilities and weapons, crucial for unlocking access to deeper strata of the moon and uncovering optional hidden areas. The game's world is filled with secret chambers and a haunting history waiting to be discovered, encouraging thorough exploration, as noted by the development team.

Combat in *Ghost Song* is designed to be responsive and precise, challenging players to face the fungal aliens and metal husks that inhabit Lorian. Mastering the distinctive rhythm of the Deadsuit's core combat is key. Players can pummel enemies with a rapid-fire blaster, building up barrel heat that empowers devastating melee attacks. Furthermore, the game emphasizes character interaction, with players encountering a cast of voiced characters who share their own tales of survival, courage, abandonment, and redemption, adding a rich narrative layer to the alien world. A study on player engagement in similar titles suggests that such narrative elements significantly enhance immersion. The developers have also highlighted that the game's design encourages players to learn enemy patterns and adapt their strategies, a common feature in critically acclaimed Metroidvania titles, according to industry analysis. This approach to combat, combined with the atmospheric setting, creates a truly unique and engaging experience.

### Super Meat Boy: A Grueling Platforming Challenge

Super Meat Boy is a notoriously difficult platformer where players guide a sentient cube of meat on a desperate mission to rescue his girlfriend, a character made of bandages, from an evil, tuxedo-clad fetus trapped in a jar. This unusual hero must navigate treacherous environments filled with perilous wall leaps, deadly buzz saws, unstable crumbling caves, and hazardous pools of old needles. The game captures the spirit of classic NES difficulty, drawing comparisons to titles like Mega Man 2 and Ghosts 'n Goblins, according to many players. However, Super Meat Boy refines the experience, focusing on pure, unadulterated twitch reflex platforming. The challenge escalates from demanding to what many describe as "soul crushing." As players advance, Super Meat Boy journeys through unsettling locations, including haunted hospitals, salt factories, and the depths of Hell.

Beyond its substantial single-player campaign, featuring over 300 levels across more than five distinct chapters, Super Meat Boy offers a wealth of additional content. This includes challenging boss fights, a robust level editor for creating and sharing custom stages, and numerous unlockable secrets like warp zones and hidden characters. The Story Mode alone contains over 300 levels spread across more than five chapters. A unique Steam exclusive allows players to control the Head Crab, as confirmed by the developers. The game also presents 33 achievements to earn, offering in-game goals. Notably, warp zones act as special areas that can transport players into other games, a unique feature praised by critics. Super Meat Boy boasts over 16 unlockable characters, many originating from popular indie titles such as Minecraft and VVVVVV. The epic boss fights are a significant and memorable aspect of the gameplay. The full level editor and level portal, released in January 2011, greatly enhanced the game's replayability, as noted by players. The narrative, while often humorous, is considered profound, with some critics jokingly suggesting its impact will leave players "crying yourself to sleep for the rest of your life."

Name: INSIDE
Description:
Hunted and alone, a boy finds himself drawn into the center of a dark project. Try Playdead’s award-winning indie adventure game. INSIDE is a dark, narrative-driven platformer combining intense action with challenging puzzles. It has been critically acclaimed for its moody art style, ambient soundtrack and unsettling atmosphere.

OlliOlli World invites players into the vibrant and colorful world of Radlandia, presenting a unique skateboarding action-platformer adventure. This game truly stands out due to its strong emphasis on personality, introducing players to memorable characters and a compelling quest to find the mystical skate gods in their pursuit of Gnarvana, the ultimate skateboarding nirvana. According to Roll7, the BAFTA and multi-award-winning independent studio behind the critically acclaimed OlliOlli series, Radlandia is a delightful and eccentric place brimming with missions and challenges.

Players will explore meticulously crafted levels, each offering multiple paths that encourage exploration and replayability. Optional side quests further immerse players in the world and its quirky inhabitants. Successful challenge completions reward players with cosmetic unlocks, as noted by the developers. The game also provides ample opportunities to master epic tricks, featuring a vast array of aerial maneuvers and grinds. Complementing the distinctive visual style is a curated soundtrack of IDM and Electronica tracks, which significantly enhances the overall atmosphere, according to the studio.

The signature "flow state" gameplay of OlliOlli World is a direct result of incredibly tight controls and refined mechanics, ensuring a "silky smooth ride" for players of all skill levels. The game is thoughtfully designed to be accessible for newcomers, allowing them to perform impressive tricks with relative ease and minimizing frustration. For veterans seeking a challenge, OlliOlli World offers a profoundly rewarding experience with layers of complexity. The game boasts a deep combo system featuring over 100 distinct moves that can be seamlessly combined, allowing for immense player expression and strategic gameplay aimed at achieving high scores, as highlighted by the game's design.

Players can prove their skills to unlock special rewards for personalizing their skater's looks, signature tricks, and style, as the game wholeheartedly embraces individual expression. Competition is a key feature, with players able to compete in ranked Leagues against others globally. Furthermore, friends can be challenged to beat best tricks on millions of unique, player-created levels, fostering a vibrant community, according to Roll7.

## Embark on Your Guild Wars 2 Journey: Exploration and Adventure Await

Guild Wars 2 invites players to explore the vast and dynamic world of Tyria. Your **Content Guide** and **compass** serve as your companions, offering suggestions and pointing you toward points of interest, but spontaneous discovery is equally encouraged. The world teems with characters, each with their own stories and goals. By assisting them through **Renown Hearts** or engaging in **Dynamic Events**, you'll be rewarded and contribute to the unfolding narrative.

Collaboration is seamless in the open world; you can assist other players without formal party formation. Whether you're aiding a fellow adventurer, tackling a challenging **jumping puzzle**, or confronting a formidable **world boss**, Guild Wars 2 promotes a flexible and organic playstyle. Experience is gained naturally through your actions, from reviving allies and defending settlements to gathering resources. As you progress, you'll acquire a diverse array of weapons, each wielded uniquely by different professions, offering distinct combat experiences. Further customize your character by unlocking and equipping hundreds of **skills** and **traits**.

For those seeking direct competition, **structured PvP** offers an arena where all players start on equal footing, equipped with max-level gear and build options. Beyond combat, Guild Wars 2 emphasizes self-expression through extensive character customization. Acquiring new weapons and armor unlocks their **skins** in your wardrobe, which can be combined with thousands of cosmetic options and a wide selection of **dyes** to create a truly unique appearance.

Expanding your experience with expansions offers significant benefits, including **log-in rewards**, additional **character and bag slots**, and enhanced **chat features**. These expansions, along with Living World seasons, can be purchased through the in-game **Black Lion Trading Company**, with Steam Wallet integration available for upgrades. Expansions introduce new **Masteries** that enhance your character's capabilities. Key expansion features include unlocking **gliders** in **Heart of Thorns**, befriending **mounts** with unique movement skills in **Path of Fire**, and learning to **fish** and pilot **skiffs** in **End of Dragons**. Each expansion also grants access to nine **elite specializations**, providing new weapon choices, skills, and abilities. Furthermore, the **Revenant profession** can be chosen at character creation, allowing you to channel legendary figures from Tyria's history.

**Living World seasons** continue the game's narrative between expansions and are available for purchase via your **Story Journal** or in **Gem Store bundles**. Playing through these episodes unlocks new explorable zones, rewards, and Masteries. Note that Living World episodes are typically accessed at level 80, and a game relaunch may be necessary for upgrades to take effect. Please be aware that existing Guild Wars 2 accounts cannot be accessed through Steam.

## EVE Online: Forge Your Space Saga

EVE Online stands as the premier space MMO, renowned for its expansive, single-shard universe. With over 7,000 solar systems and nearly two decades of player-driven narratives, this world empowers you to forge your own destiny. Engage in thrilling PvP and PvE combat, harvest vital resources, chart unknown territories, and master intricate industrial systems. As an immortal Capsuleer, you command a fleet exceeding 350 customizable ships, ranging from agile Frigates to formidable Battleships and Freighters.

### Chart Your Course in New Eden

Will you venture into wormhole space solo? Or perhaps construct a formidable industrial empire, influencing the very fabric of the universe? Alternatively, you might unite with fellow pilots to conquer new frontiers. The decision rests with you: who will you become in New Eden?

### Experience EVE Online for Free

Embark on this vast spaceship MMO experience without cost as an Alpha Clone. This access grants you command of Frigates, Destroyers, Cruisers, Battlecruisers, and Battleships from all major factions. For unrestricted ship access and accelerated skill training, consider upgrading to Omega Clone status.

### A Single, Unified Universe

EVE Online operates on a single shard, meaning all players inhabit the same persistent server, irrespective of their geographical location or timezone. Join thousands of pilots in this ultimate space sandbox, where every strategic decision, hard-won victory, and claimed system contributes to New Eden's rich, evolving history.

### Unmatched Scale of Conflict

EVE Online holds a Guinness World Record for the largest multiplayer video game PvP battle, a monumental clash involving 8,825 players. Immerse yourself in massive spaceship engagements from the outset, or dedicate your efforts to honing skills that will enable you to lead these epic fleets.

### Player-Driven Economy

The game's unified, single-shard architecture fosters an economy of immense scope, featuring a singular market accessible across thousands of space stations. Engage in local trade, manufacture new ships and equipment, or make astute investments informed by the intricate player-driven political landscape.

### Endless Customization

Specialize in exploration, combat, wealth accumulation, or a balanced approach to all facets of the game. Pilot over 350 distinct ship hulls, each offering thousands of unique module configurations. Transform your vessel into a swift aggressor or a heavily fortified defender. For the daring, alien technology sourced from Abyssal Deadspace provides even greater opportunities for gear enhancement.

### A Universe That Evolves

With over 17 years of continuous development and regular free expansions, EVE Online consistently maintains its status as a premier space MMO. Delve into a dynamic universe shaped by the collective history and persistent activity of millions of players.

Embark on an unforgettable hunt in Monster Hunter: World, a vibrant ecosystem where you track and defeat formidable monsters. Utilize the environment and its diverse inhabitants for strategic advantage, either solo or with up to three other players. Gather resources from vanquished foes to craft superior gear, preparing for even more challenging encounters.

The thrill of the hunt involves confronting gigantic monsters across breathtaking locales. Successfully felling these creatures yields valuable materials for forging potent weapons and resilient armor. This progression system allows you to tackle increasingly dangerous prey, offering an ultimate hunting experience. The New World is a dynamic environment, teeming with diverse wildlife and unique flora, promising constant discovery and strategic engagement.

Your hunter's arsenal includes fourteen distinct weapon categories, each with unique characteristics. Many hunters master multiple types, while others focus on a single style. Indispensable Scoutflies guide you to monster tracks by memorizing their scent, providing increasingly detailed information as you collect more evidence. The versatile Slinger allows you to use environmental items like stones and nuts for diversions or opening new pathways, enabling innovative strategies. Specialized tools grant powerful, temporary effects, easily accessible during a hunt for a critical advantage. Your loyal Palico companion offers specialized support in offense, defense, and recovery, integral to your success.

Once a decade, ancient elder dragons migrate across the sea to the New World in an event known as the Elder Crossing. To unravel its mysteries, the Guild established the Research Commission, dispatching fleets to investigate. As the Commission's Fifth Fleet pursues the colossal elder dragon Zorah Magdaros, one hunter's journey is about to transcend expectations.

Path of Exile is a free-to-play action RPG set in the grim world of Wraeclast. Players assume the role of an Exile seeking vengeance. The game is lauded for its combat, loot, and deep character customization, as noted in player feedback. Grinding Gear Games emphasizes its ethical free-to-play model, avoiding pay-to-win mechanics.

Your journey begins by choosing one of seven classes: Duelist, Witch, Ranger, Templar, Marauder, Shadow, or Scion. Each offers a distinct start in Wraeclast's varied environments. Character progression relies on tradable, itemized gems. Skill Gems grant active abilities, while Support Gems enhance them. Trigger Gems can automate spellcasting, creating dynamic combat. This system allows for unique builds, balancing power, defense, and offense.

Challenging missions from the Forsaken Masters appear in various locations, including end-game Maps, keeping gameplay fresh. Items are crucial, with players collecting and trading magic, rare, and unique gear that forms the basis of powerful builds. Beyond PvE, players can engage in PvP tournaments, seasonal events, and Capture the Flag. These events often occur in separate worlds with unique ladders and economies, offering prizes. Building trust with Masters unlocks a personalizable Hideout, where they offer daily missions and crafting training. Developers consistently state that player skill and strategy, not spending, drive success.

STAR WARS™: The Old Republic™ (SWTOR) provides a unique massively multiplayer online experience where you can craft your own STAR WARS™ saga. This story-driven game, available with a Free-to-Play option, lets you assume iconic roles such as a Jedi, Sith, or Bounty Hunter. Your adventure unfolds in a galaxy set over three millennia before the classic films, giving you the power to shape your own destiny.

SWTOR is celebrated for its deep, interactive narratives. Developers have stated that the game's six major story expansions ensure player choices significantly impact their alignment with the Light or Dark side of the Force™. The game features cinematic dialogue and full voiceovers for all characters, fostering a truly personal saga. For over a decade, SWTOR has consistently received new content, with recent additions like the Onslaught expansion and ongoing updates keeping the universe dynamic and expanding.

The game offers eight distinct storylines, each presenting a unique STAR WARS™ adventure. The Legacy of the Sith expansion introduced Combat Styles, allowing players to separate their Class Story from their combat approach for extensive customization. Developers have noted that players can now select any Advanced Class within either the Tech or Force playstyle. This enables creative character builds, such as a Trooper using a Sniper Rifle or a Sith Inquisitor wielding dual lightsabers.

Explore over 20 diverse planets, including Hoth, Tatooine, and Alderaan, each offering rich exploration and engaging quests. Players can team up with allies for challenging Flashpoints and Operations against formidable bosses. Alternatively, engage in Player vs. Player combat across Warzones, Arenas, or Galactic Starfighter missions.

Take a break from combat with the player housing system, Galactic Strongholds, where you can personalize your space on planets like Tatooine, Nar Shaddaa, or Alderaan. Premium items and desirable goods are available through the Cartel Market, using an in-game currency called Cartel Coins.

Subscribing to SWTOR offers enhanced benefits, including an increased level cap of 80, access to recent expansions such as Legacy of the Sith, Onslaught, Knights of the Eternal Throne, and Knights of the Fallen Empire, a monthly Cartel Coin grant, and boosted XP gains.

RIFT is a free-to-play massively multiplayer online role-playing game (MMORPG) set in the dynamic fantasy world of Telara. Players assume the role of an Ascended, a hero tasked with defending their homeland from invaders from the elemental Planes. Telara is a realm where conflict is constant, requiring vigilance and a pursuit of glory.

The game offers a deep character creation system and a vast, ever-evolving world. RIFT is continuously updated with new content and enhancements, ensuring a fresh experience. According to the developers, RIFT is entirely free to play, with no hidden costs.

Players can customize their characters by choosing from two distinct factions, each with three unique races. Beyond race and faction, players can select from dozens of specialized Souls, each offering hundreds of traits and abilities. This intricate system allows for on-the-fly customization and the freedom to re-specialize a character's build at any time.

RIFT also appeals to players who value both performance and aesthetics. If a player admires the look of a particular armor piece but its stats are not ideal for their current build, they can use it as a cosmetic overlay. This feature allows players to permanently save acquired armor or costume pieces and apply them across all their characters, enabling them to showcase their unique fashion sense.

Telara is a world where chaos can manifest unexpectedly. Players can engage in epic battles against planar invasions or confront ancient titans alongside other Ascended. The game features a variety of adventures, including Instant, Intrepid, and Celestial quests, set in breathtaking locations. These dynamic adventures allow players to confront the latest threats menacing the land.

Players can also venture into Telara's depths to confront malevolent creatures and uncover ancient treasures. As noted in game guides, RIFT offers challenging expeditions through various dungeons and raids designed for different group sizes:

*   **Group Content:**
    *   2-player dungeons
    *   5-player dungeons
    *   10-player raids
    *   20-player raids

## Forge Your Legend in Destiny 2: A Free-to-Play Shooter Adventure

Destiny 2 beckons you to forge your legend in a vast, free-to-play first-person shooter experience that spans the entire solar system. As a Guardian, you represent humanity's final bastion of hope, tasked with unraveling profound cosmic mysteries, mastering potent elemental abilities, and meticulously customizing your character with unique gear to truly define your individual playstyle. The game presents a captivating cinematic narrative, demanding cooperative missions that require teamwork, and a diverse array of player-versus-player (PvP) modes, all of which can be enjoyed either solo or with your trusted friends.

### Become a Guardian and Choose Your Class

You embody a Guardian, a warrior sworn to defend humanity against a host of formidable villains threatening existence. Destiny 2 thoughtfully features three distinct character classes, each possessing unique strengths and combat philosophies. **Titans** are characterized by their discipline and unwavering resolve, excelling in both offensive assaults and defensive stands, wielding devastating hammers, crackling lightning, and impenetrable shields. **Warlocks** are revered as masters of arcane secrets, capable of unleashing truly devastating cosmic power to obliterate their foes with awe-inspiring force. **Hunters**, on the other hand, are renowned for their agility and pinpoint precision, celebrated for their incredible speed, devastating golden gun attacks, or their ability to execute stealthy shadow strikes with lethal efficiency.

### Engage in Multiplayer Mayhem and Hunt for Exotic Gear

Destiny 2 provides an exceptionally rich and engaging multiplayer experience, encompassing everything from thrilling cooperative PvE adventures like challenging Strikes and epic Raids, to exhilarating competitive PvP modes and highly anticipated limited-time events such as the Iron Banner. Beyond the intense combat encounters, a fundamental and deeply rewarding element of the game is the relentless hunt for powerful exotic gear. Discover an expansive arsenal of unique weapons and specialized armor, offering millions of potential combinations. This allows you to meticulously craft your perfect loadout, enabling you to express your individual style and dominate the battlefield. Your legend truly awaits among the distant stars.

## Embark on an Epic Journey in FINAL FANTASY XIV Online

Dive into a **vast and dynamic FINAL FANTASY world** where you can forge adventures alongside friends from across the globe. This comprehensive package grants you access to **FINAL FANTASY® XIV: A Realm Reborn** and its critically acclaimed first expansion, **FINAL FANTASY® XIV: HEAVENSWARD**.

### Your Gateway to Eorzea: The Starter Edition

For those new to the realm of Eorzea, the **Starter Edition** is your perfect entry point. It includes two award-winning titles:

*   **FINAL FANTASY XIV: A Realm Reborn:** The foundational experience that sets the stage for your grand adventure.
*   **FINAL FANTASY XIV: Heavensward:** The first major expansion, taking you to new heights and introducing a wealth of content.

Join a community of **over 25 million adventurers worldwide** and prepare for a journey that will transport you to the heavens and beyond!

### Welcome Bonus: A Complimentary Subscription Period

As a special welcome, all newly created service accounts will receive a **30-day free subscription period***. This allows you to immerse yourself fully in the world of Eorzea without immediate commitment.

*   *Please note that the 30-day free play period is a one-time offer per platform on a single service account and is not applicable to platforms where a license has already been registered.*

### Important Information for New Adventurers

**User registration and a service subscription are required to play the game.**

#### Steam Users: A Streamlined Registration Process

For players purchasing FINAL FANTASY XIV Online packages on Steam, please be aware of the following:

*   **Platform Restriction:** Game packages on Steam can only be registered and added to a Square Enix account that has the base game, "FINAL FANTASY XIV Online Starter Edition" (or formerly "FINAL FANTASY XIV: A Realm Reborn"), purchased on Steam.
*   **Accessing Your Registration Codes:** After your purchase, you can easily locate your 20-digit registration codes. Simply right-click on "FINAL FANTASY XIV" within your Steam "Library" and select "View CD key." These codes will remain accessible in this location for future reference.
*   **Redeeming Your Codes:** Your registration codes can be redeemed immediately on the Mog Station. If this is your first time installing and registering FINAL FANTASY XIV Online, you will have the opportunity to redeem your codes during the initial installation process.

### Pricing Adjustments

Please be advised that subscription and optional item prices for Brazil and Russia were adjusted on November 15th, 2017. For detailed information, please visit the following links: [Brazilian Prices](link_to_brazilian_prices) / [Russian Prices](link_to_russian_prices).

**LOGO ILLUSTRATION:** © 2010, 2014, 2016, 2018, 2021 YOSHITAKA AMANO

Name: EverQuest II
Description:
EverQuest® II is the epitome of massively multiplayer gaming - the ultimate blend of deep features, heritage, and community. Explore an enormous online game where friends come together for adventure and community. Immerse yourself in a living, breathing fantasy world filled with exciting locales, mysterious lore, monsters, gods, and dragons. Vast, beautiful, and dangerous, EverQuest II sets the standard for MMORPG online gaming. EverQuest II is free to play. Your character. Your story. Your adventure. 110 levels of unparalleled gameplay Strong heritage and lore spanning 14 years and 15 expansions A thriving, friendly community with thousands of guilds Thousands of creatures to battle and quests to complete Hundreds of gorgeous, expansive, and dangerous environments to explore Independently leveled tradeskill system with deep quest lines Full support of different play styles from, including Solo, Group, Raid, and PVP Robust housing system with dozens of styles, thousands of items, ratings, and more *Optional content available for purchase.

Name: SMITE®
Description:
Enter the Battleground of the Gods Join 35+ million players in SMITE, the world’s most popular action multiplayer online battle arena. Become a legend of myth, enter the Battleground of the Gods, and play FREE now! Unleash each deity’s unique strategies, legendary weapons, and earth-shattering powers. Rain lightning down upon your foes as Zeus, assassinate from the shadows as Loki, or transform and trick your foes as the Monkey King, Sun Wukong. Which God will you choose? Unlike other MOBAs, SMITE puts you directly onto the battlefield with a third-person action viewpoint. From blind-side ambushes to aimed shots, a new pantheon of strategic possibilities awaits. Never played a battle arena before? Don’t worry. Auto-buy, auto-level, and the deathmatch-like Arena mode let you jump right into divine MOBA action. Aspiring pro? Top the ladders, join a competitive team, and you too could be playing at the SMITE World Championship.

Name: Tetris® Effect: Connected
Description:
Tetris® Effect: Connected is Tetris like you've never seen it, or heard it, or felt it before—an incredibly addictive, unique, and breathtakingly gorgeous reinvention of one of the most popular puzzle games of all time. In all of the 30+ gorgeous single-player stages and 10+ modes, and in both cooperative or competitive online and local multiplayer modes, everything in Tetris® Effect: Connected—music, backgrounds, sounds, special effects—everything, down to the Tetriminos themselves, pulse, dance, shimmer, and explode in perfect sync with how you're playing and the award-winning soundtrack, taking Tetris’s already fiendishly-addictive replayability to new heights. FEATURES Includes the all-new “Zone” mechanic, where players can stop time (and Tetriminos falling) by entering “the Zone” and either get out of a sticky situation that could otherwise lead to “Game Over,” or rack up extra Line Clears for bonus rewards. Tailored for Steam, capable of running at resolutions of 4K or more with an uncapped framerate (with Vsync disabled) and includes ultra-wide monitor support as well as other expanded game and graphical options not found in the console release for both 2D and VR play (including adjustable particle volume and size, texture filtering, and more). 'Connected' co-op mode, where up to three players can literally connect their Tetris playfields together and play as one. 10+ single-player Effect modes with varying twists on the classic Tetris formula, designed to evoke different moods the player might be in (or want to be in -- i.e. chill out with “Relax,” concentrate with “Focus,” enjoy the familiarity/nostalgia of “Classic” modes or try something unique with “Adventurous.”), as well as appeal to varying skill levels. Nostalgic stages based on old-school Tetris games, as well as Classic Score Attack multiplayer mode with the rules and appearance of 8-bit Tetris. Fully featured multiplayer, including cross-platform play with all other platforms, matchmaking for Ranked play, robust options for Friend matches, player progression for unlockable avatars, and more!

Name: Pinball FX3
Description:
Williams™ Pinball classics are now available -- and Fish Tales™ is yours for FREE! Zen is proud to bring these amazing games to players around the world. Enjoy! Pinball FX3 is the biggest, most community focused pinball game ever created. Multiplayer matchups, user generated tournaments and league play create endless opportunity for pinball competition. FREE backwards compatibility! Bring your previous Pinball FX2 purchases with you to Pinball FX3 at no charge! Not so hot with the flippers? Pinball FX3 features new single player modes that will help you become a better player! All tables have received graphics updates including real-time lighting and shadow projection. Zen Studios will continue to support Pinball FX3 with frequent content releases and new features!

Name: Super Hexagon
Description:
Super Hexagon is a minimal action game by Terry Cavanagh, with music by Chipzel. Important facts about Hexagons: Hexagons are third order permutohedrons: The vertices of a hexagon can be formed by permuting the coordinates of the vector (1, 2, 3). The north pole of the planet Saturn has a hexagonal storm cloud pattern with 8,600 mile long sides, larger than the diameter of Earth. Though hexagon may appear to be a difficult word to rhyme, there are actually dozens of words that rhyme with it. For example: Autobahn, decagon, decathlon, electron, Kyrgzstan, Lebanon, leprechaun and marathon.

Name: Counter-Strike
Description:
Play the world's number 1 online action game. Engage in an incredibly realistic brand of terrorist warfare in this wildly popular team-based game. Ally with teammates to complete strategic missions. Take out enemy sites. Rescue hostages. Your role affects your team's success. Your team's success affects your role.

Name: AudioSurf
Description:
Ride your music. Audiosurf is a music-adapting puzzle racer where you use your own music to create your own experience. The shape, the speed, and the mood of each ride is determined by the song you choose. You earn points for clustering together blocks of the same color on the highway, and compete with others on the internet for the high score on your favorite songs. Audiosurf on Steam includes The Orange Box soundtrack, integrated with the game to enable 'Still Alive' surfing and more. In addition, Audiosurf is one of the first titles to leverage Steamworks, offering full support for the Steam Achievements that appear on Steam Community profile pages. Play with any music from your own collection--the game supports MP3s, iTunes M4As, WMAs, CDs and OGGs Valve's The Orange Box Original Soundtrack is included. Online scoreboards for each song you play. Choose your strategy from 14 available characters. Track your progress as Steam Achievements.

Name: Octahedron: Transfixed Edition
Description:
Surf through a pulsating, underground world on platforms pulled from thin air in this challenging psychedelic action platformer that has you defying gravity to a pumping beat. KEY FEATURES: Platforms From Thin Air Spawn platforms at your feet with the press of a button & surf on them until their energy depletes Reach For The Sky Scale colourful summits to a pulse-pounding beat, reach the top & escape the subterranean world of Veetragoul Neon Powered Upgrades Fry enemies with laser beams, crumble walls, and solve puzzles as you strive to upgrade your platform Hand-crafted Delight Collect shards of the Octahedron across 50 hand-crafted levels, unlock new worlds & bonus levels, and earn special medals On A Dime Master tight controls to pull off amazing feats of pixel-perfect platforming, as obstacles & enemies move along with the beat Thumping Tunes Get into the flow of a pumping, atmospheric soundtrack by Chipzel (Super Hexagon), and house & trance producers Andre Sobota and Monomirror

## Russian Subway Dogs: A Guide to Canine Survival in Moscow's Metro

Embark on a unique arcade-simulation adventure with **Russian Subway Dogs**, a game that places you in the paws of a stray dog navigating the vibrant and often perilous Moscow subway system. Inspired by the resilience of real-life subway canines, this title delivers a challenging and engaging experience, according to the game's developers.

### Core Gameplay and Survival Tactics

Surviving the bustling metro requires sharp instincts and quick reflexes. Players must scavenge for food from unsuspecting commuters while skillfully avoiding a variety of hazards. These include volatile spilled vodka that can have unpredictable effects, rival dogs competing for scarce resources, and even the rare, dangerous subway bear, as noted in gameplay descriptions. The fundamental gameplay loop involves running and jumping across platforms, barking to startle commuters into dropping food, and manipulating vodka bottles. Advanced tactics, such as strategically using vodka explosions or preparing and consuming rival wildlife, are key to mastering the game.

### Game Modes and Strategic Depth

Russian Subway Dogs offers two distinct modes to test your survival prowess. Campaign Mode features dozens of levels and over 100 unique challenges, with increasingly peculiar objectives assigned by the formidable Proletaricat and its litter of kittens. These missions can range from completing a level with a strictly vegetarian diet to protecting a bear or preventing pigeons from engaging in cannibalism, ultimately leading to a secret station. For a competitive edge, Endless Mode allows players to climb online leaderboards by achieving the highest scores, featuring random mini-challenges and a dynamic difficulty algorithm.

The game is rich with simulated systems, offering players significant freedom in how they earn points and interact with the environment. Strategic choices abound: will you risk consuming toxic chocolate for a score boost, or use it to sabotage a rival dog? Will you drink hot sauce for powerful fire barks, or feed it to a pigeon for aerial support? Your understanding of these systems and your tactical decisions are crucial for filling your stomach and causing maximum mayhem.

Beyond the core canine protagonists, Russian Subway Dogs features a roster of unlockable characters, including special guest appearances from beloved indie games and comics. The game showcases detailed pixel art that beautifully captures the ornate architecture of Moscow's renowned subway stations. The original soundtrack, composed by Peter Chapman, masterfully blends Slavic and Baltic influences with electronic dance music, creating a truly immersive audio landscape. Whether you're a devoted dog lover or a feline enthusiast, Russian Subway Dogs offers a simple yet deeply engaging and challenging experience for everyone.

Name: BIT.TRIP Presents... Runner2: Future Legend of Rhythm Alien
Description:
Runner2 is the sequel to the critically acclaimed and IGF award winning BIT.TRIP RUNNER. In the style of the BIT.TRIP series, Runner2 is a rhythm-music platforming game. Players will run through fantastic environments, using brand new moves, to brand new soundtracks as they run, jump, slide, kick, and soar toward the goal of tracking down the Timbletot and thwarting his evil plans to destroy not only our world, but every world there is. Runner2 features 5 exciting worlds, 120 tantalizing levels and 5 death defying BOSS battles! Play as 8 different characters - find secret areas to unlock new and zany costumes!

**Orcs Must Die!: A Deep Dive into Strategic Fantasy Combat**

Prepare for an exhilarating fantasy action-strategy experience where the only good orc is a dead orc! In *Orcs Must Die!*, players step into the formidable boots of a powerful War Mage, a lone defender tasked with protecting twenty-four unique fortresses against relentless waves of monstrous foes. These enemies are not to be underestimated; the game throws a diverse array of terrifying creatures at you, including hulking ogres, screeching hellbats, and a vast, grotesque horde of orcs. The developers designed these enemies to present a significant challenge, requiring careful planning and execution.

The game boasts a compelling story-driven campaign that truly tests your strategic prowess. It offers multiple difficulty levels, ensuring that both newcomers and seasoned players can find their ideal challenge, including the notoriously brutal "Nightmare Mode." Your approach to dispatching these invaders is entirely yours to devise. Will you strategically roast them in fiery pits of lava, crush them with cleverly placed ceiling traps, or freeze them solid before shattering them into icy shards? The choice of weaponry and traps is vast, and the satisfaction of an orc-slaying victory is immense, according to player feedback.

*Orcs Must Die!* offers extensive replayability and strategic depth, a fact highlighted by the developers. Players can master six distinct orc-slaying weapons and spells, and deploy nineteen deadly traps and fierce minions. These include a variety of defensive measures such as arrow walls, spike traps, and flaming brimstone, each with unique tactical applications. The game further enhances its longevity with persistent upgrades for traps, a rewarding skull ranking system that encourages mastery, and a leaderboard for global competition. The developers have stated that the game is meticulously designed to remain engaging and challenging long after the initial playthrough, fostering a deep sense of accomplishment for those who dedicate themselves to its intricate systems.

Dr. Fetus' Mean Meat Machine is a hardcore puzzle-platformer that masterfully blends the signature gameplay of the classic Super Meat Boy series with a novel, Puyo Puyo-inspired format. Players are tasked with navigating over 100 meticulously designed puzzle-levels, each brimming with inventive traps and hazards. These challenges unfold across familiar worlds drawn from both Super Meat Boy and Super Meat Boy Forever, culminating in demanding boss fights designed to rigorously test players' platforming prowess.

The game's narrative seamlessly continues from the events of Super Meat Boy Forever. Dr. Fetus, having meticulously studied Meat Boy, embarks on a mission to engineer the ultimate clone. However, a critical flaw in the DNA sample results in imperfect replicas. This setback compels Dr. Fetus to construct a series of ruthless test chambers, specifically engineered to refine these nascent clones. As the document suggests, these chambers gradually sculpt the imperfect clones into the desired grotesque yet endearing form, hinting at Dr. Fetus' more sinister intentions for his perfected specimens.

Dr. Fetus' Mean Meat Machine promises a rich sensory experience, featuring:

*   **Visuals:** Dazzling backgrounds and animations, brought to life by the original artistic talent behind Super Meat Boy and Super Meat Boy Forever.
*   **Soundtrack:** An immersive soundtrack composed by RIDICULON, which includes both remixes of beloved Super Meat Boy Forever tracks and entirely new compositions.

Key features that define the experience include:

*   More than 100 expertly hand-crafted levels, each presenting unique and perilous traps.
*   Outrageous boss fights that feature escalating mechanics, demanding adaptation and skill.
*   A distinctive fusion of puzzle-solving and action-packed gameplay.
*   The central objective of assisting Dr. Fetus in his quest to create the perfect Super Meat Boy clone.
*   The opportunity to revisit and explore iconic worlds from Super Meat Boy and Super Meat Boy Forever.
*   An original soundtrack provided by the acclaimed RIDICULON.
*   Development undertaken in close cooperation with Team Meat and the original Super Meat Boy artists, ensuring authenticity.
*   A total of 30 Achievements to unlock, offering further challenges and rewards.

In Two Point Hospital, players are tasked with the exciting challenge of designing and constructing their very own healthcare facilities. You'll transform a humble plot of land into a thriving medical empire, meticulously crafting the most beautiful, or perhaps the most functional, hospital in all of Two Point County.

The core gameplay revolves around optimizing your hospital's layout to maximize both patient and cash flow. Strategic placement of corridors, rooms, and waiting areas is crucial. As your success grows, you'll have the opportunity to expand your operations across multiple buildings, aiming to accommodate as many patients as possible. Enhancing your hospital's prestige, reducing patient boredom, boosting happiness, and securing those coveted end-of-year awards can be achieved by strategically placing decorative and functional items.

Two Point Hospital distinguishes itself by featuring a roster of highly unusual illnesses, far removed from everyday ailments. Patients might suffer from conditions like "Light-headedness" or "Cubism," each demanding specialized treatment machines. Successfully diagnosing these peculiar afflictions, constructing the appropriate rooms, and hiring the right staff are just the initial steps. The game challenges players to not only manage individual cases but also to prepare for potential pandemics. Once a cure is established, players can research advancements to improve treatments and machines, ultimately aiming to transform their hospital into an formidable healthcare powerhouse.

The journey begins with your first hospital, but the ambition doesn't stop there. After successfully treating the residents of a small harbor village, players are encouraged to tackle more demanding challenges in busier environments. This involves improving facilities, upgrading machinery, enhancing staff capabilities, and refining layouts to accelerate profit generation. Training and developing your staff, equipping them with new skills and abilities, is key to boosting hospital efficiency.

Extensive statistic and information screens provide valuable insights into your hospital's strengths and weaknesses, enabling rapid adjustments. Players can fine-tune treatment prices, monitor turnover, secure loans, and optimize earnings. Managing a diverse workforce, comprised of staff with unique personalities and traits, requires careful attention to identify efficient workers and address those who might be less productive. Balancing your workforce with your strategic ambitions is essential as you strive for profitability, with the added hope of saving lives along the way.

Name: Project Hospital
Description:
Become an ace doctor, an aspiring architect and a successful manager at the same time. Design your very own hospital, tweak every detail or choose one of the prebuilt scenarios and just jump to the doctor’s duty. Contract different insurance companies to gain access to patients with interesting medical conditions, perform examinations, laboratory tests and use various equipment to solve the diagnostic puzzles. Hospitalize your patients, perform surgery and more! Use a collection of various objects, materials and colors to make it truly yours or save your time and use one of many different prefabs. From hiring to specializations, from doctors to janitors, make sure everybody is doing a great job and finds satisfaction in their work. Help your doctors and walk them through the most complicated cases or just follow your favorite patients. There are a few different modes in Project Hospital: Tutorial levels will guide your through the basics of treating patients and running hospitals. Sandbox mode offers endless hours of content, building anything from small clinics to huge multi-storey hospitals, starting from scratch or in one of pre-built hospitals or clinics in case you want to jump straight into management. Run you own ambulance service and help handle events and emergencies. The campaign will put you in the shoes of a crisis manager trying to save a few hospitals in critical state. 6 challenge levels will test your skills and let you focus on the intricate details of individual specialized departments. Translations Project Hospital also has Thai translation available via a special version of the game, go to Properties -> BETAS -> choose thai-language-support

**112 Operator: Manage Global Emergencies**

Step into the role of an emergency services dispatcher in 112 Operator, a game that places you at the heart of global crisis management. Your mission is to dispatch units, answer urgent calls, and navigate a wide array of critical situations. From severe weather and traffic congestion to escalating threats like riots, organized crime, and terrorist attacks, you'll be responsible for helping cities survive and thrive.

This sequel to the acclaimed 911 Operator offers unprecedented control and scale. You can manage a single neighborhood or coordinate multiple operators across vast metropolises. A full 3D visualization provides an in-depth view of your units' actions, allowing for strategic decision-making. The game features over 100,000 real-world areas, encompassing districts, municipalities, and tens of thousands of cities, offering a truly global experience.

Dynamic environments and incidents are central to the gameplay. Realistic weather patterns, influenced by historical data, will challenge your response. The impact of day/night cycles and changing seasons on incidents adds another layer of complexity. You'll also contend with fluctuating traffic levels and prepare for extreme conditions, including large wildfires and natural disasters. Urban threats such as terrorist attacks and gang wars will test your tactical abilities.

Critical calls come from individuals in diverse and urgent situations. You might record a murder confession, guide someone through CPR, or deal with a prank caller. The Career Mode allows you to select a European city and progress through the operator ranks, following supervisor commands and witnessing the direct impact of your decisions. Mistakes can lead to severe consequences, from reprimands to life-altering outcomes. For those seeking different challenges, Special Scenarios and Free Game modes offer unique gameplay experiences and the freedom to create your own rules.

112 Operator introduces advanced command features and new gameplay mechanics. Command specialized teams with advanced equipment and vehicles, deciding whether to deploy SWAT, a Search and Rescue helicopter, or riot gear. The tactical view offers a comprehensive overview of on-site actions. New features include 25x larger, expandable maps of real cities with 3D buildings, an entirely new set of emergency calls and large-scale events, and a redesigned campaign mode with objectives, emails, and a story. Day/night cycles, weather, seasons, and traffic now influence duty and incidents. A new fire mechanic can consume entire areas, requiring numerous units. Region-specific gameplay reflects country legislation and district characteristics, such as slums, business, residential, industrial, and forest areas. On-site situation visualization allows for precise and intuitive action display. You can also recruit new team members like doctors, sergeants, dogs, and robots, and assign additional dispatchers to districts for assistance. Equipment has been redesigned and is now organized into complete gear sets.

Welcome to the world of Big Pharma, a compelling business simulation and logistics puzzle where you wield the immense power to combat disease, enhance the lives of millions, alleviate suffering, and cure the sick – all while pursuing significant profit. As the leader of your own Pharmaceutical Conglomerate, this extraordinary influence rests in your hands. The critical question arises: will you prioritize altruism, or will a more pragmatic business strategy prevail?

The often uncomfortable reality, as noted by industry observers, is that the profitability of certain remedies can significantly outweigh others, and indeed, illness can be a driver of business growth. Big Pharma immerses you in this complex environment. Beginning with modest resources, perhaps a few reconditioned machines, you can ascend from producing affordable generic treatments for common ailments to pioneering the discovery of novel active ingredients and developing advanced machinery. These innovations are crucial for refining the next generation of groundbreaking pharmaceuticals.

However, you are not operating in a vacuum. Fierce rival corporations are actively developing their own competing cures and treatments, aiming to disrupt your market position. Furthermore, the marketplace is in a constant state of flux. A highly successful cold and flu medicine from the previous winter might see diminished sales during the peak of summer, highlighting the need for adaptability.

Big Pharma masterfully blends business simulation with intricate logistics challenges. The process of transforming scientific breakthroughs into tangible financial success demands a keen engineering and business acumen. Acquiring and optimizing factory space is a significant consideration, as advanced equipment like agglomerators and centrifuges require careful integration. According to game developers, the game features 35 distinct business-busting challenges, meticulously crafted across 7 unique scenarios. For those seeking ultimate control, a custom game mode and a freebuild mode are available, alongside robust modding support, allowing for extensive customization and replayability.

Name: Surgeon Simulator
Description:
Malpractice Makes Perfect. Didn’t fancy seven years at medical school? Skip straight to the operating table with Surgeon Simulator; an over-the-top operation sim, stitching together dastardly dark humour with all the seriousness of life-saving surgery. Taking on the role of Nigel Burke, a would-be surgeon with a penchant for non-conventional tools, perform critical procedures on patients including The Heavy from TF2, an alien with a truly one-of-a-kind anatomical structure, and the 45th President of the United States of America - yes, Mr Donald J Trump, himself! Known for its diabolically difficult controls (with each finger separately controlled by a different keyboard button), carry out terrifying transplants in theatre, high-pressure procedures along the corridor, and on-the-move operations in the back of a high-speed ambulance. Steady hands? Yeah, that ain’t gonna help! Updated for 2017, Surgeon Simulator now includes the A&E expansion pack. We’re talking slicker (and often stickier!) graphics, additional procedures, all-new environments, and a (heart) pumping soundtrack. But then again, we had you at Trump… right?

## Weedcraft Inc: Cultivate Your Cannabis Empire

Weedcraft Inc invites players to immerse themselves in the complex world of cultivating, breeding, and distributing marijuana across America. This engaging simulation game offers a deep dive into the financial, political, and cultural landscapes surrounding cannabis, providing a detailed perspective on its societal influence. Achieving success requires careful resource management, strategic cultivation techniques, and adept navigation of a multifaceted environment. According to industry analysis, the game aims to mirror the real-world challenges faced by cannabis businesses.

The game presents players with a variety of paths to master the reefer trade, each featuring unique scenarios and distinct characters. Players can pursue different strategies for growth and profitability, including:

*   **Political Influence:** Players can shape policy by engaging with elected officials.
*   **Law Enforcement Navigation:** Managing interactions with law enforcement, which may involve discreet arrangements.
*   **Advocacy Efforts:** Championing the cause of medical marijuana rights.
*   **Legal Strategy:** Employing the legal system to benefit their enterprise.

These strategic actions directly contribute to business expansion and enhanced corporate profits, empowering players to influence legislation, impact societal views, and shift public perception regarding cannabis.

Weedcraft Inc delivers a rich gameplay experience through several key features. As noted by gaming publications, the game offers a robust simulation. Players can enjoy a **Customizable Sandbox Mode** and **Extensive Scenarios** for personalized gameplay. **Advanced Grow Room Control** and **Strain Development** tools allow for optimizing crop yields and creating novel cannabis strains. The game emphasizes **Meaningful Choices** and **Moral Ambiguity**, ensuring that player decisions carry significant weight, whether they opt to operate within legal boundaries, defy them, or find a middle ground. Furthermore, **Disruptive Tactics** and **Strategic Alliances** enable players to manage their workforce, undermine competitors, and forge alliances with rival operations. Press reviews have lauded the game's realistic depiction of the industry. Endgadget described it as "a complicated, frayed mess of legislation, bribery, selfishness, greed, blackmail and just a touch of true human compassion." Destructoid highlighted the developers' goal of achieving "a more authentic tone, one that is uniquely American," while Gamereactor pointed out the "complex set of challenges that reflect the real-world tribulations of the topic." TweakTown summarized the experience, stating, "From Main Street to Wall Street Weedcraft Inc Helps You Build Your Pot Empire This April."

Name: Hospital Tycoon
Description:
Develop your own hospital drama and manipulate the results to your best advantage! In charge of a rapidly expanding hospital, your job is to cure the patients with your army of doctors and nurses while successfully managing the facilities and taking care of everyone's needs. Run the hospital and you influence the outcome in this funny, highly accessible and involving game featuring character relationships, staff management, hilarious diseases and cures and more. Featuring gameplay that's as personable as you want it, Hospital Tycoon has engaging locations, missions and characters galore! Hospital Tycoon is easy to start, impossible to put down. It's time to start operating!

Name: Hidden Farm Top-Down 3D
Description:
Find the objects that are hidden on the map. The game is a Hidden Object Game. In which you need to find objects with a certain design in beautiful locations, and click on them with the mouse. The game is a 3D level game in which objects and characters are frozen in the picture, you have to find 20 different objects. The system automatically determines which object you need to find at the moment, so the game has a high replay value, you will need to search for different objects each time.

Name: Saving You From Yourself
Description:
A game about gatekeeping. Play as a transgender therapist in this visual novel. Ask your patient questions about her gender identity and see how she responds. Determine if she should receive a letter of support for hormones or if she needs to attend more appointments with you. Between the appointments peek into your patient's life and see how your decisions impact her. This game contains the use of unprescribed hormones, the unlicensed practice of medicine, and gatekeeping. This content is potentially upsetting. Please take care of yourself and do not play if you need uplifting transgender content. Multiple Endings to play through 5 minutes to complete all routes 40 Panels of artwork in the game Each page of the game uses has unique artwork

Name: Pre-Shave
Description:
Pre-Shave is a narrative shaving simulator game. You play as Saam preparing to get ready for a trip. Explore the anxieties of his nervous mind, thwart your excessive body hair with the use of your powerful shaving gear, and don't forget to brush your teeth! Features Wacky physics with unique controls 'Realistic' shaving mechanics Multiple gadgets to groom and clean with Lots of body and facial hair for you to sculpt / personalize Achievements to unlock your true hairy potential NOTE: This is a very short game. If you get stuck try holding the phone up to your face. Originally created for #WineJam 2019

Name: Galactic Civilizations® II: Ultimate Edition
Description:
Get the complete Galactic Civilizations II saga including the acclaimed PC strategy game of the year Galactic Civilizations II: Dread Lords, the award winning expansion pack Dark Avatar, and the newest expansion pack Twilight of the Arnor! Galactic Civilizations II: Dread Lords: Galactic Civilizations II is the sequel to 2003's hit turn-based strategy game of the same name. The player takes on the role of the leader of a space-faring civilization and must guide its expansion in a hostile galaxy. Gamers must balance their economic, technological, diplomatic, cultural, and military power to forge alliances, fight wars, and ultimately dominate the galaxy. The game is single-player and allows the player to play randomly generated galactic maps or play through a multi-mission campaign that tells the story of an ancient enemy called the Dread Lords. Galactic Civilizations II: Dark Avatar: The expansion pack for Stardock's award-winning hit strategy game, Galactic Civilizations II: Dread Lords. This expansion pack not only adds the usual content that expansion packs tend to do such as new opponents, new units and a new campaign. It also greatly expands the game play of Galactic Civilizations II. New features include asteroid belts on the map that can be mined for resources, unique planets that require special technologies to colonize, spies to conduct sabotage and destabilization (or used to protect your worlds from the same), new types of diplomatic treaties, an enhanced artificial intelligence engine, and much more! Galactic Civilizations II: Twilight of the Arnor: The year is 2227 and the fire of war is consuming the galaxy thanks to the manipulations of the evil Dread Lords. But the remaining factions, led by the humans, have a plan to rid the galaxy of the Dread Lords once and for all. Expand the Galactic Civilizations II universe with Terror Stars, unique technology trees per civilization, Map editors, Custom Scenario makers, campaign editors, new types of ships, new planetary improvements, and much more! Key features: Beautiful 3D engine brings planets, stars, asteroids and ship battles to life. Create custom 3D ships piece-by-piece with your Shipyard. Play as any of a dozen unique civilizations or create your own. Multiple paths to victory: Military conquest, cultural domination, political alliance, technological supremacy or ascension. Addictive gameplay: Dynamic galaxies ranging from tiny to gigantic. Superior multi-threaded artificial intelligence enables computer players to provide a challenge without having to cheat. Put your scores online via the Metaverse and compete with players from around the world. Fully moddable design enables players to create unique opponents, graphics and scenarios. Advanced diplomacy enables players to trade, make treaties, alliances and more.

Sid Meier's Civilization V is a highly acclaimed turn-based strategy game that places players in the role of a world leader. The game commences at the dawn of humanity, guiding your civilization through strategic gameplay all the way to the space age. This extensive journey requires a comprehensive strategy, encompassing warfare, intricate diplomacy, the discovery of new technologies, and direct competition with historical figures. The ultimate goal is to forge the most powerful and enduring empire in history.

The game offers an accessible presentation, welcoming newcomers while providing significant depth for seasoned strategists.
